Leviticus1:1 Med'inaa Godaanna Gakkettiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddoppe Med'inaa Goday Musa s'eesiide
Leviticus1:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Hintteppe ooninne Med'inaa Godaw yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaa wode
Leviticus1:3 He yarshshuu mehiyaa wudiyaappe s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa gidooppe
Leviticus1:4 Yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaa bitanii s'uugiide yarshshanaw aheedda bare mehiyaa huup'iyaan bare kushiyaa wotso. Hewe Aa nagaraa atto gaanaw S'oossay akkeedda yarshshuwaa gidanawaa.
Leviticus1:5 I korumaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan shukkina; Aaroona naanay k'eesatuu he suutsaa ahiide
Leviticus1:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus1:7 K'eesiyaa Aaroona naanay yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan tamaa eetsiide
Leviticus1:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus1:9 Shin he bitanii k'antsaa ashuwaanne gedetuwaa haatsaan meec'c'o. Yaatiide k'eesii hewaa ubbaakka ahiide
Leviticus1:10 « ‹S'uuggiyaa yarshshoo I immiyaa imuu dorssaa wudiyaappe woy deeshshaa wudiyaappe akettiyaawaa gidooppe
Leviticus1:11 He mehiyaa yarshshiyaa sa'aappe huup'issa baggana Med'inaa Godaa sintsan shukko. Aaroona naanay k'eesatuu Aa suutsaa akkiide
Leviticus1:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus1:13 Shin k'antsaa ashuwaanne gedetuwaa haatsaan meec'c'o; yaatiide k'eesii hewaa ubbaa ahiide yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan s'uuggo; hewe Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa
Leviticus1:14 « ‹Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa s'uuggiyaa yarshshuu kafuwaa gidooppe
Leviticus1:15 K'eesii hewaa akkiide
Leviticus1:16 ulo gidduwaa baalletuwaana kessiide
Leviticus1:17 I he kafuwaa k'efetuwaa oyk'k'iide p'alk'k'o
Leviticus2:1 « ‹Ooninne katsaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw shiishshiyaa wode
Leviticus2:2 Hewaa I Aaroona naanatuwaakko k'eesatuwaakko aho; k'eesatuu he liik'o d'iiliyaappenne zayitiyaappe itti kushiyaa kuntsi akkiide
Leviticus2:3 Katsaa yarshshuwaappe atteedawe Aaroonassanne Aa naanatuwaassa. Hewe Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uugettiyaa geeshsha yarshshuwaa ubbaappe ittuwaa gideedda geeshsha yarshshuwaa.
Leviticus2:4 « ‹Yarshshoo shiishshiyaa ukitsay c'ooc'iyaan kaeeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus2:5 « ‹Yarshshoo shiishshiyaa ukitsay bashiyaan uuketteeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus2:6 Aa mentsiide Aa bolla zayitiyaa tigo; hewaa katsaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide shiishsho.
Leviticus2:7 « ‹Ne yarshshoo shiishshiyaa katsaa yarshshuu disttiyaan kaeeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus2:8 Hawaadan giigisseedda katsaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw aha; k'eesiyaw imma. K'eesii hewaa akkiide yarshshiyaa sa'aa shiishsho.
Leviticus2:9 K'eesii he katsaa yarshshuwaappe akkiide
Leviticus2:10 Katsaa yarshshuwaappe atteedawe Aaroonessanne Aa naanatuwaassa. Hewe Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggeedda
Leviticus2:11 « ‹S'oossaw hintte ahiyaa ay katsaa yarshshuunne irshshuwaana de'iyaawaa gidoppo; ayaw gooppe neeni irshshuwaa woy eessaa ililuwaa S'oossaw taman s'uuggaade yarshshanaw koshshenna.
Leviticus2:12 Hintte laytsan laytsan c'akettiyaa katsaappe s'eeraa kessiide
Leviticus2:13 Neeni shiishshiyaa katsaa yarshshuwaa ubbaan mas'iniyaa yegga; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus2:14 Neeni koyiro katsaappe s'eeraa kessaade Med'inaa Godaw ahiyaa wode
Leviticus2:15 Aa bolla zayitiyaa tiga; is'aanaakka aan wotsa; hewe katsaa yarshshuwaa.
Leviticus2:16 K'eesii he zayitii tigetteedda hars's'eteedda katsaappe shakkuwaa akkiide
Leviticus3:1 « ‹Itti Asay ittippetetsaa yarshshoo bare wudiyaappe mac'c'awaa gidina attumawaa gidina itti mehiyaa shiishshiyaa wode
Leviticus3:2 Yarshshanaw aheedda mehiyaa huup'iyaan bare kushiyaa wotsiide
Leviticus3:3 Ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaappe taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide Med'inaa Godaw shiishsho; hewekka k'antsaa ashuwaa mayyeedda handdaa ubbaynne aanana gatsiyaa handday
Leviticus3:4 laau kilahotuwaa
Leviticus3:5 Aaroona attuma naanay hewaa hara s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanna yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla de'iyaa mitsaa bolla wotsiide s'uuggino; hewe Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa
Leviticus3:6 « ‹Med'inaa Godaw ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaa uray dorssaa gidina deeshshaa
Leviticus3:7 Itti uray dorssaa maraa yarshshiyaawaa gidooppe
Leviticus3:8 bare kushiyaa Aa huup'iyaan wotsiide
Leviticus3:9 Ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaappe taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide
Leviticus3:10 laau kilahotuwaa
Leviticus3:11 K'eesii he k'umaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla wotsiide s'uuggo.
Leviticus3:12 « ‹Aa yarshshuu deeshshaa gidooppe
Leviticus3:13 Yaatiide Aa huup'iyaan bare kushiyaa wotsiide
Leviticus3:14 I he yarshshiyaawaappe akkiide
Leviticus3:15 laau kilahotuwaa
Leviticus3:16 K'eesii he k'umaa taman s'uuggiyaa
Leviticus3:17 « ‹Handdaanne suutsaa hintte de'iyaa sa'aan hak'aninne mooppite. Hawe hinttenttoonne hintte yeletaw med'inaw naagettiyaa wogaa› yaagaade oda» yaageedda.
Leviticus4:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus4:2 «Neeni Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Ooninne k'oppennaan nagaraa ootsooppenne
Leviticus4:3 « ‹K'eesiyaa kaappuu nagaraa ootsooppenne he nagaray asaa bayzzanchcha kessiyaawaa gidooppe
Leviticus4:4 He korumaa Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge aatsiide
Leviticus4:5 K'eesiyaa kaappuu korumaa suutsaappe amareedawaa akkiide
Leviticus4:6 Bare kushiyaa birad'd'iyaa suutsan tushi tushi kessiide
Leviticus4:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:8 Nagaraa yarshshoo shuketteedda ha korumaa mod'd'uwaa ubbaa
Leviticus4:9 laau kilahotuwaa
Leviticus4:10 Ittippetetsaa yarshshoo shuketteedda korumaappe akkeedda mod'd'uwaadan akko. K'eesiyaa kaappuu s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan s'uuggo.
Leviticus4:11 Shin korumaa galbbaa
Leviticus4:12 korumaa ashuwaappe atteedawaa ubbaa dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe kare kessiide; bidintsaa k'oliyaa wogaadan geeshsha gideedda sa'aa afo; yan mitsaa taman s'uuggo.
Leviticus4:13 « ‹Israa'eeliyaa maabaray ubbay k'oppennaan nagaraa ootsooppenne
Leviticus4:14 Unttunttu ootseedda nagaray erettiyaa wode
Leviticus4:15 He maabaraa c'imatuu Med'inaa Godaa sintsan barenttu kushiyaa korumaa huup'iyaa bollan wotsiide
Leviticus4:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:17 I bare kushiyaa birad'd'iyaa suutsan tushi tushi kessiide
Leviticus4:18 K'ay amareeda suutsaa akkiide
Leviticus4:19 Mod'd'uwaa ubbaa akkiide
Leviticus4:20 Nagaraa yarshshoo shuketteedda korumaa ootseeddawaadan ha korumaakka ootso. Hewaadan ootsiide
Leviticus4:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:22 « ‹Asaa kaaletsiyaa suntsatuwaappe ittuu k'oppennaan nagaraa ootsooppenne Med'inaa Goday Aa S'oossay Aa azazeedda azazuwaappe ittuwaa hak'awaanne mentsooppe
Leviticus4:23 I bare ootseedda nagaraa ereeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:24 He deeshshaa orggiyaa huup'iyaan bare kushiyaa wotsiide s'uuggiyaa yarshshuu Med'inaa Godaa sintsan shukettiyaa sa'aan shukko; hewe nagaraa yarshshuwaa.
Leviticus4:25 K'eesiyaa kaappuu nagaraa yarshshuwaa suutsaa giddo bare kushiyaa birad'd'iyaa tushi tushi kessiide
Leviticus4:26 Mod'd'uwaa ubbaa ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa mod'd'uwaa yarshshiyaawaadan yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan yarshsho. Hawaadan ootsiide
Leviticus4:27 « ‹He maabaraa asaappe ittuu k'oppennaan nagaraa ootsooppenne Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaappe ittuwaa hak'awaanne mentsooppe
Leviticus4:28 I bare ootseedda nagaray aw eretteeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:29 Bare kushiyaa nagaraa yarshshuwaa ootsiide shukkiyaa deeshshatti huup'iyaan wotso; yaatiide s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa sa'aan nagaraa yarshshuwaa ootsiide shukko.
Leviticus4:30 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:31 Mod'd'uwaa ubbaa ittippetetsaa yarshshoo shukkeedda mehiyaappe kessiyaawaadan
Leviticus4:32 « ‹He bitanii bare nagaraa yarshshoo dorssaa shiishshanaw koyooppe
Leviticus4:33 I bare kushiyaa he dorssatti huup'iyaan wotsiide s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo shukkiyaa mehii shukettiyaa sa'aan izo shukko.
Leviticus4:34 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus4:35 Ittippetetsaa yarshshoo shuketteedda mod'd'uwaa k'aariide kessiyaawaadan
Leviticus5:1 « ‹Ay asaynne markkaw s'eesettiide bare be'eeddawaa woy bare ereeddawaa gutaran markkattennaan is's'ooppe
Leviticus5:2 « ‹K'ay ay asaynne erennan de'iidde tunabaa
Leviticus5:3 « ‹K'aykka ay asaynne erennan de'iidde
Leviticus5:4 « ‹Woy k'ay ay asaynne iitabaa gidina loobaa ootsanaw ellekka c'aak'k'ooppenne bare c'aak'k'eeddawaakka I akeekenan d'ayooppe
Leviticus5:5 « ‹Ay asaynne ha odetteedda bayzzatuwaappe ittuwaa ootseeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus5:6 I bare ootseedda nagaraa diraw Med'inaa Godaw bare wudiyaa giddoppe mac'c'a dorssaa woy mac'c'a deeshshaa nagaraa yarshshuwaa ootsiide shiishsho. K'eesii akkiide
Leviticus5:7 « ‹Asay bare ootseedda nagaraw yarshshanaw
Leviticus5:8 I unttuntta k'eesiyaw immo. K'eesii laau harap'p'etuwaappe ittinniw k'ood'iyaa muuc'enan c'oo mirk'k'iide
Leviticus5:9 Yaatiide he nagaraa yarshshuwaa suutsaappe amareedawaa akkiide
Leviticus5:10 Yenkko harap'p'atto k'ay higgii azaziyaawaadan
Leviticus5:11 « ‹Shin itti uraw laau wogga dogomattuwaa woy laau harap'p'etuwaa ahanaw shaluu gidana d'ayooppe
Leviticus5:12 I hewaa ahiide k'eesiyaw immo; k'eesii he d'iiliyaappe itti kushiyaa kuntsi akkiide
Leviticus5:13 Ha geetetteeddawanttuppe hak'awaaninne gido bitanii ootseedda nagaraw k'eesii hawaadan ootsiide
Leviticus5:14 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus5:15 «Ooninne Med'inaa Godaw geeshshi wotseedda miishshatuwaa bolla ammanettenan d'ayooppe k'ay erennan nagaraa ootsooppe
Leviticus5:16 Med'inaa Godaw dummayi wotseedda miishshatuwaa bolla I nagaraa ootseedda diraw
Leviticus5:17 «Ay asaynne erennan de'iidde
Leviticus5:18 I bare wudiyaappe tilla bollaanna de'iyaa itti dorssaa orggiyaa naak'uwaa yarshshoo k'eesiyaakko aho. He dorssay naak'oo c'iggiyaa gatiyaa kessiyaawaa gido; yaatooppe k'eesii he dorssaa yarshshiide
Leviticus5:19 Hewe naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa. I tumukka Med'inaa Godaa naak'k'eedda» yaageedda.
Leviticus6:1 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus6:2 «Med'inaa Goday ooninne nagaraa ootsiide bare shooruwaa worddotiide c'immooppe hawaappe kaaliide de'iyaa higgetuwaa immeedda: shooruwaa matan hadaraa wotsobaa woy oytsiide taleeddabaa kaadooppe
Leviticus6:3 woy bayeeddawaa demmiide ta be'abeykke gooppenne wordduwaan c'aak'k'ooppe
Leviticus6:4 I hak'awaanne gido
Leviticus6:5 woy wordduwaan c'aak'k'i akkeeddawaa ubbaakka Aa godaw zaaro. K'ay bare naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa gallassi bare akkeeddawaa bolla s'eetuwaappe laatamu kushiyaa gujjiide Aa godaw immo.
Leviticus6:6 K'aykka bare naak'uwaa diraw Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa yarshshoo bare wudiyaa giddoppe tilla bollaanna de'iyaa itti dorssaa orggiyaa k'eesiyaakko aho. He dorssaa gatii suure k'ofetteeddawaa gido.
Leviticus6:7 K'eesii he dorssaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan yarshshiide
Leviticus6:8 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus6:9 «Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa hawaadan yaagaade azaza; ‹S'uuggiyaa yarshshoo de'iyaa wogay hawaa: S'uuggiyaa yarshshuu k'amay wonttana gakkanaw yarshshiyaa sa'aan de'o. Tamaykka yarshshiyaa sa'aan ubbaa wode ees's'iidde de'o.
Leviticus6:10 K'eesii liinuwaappe dadetteedda k'amishiyaanne suriyaa mayyiide
Leviticus6:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus6:12 Yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla de'iyaa tamay to'ennan ubbaa wode ees's'iidde de'o. K'eesii wontta wontta mitsaa aan gujji gujjiide wotso. S'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaakka he mitsaa bolla maaran wotsiide
Leviticus6:13 Tamay yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla ubbaa wode ees's'iidde de'o; to'anaw koshshenna.
Leviticus6:14 « ‹Katsaa yarshshoo imetteedda wogay hawaa: Aaroona attuma naanaa gidiyaa k'eesatuu yarshshiyaa sa'aappe sintsa baggana Med'inaa Godaa sintsan shiishshino.
Leviticus6:15 K'eesii loo d'iiliyaappe kop'p'iyaawaanne zayitiyaa akkiide
Leviticus6:16 Hewaappe atteedawaa Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay miino; hewaa unttunttu irshshuu yegettibeenna ukitsaa ootsi uukkiide
Leviticus6:17 He ukitsay irshshuwaa yeggenaan uuketto. Hewaa taw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaappe unttuntta gakkiyaawaa taani unttunttoo immaad. Nagaraa yarshshuwaadaaninne naak'uwaa yarshshuwaadan ikka loytsiide geeshsha.
Leviticus6:18 Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaappe unttuntta gakkiyaawaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus6:19 Med'inaa Goday k'aykka Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus6:20 «Aarooninne Aa attuma naanattuwaappe k'eesatetsaa kaappotetsaw okettiyaa gallassi laau kiilo giraame gidiyaa loo d'iiliyaa katsaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide Med'inaa Godaw ahino. Hewaappe bagga wontta
Leviticus6:21 He d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'etti loo walakettiide bashiyaan uuketto; bunchchaade
Leviticus6:22 K'ay Aaroona attuma naanatuwaappe Aa k'eesetetsaa kaappotetsaa oosoo okettiyaa ubbaykka he wogaa ootsino. Hewe Med'inaa Godaw ubbaa gede yarshshiyaa yarshshuwaa gidiide ubbaanna s'uugetto.
Leviticus6:23 K'eesii shiishshiyaa katsaa yarshshuwaappe guyye attenaan wuri s'uugetto; aappe ayaynne meetettoppo» yaageedda.
Leviticus6:24 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus6:25 «Aaroonassanne Aa attuma naanaatoo
Leviticus6:26 He yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa k'eesii Dunkkaaniyaa dabaabaa giddon de'iyaa geeshsha sa'aan mo.
Leviticus6:27 He ashuwaa bochchiyaa ayaynne geeshsha gidanawaa; k'ay shukkishiin ay mayuwaa bollanne suutsay d'ac'ettooppe
Leviticus6:28 Ashuu doyssetteedda urk'k'aa miishshay meo; madaabiyaa birataa disttiyaan doyisseeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus6:29 K'eesatuwaa zariyaappe attuma asaa gideedda ooninne he ashuwaa mo; he ashuu geeshsha ubbaappe ittuwaa gideedda loytsi geeshsha.
Leviticus6:30 Gido shin Geeshsha Sa'aan nagaraa atto giissanaw Aa suutsaa akkiide
Leviticus7:1 « ‹Naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa wogay hawaa: ikka geeshsha ubbaappe ittuwaa gideedda geeshsha yarshshuwaa.
Leviticus7:2 S'uuggiyaa yarshshoo shiishshiyaa mehiyaa shukkiyaa sa'aan naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa mehiyaakka shukkino; Aa suutsaakka yarshshiyaa sa'aa miyyetuwaan d'ac'ino.
Leviticus7:3 K'ay Aa handdaa ubbaa: hewekka nasiyaa handdaa
Leviticus7:4 laau kilahotuwaa
Leviticus7:5 Taman s'uugiide Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa yarshshuwaadan
Leviticus7:6 K'eesiyaa zare gideedda attuma Asay ubbay he yarshshuwaa ashuwaa mo. He yarshshuu geeshsha yarshshuwaa ubbaappe ittuwaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus7:7 « ‹Naak'uwaa yarshshuu nagaraa yarshshuwaakka mala; unttunttu laauwaa wogay ittuwaa. Hewenne yarshshetteedda mehiyaa ashuu nagaraa atto giissanaw yarshshuwaa yarshsheedda k'eesiyaw imettee.
Leviticus7:8 Ooninne s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ahooppe yarshshiyaa k'eesii he mehiyaa galbbaa barew akko.
Leviticus7:9 C'ooc'iyaan komppetteedda katsaa yarshshuwaa ubbaynne otuwaan doyssetteedda woy bashiyaan uuketteedda ubbaykka he yarshshuwaa yarshsheedda k'eesiyaw imettee.
Leviticus7:10 K'ay zayitiyaan munak'etteedda woy munak'ettibeenna katsaa yarshshuwaa ubbay Aaroona attuma naanaatoo ubbaw imettee; unttunttu hewaa k'aran gishi akkino.
Leviticus7:11 « ‹Asay ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa wode aw de'iyaa wogay hawaa:
Leviticus7:12 I shiishshiyaa ittippetetsaa yarshshuu galataa yarshshuwaa gidooppe
Leviticus7:13 He galataw shiishshiyaa ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaanna ittippe irshshuwaa yegeedda munak'aappe uuketteedda ukitsaakka imotaa ootsiide shiishsho.
Leviticus7:14 K'ay he ubbaa k'ommo ukitsatuwaappekka I ittuwaa ittuwaa dentsiide
Leviticus7:15 He mehiyaa ashuu galataw shiik'iyaa ittipetetsaw yarshshetteedda gallassi meetetto; wonttaw ayaynne attoppo.
Leviticus7:16 « ‹Shin Aa yarshshuu shiik'k'eeddawaa gatsiyaa woy bare dosuwaan c'oo immiyaa yarshshuwaa gidooppe
Leviticus7:17 He yarshshuwaa ashuwaappe palahiide heezzentso gallassaa gakkanaw gamiyaawe de'ooppe
Leviticus7:18 Itti Asay shiishsheedda ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa ashuwaappe hak'awenne heezzentso gallassi meetettooppe
Leviticus7:19 « ‹Tunabaa ayaanne bochcheedda ashuu meetettoppo; I taman s'uugettanaw koshshee. Ashuu geeshsha ashuwaa gidooppe
Leviticus7:20 Shin itti Asay tuna gidi uttiide
Leviticus7:21 K'ay itti Asay tunabaa ayaanne bochchooppe asaa tunatetsaa gidina woy tuna mehiyaa gidina
Leviticus7:22 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus7:23 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaaga; ‹Korumaa woy dorssaa woy deeshshaa ashuwaan mood'iyaa zawaa mulekka mooppite.
Leviticus7:24 Hayk'k'eedda mehiyaa woy do'ay wod'eedda mehiyaa mood'iyaakka harabaw go'ettiteppe attina
Leviticus7:25 Ayaw gooppe
Leviticus7:26 Hintte de'iyaa sa'aan hak'an gidooppekka
Leviticus7:27 Suutsaa miyaa ay asaynne
Leviticus7:28 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus7:29 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaaga; ‹Med'inaa Godaw ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaa ay asaynne he ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaappe shaakkiide
Leviticus7:30 Hewaa I Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide
Leviticus7:31 K'eesii yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan mod'd'uwaa s'uuggo; shin anggoosu Aaroonassanne Aa attuma naanaatoo imetto.
Leviticus7:32 Hintte ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaappe ushechcha gediyaa imotaa ootsiide k'eesiyaw immite.
Leviticus7:33 Hewe ushechcha gedii Aaroona attuma naanatuwaappe ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa suutsaanne mooddiyaa yarshshiyaawoo Aa gakkiyaa Aa gishuwaa.
Leviticus7:34 Taani Israa'eeliyaa asaa ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaappe k'aatseedda anggoosuwaanne yarshshoo shiishsheedda gediyaa akkaade
Leviticus7:35 Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay K'eesiyaa gidiide
Leviticus7:36 Med'inaa Goday unttunttu k'eesetetsaw oketteedda gallassi
Leviticus7:37 Simmi hawanttu
Leviticus7:38 Ha wogatuu Israa'eeliyaa Asay Siinaa mela sa'aan barenttu yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshshana mala Med'inaa Goday azazeedda gallassi
Leviticus8:1 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus8:2 «Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa k'ay unttunttunna ittippe
Leviticus8:3 K'ay Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaakka s'eesaade
Leviticus8:4 Muse Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan ootseedda; asaykka ubbay Dunkkaaniyaa karen shiik'eedda.
Leviticus8:5 Muse asaw
Leviticus8:6 Muse Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa ahiide
Leviticus8:7 Aaroona k'amishiyaa mayzzeedda; danc'c'uwaakka danc'c'isseedda. K'ay adussa k'amishiyaa mayzziide
Leviticus8:8 K'ay tiraan wotsiyaawaa Aaroona bollan aatsiide
Leviticus8:9 K'aykka Aaroona huup'iyaan shaashiyaa enc'c'urssaa wotseedda. Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan he enc'c'urssaa bollan sintsa baggana work'k'aa madaaliyaa
Leviticus8:10 Yaatowaappe guyyiyaan Muse okkiyaa zayitiyaa akkiide
Leviticus8:11 K'ay he zayitiyaappe akkiide
Leviticus8:12 K'ay he okkiyaa zayitiyaappe amaraa Aaroona huup'iyaan tigiide
Leviticus8:13 Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan
Leviticus8:14 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus8:15 Muse he korumaa shukkeedda; Aa suutsaappe bare birad'd'iyaan akkiide
Leviticus8:16 K'antsaa ashuwaa kammeedda handdaa ubbaa
Leviticus8:17 Shin Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan
Leviticus8:18 Yaati simmiide Muse s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo haniyaa dorssaa orggiyaa aheedda; Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay he dorssaa orggiyaa huup'iyaan barenttu kushiyaa wotseeddino.
Leviticus8:19 Muse he dorssaa orggiyaa shukkeedda; Aa suutsaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa miyyiyaa ubbaan gusseedda.
Leviticus8:20 K'ay dorssaa orggiyaa ashuwaakka Aa k'ommuwaan k'ommuwaan k'ans's'eedda; k'ans's'etsaa
Leviticus8:21 K'antsaa ashuwaanne gedetuwaa haatsaan meec'c'owaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus8:22 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus8:23 Muse he dorssaa shukkeedda; Aa suutsaappe akkiide
Leviticus8:24 K'ay Muse Aaroona attuma naanatuwaakka sintsaw ahiide
Leviticus8:25 Yaatiide mod'd'uwaa
Leviticus8:26 K'ay irshshuwaa yeggenaan uukkeedda ukitsaa wotsiyaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan de'iyaa masoofiyaappe itti komppuwaa
Leviticus8:27 I ha k'umaa ubbaa Aaroona kushiyaaninne Aa attuma naanatuwaa kushiyaan wotseedda; unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa sintsan k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide k'aatseeddino.
Leviticus8:28 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus8:29 K'ay Muse anggoosuwaa akkiide
Leviticus8:30 Muse okkiyaa zayitiyaappenne yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan de'iyaa suutsaappe akkiide
Leviticus8:31 Muse Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa hawaadan yaageedda; «Ashuwaa Gakettiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa karen doyissite; ‹Aarooninne Aa naanay hewaa miino› yaagaade taani azazeeddawaadan
Leviticus8:32 He ashuwaappenne ukitsaappe palaheeddawe de'ooppe taman s'uuggite.
Leviticus8:33 K'eesatetsaw okkiyaa wogay laappun gallassaa akkiyaa diraw
Leviticus8:34 Ha hachchi oosetteeddawe Med'inaa Goday azazina
Leviticus8:35 Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan laappun gallassaa kumentsaa gallassinne k'ammanne takkite; Med'inaa Godaa wogaakka naagite; is's'ooppe hintte hayk'k'ana. Taana Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawe hawaa» yaageedda.
Leviticus8:36 Aarooninne Aa naanay Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaa ubbaa ootseeddino.
Leviticus9:1 Hosppuntsa gallassan Muse Aaroonanne Aa naanatuwaa
Leviticus9:2 Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda; «Nagaraa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Leviticus9:3 K'ay Israa'eeliyaa asaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Med'inaa Goday hinttenttoo k'onc'c'iyaa diraw
Leviticus9:4 Ittippetetsaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Leviticus9:5 Unttunttu Muse azazeeddawaa ubbaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsa aheeddino; yaatiide maabaraa ubbay shiik'iide
Leviticus9:6 Muse unttuntta
Leviticus9:7 K'ay Muse Aaroonaw hawaadan yaageedda; «Yarshshiyaa saakko haa shiik'a; ne nagaraa yarshshuwaanne ne s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshsha; yaataade ne huup'e nagaraanne ne asaa nagaraakka atto giissa. K'ay Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan
Leviticus9:8 Aarooni yarshshiyaa saakko yiide
Leviticus9:9 Aaroona attuma naanay suutsaappe akkiide aw aheeddino; I bare kushiyaa birad'd'iyaa he suutsan yeddi kessiide
Leviticus9:10 Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan
Leviticus9:11 Shin atteeda ashuwaanne galbbaa dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe kare kessiide s'uuggeedda.
Leviticus9:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus9:13 K'ay unttunttu s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa k'ommuwaan k'ommuwaan kessiide
Leviticus9:14 K'antsaa ashuwaanne gedetuwaakka haatsaan meec'c'iide
Leviticus9:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus9:16 K'ay I s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa mehiyaa ahiide
Leviticus9:17 Katsaa yarshshuwaakka shiishsheedda; aappe itti kop'p'iyaa gidiyaawaa akkiide
Leviticus9:18 Aarooni k'aykka asaa ittippetetsaa yarshshoo korumaanne dorssaa orggiyaa shukkeedda; Aa attuma naanay suutsaa aw aheeddino; I he suutsaa akkiide
Leviticus9:19 K'ay korumaanne dorssaa orggiyaa ashuwaappe mod'd'uwaa
Leviticus9:20 Unttunttu he handdaa anggoosuwaa bolla wotsina
Leviticus9:21 Shin Muse azazeeddawaadan
Leviticus9:22 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus9:23 Musenne Aarooni Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddo geleeddino; unttunttu hewaappe keseedda wode
Leviticus9:24 Med'inaa Godaa sintsaappe tamay wod'iide
Leviticus10:1 Aaroona attuma naanay
Leviticus10:2 Hewaa gaasuwaan Med'inaa Godaa sintsappe tamay yiide
Leviticus10:3 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus10:4 Muse Aaroona aawuwaa ishaa Uzi'eela attuma naanatuwaa
Leviticus10:5 Hewaa diraw unttunttu yiide
Leviticus10:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus10:7 K'aykka hintte Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaappe kare kesooppe hintte hayk'k'ana; ayaw gooppe S'oossay okkiyaa zayitii hintte bollan de'ee» yaageedda. Unttunttukka Muse geeddawaadan ootseeddino.
Leviticus10:8 Med'inaa Goday Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus10:9 «Hintte hayk'k'enna mala
Leviticus10:10 Hintte geeshshanne geeshsha gidennabaa k'ay tunanne tuna gidennabaa shaakkiide erite.
Leviticus10:11 Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana odeedda wogaa ubbaakka Israa'eeliyaa asaa tamaarissite» yaageedda.
Leviticus10:12 Muse Aaroonanne atteeda Aa attuma naanatuwaa Elaazaranne Itaamaara hawaadan yaageedda; «Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaappe atteeda katsaa yarshshuwaa akkiide; irshshuwaa yeggenaan uukkite; yaatiide I loytsi geeshsha gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus10:13 Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaappe hewe neenanne ne attuma naanatuwaa gakkiyaa hintte gishuwaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus10:14 Shin k'aatseedda anggoosuwaanne shiik'eedda gediyaa neeni
Leviticus10:15 Med'inaa Godaw yarshsheedda gediyaanne k'aatseedda anggoosuwaa Asay taman s'uuggiyaa mood'iyaanna ittippe gatsiide
Leviticus10:16 Muse nagaraa yarshshuwaa deeshshay waaneedenttonne eranaw koyiide oochcheedda; I s'uugetti diggeeddawaa ereedda wode
Leviticus10:17 «Nagaraa yarshshuu loytsi geeshsha gideeddawanttu giduwaappe ittuwaa gideedda geeshsha; k'ay hewekka asaa nagaraa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan atto giissana mala hinttenttoo imetteedda; yaatina hintte Aa loytsi geeshsha sa'aan ayaw mibeykkitee?
Leviticus10:18 He mehiyaa suutsay Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddo gelibeennawaa gidoode
Leviticus10:19 Aarooni Musa
Leviticus10:20 Muse hewaa siseedda wode
Leviticus11:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus11:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagiide odite; ‹Biittaa bollan de'iyaa mehiyaa ubbaappe hintte maana mehetuunne do'atuu hawantta.
Leviticus11:3 S'uguntsay wuri p'alk'k'etteeddawanttanne waammotiyaa mehetuwaa ubbaa miite.
Leviticus11:4 Shin waammo s'alalaa waammotiyaawantta woy k'ay s'uguntsaa s'alalay p'alk'k'etteeddawantta mooppite. Gaaluu waammotee shin s'uguntsay p'alk'k'etibeenna diraw I hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:5 Guppallii waammotee shin s'uguntsay p'alk'k'etibeenna diraw I hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:6 Harbbayinni waammotee shin mooppite; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus11:7 Guduntsaakka mooppite; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus11:8 Hintte hawanttu ashuwaa mooppite; unttunttu bakkutaakka bochchoppite; unttunttu hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:9 « ‹Haatsaa giddon de'iyaa med'etatuwaa ubbaappe hintte maanawanttu hawantta. Abbaa giddon gidina woy k'ay goggiyaa haatsaa giddon gidina de'iyaa ubbaappe moliyaa mala k'efiinne pok'uu de'iyaa ubbaa miite.
Leviticus11:10 Shin abbaa giddon woy shaafaan shamishamiyaa med'etatuwaappenne shemppuu de'iyaa
Leviticus11:11 Hawanttu hinttenttoo tuna; unttunttu ashuwaa mooppite; unttunttu bakkutaakka bochchoppite.
Leviticus11:12 K'efiinne pok'uu baynna haatsaa giddon de'iyaa med'etatuu ubbay hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:13 « ‹Kafotuwaappe tuna gidiyaa diraw hintte meennawanttu hawantta: arggantsaa
Leviticus11:14 s'inggilliyaa
Leviticus11:15 k'uuruwaa zariyaa ubbaa
Leviticus11:16 sogoniyaa
Leviticus11:17 k'eeri guttuwaa
Leviticus11:18 haatsaa kuttuwaa
Leviticus11:19 shimalaanne saabiissaa giyaa haatsaa kafotuwaa zariyaa ubbaa
Leviticus11:20 « ‹K'efiyaana de'iyaa oyddu gediyaan hametiyaa k'eeri med'etatuu ubbay hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:21 Gidooppenne
Leviticus11:22 Hewanttukka
Leviticus11:23 Shin hara k'efiyaana de'iyaa oyddu gedii de'iyaa med'etatuu ubbay hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:24 « ‹Hawanttu hinttena tunissana; unttunttu bakkutaa bochchiyaa ubbay omarssi gakkanaw tuna gidanawaa.
Leviticus11:25 Hawanttu bakkutaa dentsiyaa ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; shin gidooppenne omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus11:26 S'uguntsay de'iidde p'alk'k'etsaa gidennawantta woy k'ay
Leviticus11:27 Oyddu gedetuwaan hametiyaa mehiyaa ubbaappe adanetuwaa ginddiyaa mala ginddiyaan hametiyaawanttu hinttenttoo tuna; k'ay unttunttu bakkutaa bochchiyaa oonikka omarssi gakkanaw tuna.
Leviticus11:28 Hewanttu bakkutaa dentsiyaa ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; shin gidooppenne omarssi gakkanaw I tuna. Unttunttukka hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:29 « ‹Sa'aanna hamettiyaawaanttuppe hawanttu hinttenttoo tuna: oc'c'uu
Leviticus11:30 geeggi
Leviticus11:31 Sa'aanna hametiyaa ubbatuwaappe hinttenttoo tuna gidiyaawanttu hewantta; unttunttuppe hayeeddawaa bochchiyaa ubbay omarssi gakkanaw tuna.
Leviticus11:32 Unttunttuppe hayk'k'eeddawe ayaa bolla kunddooppekka he unttunttu Aa bolla kunddeedda miishshay tuna; mitsaa miishshaa woy mayuwaa woy galbbaa woy keeshshatuwaa gidinakka
Leviticus11:33 Ha sa'aanna hamettiyaawanttuppe ittuwaa bakkutay ay urk'k'a miishshaa giddon kunddooppekka
Leviticus11:34 He miishshaa giddon de'iyaa haatsaappe meetettiyaa ay k'uma bolla s'okooppekka
Leviticus11:35 Hawanttu anhay Aa bolla kunddiyaabay ayaa gidooppekka tuna. C'ooc'iyaa woy katsiyaa urk'k'aa miishshaa gidooppekka mentsite; unttunttu hinttenttoo tuna.
Leviticus11:36 Hawanttu bakkutay bochchiyaabay ubbay tuna gidooppenne
Leviticus11:37 Unttunttu bakkutaappe ittuu zeranaw wotseedda zeretsaa katsaa bolla kunddooppe
Leviticus11:38 Shin he zeretsaa bolla haatsay gukki simmina
Leviticus11:39 « ‹K'ay hintte miyaa mehetuwaappe ittuu hayk'k'ina
Leviticus11:40 Ooninne he mehiyaa bakkutaappe mooppe
Leviticus11:41 « ‹Sa'aanna gooshettiyaa med'etaa ubbay hinttenttoo tuna; Aa mooppite.
Leviticus11:42 Uluwaan gooshettiyaawaa gidina
Leviticus11:43 Sa'aanna gooshettiyaa med'etatuwaa ubbaan miide hintte huup'iyaw tunoppite; k'ay unttunttun hintte asatetsaa tunissoppite.
Leviticus11:44 Taani
Leviticus11:45 Ayaw gooppe
Leviticus11:46 « ‹Mehetuwaa
Leviticus11:47 Hewenne hintte tunaanne geeshsha
Leviticus12:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus12:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Itti mac'c'awuna shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelooppe
Leviticus12:3 Hosppuntsa gallassi na'ay k'as's'arettanaw koshshee.
Leviticus12:4 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus12:5 « ‹Shin itti mac'c'awuna mac'c'a naatto yelooppe
Leviticus12:6 « ‹Mac'c'awuna attuma na'aa gidina mac'c'a na'aa gidina yelaade
Leviticus12:7 K'eesii hewaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan yarshshiide
Leviticus12:8 « ‹Shin itti laytsaa dorssaa orggiyaa ahanaw iziw shaluu gidana d'ayooppe
Leviticus13:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus13:2 «Ay asaa bollanne gaafu beetooppe
Leviticus13:3 K'eesii Aa galbbaa bollan de'iyaa madutsaa be'o. He madus'eedda sa'aan de'iyaa isikkii boos's'ooppenne
Leviticus13:4 Shin Aa galbbaa bollan de'iyaa shattuu boos's'inttokka
Leviticus13:5 Laappuntsa gallassan k'eesii Aa zaaretsiidekka be'o; I be'iyaa wode madutsay bitaniyaa galbbaa bollan aakkennan kasewaadankka de'ooppe
Leviticus13:6 K'aykka laappuntsa gallassan k'eesii Aa; be'iyaa wode madutsay aakkiyaawaa aggiide d'ay d'ay booppenne d'umooppe
Leviticus13:7 Shin I geeyanaw barena k'eesiyaa besseeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus13:8 K'eesiikka Aa be'o; he shattuu bitaniyaa galbbaa bollan yaa aakki aakki booppe
Leviticus13:9 «Oonanne wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii oyk'k'ooppe
Leviticus13:10 K'eesii Aa be'o; be'iyaa wode Aa galbbaa bollan bootsa gaafuu de'ooppe
Leviticus13:11 hewe Aa galbbaa bollan gameedda wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggiyaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus13:12 «K'ay wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii bitaniyaa galbbaa bollan aakkiide
Leviticus13:13 He wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii Aa bollaa ubbaa mayyooppe
Leviticus13:14 Shin he madutsaa giddon muunneedda ashuu beettooppe I tuna.
Leviticus13:15 K'eesii he muunneedda ashuwaa; be'iide he bitanii tuna gidiyaawaa erisso. He muunneedda ashuu wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggiyaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus13:16 Shin he muunneedda ashuu k'aykka laamettiide boos's'ooppe
Leviticus13:17 K'eesii Aa be'o; Aa madutsay boos's'eeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus13:18 «Itti asaa bolla madutsay wod'd'iide pas'ina
Leviticus13:19 Aa sa'aan bootsa gaafuu beetooppe woy zoeedda ilahuu kesooppe
Leviticus13:20 K'eesii Aa be'o; he madutsay ollatooppenne madutsaa bollan de'iyaa isikiikka laamettiide boos's'ooppe
Leviticus13:21 Shin k'eesii be'iyaa wode
Leviticus13:22 Hewe Aa galbbaa bollan aakki aakkiide booppe
Leviticus13:23 Shin he ilahuu aakki aakki beennan ittisaa s'alalaan de'ooppe
Leviticus13:24 «Itti asaa galbbaa tamay mooppenne he meedda sa'aan boos's'eedda woy zoeedda ilahuu kesooppe
Leviticus13:25 k'eesii he sa'aa be'o; Aa sa'aan de'iyaa isikkii boos's'ooppenne madutsaykka lukkiide ollatooppe
Leviticus13:26 Shin k'eesii be'iyaa wode
Leviticus13:27 Laappuntsa gallassan k'eesii Aa be'o; he wode he sa'ay aakki aakki booppe
Leviticus13:28 Shin he ilahuu galbbaa bollan aakkennan aggiide itti sa'aan uttooppenne ubbaa k'ay d'ay d'ay booppe
Leviticus13:29 «Itti attuma asaw woy mac'c'a asaw huup'iyaa woy gac'uwaa bollan madutsay kesooppe
Leviticus13:30 k'eesii he madutsaa be'o. I be'iyaa wode madutsay galbbaa lukkiide ollatooppenne Aa bollan de'iyaa isikiikka adilliyaa c'iishshaa malatiyaa leeo gidooppe
Leviticus13:31 K'ay k'eesii he harggiyaa be'iyaa wode
Leviticus13:32 Laappuntsa gallassan k'eesii he harggiyaa; be'iyaa wode k'aac'echchuwaa harggii aakkennawaa gidooppe
Leviticus13:33 he bitanii he madutsaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa isikiyaa meedo; k'aac'echchiyaa sa'aan de'iyaa isikiyaa mata meedoppo. K'eesii he bitaniyaa dumma kifiliyaan hara laappun gallassaa gorddiide wotso.
Leviticus13:34 Laappuntsa gallassan k'eesii he k'aac'echchiyaa sa'aa be'iyaa wode; hewe bitaniyaa galbbaa bollan aakkana d'ayooppe galbbaa lukkiide ollatana d'ayooppe
Leviticus13:35 Shin I geeyeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus13:36 k'eesii Aa be'iyaa wode he k'aac'echchiyaawe aakkeeddawaa gidooppe
Leviticus13:37 Shin k'eesii be'iyaa wode
Leviticus13:38 «Itti attuma asaa woy mac'c'a asaa galbbaa bolla bootsa ilahuu kesooppe
Leviticus13:39 k'eesii Aa; be'iyaa wode he unttunttu galbbaa bollan de'iyaa ilahuu shololla bootsa gidooppe
Leviticus13:40 «Itti asaw huup'iyaa binnaanay k'ok'k'ofettooppe
Leviticus13:41 K'ay itti asaw huup'iyaa binnaanay sintsanna boatooppe
Leviticus13:42 Shin Aa boaa woy Aa tiishshay meeddasaa bollan zo'o woy bootsa madutsay kesooppe
Leviticus13:43 Aa k'eesii; be'iyaa wode Aa boaa woy tiishshay meeddasaa bollan de'iyaa madutsay galbbaa bollan kesiyaa wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggiyaadan zo'o gidooppe
Leviticus13:44 he bitanii tumukka wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii sakkiyaa hargganchcha. I tuna gidiyaa diraw I tuna gidiyaawaa k'eesii erisso; ayaw gooppe harggii Aa huup'iyaan de'ee.
Leviticus13:45 «Wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii oyk'k'eedda Asay peed'eteedda mayuwaa mayyo; bare huup'iyaa pis'oppo; bare mettershshaakka kammo; yaatiide
Leviticus13:46 He harggii Aa bolla de'eedda keeshshan ubbaan I tuna. I tuna gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus13:47 «Ay mayuwaa bollanne borok'eedda sa'ay beettooppe
Leviticus13:48 k'ac'inaappe woy shaluwaappe dadetteedda liino woy suufe gidina
Leviticus13:49 he mayuwaa bolla kesiidde borok'uu maataa malatiyaa woy zo'o malaa bessooppe
Leviticus13:50 K'eesii he borok'uwaa be'iide
Leviticus13:51 Laappuntsa gallassan k'eesii he mayuwaa be'iyaa wode; he mayuwaa bollan aakki aakki booppe
Leviticus13:52 K'ay he mayuu k'ac'inaa woy shalo mayyo gidina
Leviticus13:53 «K'aykka k'eesii be'iyaa wode
Leviticus13:54 he borok'uu de'iyaa mayuwaa meec'c'anaadan k'eesii azazo. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus13:55 He borok'o sa'ay de'iyaa mayuwaa meec'c'owaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus13:56 Shin he mayuwaa meec'c'i simmina k'eesii be'iyaa wode borok'uu d'ay d'ay booppe
Leviticus13:57 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus13:58 Shin meec'etteedda mayuu k'ac'inaa woy shalo mayyo gidina
Leviticus13:59 «Itti mayuu suufe woy liino gidina
Leviticus14:1 Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeedda;
Leviticus14:2 «Wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii oyk'k'eedda bitanii geeyiyaa gallassi ootsanaw koshshiyaa wogay hawaa. He bitaniyaa k'eesiyaakko afanaw koshshee.
Leviticus14:3 K'eesii Asay dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe gas'aa kesiide
Leviticus14:4 k'eesii pas'a de'iyaa laau geeshsha kafotuwaa
Leviticus14:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus14:6 Pas'a de'iyaa kafuwaa
Leviticus14:7 Kesseedda suutsaa he wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggiyaappe pas'iyaa bitaniyaa bolla laappu gede c'ac'c'afo; yaatiide he bitanii geeshsha gidiyaawaa erisso; pas'a de'iyaa kafuwaa gede dembbaa yeddo.
Leviticus14:8 «He harggiyaappe geeyeedda bitanii bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollan de'iyaa isikiyaa ubbaa meedetto; bare bollaakka meec'etto; yaatooppe I geeshsha gidanawaa. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus14:9 Laappuntsa gallassan bare huup'iyaa
Leviticus14:10 «Hosppuntsa gallassan tilla bollaanna de'iyaa laau dorssaa maratuwaanne itti laytsaa gideedda itti dorssato aho; k'ay katsaa yarshshoo zayitiyaan munak'etteedda usuppun kiilo giraame d'iiliyaanne itti liitiro wogaraa zayitiyaw heezzentso kushiyaa aho.
Leviticus14:11 Aa geeshshiyaa k'eesii bitaniyaa I aheedawanttuna ittippekka Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge Med'inaa Godaa sintsa shiishsho.
Leviticus14:12 «K'eesiikka laau dorssaa maratuwaappe ittuwaa akkiide
Leviticus14:13 Yaatiide I he dorssaa maraa nagaraa yarshshuwaanne s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa shukkiyaa geeshsha sa'aan shukko; nagaraa yarshshuwaadan naak'uwaa yarshshuukka k'eesiyaw imettee; ikka loytsi geeshsha.
Leviticus14:14 K'eesii naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa suutsaappe guutsaa akkiide
Leviticus14:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus14:16 «He haddirssa kushiyaa gomppan de'iyaa wogaraa zayitiyaan bare ushechcha kushiyaa birad'd'iyaa naak'k'iide
Leviticus14:17 Yaati simmiide bare kushiyaa gomppan atteeda zayitiyaappe akkiide
Leviticus14:18 K'ay bare kushiyaa gomppan atteeda zayitiyaa k'eesii geeyiyaa bitaniyaa huup'iyaan gusso; yaatiide Med'inaa Godaa sintsan he bitaniyaa nagaraa atto giisso.
Leviticus14:19 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan k'eesii bare tunatetsaappe geeyiyaa bitaniyaa nagaraa atto giissanaw nagaraa yarshshoo shiishsheedda mehiyaa shukkee; hewaappe simmiide k'ay s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo shiishsheedda mehiyaa yarshshee.
Leviticus14:20 K'ay k'eesii he s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa katsaa yarshshuwaanna ittippe yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan wotsiide s'uuggee; yaatiide bitaniyaa nagaraa atto giissee; bitaniikka geeshsha gidee.
Leviticus14:21 «Shin bitanii hewaa ubbaa ahanaw danddayenna mank'k'o gidooppe
Leviticus14:22 K'aykka barew danddayeeddawaadan laau maraa harap'p'etuwaa woy laau mara dogomattuwaa
Leviticus14:23 «Hosppuntsa gallassan bare nagaraappe geeyanaw bitanii hawantta k'eesiyaakko Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge Med'inaa Godaa sintsa aho.
Leviticus14:24 K'eesii naak'uwaa yarshshoo aheedda dorssaa maraanne littiro heezentso kushe zayitiyaa akkiide
Leviticus14:25 Yaatiide naak'uwaa yarshshoo aheedda dorssaa maraa shukkiide he naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa suutsaappe guutsaa akkiide
Leviticus14:26 K'ay k'eesii zayitiyaappe guutsaa bare haddirssa kushiyaa gomppan tigo.
Leviticus14:27 He haddirssa kushiyaa gomppan de'iyaa zayitiyaappe ushechcha kushiyaa s'eeran guutsaa akkiide
Leviticus14:28 K'aykka k'eesii bare kushiyaa gomppan de'iyaa zayitiyaappe guutsaa akkiide
Leviticus14:29 K'ay Med'inaa Godaa sintsan bitaniyaa nagaraa atto giissanaw
Leviticus14:30 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus14:31 ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshoo laaentsuwaa k'ay s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo katsaa yarshshuwaanna ittippe yarshsho. K'ay k'eesiikka he geeyiyaa bitaniyaw Med'inaa Godaa sintsan Aa nagaraa atto giisso.
Leviticus14:32 Bare bollan de'iyaa wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggiyaappe geeyanaw koshshiyaa wogaa polanaw mank'k'otay diggeedda uraw de'iyaa wogay simmi hawaa» yaageedda.
Leviticus14:33 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus14:34 «Taani hinttenttoo ak'o ootsaade immiyaa Kanaane biittaa hintte geliyaa wode
Leviticus14:35 he golliyaw k'eesiyaakko biide
Leviticus14:36 Gollen de'iyaabay ubbay tuna geetettennaadan
Leviticus14:37 Hewaan be'iyaa wode
Leviticus14:38 k'eesii golleppe kare kesiide
Leviticus14:39 Laappuntsa gallassaan k'eesii he golliyaa zaaretsiide; s'eelliyaa wode he borok'uu golliyaa godaa bollan aakkooppe
Leviticus14:40 borok'uu de'iyaa shuchchatuwaa ubbaa godaappe shoddiide
Leviticus14:41 K'ay godaa dufeedda urk'k'aa soo baggana bookkishin
Leviticus14:42 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus14:43 «Shuchchatuwaa shod diggina
Leviticus14:44 k'eesii hewaa be'iyaa wode; borok'uu he golliyaa giddon aakkooppe
Leviticus14:45 Hewaa diraw I he golliyaa
Leviticus14:46 K'ay he gollii gorddan takkiyaa wodiyaan Aa giddo geliyaa ooninne sa'ay k'ammana gakkanaw tuna.
Leviticus14:47 He golliyaan gisiyaa uray woy k'umaa miyaa uray bare mayuwaa meec'c'o.
Leviticus14:48 «Shin k'eesii yiide s'eelliyaa wode
Leviticus14:49 Golliyaa geeshshanaw laau kafotuwaa
Leviticus14:50 Kafotuwaappe ittuwaa keriyaan de'iyaa pulttuwaa haatsaa bollan shukko.
Leviticus14:51 Hewaappe guyyiyaan s'idiyaa
Leviticus14:52 Yaatiide he golliyaa k'eesii kafuwaa suutsan
Leviticus14:53 K'ay pas'a de'iyaa kafuwaa katamaappe gas'aa hini dembbaa yeddo. Hewaadan ootsiide
Leviticus14:54 «Ay wolk'k'aama galbbaa hargge gidooppekka hawe woga; k'aac'echchiyaawaa gidina
Leviticus14:55 mayuwaa bollan woy golliyaa bollan kesiyaa borok'o gidina
Leviticus14:56 gaafuwaa gidina
Leviticus14:57 ittibay tuna gidiyaawaanne geeshsha gidiyaawaa erissanaw wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggiyaanne borok'uwaa wogay hawaa» yaageedda.
Leviticus15:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus15:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagiide odite; ‹Ay asaa attuntsaappe ayayneekka goggooppe
Leviticus15:3 He goggiyaawaappe denddeedawaan he uray tuna gidiyaa wogay hawaa: He goggiyaabay aggenaan gogginakka woy k'ay goggiyaawaa agginttokka he Aa giddon de'iyaabay Aa tunissee.
Leviticus15:4 « ‹Aa bollaappe ayayneekka goggiyaa Asay gisiyaa ay gisuukka tuna; k'ay I uttiyaabay ayaa gidooppekka tuna.
Leviticus15:5 Aa gisuwaa bochchiyaa ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:6 Goggiyaawaana de'iyaa Asay utteeddawaa bolla uttiyaa ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:7 « ‹Goggiyaabay de'iyaa asaa bollaa bochchiyaa ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:8 « ‹Goggiyaabay de'iyaa Asay geeshsha asaa bolla c'uchchooppe
Leviticus15:9 « ‹K'ay goggiyaabay de'iyaa Asay uttiyaa ay kooraykka tuna.
Leviticus15:10 Bareppe garssana de'iyaawaa ayan gidooppekka bochchiyaa ooninne omarssi gakkanaw tuna; k'ay hewantta malatiyaawantta tookkiyaa ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:11 « ‹Goggiyaawaana de'iyaa Asay bare kushiyaa meec'ettennaan de'iidde bochchiyaa Asay ooninne bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:12 « ‹K'ay goggiyaabay de'iyaa Asay bochchiyaa urk'k'aa miishshaa ubbaa mentsite; mitsaappe oosetteedda miishshaa ubbay k'ay haatsaan meec'etto.
Leviticus15:13 « ‹Goggiyaabay de'iyaa Asay he goggiyaawaappe geeyiyaa wode
Leviticus15:14 Hosppuntsa gallassi laau maraa harap'p'etuwaa woy laau mara dogomattuwaa akkiide
Leviticus15:15 K'eesii harap'p'etuwaappe ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshoo
Leviticus15:16 « ‹Ay attuma asaynne bare attumatetsaappe zeretsay gukkooppe
Leviticus15:17 Attumatetsaappe gukkeedda zeretsay bochcheedda mayuwaa ubbay woy galbbaa ubbay haatsaan meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:18 K'ay itti attuma Asay mac'c'a asaana gisina
Leviticus15:19 « ‹Mac'c'a asaw aginaan aginaan yiyaa piilay yooppe
Leviticus15:20 « ‹He piilaa wode iza gisiyaawe ubbay tuna; k'ay iza uttiyaawe ubbaykka tuna.
Leviticus15:21 Iza gisiyaa gisuwaa bochchiyaa ubbay bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; haatsaankka meec'etto; omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:22 Iza uttiyaawaa bochchiyaa ubbay bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:23 Iza gisiyaa gisuwaa gidinakka woy iza uttiyaawaa bochchiyaa ooninne omarssi gakkanaw tuna.
Leviticus15:24 « ‹Ay attuma asaynne he piilaa wode iinanna gisooppe
Leviticus15:25 « ‹Itti mac'c'a mishiratiw izi piilaa wodiyaa gidenaan hara wodiyaan suutsay goggooppe
Leviticus15:26 He suutsay iippe goggiyaa wodiyaan iza giseedda gisuu ubbay
Leviticus15:27 K'ay he tuneeddabatuwaa bochchiyaa ooninne tuna; I bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka meec'etto; k'ay omarssi gakkanaw I tuna.
Leviticus15:28 « ‹Izippe goggiyaabay ek'k'ooppe
Leviticus15:29 Hosppuntsa gallassaan iza laau mara harap'p'etuwaa woy laau mara dogomattuwaa akkaade
Leviticus15:30 K'eesii harap'p'etuwaappe ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshoo ittuwaa k'ay s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo yarshsho. Yaatiide k'eesii iippe goggiyaawaa tunatetsaa diraw Med'inaa Godaa sintsan I nagaraa atto giissee.
Leviticus15:31 « ‹Barenttu giddon de'iyaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa tunissiide Israa'eeliyaa Asay hayk'k'ennaadan
Leviticus15:32 « ‹Aa bollaappe ayayneekka goggiyaa asawunne Aa attumatetsaappe gukkeedda zeretsaan tuniyaa asaw
Leviticus15:33 k'ay bare piilaa gaasuwaan tuniyaa mac'c'a asaw
Leviticus16:1 Aaroona attuma naanay laau Med'inaa Godaa sintsa shiik'iide hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus16:2 «Med'inaa Goday Musa
Leviticus16:3 Aarooni nagaraa yarshshoo itti korumaanne k'ay s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti dorssaa orggiyaa akkiide
Leviticus16:4 «Aarooni liinuwaappe oosetteedda geeshsha k'amishshiyaanne liinuwaappe oosetteedda garssana mayiyaa mayuwaa mayyo. K'ay liinuwaappe oosetteedda danc'c'uwaa danc'c'o; hewaadankka k'ay bare huup'iyaan liinuwaappe oosetteedda shaashiyaa enc'c'urssaa wotso. Hawaanttu geeshsha mayotuwaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus16:5 «Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaray nagaraa yarshshoo laau deeshshaa koletuwaa
Leviticus16:6 Aarooni bare nagaraanne bare soo asaa nagaraa atto giissanaw korumaa yarshsho.
Leviticus16:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus16:8 Yaatiide he laau deeshshatuwaan saamaa yeggina ittuu Med'inaa Godaassa; ittuu k'ay bazzuwaa yeddiyaawaa gidee.
Leviticus16:9 Aarooni Med'inaa Godaw saamay keseedda deeshshaa ahiide
Leviticus16:10 Shin bazzuwaa yeddiyaa saamay keseedda deeshshaa pas'a de'ishshin Med'inaa Godaw shiishsho; bazzuwaa Aa yederssiyaa wode
Leviticus16:11 «Aarooni bare nagaraanne bare soo asaa nagaraa atto giissanaw
Leviticus16:12 K'ay Med'inaa Godaa sintsan de'iyaa yarshshiyaa sa'aappe is'aanaa c'uwissiyaa miishshaa kumentsaa bonk'k'uwaanne
Leviticus16:13 I hayk'k'ennaadan
Leviticus16:14 K'ay he orggiyaa suutsaappe guutsaa akkiide
Leviticus16:15 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan asaa nagaraa yarshshoo gidiyaa deeshshaa shukkiide
Leviticus16:16 Yaatiide Ubbaappe Aad'd'eeda Geeshsha Sa'aa Israa'eeliyaa asaa tunatetsaappenne nagaraappe geeshshee. K'ay unttunttu tunabaa ootsishin
Leviticus16:17 I Ubbaappe Aad'd'eeda Geeshsha Sa'aa geliide
Leviticus16:18 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan I Med'inaa Godaa sintsan de'iyaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa yiide Aa nagaraa atto giisso. Korumaa suutsaappenne deeshshaa suutsaappe guutsaa guutsaa akkiide
Leviticus16:19 K'ay he suutsaappe guutsaa bare birad'd'iyaan akkiide
Leviticus16:20 «Aarooni Ubbaappe Aad'd'eeda Geeshsha Sa'aa
Leviticus16:21 Aarooni bare laau kushetuwaa pas'a de'iyaa deeshshaa huup'iyaan wotsiide
Leviticus16:22 I deeshshaa bazzuwaa yeddina
Leviticus16:23 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus16:24 Geeshsha sa'aan I bare bollaa haatsaan meec'ettiide
Leviticus16:25 K'ay hewaadankka nagaraa yarshshuwaa handdaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan wotsiide s'uuggo.
Leviticus16:26 «Wora yeddiyaa deeshshaa afeeda bitaniikka bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka haatsaan meec'etto. Yaati simmiide dunkkaaneeddasaa yo.
Leviticus16:27 «Nagaraa atto giissanaw Aarooni Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha Sa'aa geleedda wode
Leviticus16:28 Hewaa taman s'uuggeedda bitanii bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka haatsaan meec'etto; Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus16:29 «Hawe hinttenttoo med'inawukka woga gido: laappuntsa aginay geleedda tammuntsa gallassan hintte huup'iyaa kawushshite; Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidina woy k'ay hintte giddon de'iyaa hara biittaa asaa gidinakka
Leviticus16:30 Ayaw gooppe
Leviticus16:31 Hewe hintte waanna shemppuwaa shemppiyaa sambbata gallassaa. He gallassan hintte huup'iyaa kawushshite; hewe hinttenttoo med'inawukka woga gido.
Leviticus16:32 K'ay bare aawuwaa kotaan k'eese gidanaadan okettiyaawenne dummatiyaa Asay geeshsha gideedda liinuwaappe dadetteedda mayuwaa mayyiide
Leviticus16:33 I Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha Sa'aa
Leviticus16:34 Israa'eeliyaa asaa nagaraa ubbaa atto giissiyaa wogaa hintte laytsan laytsan itti gede ootsanaadan
Leviticus17:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus17:2 «Aaroonaw Aa attuma naanatoonne Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawe hawaa:
Leviticus17:3 Israa'eeliyaa asaappe ooninne booraa woy dorssaa woy deeshshaa dunkkaaneedda sa'aan woy dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe gas'aana shukkiide
Leviticus17:4 Med'inaa Godaw imotaa ootsiide immanaw Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsa ahana d'ayooppe
Leviticus17:5 Hewaa diraw Israa'eeliyaa Asay barenttu yarshshuwaa mehiyaa c'oo dembban shukkiyaawaa aggiide
Leviticus17:6 K'ay k'eesii Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan de'iyaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa bollan he suutsaa c'ac'c'afo; handdaakka Med'inaa Godaw sawuwaa toshukku giyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide s'uuggo.
Leviticus17:7 Israa'eeliyaa Asay S'oossaa kaalliyaawaa aggiide kaalleedda s'alahetoo laaentso barenttu yarshshuwaa yarshshoppino. Hawe unttunttoonne yiyaa yeletaa ubbaw med'inaw woga gido› yaaga.
Leviticus17:8 «Unttuntta hawaadan yaaga; ‹Israa'eeliyaa asaappe gidina woy unttunttu giddon de'iyaa hara biittaa asaappe gidinakka
Leviticus17:9 Med'inaa Godaw yarshshanaw Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaa ahana d'ayooppe
Leviticus17:10 « ‹Israa'eeliyaa asaappe woy unttunttu giddon de'iyaa hara biittaa asaappe ooninne suutsaa mooppe
Leviticus17:11 Ayaw gooppe ashuwaa mayyeedda ubbaa de'uu Aa suutsaa giddon de'ee; suutsaykka k'ay de'uwaa shemppuu Aa giddon de'iyaawaappe denddeedawaan nagaraa atto giissiyaawaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus17:12 Hewaa diraw taani Israa'eeliyaa asaa
Leviticus17:13 « ‹Israa'eeliyaa asaappe woy unttunttu giddon de'iyaa hara biittaa asaappe ooninne miyaa do'aa woy kafuwaa shankkatiide wod'ooppe
Leviticus17:14 Ayaw gooppe ashuwaa mayyeedda ubbaa shemppu Aa suutsaa giddona. Hewaa diraw taani Israa'eeliyaa asaa
Leviticus17:15 « ‹Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidina woy unttunttu giddon de'iyaa hara biittaa asaa gidina
Leviticus17:16 Bare mayuwaa meec'c'ana d'ayooppe
Leviticus18:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus18:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Taani
Leviticus18:3 Hintte kase de'eedda Gibs'e biittaa Asay ootsiyaawaadan ootsoppite; woy hai taani hinttena afiyaa Kanaane biittaa Asay ootsiyaawaadankka ootsoppite; unttunttu wogaakka kaalloppite.
Leviticus18:4 Hintte ta azazuwaa ootsite; ta wogaakka naagite; k'ay aan biite. Taani
Leviticus18:5 Hewaa diraw ta azazuwaanne ta wogaa naagooppe
Leviticus18:6 « ‹Hintteppe ooninne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw bare mata dabbuwaana gisoppo. Taani S'oossaa.
Leviticus18:7 Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne daayinna gisoppa; ne aawuwaa kawushshoppa. Iza ne daayo; iinanna gisoppa.
Leviticus18:8 Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne aawuwaa machchattinna gisoppa; ne aawuwaa kawushshoppa.
Leviticus18:9 « ‹Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne michchatina gisoppa; woy k'ay son yeletteedda woy karen yeletteedda ne aawuwaa woy ne daay naattinakka gisoppa.
Leviticus18:10 « ‹Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne na'aa naattinna woy ne naatti naattinna gisoppa. Ne huup'iyaw neena kawushshaasa.
Leviticus18:11 Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne aawuwaa machchati naattinna gisoppa; iza ne michchato gidiyaa diraw iinanna gisoppa.
Leviticus18:12 Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne aawuwaa michchatina gisoppa. Iza ne aawoo mata dabbo.
Leviticus18:13 Ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne daay michchatina gisoppa; iza ne daayiw mata dabbo.
Leviticus18:14 Ne aawuwaa ishaa kalluwaa k'aaraade ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw Aa machchattinna gisoppa; iza ne aawuwaa ishaa machchato.
Leviticus18:15 Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne na'aa machchattinna gisoppa; iza ne na'aa machchato gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus18:16 Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw ne ishaa machchattinna gisoppa; gisooppe ne ishaa kawushshaasa.
Leviticus18:17 « ‹Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw mishiratinanne I naattinanne laa'uwaanna gisoppa. I naatti naattinna woy k'ay I na'aa naattinakka gisoppa; unttunttu iziw mata dabbo gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus18:18 « ‹Ne machchata pas'a de'ishshin
Leviticus18:19 « ‹Ne ashuwaa amuwaa polanaw piilay yiina tuna utteedda mishiratina gisoppa.
Leviticus18:20 « ‹Neeni tunennaadan ne shooruwaa machchattinna gisoppa.
Leviticus18:21 « ‹Ne S'oossaa suntsaa tunissanaw ne naanatuwaappe ittuwaanne taman s'uugiide
Leviticus18:22 « ‹Mac'c'a asaana gisiyaawaadan attuma asaana gisoppa; hewe sheneyiyaabaa.
Leviticus18:23 « ‹Neeni tunennaadan ay mehiyaananne gisoppa
Leviticus18:24 « ‹Taani hintte sintsaappe yederssiyaa kawutetsatuu ha oosotuwaan tuneedda diraw
Leviticus18:25 Haray atto unttunttu biittaykka tuneedda diraw
Leviticus18:26 Shin hintte ta higgiyaanne ta azazuwaa naagiteppe attina
Leviticus18:27 « ‹Hintteppe kase ha gadiyaan de'eedda asatuu hawaa mala tunabaa ootseedda diraw
Leviticus18:28 Hintte ha biittaa tunissooppe
Leviticus18:29 Hewantta malatiyaa tuna oosotuwaappe ittuwaanne ootsiyaa Asay de'ooppe
Leviticus18:30 « ‹Hewaa diraw hintteppe kase de'eedda asatuu ootseedda tuna oosotuwaa ubbaa ootsiide hintte tunennaadan
Leviticus19:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus19:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw ubbaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Taani
Leviticus19:3 « ‹Hintteppe ittuunne attenan bare aabbanne bare daayo bonchcho; ta Sambbatatuwaakka bonchchite. Taani
Leviticus19:4 « ‹Taana aggiide eek'atoo goyinnoppite; woy k'ay birataappe siilisseedda
Leviticus19:5 « ‹Hintte ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa wode
Leviticus19:6 He yarshshuu hintte yarshsheedda gallassan woy wonttetsa gallassan meetetto; heezzentso gallassay gakkanaw atteedawe de'ooppe hewe s'uugetto.
Leviticus19:7 Heezzantso gallassan Aa mooppe
Leviticus19:8 Hewaa miyaa ooninne bare nagaran ooshettee; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus19:9 « ‹Hintte gadiyaan mokkeedda katsaa hintte c'akkiyaa wode
Leviticus19:10 Ne woyniyaa ayfiyaa mule mas'aade mitsaa kalloyoppa; sa'aan wod'd'eedda woyniyaa ayfiyaakka mas'oppa; hewaa hiyyeesatoonne betetoo agga. Taani
Leviticus19:11 « ‹Hintte wuuoppite. « ‹Worddotoppite. « ‹Ittuu ittuwaa c'immoppite.
Leviticus19:12 « ‹Ta suntsan wordduwaan c'aak'k'oppite; yaatiide hintte S'oossaa suntsaa tunissoppite. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:13 « ‹Ne shooruwaa sugoppa; woy bonk'k'oppa. « ‹Keraa ootsiyaa bitaniyaa dirgguwaa diggaade
Leviticus19:14 « ‹Tulliyaa shek'k'oppa; woy k'ay k'ook'iyaa sintsan d'ubbiyaawaa wotsoppa; shin neeni S'oossaw yayya. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:15 « ‹Pirddaa pirddaadde deshissoppa; hiyyeesaa Aa hiyyeesatetsaa diraw maaddaade pirddoppa; duriyaakka Aa duretetsaa diraw yayaade aggoppa. Shin ne shooroo tumatetsan pirddaa.
Leviticus19:16 « ‹Ne asaa giddon iita zigirssaa akkaade yuuyyoppa. « ‹Ne shooruwaa wod'iyaawaa ayaanne ootsoppa. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:17 « ‹Ne ishaa ne wozanaan is's'oppa. « ‹Ne shooruwaa gaasuwaan neeni nagaraa ootsenna mala
Leviticus19:18 « ‹Kushshiyaa c'iggoppa; k'ay ne asaappe ittoonne uluwaan k'immiyaa oyk'k'oppa. Shin ne shooruwaa ne huup'iyaadan siik'a. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:19 « ‹Ta azazotuwaa naaga. « ‹Ne mehiyaappe itti k'ommo mehiyaa hara k'ommo dumma mehiyaan birassissoppa. « ‹Itti shoyk'aan laau k'ommo zeretsaa zeroppa. « ‹K'ay laau k'ommuwaappe dadetteedda mayuwaa mayyoppa.
Leviticus19:20 « ‹Itti Asay hara asaa gelanaw giiga utteedda danggaas'iratina gisooppe
Leviticus19:21 Gidooppenne he bitanii bare naak'uwaa yarshshoo gidiyaa dorssaa orggiyaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaakko Med'inaa Godaa sintsa aho.
Leviticus19:22 K'eesii he naak'uwaa yarshshuwaa dorssaa akkiide
Leviticus19:23 « ‹Hintte Kanaane biittaa geliyaa wode
Leviticus19:24 Oyddentso laytsaan he mitsaa ayfii ubbay Med'inaa Godaw galataa shiishshiyaa geeshsha yarshshuwaa gidanawaa.
Leviticus19:25 Shin he mitsaa ayfii hinttenttoo loytsi darana mala
Leviticus19:26 « ‹Suutsay Aa giddon de'iyaa ay ashuwaakka mooppite. « ‹Kaayoppite woy shareechchoppite.
Leviticus19:27 « ‹Hintte huup'iyaa binnaanaa garssana yuushshi aatsiide k'ans's'oppite; k'ay hintte buuchchaakka yuushshi aatsiide k'ans's'oppite.
Leviticus19:28 « ‹Hayk'k'eeda asaa diraw hintte bollaa k'ans's'ereetsoppite; woy c'achchaa malaataa hintte bollan kessoppite. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:29 « ‹Biittay woddalaa tunatetsan kumeeddawaa gidenna mala
Leviticus19:30 « ‹Ta Sambbatatuwaa bonchchite; taw goynniyaa sa'aakka bonchchite. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:31 « ‹Moyttiliyaa haasayissiyaawanttukkonne shareechchotuwaakko booppite; hintte tunenna mala unttuntta koyyoppite. Taani
Leviticus19:32 « ‹Puulummeedda asaanne c'imeedda asaa be'iyaa wode utteedda sa'aappe dendda ek'k'a; unttuntta bonchcha; ne S'oossaw yayya. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus19:33 « ‹Hintte gadiyaan hinttenana de'iyaa betetuwaa bollan sugetsaabaa ootsoppite.
Leviticus19:34 Hintte gadiyaan hinttenana de'iyaa bete asaa hintte biittaa asaadan s'eellite; Aa hintte huup'iyaadan siik'ite. Ayaw gooppe
Leviticus19:35 « ‹Hintte geesaa likkiyaaban
Leviticus19:36 Hintte kiiluwaa miizaanay
Leviticus19:37 Hintte ta higgiyaanne ta azazuwaa ubbaa naagitenne ootsite. Taani Med'inaa Godaa yaaga› » yaageedda.

Leviticus20:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda
Leviticus20:3 Taani he bitaniyaa is's'ana; Aa asaa giddoppe shoddaade Aa d'ayissana. Ayaw gooppe
Leviticus20:4 He bitanii bare naanatuwaappe ittuwaa Molookaw immiyaa wode
Leviticus20:5 taani ta huup'iyaw he bitaniyaanne he soo asaa is's'ana; Molookena sharmus'anaw Aa kaalliyaa ubbatuwaa unttunttu asaa giddoppe bohitte.
Leviticus20:6 « ‹Ay asaynne taanan ammanettennan is's'iide
Leviticus20:7 « ‹Taani
Leviticus20:8 Ta higgiyaa naagitenne ootsite. Taani hinttena geeshshiyaa Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus20:9 « ‹Ay asaynne bare aawuwaa woy bare daayo shek'k'ooppe hayk'k'o. I bare aawuwaa woy bare daayo shek'k'eedda diraw
Leviticus20:10 « ‹Itti Asay bare shooruwaa machchattinna gisooppe
Leviticus20:11 Bare aawuwaa machchattinna giseedda Asay bare aawuwaa kawushshiseedda; unttunttu laauukka hayk'k'ino. Unttunttu suutsaa ac'uu unttunttu bollana.
Leviticus20:12 Itti Asay bare na'aa machchattinna gisooppe
Leviticus20:13 « ‹Itti attuma Asay mac'c'a asaana gisiyaawaadan attuma asaana gisooppe
Leviticus20:14 Itti Asay naattonne aattonne ittippe akkiyaawaa gidooppe
Leviticus20:15 « ‹Itti Asay mehiyaanna gisooppe
Leviticus20:16 Itti mac'c'a asi mehiyaanna gisooppe he mishiratonne he mehiyaa laauwaakka wod'ite; unttunttu hayk'k'ino. Unttunttu suutsaa ac'uu unttunttu bollana.
Leviticus20:17 « ‹Itti Asay bare michchato bare aawuwaa naattinna woy bare daay naattinna gisooppe
Leviticus20:18 Itti Asay piilay yeedda mac'c'aani kalluwaa k'aariide iinanna gisooppe
Leviticus20:19 « ‹Ne daay michchatina woy ne aawuwaa michchatina gisoppa; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus20:20 Itti Asay bare aawuwaa ishaa machchattinna gisooppe
Leviticus20:21 Itti Asay bare ishaa machchato akkooppe
Leviticus20:22 « ‹Simmi hintte de'anaadan
Leviticus20:23 Taani hintte sintsaappe d'ayissiyaa asatuwaa de'uwaa wogaa kaalloppite. Unttunttu hawaa ubbaa ootseedda diraw
Leviticus20:24 Shin taani hinttena
Leviticus20:25 « ‹Hewaa diraw hintte geeshsha gideedda mehetuwaanne kafotuwaa geeshsha gidennawanttuppe shaakkiide erite. Taani hawanttu hinttenttoo tuna ga wotseedda mehetuwaan
Leviticus20:26 Taani Med'inaa Goday geeshsha gidiyaa dirawunne hintte tawaa gidana mala hinttena hara asaappe dummayeedda diraw
Leviticus20:27 « ‹Itti attuma Asay woy mac'c'a Asay moyttilliyaanna haasayiyaawaa woy shareechcho gidooppe

Leviticus21:2 bare mata dabbo
Leviticus21:3 woy asinaa gelennaan
Leviticus21:4 K'ay akuwaaninne geluwaan dabboteedda asaa anhaa bochchiidekka barena tunissoppo.
Leviticus21:5 « ‹K'eesetuu hayk'k'eeddawoo kayyottanaw barenttu huup'iyaa meedettoppino; barenttu buuchchaakka k'antsaan k'ans's'oppino; woy k'ay barenttu bollaakka k'ans's'ereetsoppino.
Leviticus21:6 Unttunttu barenttu S'oossaw geeshsha gidino; k'ay barenttu S'oossaa suntsaakka tunissoppino. Ayaw gooppe unttunttu Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uugiide yarshshiyaa
Leviticus21:7 « ‹K'aykka k'eesatuu sharmus'a mac'c'a asaa
Leviticus21:8 K'eesii hintte S'oossaw k'umaa yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaawaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus21:9 Ay k'eesiyaa naatto gidooppekka sharmus'aade barena tunissooppe
Leviticus21:10 « ‹K'eesiyaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu
Leviticus21:11 Ay anhaa gidooppekka
Leviticus21:12 Aa geeshshanaw okkiyaa S'oossaa zayitii Aa bollan de'iyaa diraw
Leviticus21:13 « ‹K'eesii wodoro mac'c'a naatto akko.
Leviticus21:14 Asinay hayk'k'eedda mishirato
Leviticus21:15 Yaanana d'ayooppe
Leviticus21:16 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Leviticus21:17 «Neeni Aaroonaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Sintsanna yiyaa ne zeretsaappe bollay tilla gidenna Asay ooninne k'umaa yarshshuwaa taw immanaw shiik'oppo.
Leviticus21:18 Ayaw gooppe bollay tilla gidenna Asay ooninne shiik'anaw bessena. K'ook'a
Leviticus21:19 woy gediyaa woy kushiyaa silay
Leviticus21:20 woy k'uunay
Leviticus21:21 K'eesiyaa Aaroona zariyaappe bollay tilla gidenna Asay ooninne Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa shiishshanaw shiik'oppo. Aw bollay tilla gidennawaa gidowaappe hini baggan
Leviticus21:22 I geeshsha k'umaanne k'ay geeshsha ubbaappe ittuwaa gideedda geeshsha yarshshuwaa bare S'oossaa k'umaakka maanaw danddayee.
Leviticus21:23 Shin aw bollay tilla gidenna diraw
Leviticus21:24 Muse Aaroonaw
Leviticus22:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus22:2 «Ta geeshsha suntsaa unttunttu tunissenna mala
Leviticus22:3 «Unttunttoo hawaadan yaaga; ‹Sintsanna yiyaa yeletaa ubbaan hintte zariyaappe ooninne tuni uttiide
Leviticus22:4 « ‹Aaroona zariyaappe wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii de'iyaa
Leviticus22:5 Woy k'ay sa'aanna gooshettiyaa
Leviticus22:6 woy hewaa malabaa ayaanne bochchiyaa asay
Leviticus22:7 Away wulliyaa wode I geeshsha gidee; Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus22:8 Barew hayk'k'eeddawaa woy do'ay wod'eedda mehiyaa ashuwaa mooppo; hewe tunissiyaabaa. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus22:9 « ‹K'eesetuu ta wogaa; naagennan is's'ooppe
Leviticus22:10 « ‹He geeshsha yarshshuwaa k'eesiyaa soo asaappe attina
Leviticus22:11 Shin k'eesii bare biran shammeedda ayiliyaa woy Aa son yeletteedda ayilii he k'umaappe mo.
Leviticus22:12 K'eesiyaa gidenna hara asaa geleedda k'eesiyaa naatta he geeshsha yarshshuwaappe muuppu.
Leviticus22:13 Shin k'eesiyaa naatta asinay hayk'k'ina
Leviticus22:14 « ‹Itti Asay erennan de'iidde geeshsha yarshshuwaappe mooppe
Leviticus22:15 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa geeshsha yarshshuwaa k'eesatuu tunissoppino.
Leviticus22:16 Unttunttu barenttu aheedda geeshsha yarshshuwaa barew miide
