Leviticus22:18 «Aaroonaw
Leviticus22:19 he yarshshuu akettana mala
Leviticus22:20 Bollay tilla gidennawe ayaa gidooppenne aketena diraw
Leviticus22:21 « ‹K'ay oona gidooppenne bare shiik'k'owaa gatsanaw ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa S'oossaw yarshshiyaa wode
Leviticus22:22 Hintte mehiyaappe k'ook'iyaa
Leviticus22:23 Aa bollan pac'a med'etay woy pac'abay de'iyaa korumaa woy dorssaa itti Asay bare dosuwaan c'oo immiyaa yarshshoo shiishshanaw danddayee; shin shiik'uu gatso gidooppe
Leviticus22:24 Sanggisetteeddawaa woy k'os'etteeddawaa woy kaatsay maytteeddawaa woy k'ans's'etteeddawaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshshoppite. Hintte gadiyaan hewaa malabaa ootsoppite.
Leviticus22:25 Hintte giddon de'iyaa allaga asatuwaappe akkeedda hewaa mala mehiyaakka hintte S'oossaw k'uma ootsiide shiishshoppite. Unttunttu bollay tilla gidennawaa gaasuwaan unttunttun pokkuu de'iyaa diraw
Leviticus22:26 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus22:27 «Miizzaa maray woy dorssaa maray woy deeshshaa maray yelettiyaa wode
Leviticus22:28 Miyatoo
Leviticus22:29 «Hintte galataa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw shiishshiyaa wode
Leviticus22:30 He yarshshuu he gallassikka meetettanaw koshshee; aappe ayaanne wonttiw ashshoppite. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus22:31 «Ta azazuwaa naagitenne ootsite. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus22:32 K'ay ta geeshsha suntsaa hintte tunissoppite; Israa'eeliyaa asaa giddon taani geeshsha gidiyaawe erettanaw bessee. Hinttena geeshshiyaawe
Leviticus22:33 Hinttew S'oossaa gidanaw
Leviticus23:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus23:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Geeshsha shiik'uwaa gi awaayiide
Leviticus23:3 « ‹Hintte usuppun gallassaa oosuwaa ootsiita; shin laappuntsa gallassi hintte shemppiyaa Sambbata gallassaa; he gallassan geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; ayaa oosonne ootsoppite; hintte de'iyaa sa'aan ubbaan hewe Med'inaa Godaw Sambbataa.
Leviticus23:4 « ‹Unttunttu wodiyaan wodiyaan geeshsha shiik'uwaa ootsi awaayiide hintte bonchchanaw bessiyaa Med'inaa Godaa baalatuu hawantta.
Leviticus23:5 Koyro aginaan tammanne oyddentso gallassi sa'ay omarssiyaa wode
Leviticus23:6 « ‹K'ay he aginankka tammanne ichcheshentso gallassay Med'inaa Godaa magaage Ukitsaa Baalaa gallassaa; hewaa diraw laappun gallassatuwaan irshshuu gelibeenna ukitsaa miite.
Leviticus23:7 He gallassatuwaappe koyiro gallassan geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; daaburssiyaa oosuwaa ayaanne ootsoppite.
Leviticus23:8 Laappun gallassaa ubbaa Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa shiishshite; laappuntsa gallassan k'ay geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; daaburssiyaa oosuwaa ayaanne ootsoppite› yaaga» yaageedda.
Leviticus23:9 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus23:10 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Taani hinttenttoo immiyaa biittaa geliide
Leviticus23:11 Med'inaa Goday hinttewaa akkana mala
Leviticus23:12 He hintte mirk'k'iyaa k'aatseedda gallassi tilla bollaanna de'iyaa itti laytsaa dorssaa orggiyaa s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide Med'inaa Godaw shiishshite.
Leviticus23:13 He yarshshuwaanna ittippe wogaraa zayitiyaan munak'etteedda laau kiilo giraame loo d'iiliyaa katsaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide shiishshite; hewe Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa
Leviticus23:14 Ha yarshshuwaa hintte hintte S'oossaw shiishshiyaa gallassay gakkanaw
Leviticus23:15 « ‹Hintte k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa mirk'k'iyaa aheedda Sambbata wonttetsappe doommiide
Leviticus23:16 Laappuntsa Sambbataa wonttetsa gallassay gakkanaw
Leviticus23:17 Hintte ak'iyaa sa'aappe laau kiilo giraame gidiyaa loo d'iiliyaappe irshshuwaa yeggiide uukkeedda laau ukitsaa k'aatsanaw akki yiite. Hewe koyiro gakkeedda katsaa ayfiyaappe Med'inaa Godaw yarshshuwaa gidee.
Leviticus23:18 He ukitsaanna ittippe tilla bollaanna de'iyaa itti laytsaa gideedda laappun dorssaa maratuwaa
Leviticus23:19 K'ay itti deeshshaa orggiyaa nagaraa yarshshoo
Leviticus23:20 « ‹K'eesii he koyiro gakkeedda katsaa ayfiyaa ukitsaanne he laau dorssatuwaa k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide
Leviticus23:21 He gallassikka awaayiide geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; daaburssiyaa ooso ayaanne ootsoppite. Hawe hintte de'iyaa saan ubbaan sintsanna yiyaa yeletaw ubbaw med'inaw woga.
Leviticus23:22 « ‹Hintte gadiyaan mokkeedda katsaa hintte c'akkiyaa wode
Leviticus23:23 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus23:24 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Laappuntsa aginaan koyiro gallassaa shemppo gallassaa ootsiide bonchchite; hassayissuwaa malakataykka punettiyaa wode
Leviticus23:25 He gallassan Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa shiishshiteppe attina
Leviticus23:26 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus23:27 «Ha laappuntsa aginaw tammantsa gallassay nagaraa atto giissiyaa gallassaa; he gallassi geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; k'ay hintte huup'iyaa kawushshite; yaatiide Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa shiishshite.
Leviticus23:28 He gallassay Med'inaa Godaa hintte S'oossaa sintsan hintte nagaray atto geetettana mala
Leviticus23:29 He gallassi barenatetsaa kawushshenna Asay ooninne bare asaa giddoppe bohetto.
Leviticus23:30 He gallassi ayaa oosuwaa gidooppenne ootsiyaa asaa taani Aa asaa giddoppe d'ayissana.
Leviticus23:31 He gallassi ay oosuwaanne ootsoppite. Hawe hintte de'iyaa saan ubbaan sintsanna yiyaa yeletaw ubbaw med'inaw woga.
Leviticus23:32 Hewe hintte waanna shemppuwaa shemppiyaa Sambbata gallassaa. He gallassan hintte huup'iyaa kawushshite. He aginaan udduppuntsa gallassan omarssaappe doommiide
Leviticus23:33 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus23:34 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Ha laappuntsa aginaan tammanne ichcheshentso gallassaappe doommiide
Leviticus23:35 He gallassatuwaappe koyiro gallassan geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; daaburssiyaa oosuwaa ayaanne ootsoppite.
Leviticus23:36 Laappun gallassan ubbaan Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa shiishshite; hosppuntsa gallassan k'ay geeshsha shiik'uwaa shiik'ite; Med'inaa Godaw taman yarshshiyaa yarshshuwaakka shiishshite. He gallassay hintte shiik'uwaa poliyaa gallassaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus23:37 « ‹Taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanne katsaa yarshshuwaa
Leviticus23:38 Ha baalatuu Med'inaa Godaa Sambbatatuwaappe
Leviticus23:39 « ‹Laappuntsa aginaan tammanne ichcheshentso gallassan hintte gadiyaan mokkeeddawaa c'akkiide shiishsheeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus23:40 Koyro gallassan loo mitsaa ayifiyaappe
Leviticus23:41 He baalaa laytsan laytsan laappun gallassaa Med'inaa Godaw bonchchite. Hewe sintsanna yiyaa yeletaw ubbaw med'inaw woga. Hintte hewaa laappuntsa aginaan bonchchite.
Leviticus23:42 He laappun gallassaa hintte daasiyan de'ite; Israa'eeliyaa biittaa asaa gidiyaa ubbay daasiyan de'ite.
Leviticus23:43 Hewe sintsanna yiyaa yeletay ubbay Israa'eeliyaa asaa taani Gibs'eppe Kesseedda wode
Leviticus23:44 Hewaadan ootsiide
Leviticus24:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus24:2 «S'omppii to'ennan ees's'iidde de'ana mala
Leviticus24:3 Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon de'iyaa markkatetsaa gaariduwaappe kare baggana
Leviticus24:4 S'omppiyaa wotsiyaa
Leviticus24:5 «Laatamanne oyddu kiilo giraame gidiyaa liik'o d'iiliyaa akkaade tammanne laau ukitsaa uukka.
Leviticus24:6 He ukitsatuwaa usuppunatuwaa ittuwaa ittuwaa bolla usuppunatuwaa ittuwaa ittuwaa bollan Med'inaa Godaa sintsan de'iyaa walakay bayinna work'k'aa s'arap'p'eezaa bollan wotsa.
Leviticus24:7 Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uugganaw shiishsheedda k'umaa yarshshuwaa gidiyaawaa erissanaw
Leviticus24:8 Ha ukitsaa Sambbatan Sambbatan ubbaa wode Aarooni Med'inaa Godaa sintsan Israa'eeliyaa asaa diraw wotso. Hewe Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbaa wode ootsanaw koshshiyaa k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa.
Leviticus24:9 Hewe Aaroonawunne Aa attuma naanaatoo imetto; I Med'inaa Godaw taman s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaappe wogaadan Aaroonanne Aa naanatuwaa gakkiyaa ubbaappe geeshsha gideedda yarshshuwaappe ittuwaa gidiyaa geeshsha yarshshuwaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus24:10 Aata Israa'eeliyaa asaa
Leviticus24:11 Ha aw aata Israa'eeliyaa asaa gideedda bitanii wad'etaa giddon S'oossaa suntsaa shek'k'eedda. Yaatina Aa Musekko aheeddino. He bitaniyaa aata Daana yaraa gidiyaa S'iibira naatto. I suntsaykka Shalomiito.
Leviticus24:12 Ha bitaniyaa waatanentto Med'inaa Godaa shenii unttunttoo k'onc'c'ana gakkanaw
Leviticus24:13 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Leviticus24:14 «He shek'k'eedda bitaniyaa dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe gas'aa kessa; I shek'ishshin siseedda Asay ubbay barenttu kushiyaa Aa huup'iyaa bollan wotsino; yaatooppe Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaray ubbay Aa shuchchaan c'addiide wod'o.
Leviticus24:15 Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; Ay asaynne bare S'oossaa shek'k'ooppe
Leviticus24:16 Med'inaa Godaa suntsaa shek'k'iyaa Asay hayk'k'o; Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaray ubbay Aa shuchchaan c'addo. Betiide yeeddawaa gidina woy biittaa asaa gidinakka Med'inaa Godaa suntsaa shek'k'ooppe hayk'k'o.
Leviticus24:17 « ‹Asa wod'iyaa Asay hayk'k'o.
Leviticus24:18 Asaa mehiyaa wod'iyaa Asay ooninne bare wod'eedda mehiyaa diraw pas'a mehiyaa c'iggo.
Leviticus24:19 Itti Asay bare shooruwaa k'ohooppe
Leviticus24:20 Mentsooppe meo; ayfiyaa diraw ayfiyaa; achchaa diraw achchaa. Asaa bollan k'ohuwaa gatseedda oonikka I gatseedda k'ohuwaa malay Aa bollankka gakko.
Leviticus24:21 Mehiyaa wod'eedda Asay mehiyaa c'iggo; shin asaa wod'eedda Asay hayk'k'o.
Leviticus24:22 Betiyawukka Israa'eeliyaa asaw higgii itti mala gido; ayaw gooppe Taani Med'inaa Godaa hintte S'oossaa› yaaga» yaageedda.
Leviticus24:23 Hewaa ubbaa Muse Israa'eeliyaa asaw ubbaw odeedda; unttunttu he shek'k'eedda bitaniyaa dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe gas'aa kessiide
Leviticus25:1 Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus25:2 «Neeni Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Taani hinttenttoo immiyaa biittaa hintte geliyaa wode
Leviticus25:3 Usuppun laytsaa kumentsaa hintte shoyk'aan zerite; k'ay usuppun laytsaa kumentsaakka hintte woyniyaa turaa s'eeraa s'unk'k'ite; Aa ayfiyaakka mas'i akkite.
Leviticus25:4 Shin laappuntsa laytsay biittaw shemppo Sambbata; hewe Med'inaa Godawukka Sambbata. He laappuntsa laytsan hintte shoyk'aan zeroppite; hintte woyniyaa s'eeraakka s'unk'k'oppite.
Leviticus25:5 Hintte gadiyaan azabbaa gidiide mokkiyaawaakka c'akkoppite; k'ay s'unk'k'ennan de'ishshin c'oo ayfeedda woyniyaakka shiishshoppite. He laytsay biittaw ubbaanna shemppo laytsaa gido.
Leviticus25:6 He Sambbata laytsan biittay oosettana d'ayooppe hinttenttoo
Leviticus25:7 
Leviticus25:8 « ‹Laytsatuwaa giddon de'iyaa laappun Sambbatatuwaa payda; laappun Sambbatatuwaa laytsaa payduu laappu gede laappuna; hewekka oytamanne udduppun laytsaa.
Leviticus25:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Leviticus25:10 Ishatamantso laytsaa dummayiide
Leviticus25:11 He laytsay hinttenttoo Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa. He laytsan zeroppite; azabbaa gidiide mokkeeddawaakka c'akkoppite; k'ay hintte Aa s'eeraa s'unk'k'ennan ayfeedda woyniyaa ayfiyaakka shiishshoppite.
Leviticus25:12 Hewe Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baala gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus25:13 « ‹Ha Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa wode Asay ubbay bare gadiyaa simmo.
Leviticus25:14 « ‹Hintte hintte shooruwaappe gadiyaa shammooppe
Leviticus25:15 Hintte Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaappe guyyiyaan de'iyaa laytsatuwaa payduwaadan hintte shooruwaappe shammite; hintte shooruukka k'ay gadii katsaa mokkanaw de'iyaa laytsatuwaa payduwaadan zalo.
Leviticus25:16 Laytsatuwaa paydu daro gidooppe
Leviticus25:17 Hintte ittuu ittuwaa c'immoppite; shin hintte hintte S'oossaw yayyite. Taani Med'inaa Goday
Leviticus25:18 « ‹Ta azazuwaa ootsite; ta higgiyaakka naagitenne ootsite; yaatooppe hintte ha gadiyaan sarotetsaan de'ana.
Leviticus25:19 Biittay bare ayfiyaa hinttenttoo immana; hintte kallana gakkanaw maana; k'ay he biittankka hintte sarotetsaan de'ana.
Leviticus25:20 Hintte
Leviticus25:21 taani usuppuntsa laytsan ta anjjuwaa hintte bollan kiittana; yaatooppe biittay heezzu laytsaw gidiyaa ayfiyaa ayfana.
Leviticus25:22 Hosppuntsa laytsan hintte hintte gadiyaan zeriyaa wodekka
Leviticus25:23 « ‹Biittay tawaa gidiyaa dirawunne hinttekka ha gadiyaan imatsaanne bete gidiide de'iyaa diraw
Leviticus25:24 Hintte oyk'k'eedda gadiyaan ubbaan de'iyaa gadiyaa godatuu wozana mala
Leviticus25:25 « ‹Ne ishay hiyyeesiide bare gadiyaappe zalooppe
Leviticus25:26 Aw he gadiyaa woziyaa dabbuu d'ayooppe
Leviticus25:27 bare zaleedda wodiyaappe doommiide de'iyaa laytsaa paydiidde
Leviticus25:28 Shin aw he gadiyaa wozanaw gidiyaa shaluu d'ayooppe
Leviticus25:29 « ‹Gimbbetti utteedda katamaa giddon itti Asay de'iyaa golliyaa hara uraw zalooppe
Leviticus25:30 Itti laytsaa kumentsaa giddon wozana d'ayooppe
Leviticus25:31 Shin gimbbettibeenna heeratuwaan de'iyaa golletuu shoyk'aa mala. Unttunttu wozettiino; Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa wodekka zaleeddawoo simmiino.
Leviticus25:32 « ‹Gidooppenne Leewatuwaa katamatuwaan de'iyaa barenttu golliyaa Leewatuu barenttu koyeedda wodiyaan wozi akkanaw danddayiino.
Leviticus25:33 Leewatuwaappe itti Asay unttunttu katamaa giddon de'iyaa golliyaa zaliide wozana d'ayooppe
Leviticus25:34 Shin unttunttu katamaa yuushshuwaan unttunttu ubbaw ittippe de'iyaa biittay unttunttoo med'inaw ak'o gidiyaa diraw zalettenna.
Leviticus25:35 « ‹K'ay ne ishay hiyyeesiide barena danddayana d'ayooppe
Leviticus25:36 Ne ishaa neenana wotsanaw aappe dichchaa akkoppa; woy wod'iyaa mooppa. Shin neeni ne S'oossaw yayya.
Leviticus25:37 Ne biraa aw dichchaw taloppa; ne k'umaakka aw wod'iyaan zaloppa.
Leviticus25:38 Hinttew Kanaane biittaa immanawunne hintte S'oossaa gidanaw
Leviticus25:39 « ‹New dabbo gidiyaa Israa'eeliyaa Asay mank'k'iide
Leviticus25:40 I keraa ootsiyaa asaadaaninne betiyaadan neenana de'o; Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw I new ootso.
Leviticus25:41 He wode I bare naanatuwaannakka ittippe ne golleppe kesiide bare golliyaa asaakko bo; bare aawuwaa gadiyaakkokka simmo.
Leviticus25:42 Israa'eelatuu taani Gibs'e gadiyaappe Kesseedda ta ayiletuwaa gidiyaa diraw
Leviticus25:43 Neeni unttunttoo mek'etsaa iitaade mooddoppa; shin neeni ne S'oossaw yayya.
Leviticus25:44 « ‹New attumanne mac'c'a ayiletuu de'ana mala koyooppe
Leviticus25:45 K'ay hintte gadiyaan de'iyaa betetuwaappenne hintte gadiyaan de'ishshin yeletteedda unttunttu soo asaappe shammanaw danddayiita; unttunttu hinttenttoo ak'o gidino.
Leviticus25:46 Hintteppe guyyiyaan hintte naanay unttuntta med'inaw laattana mala
Leviticus25:47 « ‹Ne matan de'iyaa imatsaa woy bete Asay duretina
Leviticus25:48 I zaletti simmina Aa wozanaw danddayettee; Aa ishatuwaappe ittuu Aa wozo.
Leviticus25:49 Woy Aa aawuwaa ishay
Leviticus25:50 I barena shammeedda bitaniyaanna ittippe gidiide
Leviticus25:51 Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw biro daro laytsay atteedawaa gidooppe
Leviticus25:52 K'ay Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw atteeda laytsay guutsaa gidooppe
Leviticus25:53 I laytsan laytsan keraa ootsiyaa asaadan barena shammeeddawaanna de'oppe attina
Leviticus25:54 « ‹Shin I hewaa mala ogiyaan wozettana d'ayooppe
Leviticus25:55 Ayaw gooppe
Leviticus26:1 Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Hintte unttunttoo goynnanaw eek'atuwaa med'd'oppite; k'ay hawulttiyaa
Leviticus26:2 Ta Sambbatatuwaa naagite; ta Dunkkaaniyaa bonchchite; Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Leviticus26:3 «Hintte ta higgiyaan booppe
Leviticus26:4 taani hinttenttoo iraa wodiyaan bukissana; biittaykka katsaa darissiide mokkana; dembbaa mitsatuukka ayfiyaa ayifana.
Leviticus26:5 Hintte katsaa bukkiyaa wodiyaappe biide woyniyaa ayfiyaa mas'iyaa wodii gakkanaw katsaa k'os's'ana; k'ay woyniyaa ayfiyaa mas'uukka biide katsaa zeriyaa wodii gakkanaw wurenna. Hintte kallana gakkanaw k'umaa maana; k'ay hintte hintte biittankka saruwaan de'ana.
Leviticus26:6 «Taani biittaw sarotetsaa immana; ooninne yashissennan hintte gisana. Iita do'atuwaa taani gadiyaappe d'ayissana; hintte gadiyaan laaentso olay denddenna.
Leviticus26:7 Hintte morkkatuwaa hintte yederssana; hintte sintsan unttunttu mashshaan hayk'k'ana.
Leviticus26:8 Hintteppe ichcheshu s'eetuwaa yederssana; k'ay s'eetuu tammu shaaa yederssana. Hintte morkketuu hintte sintsan mashshaan hayk'k'ana.
Leviticus26:9 «Taani ta deemuwaa hinttekko zaarana; hinttena ayfissana; hinttena darissana. K'ay taani ta c'aak'uwaa hinttenana minisana.
Leviticus26:10 Hintte shaachcha katsaa maana; k'ay ha laytsaa katsaa wotsanaw
Leviticus26:11 Taani ta de'iyaa sa'aa hintte giddon ootsana; taani hinttena shaattikke.
Leviticus26:12 Taani hintte gidduwaan hamettana; k'ay hintte S'oossaa gidana; hinttekka ta asaa gidanita.
Leviticus26:13 Hintte Gibs'etoo ayiliyaa gidennaadan
Leviticus26:14 «Shin hintte taani giyaawaa sisennan is's'ooppenne
Leviticus26:15 ta wogaa hintte kad'ooppe
Leviticus26:16 he wode taani hintte bolla hawaa ootsana: Hintte akeekenan de'ishshin yashshaa
Leviticus26:17 Taani ta somuwaa hintte bolla tukkana; hintte morkkatuwaa sintsan hintte kunddana; hinttena is's'iiyaawanttu hinttena mooddana; k'ay ooninne yederssenan hintte bak'atana.
Leviticus26:18 «Hawaa ubbaa ootsinakka hintte taana sisennan is's'ooppe
Leviticus26:19 Hintte wolk'k'aa otoruwaa taani mentsana; saluwaa birataa mala ootsana; hintte biittaakka nahaasiyaa giyaa birataa mala ootsana.
Leviticus26:20 Hintte wolk'k'ay hadasan wurana; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus26:21 «Hintte taw is's'eeddo gooppenne taani giyaawaakka sisennan is's'ooppe
Leviticus26:22 Taani hintte bolla bazzuwaa do'atuwaa yeddana; unttunttu hintte naanatuwaa bonk'k'ana; hintte mehetuwaa d'ayssana; hintte payduwaakka guutsana; hewaa gaasuwaan hintte hamettiyaa ogii bazzuwaa gidanawaa.
Leviticus26:23 «Ha ubbaa murankka hintte taakko simmennaan is's'aaddi giide booppe
Leviticus26:24 he wode taanikka hinttenttoo is's'aaddi gaana; k'ay hintte nagaraa diraw taani ta huup'iyaw hinttena laappun dakkuwaa murana.
Leviticus26:25 Ta c'aak'uwaa mentseedda haluwaa kesiyaa mashshaa taani hintte bolla ahana; hintte hintte katamatuwaan shiik'ooppekka
Leviticus26:26 Hintte katsaa taani d'ayssiyaa wode
Leviticus26:27 «Ha ubbankka hintte taani giyaawaa sisennan is's'aaddi giide booppe
Leviticus26:28 he wode taanikka hintte bolla hank'k'uwaan denddana; hintte nagaraa diraw taani ta huup'iyaw hinttena laappun dakkuwaa muran.
Leviticus26:29 Hintte hintte attuma naanatuwaanne hintte mac'c'a naanatuwaa ashuwaa maana.
Leviticus26:30 Hintte goynniyaa d'ok'k'a sa'aa taani kolana; hintte is'aanaa yarshshiyaa sa'aakka d'ayssana. Taani hintte anhaa hintte eek'atuwaa anhaa bollan olana; taani hinttena mule shaataanna.
Leviticus26:31 Taani hintte katamatuwaa mela ootsana; hintte goynniyaa sa'atuwaakka kolereetsana; hintte sawiyaa yarshshuwaakka singgikke.
Leviticus26:32 «Taani hintte biittaa d'ayssana; yaatooppe he hintte gadiyaan yiide uttiyaa morkketuukka hewaan malalettana.
Leviticus26:33 Taani hinttena kawutetsatuwaa giddon laalana; hintte bollankka ta mashshaa shoddana. Hintte biittay bayana; hintte katamatuukka mela gidana.
Leviticus26:34 He hintte hintte morkkatuwaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wode
Leviticus26:35 Hintte he gadiyaan de'eedda wodiyaan ubbaan hintte Sambbatatuwaan demmibeenna shemppuwaa hai bayiide c'oo de'iyaa wodiyaan demmana.
Leviticus26:36 «Hintte hintte morkkatuwaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wode
Leviticus26:37 Hinttena yederssiyaawe bayinnan de'ishshin
Leviticus26:38 Hintte kawutetsatuwaa giddon bayana; hintte morkkatuwaa biittaykka hinttena mittana.
Leviticus26:39 Hintteppe shaakettiide hintte morkkatuwaa gadiyaan atteedawaanttu barenttu nagaraa gaasuwaaninne barenttu aawotuwaa nagaraa gaasuwaan gilk'k'ana.
Leviticus26:40 «Shin unttunttu taani unttunttoo is's'eedda gaanaadaaninne unttunttu morkkatuwaa biittaw unttuntta yeddanaadan ootseedda barenttu nagaraa
Leviticus26:41 hewan k'ay unttunttu azazettena wozanaykka zik'k'i gooppenne unttunttu barenttu nagaraa muraa akkooppe
Leviticus26:42 he wode taani Yaak'oobana c'aak'k'eteedda ta c'aak'uwaa hassayana; k'ay Yisaak'ananne Abrahaamena c'aak'k'eteedda ta c'aak'uwaa hassayana; biittaakka hassayana.
Leviticus26:43 Unttunttu d'ay diggina
Leviticus26:44 «Gidooppenne unttunttu barenttu morkkatuwaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wode
Leviticus26:45 Taani unttunttu S'oossaa gidanaw
Leviticus26:46 «Med'inaa Goday Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Muse bagganna bareppenne Israa'eeliyaa asaappe gidduwaan wotseedda wogatuu
Leviticus27:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Leviticus27:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Itti Asay Med'inaa Godaw immanaw shiik'ooppe
Leviticus27:3 Hewenne laatamu laytsaappe biide usuppun tammu laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa attumawoo usuppun s'eetu giraamiyaa dees'iyaa s'agaraa biraa c'iggo.
Leviticus27:4 Mac'c'a asaa gidooppe k'ay hattamu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo.
Leviticus27:5 K'ay ichcheshu laytsaappe biide laatamu laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa attumawoo laatamu s'agaraa biraanne mac'c'aaniw tammu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo.
Leviticus27:6 K'aykka itti aginaappe biide ichcheshu laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa attumawoo ichcheshu s'agaraa biraanne mac'c'aaniw heezzu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo.
Leviticus27:7 Hewaadankka k'ay usuppun tammu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawoo tammanne ichcheshu s'agaraa biraanne mac'c'aaniw tammu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo.
Leviticus27:8 K'ay shiik'k'eedda bitanii neeni k'oppeeddawaa c'igganaw danddayenna daro mank'k'o gidooppe
Leviticus27:9 « ‹I shiik'etteeddawe Asay Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa mala mehiyaa yarshshanaw gidooppe
Leviticus27:10 I he mehiyaa diraw hara mehiyaa immoppo; woy Aa hara mehiyaanna laammoppo. Louwaa iitaanna woy k'ay iitaakka louwaanna laammoppo; shin I laammooppe
Leviticus27:11 I shiik'etteedda mehii Med'inaa Godaw yarshshuwaa ootsiide shiishshanaw geeshsha gidenna mehiyaa gidooppe
Leviticus27:12 Loo gidina iita gidina
Leviticus27:13 Shin he mehiyaa goday Aa zaariide wozanaw koyooppe
Leviticus27:14 « ‹Itti Asay bare golliyaa geeshsha gidanaadan Med'inaa Godaw dummayooppe
Leviticus27:15 K'ay bare golliyaa S'oossaw geeshsha ootsi dummayeedda Asay zaaretsiide wozanaw koyooppe
Leviticus27:16 « ‹Itti Asay bare laata gadiyaappe shaakkiide geeshsha ootsi Med'inaa Godaw dummayooppe
Leviticus27:17 I bare gadiyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaappe doommiide geeshsha ootsi S'oossaw dummayooppe
Leviticus27:18 Shin I bare gadiyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay aad'd'i simmina geeshsha ootsi S'oossaw dummayooppe
Leviticus27:19 He gadiyaa geeshsha ootsi S'oossaw dummayeedda Asay zaaretsi wozanaw koyooppe
Leviticus27:20 Shin I gadiyaa zaaretsiide
Leviticus27:21 Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkina gadii yedettiyaa wode
Leviticus27:22 « ‹Itti Asay hara asaappe shammeedda gadiyaa geeshsha ootsi Med'inaa Godaw dummayanaw koyooppe
Leviticus27:23 kaalliyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw de'iyaa gatiyaa k'eesii gammato; bitanii he gallassikka he gimmitiyaa c'iggo; he miishshay Med'inaa Godaw dummateedda miishshaa gidanawaa.
Leviticus27:24 Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkiyaa wode
Leviticus27:25 « ‹Aa gatii S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan erettiyaa miizaanan gammatettee.
Leviticus27:26 « ‹Shin ooninne bayira yeletteedda mehiyaa Med'inaa Godaw dummayiide shiishshanaw danddayenna; ayaw gooppe
Leviticus27:27 He mehii geeshsha gidana d'ayooppe
Leviticus27:28 « ‹Itti Asay barewaappe Med'inaa Godaw immeeddawe ayaa gidooppekka
Leviticus27:29 Asaa giddoppe shaakettiide d'ayanaadan imetteedda Asay wozettoppo; he Asay hayk'k'o.
Leviticus27:30 « ‹Biittaa asiraatay ubbay gadiyaappe mokkeedda katsaa gidina woy mitsaa ayfiyaa gidinakka Med'inaa Godaassa. Hewe Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha.
Leviticus27:31 Itti Asay bare asiraataa wozanaw koyooppe
Leviticus27:32 Miizzaa asiraataa gidina
Leviticus27:33 Tammuntsa mehiyaa iita gidina loo gidinakka dooroppo; woy Aa haraana laammoppo. Laammooppenne koyirowenne laamiyaa immeeddawenne laauukka S'oossaw geeshsha gidiinoppe attina
Leviticus27:34 Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana Israa'eeliyaa asaa azazeedda azazotuu hawantta.

Numbers1:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa unttunttu yaran yaraaninne golliyaan golliyaan paydaade
Numbers1:3 Neeninne Aarooni yelettoodeppe laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa Israa'eelatuwaa
Numbers1:4 Zariyaappe zariyaappe itti itti Asay bare golliyaa asaw kaappuwaa gidiide
Numbers1:5 Hinttena maaddana asatuu suntsay hawaappe kaalliide de'iyaawaa: Zariyaa Golliyaa Asaa Kaappuwaa Roobeela Shade'uura na'aa Eliis'uura
Numbers1:6 Simoona S'uriishadaaya na'aa Shalumi'eela
Numbers1:7 Yihudaa Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona
Numbers1:8 Yisaakoora S'u'aara na'aa Nataani'eela
Numbers1:9 Zaabiloona Heloona na'aa Eli'aaba
Numbers1:10 Yooseefo naanaappe Efireema Amihuuda na'aa Elishamaa'a
Numbers1:11 Biiniyaama Giidi'oona na'aa Abidaana
Numbers1:12 Daanappe Amishadaaya na'aa Ahi'eezera
Numbers1:13 Aaseera Okiraana na'aa Paagi'eela
Numbers1:14 Gaada Da'u'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa
Numbers1:15 Nifttaaleema Enaana na'aa Ahiraa'a;
Numbers1:16 Ha asatuu barenttu aawotuwaa golliyaa asatuwaappe kaaletsanaw dooretteeddawantta; unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa yaratoo kaappatuwaa» yaageedda.

Numbers1:45 Olaw baanaw danddayiyaa attuma asatuu ubbay laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaawanttu barenttu aawuwaa golliyaan golliyaan paydeteeddino.
Numbers1:46 Hewanttu ubbaanna 603
Numbers1:47 Shin Leewiyaa zaratuu ha paydeteedda asaana paydettibeykkino.
Numbers1:48 Ayaw gooppe
Numbers1:49 «Leewiyaa zaratuwaa paydoppa; unttuntta atteeda Israa'eelatuwaa payduwaan yeggoppa.
Numbers1:50 Leewatuwaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa bollaninne Aa giddon de'iyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaa bollan kaappuwaa ootsaade suntsaa. Unttunttu he Dunkkaaniyaanne Aa giddon de'iyaa miishshata tookkino; unttunttu Aa giddon ootsinonne Aa yuushshuwaan dunkkaanino.
Numbers1:51 S'oossaa Dunkkaanii shodettiyaa wode Leewatuu shoddino; S'oossaa Dunkkaanii ek'k'iyaa wodekka Leewatuu essino. Unttunttuppe haray ooninne aakko shiik'ooppe
Numbers1:52 Israa'eeliyaa asatuu ubbay barenttu armman armmaaninne barenttu c'itan c'itan shaakettiide
Numbers1:53 Shin S'oossaa hank'k'uu Israa'eeliyaa maabaraa bolla wod'd'enna mala
Numbers1:54 Israa'eelatuu hawaa ubbaa Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan ootseeddino.

Numbers2:34 Israa'eelatuu Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaa ubbabaa ootseeddino. Simmi unttunttu barenttu banddiraa kaalliide
Numbers3:1 Med'inaa Goday Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Musena haasayeedda wode de'iyaa Aaroonanne Muse golliyaa Asay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa.
Numbers3:2 Aaroona attuma naanatuwaa suntsay bayiray Nadaaba
Numbers3:3 He Aaroona attuma naanay ubbay k'eese gidiide ootsanaw okettiide suntsetteeddino.
Numbers3:4 Shin unttunttu giddoppe Naadaabinne Abihu Siinaa mela biittaan S'oossay azazibeena tamaa yarshshiide
Numbers3:5 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers3:6 «Leewatuwaa haa akka yaade k'eesiyaa Aaroona maaddana mala
Numbers3:7 Unttunttu Aaroonawunne Israa'eeliyaa maabaraw ubbaw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsan dumma dumma oosuwaa ootsino.
Numbers3:8 Unttunttu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan de'iyaa miishshaa ubbaa aawotetsaa akkino; Israa'eeliyaa asaa diraw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan ooso ubbaa unttunttu ootsino.
Numbers3:9 Neeni Leewatuwaa Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa maaddanaadan suntsaa; unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa giddoppe ubbaanna Aaroonaw imetteeddino.
Numbers3:10 Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa k'eese ootsaade suntsaa. Unttunttuppe hara Asay ooninne S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaakko shiik'ooppe
Numbers3:11 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers3:12 «Taani Israa'eelatuwaa mac'c'a Asay bayira yeliyaa attuma naanatuwaa ubbaa diraw Israa'eelatuwaa giddoppe Leewatuwaa akkaad. Leewatuu tawaa;
Numbers3:13 ayaw gooppe
Numbers3:14 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Musa Siinaa mela biittaan
Numbers3:15 «Neeni Leewatuwaa unttunttu soo asan asaaninne unttunttu yaran yaran payda; yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawantta ubbaa payda» yaageedda.
Numbers3:16 Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan
Numbers3:17 Leewiyaa attuma naanay Gershshoona
Numbers3:18 Gershshoona attuma naanay Liibinanne Shima.
Numbers3:19 K'ahaata attuma naanay Amiraama
Numbers3:20 Maraara attuma naanay k'ay Maahilanne Musha. Leewatuwaa mayzza aawotuu hawantta.
Numbers3:21 Liibina yaratuunne Shima yaratuu Gershshoona zaratuwaa.
Numbers3:22 Unttunttuppe paydina
Numbers3:23 Gershshoona yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe guyye away wulliyaa baggana dunkkaaniino.
Numbers3:24 Gershshoona yaratuwaa soo asaa kaappuu Laa'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa.
Numbers3:25 Gershshoona yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa
Numbers3:26 dabaabaa gaariddotuwaa
Numbers3:27 Amiraama yaratuu
Numbers3:28 Yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu ubbaanna 8
Numbers3:29 K'ahaata yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe gedissa baggana dunkkaaniino.
Numbers3:30 K'ahaata yaratuwaa soo asaa kaappuu Uuzi'eela na'aa Els's'aafaana.
Numbers3:31 Unttunttu Taabootaa
Numbers3:32 Leewatuwaa kaappatuwaa kaappuu k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Elaazara; Geeshsha Sa'aa aawotiyaawanttu bolla I suntsetteedda.
Numbers3:33 Maahila yaratuunne Musha yaratuu Maraara zaratuwaa.
Numbers3:34 Unttunttuppe paydina
Numbers3:35 Maraara yaratuwaa soo asaa kaappuu Abihayila na'aa S'urii'eela. Maraara yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe huup'issa baggana dunkkaaniino.
Numbers3:36 Maraara yaratuu Dunkkaaniyaa s'agaagetuwaa
Numbers3:37 Hewaa bollakka gujjiide
Numbers3:38 K'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe sintsa away doliyaa baggana Muse
Numbers3:39 Med'inaa Goday azazina
Numbers3:40 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers3:41 Israa'eelatuwaan bayira yeletteedda ubbaa kotaw Leewatuwaa taw akka; k'ay Israa'eelatuwaa mehiyaan bayira yeletteedda ubbaa kotaw Leewatuwaa mehiyaa taw akka. Taani Med'inaa Godaa» yaageedda.
Numbers3:42 Muse Med'inaa Goday Aa azazeeddawaadan
Numbers3:43 Yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa bayira yeletteedda attumawanttu
Numbers3:44 Med'inaa Goday Musa k'aykka hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers3:45 «Leewatuwaa Israa'eeliyaa attumawanttu ubbaa kotaw akka; Leewatuwaa mehetuwaa Israa'eelatuwaa mehiyaa kotaw akka; Leewatuu tawaa gidanawantta. Taani Med'inaa Godaa.
Numbers3:46 Leewatuwaa payduwaappe dariyaa 273 bayira gidiide yeletteedda Israa'eeliyaa attuma naanatuwaa wozanaw
Numbers3:47 ittoo ittoo ichcheshu s'agaraa biraa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan erettiyaa miizaaniyaa likkiyaan akka; Itti S'agaraa Biray Laatamu Geera keeshshaa.
Numbers3:48 Palaheedda Israa'eelatuwaa woziyaa he miishshaa Aaroonawunne Aa attuma naanaw imma» yaageedda.
Numbers3:49 Muse
Numbers3:50 Bayira yeletteedda Israa'eelatuwaappe 1
Numbers3:51 Med'inaa Goday azazeedda azazuwaadan
Numbers4:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers4:2 «Leewiyaa zaratuwaan K'ahaata yaratuwaa unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkaade payda;
Numbers4:3 yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asaa ubbaa
Numbers4:4 K'ahaata yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsana oosuu hawaa: unttunttu ubbaappe aad'd'eeda geeshsha miishshatuwaan aawotiino.
Numbers4:5 «Asay dunkkaaneedda saappe baanaw haniyaa wode
Numbers4:6 He kammeeddawaa bollakka wod'iyaa irbbaaniyaa kammino; hewaa bollakka k'ay gujjiide
Numbers4:7 «S'oossaa sintsa shiishshiyaa ukitsaa wotsiyaa s'arap'p'eezaa bollan saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'ino; Aa bolla saanetuwaa
Numbers4:8 Hewaa bollan zo'o c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'iide
Numbers4:9 «Unttunttu saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa akkiide
Numbers4:10 Yaatiide aakka miishshatuwaa ubbaakka irbbaniyan kammiide
Numbers4:11 «Is'aanaa c'uwissiyaa work'k'aa saas'iniyaa bollan saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'eeddawaa k'ay irbbaniyan kammino; tookkiyaa kasotuwaa unttunttu sagaayetuwaan aatsino.
Numbers4:12 Hewaadankka
Numbers4:13 «Yaatiide nahaasiyaappe ootseedda yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla de'iyaa bidintsaa diggiide Aa bolla ochchaa teeraa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'ino.
Numbers4:14 Aa bolla yarshshiyaasan go'ettiyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaa
Numbers4:15 «Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay
Numbers4:16 «K'eesiyaa Aaroona na'ay Elaazari s'omppiyaa zayitiyaw
Numbers4:17 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers4:18 «K'ahaata yaratuu Leewiyaa zaratuwaappe hayk'k'iide d'ayenna mala s'eellite.
Numbers4:19 Ubbaappe aad'd'eedda geeshsha miishshaa mata shiik'iyaa wode
Numbers4:20 K'ahaata yaratuu hayk'k'ennaadan
Numbers4:21 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers4:22 «Gershshoona yaratuwaakka unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkaade payda;
Numbers4:23 yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asaa ubbaa
Numbers4:24 «Gershshoona yaratuu ootsiyaa oosuunne tookkiyaa tookku hawaa:
Numbers4:25 unttunttu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa gaariddotuwaa
Numbers4:26 k'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaanne yarshshiyaa sa'aa yuuyyi aad'd'eeda dabaabaa gaariddotuwaa
Numbers4:27 Tookkiyaawaa gidina
Numbers4:28 S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon Gershshoona yaratuu ootsana oosuu ubbay hawaa. Unttunttu ootsana oosuwaa ubbay k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Itaamaara aawotetsaa garssaana gidanawaa.
Numbers4:29 «Maraara yaratuwaa unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkaade payda;
Numbers4:30 yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asaa ubbaa
Numbers4:31 «Unttunttu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsana oosotuu hawantta: unttuntta Dunkkaaniyaa s'agaagetuwaa
Numbers4:32 k'aykka dabaabaa yuushshuwaan ek'k'iyaa tuussatuwaa
Numbers4:33 S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon Maraara yaratuu ootsana oosuu ubbaanna hawaa. Unttunttu ootsana ooso ubbay k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Itaamaara aawotetsaa garssaana gidanawaa» yaageedda.
Numbers4:34 Muse Aarooninne maabaraa kaappatuu K'ahaata yaratuwaa attuma asaa unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkiide paydeeddino.
Numbers4:35 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu
Numbers4:36 unttunttu soo asan asan paydina ubbaanna 2
Numbers4:37 K'ahaata yaratuwaan S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootseedda asaa paydu hawaa. Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan
Numbers4:38 Gershshoona yaratuukka barenttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne barenttu soo asan asan shaakettiide paydeteeddino.
Numbers4:39 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu
Numbers4:40 unttunttu soo asan asan paydina ubbay 2
Numbers4:41 Gershshoona yaratuwaan S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootseedda asaa paydina hawaa. Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan
Numbers4:42 Maraara yaratuukka k'ay dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne barenttu soo asan asan shaakettiide paydeteeddino.
Numbers4:43 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu
Numbers4:44 unttunttu soo asan asan paydina ubbay 3
Numbers4:45 Maraara yaratuwaa paydu hawaa. Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan
Numbers4:46 Hewaa ootsiide Muse
Numbers4:47 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu
Numbers4:48 ubbay 8
Numbers4:49 Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan
Numbers5:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda:
Numbers5:2 «Neeni Israa'eelatuwaa
Numbers5:3 Hewe mac'c'awaa attumawaa gidinakka kessino. Taani unttunttu gidduwaan de'iyaa unttunttu dunkkaaneeddasaa hewanttu tunissenna mala
Numbers5:4 Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan
Numbers5:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers5:6 «Neeni Israa'eelatuwaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Itti attuma Asay woy itti mac'c'a Asay ay ogiyaaninne hara asaa naak'k'ooppenne hewan Med'inaa Godaw ammanettennan is's'ooppe
Numbers5:7 Hewaa diraw
Numbers5:8 Shin he naak'etteedda uray hayk'k'eeddawaa gidooppenne
Numbers5:9 K'ay Israa'eelatuu k'eesiyaw immiyaa geeshsha imuwaa ubbay he k'eesiyaassa.
Numbers5:10 Itti itti Asay immiyaa imotay he immeedda uraabaa; shin k'eesiyaw I immiyaa imotay he k'eesiyaassa› yaaga» yaageedda.
Numbers5:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers5:12 «Neeni Israa'eelatoo hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Itti uraa machchata kare hamettaade
Numbers5:13 hara attuma asaana gisooppe
Numbers5:14 Iza tuneedda diraw
Numbers5:15 Yaatooppe
Numbers5:16 « ‹Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers5:17 Anjjetteeda haatsaa kuyis'aaruwaan akko. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers5:18 He mishiratto Med'inaa Godaa sintsan esso; hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers5:19 Mishirato hawaadan yaagiide c'aak'k'etso; «Neeni hara attuma asaana gisabeennawaa gidooppenne
Numbers5:20 Shin neeni ne asinaa aggaade kare hamettaade tuneeddawaa gidooppenne
Numbers5:21 Med'inaa Goday ne yeluwaa golliyaa gunddissiyaawaaninne ne uluwaakka gaafisiyaawan
Numbers5:22 Ha shek'k'aa ahiyaa haatsay ne ulo giddo geliide ne uluwaa gaafiso; ne yeluwaa keetsaakka gunddisso» yaagiide c'aak'k'etso. « ‹Mishiratakka
Numbers5:23 « ‹Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers5:24 Yaatiide shek'k'aa ahiyaa he c'amo haatsaa mishirato ushsho; shek'k'aa ahiyaa haatsay mishiratti uluwaan geliide
Numbers5:25 K'eesii mishiratti kushiyaappe sid'eedda diraw yarshshiyaa katsaa yarshshuwaa akkiide
Numbers5:26 K'eesii katsaa yarshshuwaappe kop'p'iyaawaa akkiide bayzzanchcha gidekkentto k'onc'c'issiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide
Numbers5:27 Haatsaa izo ushsheeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers5:28 Shin iza tunabeenna s'illo mac'c'a asaa gidooppe
Numbers5:29 « ‹Itti Asay bare machchato sid'iyaa wode ootsana wogay hawaa. Iza kare hamettaade tunooppe
Numbers5:30 
Numbers5:31 Asinay bayzzuwaa ubbaappe saro attana; shin mac'c'awunno bare nagaraa gaasuwaan yiyaawaa tookkana› yaaga» yaageedda.
Numbers6:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda
Numbers6:2 «Neeni Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Attuma Asay woy mac'c'a Asay Naaziraawe gidiide
Numbers6:3 woyniyaa eessaanne hara matsoyiyaa ushshaa ushoppo; woyniyaa ayifiyaappe agettiya c'aalabaanne matsoyiyaabaa ushoppo; woyniyaa teeraa gumeeddawaa ushoppo. Woy woyniyaa teeraa shuguwaa gidina
Numbers6:4 I barena dummayeedda wodiyaan ubbaan
Numbers6:5 « ‹I barena Med'inaa Godaw dummayanaw geppeedda wodiyaan ubbaan
Numbers6:6 « ‹I barena Med'inaa Godaw dummayeedda wodiyaan ubbaan anhaakko shiik'oppo.
Numbers6:7 Haray attina Aa aawuu
Numbers6:8 I barena S'oossaw dummayeedda wodiyaan ubbaan I Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha.
Numbers6:9 « ‹Asay Aa matan akeekenan hayk'k'ina
Numbers6:10 Hosppuntsa gallassan laau harap'p'etuwaa woy laau mara harap'p'etuwaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge K'eesiyaw aho.
Numbers6:11 K'eesii harap'p'etuwaappe ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshoo
Numbers6:12 I barena kase geppeedda wodiyaa keenaa barena S'oossaw dummayanaw koshshee. Yaatiide yelettoodeppe itti laytsaa gidiyaa attuma dorssaa naak'oo immiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide yarshsho. Shin hewaappe kase I barena S'oossaw dummayeedda gallassatuu paydetikkino; ayaw gooppe
Numbers6:13 « ‹Bare gefaa wodiyaa wursseedda wode barena S'oossaw dummayeedda Naaziraawiyaa wogay hawaa: S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge I shiik'o;
Numbers6:14 Med'inaa Godaw tilla bollana de'iyaa itti laytsaa attuma dorssaa s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo
Numbers6:15 K'ay katsaa yarshshuwaanne ushshaa yarshshuwaa unttunttunna ittippe yarshshanaw aho; he katsaa yarshshuu irshshuu gelibeennawaa gido; k'ay zayitiyaan munak'k'eedda liik'o d'iiliyaa komppotuwaanne zayitiyaa oketteedda leeo ukitsatuwaa masoofiyan aho.
Numbers6:16 « ‹K'eesii hewaa ubbaa shiishiide
Numbers6:17 K'eesii dorssaa orggiyaa
Numbers6:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers6:19 « ‹Barena S'oossaw dummayeedda Naaziraawii bare huup'iyaa meedetteeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers6:20 K'eesii unttuntta k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide
Numbers6:21 « ‹Simmi S'oossaw barena dummayanaw geppeedda Naaziraawiyaw wotso wogay hawaa: barena Med'inaa Godaw yarshshanaw koshshiyaa yarshshotuwaappe aad'd'iyaawaa immanaw geppeeddawaa gidooppe
Numbers6:22 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers6:23 «Aaroonawunne Aa attuma naanaatoo hawaa oda; ‹Israa'eeliyaa asaa hintte hawaadan yaagiide anjjite:
Numbers6:24 «Med'inaa Goday hinttena anjjonne hinttena naago;
Numbers6:25 Med'inaa Goday hinttenttoo bare somuwaa poo'issonne hinttenttoo k'aretto;
Numbers6:26 Med'inaa Goday hinttena bare keeka ayifiyaan s'eellonne hinttenttoo sarotetsaa immo» yaagiide anjjite› yaaga.
Numbers6:27 «Hawaadan unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa asaa bolla ta suntsaa wotsana
Numbers7:1 Muse S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa toliide makkeedda wode
Numbers7:2 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers7:3 Med'inaa Godaw imotaa shiishsheeddino; hewanttukka kameteedda usuppun gaaretuwaa
Numbers7:4 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers7:5 «S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa oosoo goana mala
Numbers7:6 Muse gaaretuwaanne booratuwaa akkiide
Numbers7:7 Gershshoona yaratoo unttunttu oosoo koshshiyaawaadan shaakkiide
Numbers7:8 K'ay Maraara yaratoo unttunttu oosoo koshshiyaawaadan shaakkiide
Numbers7:9 Shin Muse K'ahaata yaratoo hewaappe ayaanne immibeenna; ayaw gooppe
Numbers7:10 Yarshshiyaa saa Muse okkiide geeshsheedda gallassan
Numbers7:11 Med'inaa Goday Musa kase
Numbers7:12 Koyro gallassi bare imuwaa aheedawe Yihudaa zariyaappe Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona.
Numbers7:13 Na'asooni aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:14 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda
Numbers7:15 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo
Numbers7:16 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:17 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:18 Laaentsa gallassi Yisaakoora zaratuu kaappuu
Numbers7:19 Nataani'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:20 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda
Numbers7:21 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:22 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:23 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:24 Heezzentsa gallassi Zaabiloona zaratuu kaappuu
Numbers7:25 Eli'aabi aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:26 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda
Numbers7:27 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:28 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa
Numbers7:29 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:30 Oyddentso gallassi Roobeela zaratuu kaappuu Shade'uura na'ay Eliis'uuri bare imuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:31 Eliis'uuri aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:32 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda
Numbers7:33 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:34 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:35 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:36 Ichcheshantsa gallassi Simoona zaratuu kaappuu
Numbers7:37 Shalumi'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:38 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;
Numbers7:39 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:40 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:41 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:42 Usuppuntsa gallassi Gaada zaratuu kaappuu
Numbers7:43 Eliyasaafi aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:44 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;
Numbers7:45 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:46 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:47 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:48 Laappuntsa gallassi Efireema zaratuwaa kaappuu Amihuuda na'ay Elishamaa'i bare imuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:49 Elishamaa'i aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:50 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;
Numbers7:51 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:52 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:53 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:54 Hosppuntsa gallassi Minaase zaratuu kaappuu Padaas'uura na'ay Gamaali'eeli bare imuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:55 Gamaali'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:56 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;
Numbers7:57 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:58 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa
Numbers7:59 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:60 Udduppuntsa gallassi Biiniyaama zaratuu kaappuu Giidi'oona na'ay Abidaani bare imuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:61 Abidaani aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:62 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda
Numbers7:63 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa itti dorssaa orggiyaanne
Numbers7:64 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:65 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:66 Tammantsa gallassi Daana zaratuu kaappuu Amishadaaya na'ay Ahi'eezeri bare imuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:67 Ahi'eezeri aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:68 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda
Numbers7:69 S'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:70 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:71 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:72 Tammanne ittentsa gallassi Aaseera zaratuu kaappuu Okiraana na'ay Paagi'eeli bare yarshshuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:73 Paagi'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:74 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda shaataa
Numbers7:75 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:76 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa;
Numbers7:77 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:78 Tammanne laaentso gallassi Nifttaaleema zaratuu kaappuu Enaana na'ay Ahiraa'i bare imuwaa aheedda.
Numbers7:79 Ahiraa'i aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:80 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda itti shaataa
Numbers7:81 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa
Numbers7:82 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa
Numbers7:83 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:84 Yarshshiyaa sa'ay oketteedda wode
Numbers7:85 biraappe med'd'eedda itti itti kerii itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'ee; biraappe med'd'eedda itti itti kuyis'aaruu hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'ee; biraappe med'etteedda keriyaanne kuyis'aaruu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina
Numbers7:86 Tammanne laau work'k'aa shaatatuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina ittuu ittuu itti s'eetanne tammu giraame
Numbers7:87 Katsaa yarshshuwaanna ittippe s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo aheedda mehii ubbaanna tammanne laau korumatuwaa
Numbers7:88 Unttunttu ittippetetsaa yarshshoo aheedda mehii ubbaanna laatamanne oyddu korumatuwaa
Numbers7:89 Muse Med'inaa Godaana haasayanaw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa geliyaa wode
Numbers8:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers8:2 «Neeni Aaroonaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Neeni laappun s'omppetuwaa wotsiyaa wode s'omppetuu s'omppiyaa wotsiyaa ballatuwaappe sintsa baggana de'iyaa heeratuwaa poo'iino› yaaga» yaageedda.
Numbers8:3 I geeddawaadan Aarooni ootseedda. Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan
Numbers8:4 S'omppiyaa wotsiyaawe garssa gediyaappe bolla c'iishshaana alleek'k'etteedda ballatuwaa s'eeraa gakkanaw k'os'etteedda work'k'aappe med'etteedda. S'omppiyaa wotsiyaa ballay Med'inaa Goday Musa besseedda leemisuwaadan oosetteedda.
Numbers8:5 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers8:6 «Hara Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaappe Leewatuwaa akkaade
Numbers8:7 Neeni unttuntta geeshshanaw hawaadan ootsa: geeshshiyaa haatsaa akkaade unttuntta pushakka; unttunttu barenttu bollaa ubbaa meedettino; barenttu mayuwaakka meec'c'ino; yaatiide unttunttu wogaadan geeshsha gidana.
Numbers8:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers8:9 Yaataade Leewatuwaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsa ayaa; Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaraa ubbaa shiishsha.
Numbers8:10 Neeni Leewatuwaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsa ahina
Numbers8:11 Leewatuu Med'inaa Godaa oosuwaa ootsanaw giigana mala
Numbers8:12 «Leewatuu barenttu kushiyaa korumatuu huup'iyaan wotsino; ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshuwaa ootsaade
Numbers8:13 Leewatuwaa Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatu aawotetsaa garssan wotsa; yaataade unttuntta k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsaade
Numbers8:14 Hewaadan ootsaade Leewatuwaa hara Israa'eeliyaa asaappe dummaya; dummayooppe Leewatuu tawaa gidana.
Numbers8:15 «Neeni Leewatuwaa geeshsheeddawaappenne k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsaade shiishsheeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers8:16 Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaappe unttunttu taw ubbaanna imetteeddino; Israa'eeliyaa mac'c'a asaappe yeletteedda bayira attumawanttu ubbaa diraw taani Leewatuwaa taw akkaad.
Numbers8:17 Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaan bayira yeletteeddawe asaa gidina
Numbers8:18 Israa'eeliyaa bayira attumawanttu ubbaa diraw taani Leewatuwaa akkaad.
Numbers8:19 Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa gidduwaappe taani Leewatuwaa Aaroonawunne Aaroona attuma naanaw imuwaa ootsaade immaad. Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa shiik'iyaa wode
Numbers8:20 Med'inaa Goday Musa Leewatuwaa dummayanaw azazeeddawaadan Muse
Numbers8:21 Leewatuu barena geeshsheeddino; barenttu mayuwaakka meec'c'eeddino. Aarooni unttunttu k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide
Numbers8:22 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers8:23 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers8:24 «Hawe Leewatuwaa s'eelliyaa wogaa: laytsay laatamanne ichcheshanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu oosuwaa ootsanaw Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa yiino.
Numbers8:25 Shin unttunttu laytsay ishatamuwaa gidiyaa wode unttunttu barenttu oosuwaappe s'urataa kesino; simmiide laaentso ootsoppino.
Numbers8:26 Unttunttu Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaan ootsiyaa barenttu ishatuwaa ootsi maaddana gooppe maaddinoppe attina
Numbers9:1 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gibs'eppe keseedda laaentso laytsan koyiro agenaan Siinaa Mela biittaan Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide haasayeedda;
Numbers9:2 «Israa'eeliyaa Asay Paasigaa Baalaa keereedda gallassan bonchcho.
Numbers9:3 Ha aginaan tammanne oyddentso gallassan
Numbers9:4 Muse Israa'eeliyaa Asay Paasigaa Baalaa bonchchana mala
Numbers9:5 Koyro aginaw tammanne oyddentso gallassi
Numbers9:6 Shin unttunttuppe amareedawanttu hayk'k'eedda asaa anhaa bochchiide tuneedda diraw
Numbers9:7 Musa
Numbers9:8 Muse unttuntta
Numbers9:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers9:10 «Neeni Israa'eeliyaa asaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Hintteppe woy hintte zaratuwaappe ooninne anhaa bochchiide tunooppe
Numbers9:11 laaentso aginaan tammanne oyddentso gallassi away wullana haniyaa wode Paasigaa Baalaa bonchcho. Paasigaa dorssaa irshshuu gelibeenna ukitsaananne c'amo bonc'c'iyaanna mo.
Numbers9:12 Sa'ay wonttanaw he dorssaappe ayaanne ashshoppo; k'ay Aa mek'etsaappekka ittuwaanne mentsoppo. Paasigaa Baalaw Aa woga ubbaa ootso.
Numbers9:13 Shin manddaribeenna geeshsha Asay Paasigaa bonchchennaan is's'ooppe
Numbers9:14 « ‹Hintte gidduwaan de'iyaa bete Asay Paasigaa Baalaa Med'inaa Godaw bonchchana koyooppe
Numbers9:15 Dunkkaanii toletteedda gallassi shaarii Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa mayyeedda; omarssaappe doommiide
Numbers9:16 Hewaadan ubbaa wode gallassi gallassi shaarii mayyee; k'amma k'amma he shaarii tamaadan poo'ee.
Numbers9:17 He shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollaappe denddiyaa wode awudenne Israa'eelatuu barenttu dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe denddiino; k'ay he shaarii wod'd'iyaa ay sa'aaninne Israa'eelatuu dunkkaaniino.
Numbers9:18 Israa'eelatuu Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan denddino; hewaadankka
Numbers9:19 Shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan daro gallassaa gamooppe
Numbers9:20 Itti itti gede shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan amareeda gallassaa gamee. Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan unttunttu dunkkaaniino; k'ay hewaadankka
Numbers9:21 Itti itti gede shaarii omarssaappe wonttana gakkanaw s'alalaa gamee; wonttina shaarii denddiyaa wode unttunttukka denddino. Gallassaa gidina
Numbers9:22 Shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan laau gallassaa gamina
Numbers9:23 Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan dunkkaaniinonne k'ay Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan denddino; Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan
Numbers10:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers10:2 «Laau s'urumbbatuwaa biraappe k'os's'aade ootsa; yaataade asaa shiik'oo s'eeganawunne k'ay dunkkaaneedda saappe denddanaw dentsetsanaadan punna.
Numbers10:3 Ha laau s'urumbbatuu punettiyaa wode
Numbers10:4 Shin itti s'urumbba s'alalay punettooppe
Numbers10:5 Neeni s'urumbbaa d'ok'k'u ootsaade punniyaa wode
Numbers10:6 S'urumbbaa laaentso d'ok'k'u ootsaade punniyaa wode
Numbers10:7 Yaa'aw asaa shiishshanaw s'urumbbaa punna; shin kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsaade punnoppa.
Numbers10:8 Aaroona naanay k'eesatuu s'urumbba punnino. Hawe newunne yiyaa yeletaa ubbaw med'ina woga gido.
Numbers10:9 «Hintte gadiyaan metuwaa dentsiyaa hintte morkkiyaanna hintte olettanaw kesiyaa wode
Numbers10:10 Hewaadankka
Numbers10:11 Laaentsa laytsan laaentso aginaan laatamantsa gallassi
Numbers10:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers10:13 Unttunttu ha koyiro buussaw Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan denddeeddino.
Numbers10:14 Yihudaa zaratuwaanna dunkkaaneedda baggay barenttu armmaa oyk'k'iide koyro denddeeddino. Yihudaa zaratuu kaappuu Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona;
Numbers10:15 Yisaakoora zaratuu kaappuu S'u'aara na'aa Nataani'eela;
Numbers10:16 Zaabiloona zaratuu kaappuu Heloona na'aa Eli'aaba.
Numbers10:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan

Numbers10:19 Simoona zaratuu kaappuu S'uriishadaaya na'aa Shalumi'eela;
Numbers10:20 Gaada zaratuu kaappuu Re'u'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa.
Numbers10:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers10:22 Kaalliide Efireema zaratuwaanna dunkkaaneedda baggay bare armmaa oyk'k'iide denddeedda. Efireema zaratuu kaappuu Amihuuda na'aa Elishamaa'a;
Numbers10:23 Minaase zaratuu kaappuu Padaas'uura na'aa Gamaali'eela;
Numbers10:24 Biiniyaama zaratuu kaappuu Giidi'oona na'aa Abidaana.
Numbers10:25 Wurssetsan
Numbers10:26 Aaseera zaratuu kaappuu Okiraana na'aa Paagi'eela;
Numbers10:27 Nifttaaleema zaratuu kaappuu Enaana na'aa Ahiraa'a.

Numbers10:29 Muse Midiyaama asaa gidiyaa bare bolluwaa Re'u'eela na'aa Hobaaba
Numbers10:30 Hobaabi
Numbers10:31 Muse Aa
Numbers10:32 Neeni nuunana booppe

Numbers11:1 Asay bare metoo Med'inaa Godaa bolla zuuzummeedda; unttunttu zuuzummiina S'oossay sisiide
Numbers11:2 Yaatina Asay Musew waassina
Numbers11:3 Med'inaa Godaa tamay unttunttu gidduwaan ees's'eedda diraw
Numbers11:4 Israa'eelatuwaana de'iyaa dumma dumma gade Asay hara k'umaa loytsi amotteedda. Israa'eeliyaa asaykka k'ay hawaadan yaagiide yeekuwaa doommeedda; «Laa nuuni ashuwaa hak'appe demmanee?
Numbers11:5 Nuuni Gibs'e gadiyaan miishshaa c'iggenan c'oo miyaa moliyaa hassayeetto; k'ay k'ayiyaa miyaa paranjjiyaa leekiyaa
Numbers11:6 Shin hai nu k'ood'ii gorddetteedda; nu ayifiikka ha mannaappe attina
Numbers11:7 Mannay deebbuwaa ayfiyaa malatee; Aa malay boos's'iyaa mitsaa c'ooshshaa malatee.
Numbers11:8 Asay yuuyyi yuuyyi Aa k'oree; wos'aan gaac'c'ee
Numbers11:9 K'amma dunkkaaneeddasan s'aasay wod'd'iyaa wode
Numbers11:10 Asay bare dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan penggiyaan yeekkishin
Numbers11:11 Hewaa diraw
Numbers11:12 Ha asaa ubbaa taani shahaaraadditaayye? Woy unttuntta taani yelaadditaa? ‹Neeni unttunttu mayzza aawaatoo
Numbers11:13 Ha asaw ubbaw taani ashuwaa hak'appe demmanee? Unttunttu taana
Numbers11:14 Taani ha asaa ubbaa taarekka tookkana danddaykke; tookku taw loytsi dees'ee.
Numbers11:15 Simmi neeni taana hawaadan metootanaadan ootsanawaappe taw k'arettaade taana hai wod'a basha; yaatooppe
Numbers11:16 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers11:17 Taani duge wod'd'aade neenana yan haasayana; taani neenan de'iyaa Ayyaanaappe akkaade
Numbers11:18 «Neeni asaw hawaadan gaade oda
Numbers11:19 Hintte gidduwaan de'iyaa Med'inaa Godaa hintte kad'eedda dirawunne hintte
Numbers11:20 
Numbers11:21 Shin Muse S'oossaa
Numbers11:22 Miizzaa wudiyaanne dorssaa wudiyaa unttunttoo shukkina kalissanee? Abban de'iyaa moliyaa ubbaa shiishshiyaawaa gidinttonne
Numbers11:23 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers11:24 Muse kare kesiide
Numbers11:25 Med'inaa Goday shaariyan duge wod'd'iide
Numbers11:26 He laappun tammu c'imatuwaanna mazggobiyaan s'aafetteedda asatuu Elddaadanne Medaada giyaa laaatuu dunkkaaneeddasan atteeddino; Dunkkaaniyaakko yibeykkino; shin unttunttu bollakka Ayyaanay wod'd'ina
Numbers11:27 Itti wodallay wos's'i yiide
Numbers11:28 Bare yalagatetsaappe doommiide
Numbers11:29 Shin Muse Aa

Numbers12:1 Muse Toop'p'iyaa biittaa mishirato akkeedda. I akkeedda Toop'p'iyaa mac'c'aani diraw
Numbers12:2 Unttunttu

Numbers12:5 S'oossay shaariyaa tuussaan duge wod'd'eedda; Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan ek'k'iide
Numbers12:6 I unttuntta

Numbers12:8 Taani Musena sintsa sintsaan haasayayippe attina

Numbers13:1 Med'inaa Goday
Numbers13:2 «Taani Israa'eelatoo immiyaa Kanaane biittaa wochchana mala
Numbers13:3 Muse Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan Paaraana Mela biittaappe unttuntta kiitteedda. Unttunttu ubbaykka Israa'eeliyaa asaa kaappatuwaa.
Numbers13:4 Unttunttu suntsay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa: Zariyaa Kaappuwaa Roobeela Zakkuura na'aa Shaamu'a;
Numbers13:5 Simoona Hoora na'aa Shafaas'a;
Numbers13:6 Yihudaa Yifune na'aa Kaaleeba;
Numbers13:7 Yisaakoora Yooseefo na'aa Yigi'aala;
Numbers13:8 Efireema Neewe na'aa Hoshee'a;
Numbers13:9 Biiniyaama Raafu na'aa Pals's'a;
Numbers13:10 Zaabiloona Sooda na'aa Gaddi'eela;
Numbers13:11 Yooseefo na'aa Minaasa Suusa na'aa Gadda;
Numbers13:12 Daana baggappe Gamaalla na'aa Ami'eela;
Numbers13:13 Aaseera Mikaa'eela na'aa Satuura;
Numbers13:14 Nifttaaleema Waafisa na'aa Naahiba;
Numbers13:15 Gaada Maaka na'aa Ge'u'eela.
Numbers13:16 He biittaa wochchana mala
Numbers13:17 Unttunttu Kanaane biittaa wochchana mala
Numbers13:18 Biittay ay mala biittenttonne be'ite; he gadiyaan de'iyaa Asay minenttonne laafaantto
Numbers13:19 unttunttu de'iyaa biittay loenttonne iitentto
Numbers13:20 biittay ay mala tu'enttonttonne ladentto
Numbers13:21 Unttunttu pude kesiide
Numbers13:22 Neegeeba pude kesiide
Numbers13:23 Hewaana aad'd'iidde
Numbers13:24 Israa'eeliyaa asatuu hewaappe k'ans's'eedda woyniyaa turaa wurc'c'uwaa diraw
Numbers13:25 Unttunttu he biittaa wochchiidde
Numbers13:26 Paaraana Mela Biittaan K'aadeesa giyaa saan de'iyaa Musekko
Numbers13:27 Unttunttu Musew hawaadan yaagiide odeeddino; «Neeni nuuna kiitteedda biittaa nuuni beeddo; he gadiyaan maatsaynne eessay goggee. Aan ayifiyaa ayfiyaakka hawaa be'a.
Numbers13:28 Shin he gadiyaan de'iyaa Asay wolk'k'aama; unttunttu katamaykka gimbbiyaa dirssaan diretti utteeddawaanne wolk'k'aama. Nuuni k'ay Anaak'e zaratuwaa yan be'eeddo.
Numbers13:29 Neegeeba Amaaleek'a asatuu de'iino; gezziyaan Hiitetuu
Numbers13:30 Kaaleebi asaa Muse sintsan c'ou giissiide
Numbers13:31 Shin Kaaleebena pude beedda asatuu
Numbers13:32 Unttunttu yuuyyi wochcheedda biittaa Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan giide
Numbers13:33 Nuuni wogga adussa asatuu yara gidiyaa Anaak'e zaratuwaa yan be'eeddo; nuuni nu ayifiyaan nuuna s'eelliyaa wode bumbburetsaa malateetto; k'ay nuuni unttunttu ayifiyaan hewaakka mala» yaageeddino.
Numbers14:1 He gallassaa k'amma maabaray ubbay barenttu k'aalaa d'ok'k'issiide yeekkeeddino.
Numbers14:2 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay Muse bollanne Aaroona bolla zuuzummeeddino. Maabaray kumentsay unttuntta
Numbers14:3 Mashshaan nuuna wod'i wurssanaw Med'inaa Goday ha biittaa nuuna ayaw ahii? Nu machchetuunne nu naanay omoodettana. Hewaappe guyye Gibs'e biittaa simmiyaawe nuw keekenneeyye?» yaageeddino.
Numbers14:4 K'ay unttunttu ittuu ittuwaa
Numbers14:5 Musenne Aarooni hewan shiik'eedda Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaraa ubbaa sintsan somuwaa sa'aan gatsiide guufanneeddino.
Numbers14:6 He biittaa wochcheedda asatuu giddoppe Neewe na'ay Iyyaasunne Yifune na'ay Kaaleebi barenttu mayuwaa peed'eeddino.
Numbers14:7 Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaraa ubbaw
Numbers14:8 Med'inaa Goday nuunan nashettiyaawaa gidooppe
Numbers14:9 Hewaa diraw
Numbers14:10 Maabaray ubbay unttuntta shuchchaan c'addanaw haasayeeddino. He wode Med'inaa Godaa bonchchuu Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaan Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaw k'onc'c'eedda.
Numbers14:11 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers14:12 Taani unttuntta iita harggiyaan shoc'aade d'ayissana; yaataade taani neena unttunttuppe dariyaanne minniyaa kawutetsaw aawuwaa ootsana» yaageedda.
Numbers14:13 Muse Med'inaa Godaa hawaadan yaagiide woosseedda; «Neeni ne wolk'k'an ha asaa Gibs'eppe pude kesseeddawaa eriyaa Gibs'etuu hawaa sisooppe
Numbers14:14 Unttunttu ha gadiyaan de'iyaawanttookka hewaa odana. Abeet Med'inaa Godaw
Numbers14:15 Hai neeni ha asaa ubbaa itti kutsan wod'iyaawaa gidooppe
Numbers14:16 Med'inaa Goday ha asaa
Numbers14:17 «Hewaa diraw
Numbers14:18 
Numbers14:19 Ha Asay Gibs'eppe kesoodeppe doommaade hachchi gakkanaw neeni atto geeddawaadan
Numbers14:20 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers14:21 Shin ta de'uwaan c'aak'k'ay; Med'inaa Godaa bonchchuu sa'aa ubbaa kumiyaawaadan
Numbers14:22 ha asaappe ittuunne he biittaa be'enna. Ta bonchchuwaanne Gibs'e biittaaninne mela biittaa taani ootseedda malaataa ha asatuu be'eeddino; shin unttunttu tammu gede taana paac'c'eeddinonne ta k'aalaa sisennan is's'eeddino. Hewaa diraw
Numbers14:23 
Numbers14:24 Shin ta k'oomay Kaaleebi unttunttuppe dummatiyaa dirawunne I taana polo wozanaappe kaalleedda diraw
Numbers14:25 Shin hai Amaaleek'atuunne Kanaanetuu zanggaaraan de'iyaa diraw
Numbers14:26 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers14:27 «Ha iita Asay ta bolla awude gakkanaw zuuzummanee? Taani Israa'eeliyaa asaa zuuzuntsaa ubbaa sisaad.
Numbers14:28 Hewaa diraw
Numbers14:29 Hintte anhay ha mela biittaan kunddana; ayaw gooppe
Numbers14:30 Yifune na'aa Kaaleebappenne Neewe na'aa Iyyaasuppe attina
Numbers14:31 Hintte
Numbers14:32 Shin hinttena gidooppe
Numbers14:33 Hintte ammanettibeenna diraw
Numbers14:34 Hintte he biittaa wochcheedda he oytamu gallassaa payduwaan
Numbers14:35 Taani Med'inaa Goday hawaa oday. Ta bolla shiik'i utteedda ha iita maabaraa bolla hawaadan tumu ootsana: unttunttu ha mela biittaan wurana; hawaan unttunttu hayk'k'ana» yaageedda.
Numbers14:36 He biittaa wochchana mala
Numbers14:37 he iita oduwaa odeedda asatuu
Numbers14:38 He biittaa wochchanaw beedda asatuwaappe Yifune na'ay Kaaleebinne Neewe na'ay Iyyaasu s'alalay pas'a atteeddino.
Numbers14:39 Muse hawaa Israa'eeliyaa asaw ubbaw odeedda wode
Numbers14:40 Wonttetsa gallassi wontta guuran unttunttu denddiide
Numbers14:41 Shin Muse unttuntta
Numbers14:42 Med'inaa Goday hinttenana de'enna diraw
Numbers14:43 Amaaleek'a asatuwaananne Kanaane asatuwaana hintte olettana; hintte mashshaan hayk'k'ana. Med'inaa Godaappe hintte wora simmeedda diraw
Numbers14:44 Shin unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa C'aak'uwaa Taabootaynne Musenne dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe denddana d'ayooppekka
Numbers14:45 Gezze gadiyaan de'iyaa Amaaleek'a asatuunne Kanaane asatuu wod'd'iide unttunttu olay s'ooniide
Numbers15:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers15:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaaga; ‹Hintte de'ana mala
Numbers15:3 mehiyaappe woy dorssaappe
Numbers15:4 Yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaa uray katsaa yarshshoo itti kiilo giraame d'iiliyaa itti liitiro wogaraa zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawaakka Med'inaa Godaw aho.
Numbers15:5 K'ay s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo
Numbers15:6 « ‹Dorssa orggiyaa yarshshanaw shiishshiyaa wode
Numbers15:7 itti liitironne bagga woyniyaa eessaa ushshaa yarshshoo ahite. Med'inaa Godaw sawuwaa toshukku giyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshite.
Numbers15:8 « ‹Itti korumaa s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa
Numbers15:9 korumaanna ittippe katsaa yarshshoo heezzu kiilo giraame d'iiliyaa laau liitiro wogaraa zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawaanne
Numbers15:10 ushshaa yarshshoo laau liitiro woyniyaa eessaakka ahite. Med'inaa Godaw sawuwaa toshukku giyaa yarshshuwaa taman yarshshite.
Numbers15:11 « ‹Itti itti korumaa booraa
Numbers15:12 Itti mehiyaappe daruu shiik'iyaa wode
Numbers15:13 Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidiyaa ooninne taman s'uuggiyaa
Numbers15:14 Sintsappe yaana yeletaan hintte giddon de'iyaa betii woy hara Asay ooninne s'uuggiyaa
Numbers15:15 Hinttewukka hintte giddon de'iyaa betetookka ha wogay ittuwaa; hawe sintsaappe yaana yeletawukka ek'k'iide de'iyaa woga. Hinttekka betetuukka Med'inaa Godaa sintsan ittuwaa.
Numbers15:16 Hinttewukka hintte giddon de'iyaa bete asatookka higgiinne wogay ittuwaa gidana› yaaga» yaageedda.
Numbers15:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers15:18 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Taani hinttena afiyaa biittaa hintte geliide
Numbers15:19 he gadiyaan mokkiyaa katsaa miyaa wode
Numbers15:20 Hewekka
Numbers15:21 Yaana yeletaa ubbaan hintte hintte gadiyaan mokkeedda katsaappe s'eeraa Kesseedda komppuwaa
Numbers15:22 « ‹Med'inaa Goday odeedda ha azazotuwaa ubbaa hintte erana d'ayiide
Numbers15:23 Med'inaa Goday Aa baggana hinttena azazeedda azazotuwaa ubbaa
Numbers15:24 k'ay hewaa maabaray erennan ootseeddawaa gidooppe
Numbers15:25 Yaatooppe k'eesii kumentsaa Israa'eeliyaa maabaraa nagaraa atto giissiyaa wogaa polo; unttunttu nagaray atto geetettana. Ayaw gooppe
Numbers15:26 Asay ubbay erennan he bayzzuwaan hambbalaachchetteedda diraw
Numbers15:27 « ‹Itti Asay barekka erana d'ayiide nagaraa ootsooppe
Numbers15:28 erennan de'iidde nagaraa ootseedda uraw k'eesii Med'inaa Godaa sintsan nagaraa atto giissiyaa wogaa polo; Aa nagaray atto geetettana.
Numbers15:29 Erennan de'iidde nagaraa ootsiyaa asaa ubbaw
Numbers15:30 « ‹Shin yeletaan Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidinakka bete asaa gidinakka eriidde otoruwaan nagaraa ootsiyaa uray Med'inaa Godaa boree. He uray bare asaa giddoppe bohetto.
Numbers15:31 He aawuu Med'inaa Godaa k'aalaa kad'eedda dirawunne Aa azazuwaa mentseedda diraw
Numbers15:32 Itti gallassi Israa'eeliyaa Asay mela biittaa de'ishshin
Numbers15:33 Mitsaa I mis'ishin demmeedda asatuu Musekko
Numbers15:34 Unttunttu Aa ootsanawaa eribeenna diraw
Numbers15:35 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers15:36 Kumentsaa yaa'ay Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan
Numbers15:37 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers15:38 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Hinttekka sintsaappe yaana yeletaykka hintte mayuwaa gas'aa s'eeran s'eeran mac'araa kessite; he mac'araa bolla saluwaa malatiyaa k'ac'inaa sikkite.
Numbers15:39 He mac'araa hintte be'iyaa wode ubbaan Med'inaa Godaa azazotuwaa hassayiide polite; yaatooppe
Numbers15:40 He mac'araa be'iyaawaan hintte ta azazotuwaa ubbaa hassayiide polananne hintte hintte S'oossaw geeshsha gidana.
Numbers15:41 Taani Med'inaa Godaa
Numbers16:1 Leewiyaa zariyaappe K'ahaata yara gidiyaa Yis'ihaara na'ay K'oraahi
Numbers16:2 Muse bolla denddeeddino. Unttunttunna laau s'eetanne ishatamu Israa'eeliyaa asatuu de'iino; unttunttu eretteedda asanne maabaran dooretteedda kaaletsiyaawantta.
Numbers16:3 Unttunttu Musenne Aaroona sintsa shiik'iide
Numbers16:4 Muse hawaa siseedda wode S'oossaa sintsan sa'aan guufanneedda;
Numbers16:5 K'oraahanne Aa c'itaa ubbaa
Numbers16:6 K'oraaha
Numbers16:7 bonk'k'uwaa aan wotsiide
Numbers16:8 Muse k'aykka K'oraaha
Numbers16:9 Israa'eeliyaa Med'inaa Goday hinttena Israa'eeliyaa maabaraappe dummayiide
Numbers16:10 I hinttenanne hintte ishatuwaa Leewatuwaa ubbaa barekko shiishsheedda; k'ay hai hintte k'eesetetsaakka kajjeeliita.
Numbers16:11 Neeninne ne c'itay ubbay Aaroona bolla zuuzummiyaawe
Numbers16:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers16:13 Neeni mela biittaan nuuna wod'anaw maatsaynne eessay goggiyaa gadiyaappe kesseeddawe guus's'eeddee? K'ay hai neeni nu bolla kaappuwaa gidanaw koyay?
Numbers16:14 Hewaa bollakka k'ay maatsaynne eessay goggiyaa biittaa neeni nuuna gelissabaakka
Numbers16:15 Muse loytsi hank'k'ettiide Med'inaa Godaa
Numbers16:16 K'ay Muse K'oraaha
Numbers16:17 Itti itti Asay bare is'aanaa c'uwayiyaawaa ubbaanna laau s'eetanne ishatamuwaa akkiide
Numbers16:18 Asay ubbaykka bare is'aanaa c'uwayiyaawaa akkiide
Numbers16:19 K'oraahi kumentsaa maabaraa Gaketiyaa Dunkkaniyaa penggiyaan shiishsheedda. He wode Med'inaa Godaa bonchchuu kumentsaa maabaraw k'onc'c'eedda.
Numbers16:20 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona
Numbers16:21 «Taani itti kutsan ha maabaraa d'ayissana haniyaa diraw
Numbers16:22 Shin Musenne Aarooni sa'aan guufanniide
Numbers16:23 Yaatina Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers16:24 «Neeni maabaraa
Numbers16:25 Muse denddiide
Numbers16:26 Maabaraa I
Numbers16:27 Unttunttu K'oraaha
Numbers16:28 Muse asaa
Numbers16:29 Ha asatuu Asay hayk'k'iyaawaadan hayk'k'ooppe
Numbers16:30 Shin Med'inaa Goday ubbaanna ooratsabaa ootsina
Numbers16:31 I yaagiide wursseedda wode
Numbers16:32 Biittay dooyettiide
Numbers16:33 Yaatina unttunttu barew de'iyaawaa ubbaanna pas'a de'iidde
Numbers16:34 Unttunttu waasuwaan unttunttu matan de'iyaa Israa'eelatuu ubbay
Numbers16:35 K'ay tamaykka Med'inaa Godaa mataappe yiide
Numbers16:36 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers16:37 «Neeni k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Elaazaraw yaagaade oda
Numbers16:38 Bare nagaraa diraw hayk'k'eedda ha asatuu is'aanaa c'uwayiyaabatuwaa lee'issaade k'os's'aade
Numbers16:39 K'eesii Elaazari s'uugetteedda asatuu shiishsheedda nahaase birataappe oosetteedda is'aanaa c'uwayiyaabatuwaa akkiide
Numbers16:40 Aaroona zare gidenna ooninne Med'inaa Godaa sintsan is'aanaa c'uwayanaw shiik'enna mala
Numbers16:41 Wonttetsa gallassi Israa'eeliyaa maabaray ubbay
Numbers16:42 Maabaray Musenne Aaroona bolla denddanaw shiik'iide
Numbers16:43 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers16:44 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers16:45 «Ha asaa gidduwaappe kichchite; taani unttuntta itti kutsan d'ayissa bashana» yaageedda. Unttunttu sa'aan guufanneeddino.
Numbers16:46 Muse Aaroona
Numbers16:47 Muse geeddawaadan Aarooni bare is'aanaa c'uwayiyaawaa akkiide
Numbers16:48 Yaatiide I hayk'k'eeddawanttuppenne pas'a de'iyaawanttuppe gidduwaan ek'k'ina
Numbers16:49 K'oraaha gaasuwaan hayk'k'eedda Asay paydettenan
Numbers16:50 Boshay ek'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers17:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers17:2 «Neeni
Numbers17:3 Itti itti zariyaa kaappoo itti s'amaa gidiyaa diraw
Numbers17:4 Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon taani neenana gaketiyaa Markkatetsaa Taabootaa sintsan wotsa.
Numbers17:5 Taani dooriyaa asaa s'amay aac'ana; hawaadan ootsaade hintte bollan Israa'eelatuu zuuzummiyaa zuuzuntsaa taani mule d'ayissana» yaageedda.
Numbers17:6 Muse Israa'eeliyaa asaw odina
Numbers17:7 Muse he s'amaa ubbaa Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon Med'inaa Godaa sintsan wotseedda.
Numbers17:8 Wonttetsa gallassi Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddo Muse geleedda wode
Numbers17:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers17:10 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers17:11 Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan Muse ootseedda.
Numbers17:12 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Musa
Numbers17:13 Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaakko
Numbers18:1 Med'inaa Goday Aaroona
Numbers18:2 Neeninne ne attuma naanay Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsan ootsiyaa wode
Numbers18:3 Unttunttu hintteppe garssana Dunkkaaniyaa ooso ubbaa ootsino; shin unttunttukka hinttekka ittippe hayk'k'ennaadan
Numbers18:4 Unttunttu hinttenana ittippe gidino; Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaan de'iyaa ooso ubbaa ootsino. Leewatuwaappe attina
Numbers18:5 Laaentsuwaa Israa'eelatuwaa bolla hank'k'uu wod'd'enna mala
Numbers18:6 Leewatuwaa hintte dabbotuwaa Israa'eelatuwaa giddoppe taani ta huup'iyaw dooraad. Unttunttu Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa oosuwaa ootsanaw hinttenttoo imuwaadan immaade
Numbers18:7 Shin neeninne ne attuma naanatu s'alalay yarshshiyaa sa'aa oosuwaa ubbaanne gaariduwaa giddon de'iyaa k'eesetetsaa ooso ubbaa ootsite. K'eesetetsaa oosuwaa taani hinttenttoo imuwaadan ootsaade immay; hara uray ooninne geeshsha sa'aakko shiik'iyaawe hayk'k'o» yaageedda.
Numbers18:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Aaroona
Numbers18:9 Taw immiyaa aad'd'eeda geeshsha imuwaappe taman s'uugettenna baggay hinttessa gidanawaa: unttunttu taw immiyaa geeshsha imuwaa ubbaappe katsaa yarshshuu
Numbers18:10 Hintte hewaa geeshsha sa'aan miite; attumawe ubbay hewaa mo; hewe hinttew geeshsha gidanawaa.
Numbers18:11 «Hawe k'ay neessa. Israa'eelatuwaa k'aatso yarshshuwaa ubbaa new
Numbers18:12 «Unttunttu taw immiyaa koyiro ayifiyaappe loo wogaraa zayitiyaa ubbaa
Numbers18:13 Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaw ahiyaa unttunttu gadiyaan de'iyaa koyiro gakkeedda ayfii hinttessa; hintte golliyaa asaa giddon wogaadan geeshsha gidiyaa ubbay hewaa mo.
Numbers18:14 «Israa'eeliyaan Med'inaa Godaw dummateeddabay ubbay hinttessa.
Numbers18:15 Bayira yeletteedda Asay woy mehii
Numbers18:16 Itti agenaa naanatuwaa wozanaw Dunkkaaniyaan erettiyaa miizaaniyaa (20 Geera) likkiyaan ichcheshu s'agaraa biraa wozo gatiyaa k'ans's'ite.
Numbers18:17 Shin miizzaa bayiraa
Numbers18:18 Unttunttuppe beettiyaa ashuu wus'akkeedda anggoosuwaadaaninne ushechcha gediyaadan hinttessa.
Numbers18:19 Israa'eelatuu Med'inaa Godaw immiyaa geeshsha yarshshuwaa ubbaa new
Numbers18:20 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Aaroona
Numbers18:21 S'oossay
Numbers18:22 Hachcheppe doommiide
Numbers18:23 Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa oosuwaa ootsiyaawanttunne hewan polettiyaa nagaraa tookkiyaawanttu Leewatuwaa. Hawe yeletaa ubbaw med'inaa wogaa. Leewatuu Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaan ayinne laattikkino.
Numbers18:24 Hewaa diraw
Numbers18:25 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers18:26 «Neeni Leewatuwaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Taani hinttenttoo laataadan immeedda asiraataa hintte Israa'eeliyaa asaappe akkiyaa wode
Numbers18:27 Hintte imuu hinttenttoo katsaa bukkiyaa uddumaa katsaadaaninne gumiyaa woyniyaa ayifiyaadan paydettee.
Numbers18:28 K'ay hawaadan Israa'eeliyaa asaappe hintte akkiyaa asiraataa ubbaappe imuwaa Med'inaa Godaw immite; ha asiraataappe Med'inaa Godaa diraw k'eesiyaa Aaroonaw hintte immanaw besse.
Numbers18:29 Hintte akkiyaa imotaa ubbaappe
Numbers18:30 «K'ay neeni Leewatuwaa
Numbers18:31 Hinttenne hintte golliyaa Asay hewaappe atteedawaa hak'aninne miite; ayaw gooppe
Numbers18:32 Loo bagga S'oossaw immi diggeeddawaappe guyyiyaan hintte miyaa wode
Numbers19:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda;
Numbers19:2 «Med'inaa Goday higgiyan azazeedda wogay hawaa: Tilla bollana de'iyaa woy borssiyaabay bayinna
Numbers19:3 K'eesiyaa Elaazaraw izo immite; I izo dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe gas'aa afina
Numbers19:4 K'eesiyaa Elaazari I suutsaappe amareedawaa bare birad'd'iyan akkiide
Numbers19:5 I s'eellishin ussatta s'uugettu; I galbbay
Numbers19:6 K'eesii zigaa
Numbers19:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers19:8 He ussatto s'uuggeeddawe k'ay bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka haatsaan meec'etto; ikka k'ay omarssa gakkanaw wogaadan tuna gidanawaa.
Numbers19:9 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers19:10 K'ay ussatti bidintsaa shiishsheedda Asay bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; omarssi gakkanaw I wogaadan tuna gidanawaa. Ha wogay Israa'eeliyaa asawunne unttunttu gidduwaan de'iyaa hara gade asaw laa''ookka med'inaa woga gidanawaa.
Numbers19:11 «Hayk'k'eedda asaa anhaa bochchiyaa ooninne laappun gallassaa wogaadan tunana.
Numbers19:12 He tunatetsaappe geeyiyaa haatsaan heezzantsa gallassinne laappuntsa gallassi
Numbers19:13 Hayk'k'eedda uraa anhaa bochchiyaa ooninne barena geeshshennan aggooppe
Numbers19:14 «Itti uray dunkkaaniyaa giddon hayk'k'ooppe de'iyaa wogay hawaa: dunkkaaniyaa giddo geliyaa ooninne
Numbers19:15 Hewaadankka
Numbers19:16 K'ay dembban mashshaan hayk'k'eedda asaa
Numbers19:17 «Tunatetsaappe geeshshanaw s'uuggeedda ussatti bidintsaappe amareedawaa akkaade
Numbers19:18 geeshsha Asay hiisoop'p'iyaa bonc'c'iyaa akkiide
Numbers19:19 Geeshsha Asay heezzentsanne laappuntsa gallassan tuneedda uraa bollan c'ac'c'afo. I laappuntsa gallassan he uraa tunatetsaappe geeshsho; he geeyeedda bitanii bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; bare bollaakka haatsaan meec'etto; he gallassaa omarssi I geeshsha gidanawaa.
Numbers19:20 «Shin tuna uray barena geeshshennawaa gidooppe
Numbers19:21 Hawe hinttenttoo med'inaa woga gidanawaa. K'ay tunatetsaappe geeyiyaa haatsaa c'ac'c'afiyaa Asay bare mayuwaa meec'c'o; tunatetsaappe geeyiyaa haatsaa bochchiyaa ooninnekka omarssi gakkanaw tuna gidanawaa.
Numbers19:22 Tuna uray bochchiyaa ayaynne tunee. K'ay hewaa bochchiyaa ooninne omarssa gakkanaw tuna gidee» yaageedda.
Numbers20:1 Koyro aginaan Israa'eelatuu ubbay S'iina giyaa mela biittaa gakkiide
Numbers20:2 Hewaan asaw haatsay d'ayina
Numbers20:3 Unttunttu
Numbers20:4 Nuuninne nu mehii ha mela biittan hayk'k'anaadan
Numbers20:5 Ha wolk'k'aama sa'aa nuuna Gibs'eppe pude ayaw aheedditee? Hawaan katsaa ayfii
Numbers20:6 Yaatina Musenne Aarooni asaa mataappe Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge biide guufanneeddino; Med'inaa Godaa bonchchuu unttunttoo k'onc'c'eedda.
Numbers20:7 Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers20:8 «Ne gatimaa akka; neeninne ne ishaa Aarooni shiik'uwaa shiishshite; unttunttu sintsan zaallay haatsaa goggana mala oda. Zaallaappe haatsaa hintte kessiide
Numbers20:9 Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan
Numbers20:10 Inne Aarooni shiik'uwaa zaallaa sintsan shiishsheeddino; Muse unttuntta
Numbers20:11 Muse bare kushiyaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide
Numbers20:12 Shin Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona
Numbers20:13 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Med'inaa Godaanna walak'ettowe I bare geeshshatetsaa unttunttu giddon k'onc'c'isseeddasay ha Mariiba haatsaana.
Numbers20:14 Muse K'aadeesappe Eedooma biittaa kaatiyaakko
Numbers20:15 Nu mayzza aawotuu duge Gibs'e wod'd'eeddino; yan nuuni daro laytsaa de'eeddo. Gibs'etuu nuunanne nu aawotuwaa uk'k'inneeddino.
Numbers20:16 Nuuni Med'inaa Godaw waassina
Numbers20:17 Hayyanaa
Numbers20:18 Shin Eedooma kaatii
Numbers20:19 Israa'eelatuu Aa
Numbers20:20 Eedooma kaatii zaaretsiide
Numbers20:21 Eedoomatuu barenttu biittaana Israa'eeliyaa Asay aad'd'anaw diggeedda diraw
Numbers20:22 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay K'aadeesappe denddiide
Numbers20:23 Eedooma zawaa matan de'iyaa Hoora Deriyan
Numbers20:24 «Aarooni hayk'k'iide bare mayzzan gaketiyaa wodii gakkeedda. Mariiba haatsaa matan hintte laauukka ta azazuwaa bolla makkaleedda diraw
Numbers20:25 Aaroonanne Aa na'aa Elaazara akkaade
Numbers20:26 Aaroona mayuwaa k'aaraade
Numbers20:27 Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan Muse ootseedda; Asay ubbay s'eellishin
Numbers20:28 Muse Aaroona mayuwaa k'aariide
Numbers20:29 Aarooni hayk'k'eeddawaa Asay ubbay ereedda wode
Numbers21:1 Neegeeba mela biittaa
Numbers21:2 He wode Israa'eeliyaa asay
Numbers21:3 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa k'aalaa sisiide
Numbers21:4 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Hoora Deriyaappe denddiide
Numbers21:5 Asay
Numbers21:6 Med'inaa Goday asaa gidduwaan marzziyaanna de'iyaa shooshshatuwaa yeddeedda; unttunttu dukkina
Numbers21:7 Unttunttu Musekko yiide Aa
Numbers21:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa
Numbers21:9 Muse nahaase birataappe shooshshaa med'd'iide
Numbers21:10 Israa'eeliyaa Asay denddiide
Numbers21:11 Obootappe denddiide
Numbers21:12 Hewaappe denddiide
Numbers21:13 Hewaappe denddiide
Numbers21:14 Hewaa diraw
Numbers21:15 Eera katamaa gakkanawunne Moo'aaba zawaa gakkanaw de'iyaa zanggaaraa dugetsaa» yaagetti s'aafetteedda.
Numbers21:16 Unttunttu hewaappe denddiide
Numbers21:17 Hewaan Israa'eeliyaa Asay ha mazimuriyaa yes's'eedda. «Haatsaa ollaw
Numbers21:18 Kaappatuu bookkeedda haatsaa ollaw
Numbers21:19 Mataanappe Naahili'eela
Numbers21:20 Baamootappe denddiide
Numbers21:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers21:22 «Nuuna ne biittaana aatsaarikkii! Nuuni ne gadiyaa gidduwaa woy woyniyaa turaa gidduwaa gelokko; k'ay haatsaa ollaa hak'awaappenne ushokko. Nuuni ne biittaana aad'd'ana gakkanaw
Numbers21:23 Shin Sihooni bare biittaana Israa'eeliyaa asaa aatsenan diggeedda; I bare olanchchatuwaa ubbaa shiishiide
Numbers21:24 Shin Israa'eeliyaa Asay olan Amooretuwaappe daruwaa wod'iide
Numbers21:25 Yaatina Israa'eelatuu Amooretuu katamatuwaa ubbaa s'ooniide akkeeddino. K'ay Haseboonanne Aa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa k'eeri katamatuwaakka ubbaa oyk'k'iide
Numbers21:26 Haseboona katamay Amooretuu Kaatiyaa Sihoona katamaa. Sihooni Moo'aaba biittaa kaatiyaa kasewaa oliide

Numbers22:21 Wonttetsa gallassi Balaami bare haratto kooriide

Numbers23:1 Balaami Baalaak'a
Numbers23:2 Balaami geeddawaadan Baalaak'i ootseedda; unttunttu laauukka itti itti yarshshiyaa sa'aan itti korumaa booraanne itti dorssaa orggiyaa yarshsheeddino.
Numbers23:3 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers23:4 Hewaan S'oossay Balaamana gakettina Balaami
Numbers23:5 Balaami gaanabaa Med'inaa Goday aw odiidde
Numbers23:6 I Baalaak'akko simmiyaa wode
Numbers23:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Numbers23:8 S'oossay shek'k'ibeenawantta taani waata shek'k'oo? Med'inaa Goday
Numbers23:9 Taani d'ok'k'a zaallaa huup'iyaan ek'k'aade unttuntta s'eellay; zooziyaan ek'k'aade taani unttuntta be'ay. Unttunttu barekka de'iyaa asaa; unttunttu barena kawutetsatuwaappe ittuwaadan paydikkino.
Numbers23:10 Baanaadan c'oratteedda Yaak'ooba zeretsaa ooni paydanaw danddayii? Haray atto Israa'eeliyaa asaw oyddentso kushiyaa ooni paydanaw danddayii? Ta hayk'k'uu s'illotuwaa hayk'uwaa mala gido; ta de'uwaa wurssetsaykka unttunttuwaadan hano!» yaageedda.
Numbers23:11 Baalaak'i Balaama

Numbers23:15 Balaami Baalaak'a

Numbers23:17 I aakko simmiide

Numbers23:19 S'oossay worddotanaw asaa gidenna; bare k'ofaa laammanaw I asaa na'aa gidenna. I odiidde
Numbers23:20 Taani anjjanaw azazuwaa akkaad. I anjji kichcheedda; taani hewaa laammanaw danddaykke.
Numbers23:21 Yaak'ooba zariyaw iitabay yaanabay
Numbers23:22 S'oossay unttuntta Gibs'eppe kesseedda; I mino mentsaadan unttunttoo de'ee.
