1Samuel2:1 Haanna hawaadan yaagaadde woossaaddu; «Ta wozanay Med'inaa Godaan nashettee; Med'inaa Godaan ta wolk'k'ay dareedda. Ta morkkatuwaa bollan taani c'eek'k'ettaade haasayay; Med'inaa Goday taana ashsheeda diraw
1Samuel2:2 «Med'inaa Godaa mala geeshshi ittuunne baawa; Aa mali ittuunne baawa. Nu S'oossaappe attina
1Samuel2:3 «Otoro haasaya aggite; otoro k'aalay hinttenttu doonaappe kessoppo. Ayaw gooppe
1Samuel2:4 «Olanchchatuwaa wonddaafii meeedda; shin d'ubetteeddawanttu wolk'k'aa danc'c'eeddino.
1Samuel2:5 Kalli utteeddawanttu koshatiidde
1Samuel2:6 «Med'inaa Goday wod'eenne patsee; k'ay I duge Si'ooliyaan yeggeenne pude kessee.
1Samuel2:7 Med'inaa Goday mank'k'etseenne dureyee; k'ay I zik'k'isseenne d'ok'k'issee.
1Samuel2:8 I hiyyeesatuwaa baanaappe dentsee. Metootanchchatuwaakka bidintsaa pituwaappe dentsee; unttuntta kaappatuwaanna utissee; unttuntta bonchcho araataa laatissee. «Ayaw gooppe
1Samuel2:9 I S'oossaa asatuwaa gediyaa naagee; shin iitatuwaa I d'uman c'ou udana. «Asay bare wolk'k'an s'oonenna;
1Samuel2:10 Med'inaa Godaana ek'k'ettiyaawanttu liik'ana. I saluwaappe unttunttu bolla guguntsaadan guummana; Med'inaa Goday sa'aan de'iyaawantta ubbaa pirddana. «I bare kaatiyaw wolk'k'aa immana; I bare okkeeddawoo s'oonuwaa immana» yaagaadde woossaaddu.
1Samuel2:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel2:12 Eeliya attuma naanay iita naanatuwaa; unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa erikkino
1Samuel2:13 woy yarshshuwaa immiyaa asaw k'eesatuu ootsiyaa wogaa naagikkino. Hewenne
1Samuel2:14 doyssiyaa wogga otuwaan woy keriyaan he koc'aa yeddiide
1Samuel2:15 K'ay mod'd'uwaa yarshshiyaa sa'aan s'iis's'anaappe kasetiide
1Samuel2:16 Hewaappe guyye bitanii zaariide
1Samuel2:17 Med'inaa Godaw immiyaa yarshshuwaa Eeliyaa naanay kad'eedda diraw
1Samuel2:18 Shin Sammeeli na'atetsaan de'iidde
1Samuel2:19 Sammeela daaya laytsan laytsan guutsa k'oliyaa giigissaade
1Samuel2:20 Eeli Elk'k'aananne Aa machchato
1Samuel2:21 Med'inaa Goday Haanno anjjina
1Samuel2:22 Eeli loytsi ec'eedda. Aa naanay Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa bolla ootseedda ubbabaanne k'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan S'oossaw ootsiyaa mac'c'a asatuwaana giseeddawaa siseedda.
1Samuel2:23 Unttuntta
1Samuel2:24 Ta naatoo
1Samuel2:25 Itti Asay asaa naak'k'ooppe
1Samuel2:26 Na'ay Sammeeli S'oossaa sintsaaninne asaa sintsan dic'c'eeddanne sabetteedda.
1Samuel2:27 Itti gallassi S'oossaa Asay Eeliyakko yiide Aa
1Samuel2:28 Aaroone ta yarshshiyaa sa'aa pude kessana mala
1Samuel2:29 Taani ta de'iyaa sa'aa shiishshana mala azazeedda ta yarshshuwaanne immiyaawaa hinttenttu ayaw yed'd'i kaa'iitee? Ta Asay Israa'eelii
1Samuel2:30 «Hewaa diraw
1Samuel2:31 Ne zariyaan Asay c'imenna mala
1Samuel2:32 Neeni metootana; taani Israa'eeliyaa asaw immiyaa anjjuwaa be'aade neeni k'anaatana; shin ne zariyaan c'imana Asay ooninne baawa.

1Samuel12:3 Hekko taani hawaan ek'k'aad; Med'inaa Godaa sintsaaninne I okkeedda kaatiyaa sintsan ta bolla markkattite. Taani O booraa akkaadditaa? O hariyaa akkaadditaa? Oona c'immaadittaa? Oona uk'k'unnaadditaa? Ta ayfiyaa k'ook'issanaw O kushiyaappe magans's'aa maaddittaa? Hawanttuppe ittuwaanne taani ootseeddawaa gidooppe

1Samuel12:10 Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaw

1Samuel12:13 Haikka hinttenttu dooriide oochcheedda kaatii hawesh! Be'ite; Med'inaa Goday hinttenttu bolla kaatiyaa wotseedda.
1Samuel12:14 Med'inaa Godaw hinttenttu yayyooppe
1Samuel12:15 Shin Med'inaa Godaa k'aalaw hinttenttu azazettenan d'ayooppenne Aa azazoo makkalooppe
1Samuel12:16 «Simmi hai ek'k'i bashite; Med'inaa Goday hinttenttu ayfiyaa sintsan ootsiyaa ha gitabaa be'ite!
1Samuel12:17 Zarggaa c'akaa wodii haa gidenneeyye? Med'inaa Goday guguntsaanne iraa yeddana mala
1Samuel12:18 Sammeeli Med'inaa Godaw waasseedda; Med'inaa Goday he gallassi guguntsaanne iraa yeddeedda; hewaa diraw
1Samuel12:19 Asay ubbay Sammeela
1Samuel12:20 Hewaappe guyye Sammeeli asaw hawaadan yaageedda; «Yayyoppite; tumukka hinttenttu ha iitatetsaa ubbaa ootseeddita; shin hinttenttu kumentsaa wozanaappe Med'inaa Godaw kiitettiteppe attina
1Samuel12:21 Maaddenna
1Samuel12:22 Med'inaa Goday bare wolk'k'aama suntsaa diraw bare asaa aggena; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel12:23 Hinttenttu diraw woossiyaawaa aggaade Med'inaa Godaa bolla nagaraa ootsanawe taappe haakko; taani hinttentta loonne suure ogiyaa tamaarissana.
1Samuel12:24 Med'inaa Godaw yayyite; hinttenttu kumentsaa wozanaappe ammanettiide
1Samuel12:25 Shin hinttenttu iitabaa zaari zaariide ootsooppe
1Samuel13:1 Saa'ooli Israa'eeliyaa bolla laau laytsaa kaate gidowaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel13:2 Israa'eelatuu giddoppe heezzu asaa dooreedda; laau shaay Mikimaasan
1Samuel13:3 Yoonataani Gebaa'an de'iyaa Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu c'itaa bolla woraajjeedda; Piliss's'eema asatuu hewaa siseeddino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan Saa'ooli
1Samuel13:4 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay
1Samuel13:5 Piliss's'eema asatuu Israa'eelatuwaa olanaw hattamu shaa paraa gaaretuwaana
1Samuel13:6 Israa'eeliyaa olanchchatuu barenttoo leeleeddawaanne unttunttu c'itaykka loytsi unetteeddawaa be'iide
1Samuel13:7 Ibraawatuwaappe amareedawanttu Yorddaanoosa Shaafaa pinniide
1Samuel13:8 Saa'ooli Sammeeli keereedda laappun gallassaa gameedda; shin Sammeeli Gelggali yibeenna; yaatina
1Samuel13:9 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel13:10 Saa'ooli s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa polo saannakka Sammeeli gakki wod'd'eedda. Yaatina
1Samuel13:11 Sammeeli Saa'oola
1Samuel13:12 ‹Piliss's'eematuu taananna olettanaw hai Gelggala wod'd'anawantta; taani Med'inaa Godaa maaduwaa oochchabeykke; hewaa diraw
1Samuel13:13 Sammeeli Saa'oola
1Samuel13:14 Simmi hai ne kawutetsay gamenna; neeni Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaa naagabeenna diraw
1Samuel13:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel13:16 Saa'ooli
1Samuel13:17 Piliss's'eematuu shiik'eedda sa'aappe woraajjiyaawanttu heezzu c'ugo gidiide keseeddino; unttuttuppe itti c'uguu Shu'aala biittan de'iyaa Oofirakko simmiide beedda; laaentsuu Beeti-Horooni beedda;
1Samuel13:18 heezzentso c'uguu Beeti-Horoona sintsa yeedda
1Samuel13:19 Piliss's'eema asatuu
1Samuel13:20 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel13:21 Maraashaa s'eeraanne shalkkiyaa poshissanaw hosppun giraame dees'iyaa biraa k'ans's'iino; kalttaa
1Samuel13:22 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel13:23 Piliss's'eematuwaa c'uguu Mikimaasa pinuwaa baanaw kesseedda.
1Samuel14:1 Itti gallassi Saa'oola na'ay Yoonaataani bare ola miishshaa tookkiyaa wodallaa hawaadan yaageedda; «Haaya; hefintsa baggan de'iyaa Piliss's'eematuu shiik'k'eedda sa'aa ane boytte» yaageedda. Shin bare aawoo ha yewuwaa odibeenna.
1Samuel14:2 He wode Saa'ooli Gib'aa matan Migiroonan
1Samuel14:3 eefuudiyaa mayyeedda k'eesii
1Samuel14:4 Yoonataani Piliss's'eematuu shiik'k'eedda sa'aa gakkanaw pinnanaw k'oppiyaa pinuwaassi laau baggaanakka s'eeray s'ini geedda wolk'k'aama zaallatuu de'iino; ittuwaa suntsay Bodees'a; laa'entsuwaa suntsay Seena.
1Samuel14:5 Zaallatuwaappe ittuu pinniyaasaa huup'issa baggana Mikimaasaw sintsanna de'iyaa wode
1Samuel14:6 Yoonaataani bare ola miishshaa tookkiyaa wodallaa hawaadan yaageedda; «Haaya; ha k'as's'arettibeennawanttu shiik'k'eedda sa'aa ane hefintsa boytte. Ooni erii
1Samuel14:7 Aa ola miishshaa tookkiyaawe
1Samuel14:8 Hewaappe guyye Yoonaataani
1Samuel14:9 Unttunttu nuuna
1Samuel14:10 Shin unttunttu
1Samuel14:11 Yaatina
1Samuel14:12 Hewaappe asatuu Yoonaataananne ola miishshaa tookkiyaawaa s'eegiide
1Samuel14:13 Yoonataani bare ola miishshaa tookkiyaawaa kaaletsiide
1Samuel14:14 He koyro woraajjuwaan Yoonataaninne Aa ola miishshaa tookkiyaawe itti goshsha gaden laatamu gidiyaa asaa wod'eeddino.
1Samuel14:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:16 Saa'ooli Biiniyaama biittan
1Samuel14:17 Yaatina
1Samuel14:18 Saa'ooli k'eesiyaa Aakiya
1Samuel14:19 Saa'ooli k'eesiyaana haasayishin
1Samuel14:20 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:21 Kase Piliss's'eema asatuwaana de'iidde
1Samuel14:22 Efireema gezziyaan k'osetti utteedda hara Israa'eelatuukka Piliss's'eematuu bak'atiidde de'iyaawaa siseeddino. Unttunttukka yederssuwaa uukkiyaa asan gaketeeddino.
1Samuel14:23 Med'inaa Goday he gallassi Israa'eeliyaa asaa ashsheeda. Beeti-Aweena katamaappe hefintsa gakkanawukka olay oletteedda.
1Samuel14:24 He gallassi Israa'eeliyaa asatuu koshaan labbaneeddino; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel14:25 Olanchchatuu ubbay ubbaanna wora giddo geliyaa wode
1Samuel14:26 Unttunttu wora giddon eessay goggiyaawaa be'eeddino; shin c'aak'uwaa yayyeedda diraw
1Samuel14:27 Shin Yoonaataani bare aawuu asaa c'aak'uwaan k'achcheeddawaa sisibeenna. Hewaa diraw
1Samuel14:28 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:29 Hewaappe guyye Yoonataani hawaadan yaageedda; «Ta aawuu biittaw meto med'd'eedda. Taani ha eessaappe laafa laac'c'ina ta ayfii ay keeshshaa dooyetteeddentto be'a.
1Samuel14:30 Asay bare morkkatuwaappe omoodeeddawaappe hachche meeddabaa gidintto
1Samuel14:31 He gallassi Israa'eeliyaa asatuu Mikimaasappe Ayaaloona gakkanaw
1Samuel14:32 Unttunttu omooduwaa gawuhayiide
1Samuel14:33 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:34 Zaaretsiidekka
1Samuel14:35 Saa'ooli he sa'aan Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa gimbbeedda; S'oossaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa I gimbbishin
1Samuel14:36 Saa'ooli
1Samuel14:37 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel14:38 Yaatina Saa'ooli
1Samuel14:39 Israa'eeliyaa ashshiyaa Med'inaa Goday ero! Ta na'aa Yoonataana gidooppenne
1Samuel14:40 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:41 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:42 K'ay Saa'ooli
1Samuel14:43 Saa'ooli Yoonaataana
1Samuel14:44 Saa'ooli hawaadan yaageedda; «Yoonaataanaa
1Samuel14:45 Shin Asay Saa'oola
1Samuel14:46 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:47 Saa'ooli Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaate gidowaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel14:48 I minniide oletteedda; Amaaleek'a asatuwaa s'ooneedda; Israa'eeliyaa asaa bonk'k'iyaawanttu kushiyaappe ashsheeda.
1Samuel14:49 Saa'oola attuma naanay Yoonaataana
1Samuel14:50 Aa machata Ahima'aas'a naatto Ahino'aamo. Aa olanchchatuu gadaaway Aa aawuwaa ishaa Neera na'aa Abaneera.
1Samuel14:51 Saa'oola aawuwaa K'iisinne Abaneera aawuwaa Neeri Abii'eela naanaa.
1Samuel14:52 Saa'ooli de'eedda laytsaa ubbaan Piliss's'eema asatuwaana suulo olaa olettiide de'eedda. Mino asaa woy s'ala asaa demmeedda wode ubbaan

1Samuel16:23 Hewaappe simmina
1Samuel17:1 Piliss's'eema asatuu barenttu olanchchatuwaa Yihudaan de'iyaa Sookko geetettiyaa sa'aa olaw shiishsheeddino; Sookoppenne Azeek'appe gidduwaan de'iyaa Efess's'amiima geetettiyaa itti sa'aan shiik'i utteeddino.
1Samuel17:2 Saa'oolinne Israa'eelatuu Eela geetettiyaa zanggaaraan shiik'i utteeddino; Piliss's'eema asatuwaana olettanaw salppiyaan keseeddino.
1Samuel17:3 Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu itti deriyaan salppina
1Samuel17:4 Gaate kataman de'iyaa
1Samuel17:5 I ishatamanne laappun kiilo giraame dees'iyaa nahaasiyaa birataa kootiyaa mayyeedda; k'ay nahaasiyaa birataa k'op'iyaa bare huup'iyaan wotseedda.
1Samuel17:6 Nahaasiyaa birataa gambbaaliyaa bare gediyaan aatseedda; bare hashiyaan nahaasiyaa birataappe k'os'etteedda s'ink'k'aa tookeedda.
1Samuel17:7 Aa bodiyaa toomay shemayinniyaa wonddarashiyaa keeshshaa; bodiyaa ayfii laappun kiilo giraame dees'ee; gonddalliyaa tookkeedda itti bitanii Aa sintsan hamettee.
1Samuel17:8 Gooliyaade ek'k'iide
1Samuel17:9 He bitanii taananna olettiide taana wod'ooppe
1Samuel17:10 K'aykka he Piliss's'eeme bitanii
1Samuel17:11 Saa'oolinne Israa'eelatuu Piliss's'eemiyaa k'aalaa sisiide
1Samuel17:12 Daawite Yihudaa gadiyaan Beeteleheemen de'iyaa Efiraataa Isseya na'aa. Isseyaw hosppun attuma naanay de'iino; Saa'ooli kaatiyaa gidiide de'iyaa wode
1Samuel17:13 Isseya attuma naanay bayiratiyaawanttu heezzatuu Saa'oola kaalliide olaa beeddino; olaa beedda Aa heezzu naanatuwaa suntsay hawaa; bayiray Eli'aaba; teefay Aminaadaaba; heezzentsuu Shaama.
1Samuel17:14 Daawite naanatuwaa ubbaappe teefa. Bayira heezzu naanay Saa'oola kaalleeddino;
1Samuel17:15 shin Daawite bare aawuwaa dorssatuwaa heemmanaw Saa'oola mataappe Beeteleeme simerettee.
1Samuel17:16 He Piliss's'eemi oytamu gallassaa guuranne omarssi yiide
1Samuel17:17 Itti gallassi Isseyi bare na'aa Daawitaw hawaadan yaageedda; «Ha s'iis'etteedda tishaappe tammu kiilo giraamiyaanne ha tammu ukitsatuwaa akkaade
1Samuel17:18 Ha tammu nukaa pilatuwaakka unttunttu shaalak'aw afa; ne ishatuu waan de'intto be'aade
1Samuel17:19 Kaatiyaa Saa'ooli
1Samuel17:20 Daawite wontta guuraanna denddiide dorssaa wudiyaa hara asaa hentsiide
1Samuel17:21 Israa'eeliyaa asatuunne Piliss's'eema asatuu ittuu ittuwaakko s'eelliide salppeeddino.
1Samuel17:22 Daawite bare aheedda miishshaa shink'k'aa naagiyaawaa kushiyan wotsiide
1Samuel17:23 Daawite bare ishatuwaanna haasayishin
1Samuel17:24 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay he bitaniyaa be'eedda wode
1Samuel17:25 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ittuu ittuwaa
1Samuel17:26 Daawite bare matan ek'k'eedda asaa
1Samuel17:27 Shin unttunttu Aa
1Samuel17:28 Daawite asaana haasayiyaawaa Aa ishay ubbaappe bayiray Eli'aabi sisiide
1Samuel17:29 Daawite
1Samuel17:30 Daawite bare ishaa aggiide
1Samuel17:31 Daawite haasayeeddawaa siseedda asatuu Saa'oolaw odeeddino; Saa'ooli Daawita s'eesisseedda.
1Samuel17:32 Daawite Saa'oola
1Samuel17:33 Saa'ooli Daawita
1Samuel17:34 Shin Daawite Saa'oola
1Samuel17:35 Aa kaallaade taani baade Aa doonaappe wotsa akkay; taakko simmiyaa wode
1Samuel17:36 Taani ne k'oomay gaammuwaanne babbantsa wod'aad; ha k'as's'arettibeenna Piliss's'eemi de'uwaa S'oossaa olanchchatuwaa naasseedda diraw
1Samuel17:37 Gaammuwaanne babbantsa s'uguntsaappe taana ashsheeda Med'inaa Goday ha Piliss's'eemiyaa kushiyaappekka ashshanawaa» yaageedda. Saa'ooli Daawita
1Samuel17:38 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel17:39 Daawite bare ola mayuwaa bolla mashshaa danc'c'eedda; hametti be'eedda; shin danddayibeenna; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel17:40 Daawite bare hentsaa gatimaa oyk'k'iide
1Samuel17:41 Gooliyaadekka Daawitakko shiik'i shiik'iide matattedda; gonddalliyaa tookkiyaa bitanii Aa sintsan de'ee.
1Samuel17:42 I Daawita tishshi ootsi s'eelliide
1Samuel17:43 Daawita
1Samuel17:44 I k'aykka Daawita
1Samuel17:45 Daawite Piliss's'eemiyaa
1Samuel17:46 Hachche Med'inaa Goday neena ta kushiyan aatsi immana; taani neena shoc'ana; ne k'ood'iyaakka muuc'a olana. Piliss's'eema olanchchatuwaa anhaa saluwaa kafotuwawunne sa'aa do'atoo taani hachche immana; yaatina
1Samuel17:47 Med'inaa Goday bare asaa ashshanaw tooraa woy mashshaa koyennawaa hawaan shiik'eedda Asay ubbay erana; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel17:48 Piliss's'eemi denddiide biide
1Samuel17:49 Daawite bare k'arc'c'iitiyaa giddo kushiyaa yeddiide
1Samuel17:50 Yaatiide Daawite Piliss's'eemiyaa yambbarshshaaninne shuchchaan s'ooneedda. Daawite bare kushiyan mashshay baynnan Piliss's'eemiyaa c'addiide wod'eedda.
1Samuel17:51 Daawite wos's'iidde biide
1Samuel17:52 Israa'eeliyaa asaynne Yihudaa Asay denddiide waasiidde
1Samuel17:53 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Piliss's'eema asatuwaa yederssi simmiide
1Samuel17:54 Daawite Piliss's'eemiyaa k'ood'iyaa Yerusaalame aheedda; shin Piliss's'eemiyaa ola miishshaa bare dunkkaaniyaa giddon wotseedda.
1Samuel17:55 Daawite Piliss's'eemiyaakko biishshin
1Samuel17:56 Kaati zaariide
1Samuel17:57 Daawite Piliss's'eemiyaa wod'iide simmeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel17:58 Saa'ooli Aa
1Samuel18:1 Daawite Saa'oolanna haasayiyaawaa wursseeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel18:2 He gallassaappe doommiide
1Samuel18:3 Yoonataani Daawita bare huup'iyaadan siik'iyaa diraw
1Samuel18:4 Yoonataani bare mayyeedda kaabbaa k'aariide
1Samuel18:5 Saa'ooli kiitteedda ubbabaa Daawite poliide ootsiyaa diraw
1Samuel18:6 Daawite Piliss's'eemiyaa Gooliyaada wod'ina Asay soo simmiyaa wode
1Samuel18:7 Mac'c'awanttu duriidde
1Samuel18:8 Saa'ooli ha yetsay iitina
1Samuel18:9 He gallassaappe doommiide
1Samuel18:10 Wonttetsa gallassaa iita ayyaanay S'oossaappe kiitettiide
1Samuel18:11 «Daawita godaana gatsaade sikkaad» giide tooraa s'onggeedda. Shin Daawite laau geedde aappe haleedda.
1Samuel18:12 Med'inaa Goday Saa'oola aggiide Daawitana de'iyaa diraw
1Samuel18:13 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel18:14 Med'inaa Goday Daawitana ittippe de'iyaa diraw
1Samuel18:15 Daawite ootsiyaabay ubbay loytsi injjetiyaawaa Saa'ooli be'iide
1Samuel18:16 Shin Daawite unttuntta olan kaaletsiyaa diraw
1Samuel18:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel18:18 Shin Daawite Saa'oola
1Samuel18:19 Shin Saa'oola naatta Meraaba Daawitaw imettiyaa wodii gakkina
1Samuel18:20 Gidooppenne
1Samuel18:21 I bare wozanaan
1Samuel18:22 K'aykka Saa'ooli bare k'oomatuwaa s'eesiide
1Samuel18:23 Unttunttu I geeddawaadankka Daawitaw odeeddino; shin Daawite unttunttoo
1Samuel18:24 Saa'oola k'oomatuu Daawite geeddawaa Saa'oolaw odeeddino.
1Samuel18:25 Saa'ooli bare k'oomatuwaa
1Samuel18:26 Saa'oola k'oomatuu Saa'ooli geeddawaa Daawitaw odeeddino; kaatiyaanna bollotiyaawe Daawita nashechcheedda. Hewaa diraw
1Samuel18:27 Daawitenne Aa Asay denddiide beeddino; Piliss's'eematuwaappe laau s'eetu asaa wod'eeddino. Daawite kaatiyaanna bollotanaw he asatuwaa k'aaratuwaa ahiide
1Samuel18:28 Saa'ooli Med'inaa Goday Daawitana ittippe de'iyaawaanne Aa naatta Miikaala Daawita siik'iyaawaa ereedda.
1Samuel18:29 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel18:30 Piliss's'eeme kaappatuu olettanaw kesiyaawaa aggibeykkino; shin olaw kesseedda payduwaa ubbaan Saa'oola gadaawatuu ubbaappe s'oonuu haniyaawe Daawitessa; hewaa diraw
1Samuel19:1 Saa'ooli bare na'aa Yoonataanawunne bare k'oomatuwaa ubbaw
1Samuel19:2 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel19:3 Taani ta aabbuna baade
1Samuel19:4 Yoonataani Daawitewaa nashshiide
1Samuel19:5 I Piliss's'eemiyaa wod'iyaa wode bare shemppoo k'arettibeenna. Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa ubbaw wolk'k'aama s'oonuwaa immeedda; hewaa be'aade neenikka nashetaadda. Yaatina
1Samuel19:6 Saa'ooli Yoonataani odeeddawaa sisiide
1Samuel19:7 Yoonataani Daawita s'eesiide
1Samuel19:8 Hara olaykka denddeedda; Daawite kesiide Piliss's'eema asatuwaanna oletteedda; unttuntta wolk'k'aama shochchaa shoc'ina
1Samuel19:9 Hewaappe simmiide
1Samuel19:10 Saa'ooli Daawita godaana gatsiide Dantsanaw (oytsanaw) tooraa s'onggeedda; shin Daawite aappe haleedda; tooray godan ek'k'eedda. He gallassaa k'amma Daawite bak'atiide kessi akkeedda.
1Samuel19:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel19:12 Miikaala Daawita maskkootiyaanna wotsaaddu; Daawite bak'atiide kessi akkeedda.
1Samuel19:13 Miikaala soo misiliyaa akkaade arssaan gisisaaddu; huup'issaana deeshsha isikiyaa wotsaaddu; yaataade afilaa mayzzaaddu.
1Samuel19:14 Daawita omoodiide ahana mala
1Samuel19:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel19:16 Shin asatuu soo geliyaa wode
1Samuel19:17 Saa'ooli Miikaalo
1Samuel19:18 Daawite bak'ati attiide
1Samuel19:19 Saa'ooli
1Samuel19:20 Daawita omooddana mala
1Samuel19:21 Saa'ooli hewaa siseedda wode
1Samuel19:22 Yaatina
1Samuel19:23 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel19:24 Bi gakkiide
1Samuel20:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel20:2 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:3 Shin Daawite Yoonataana
1Samuel20:4 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:5 Hewaappe guyye Daawite hawaadan yaageedda; «Sisa
1Samuel20:6 Ne aawuu taana koyooppe
1Samuel20:7 Hewaappe guyye I
1Samuel20:8 Neena gidooppe
1Samuel20:9 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:10 Hewaappe guyye Daawite
1Samuel20:11 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:12 Yoonataani Daawita hawaadan yaageedda; «Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa S'oossay ero
1Samuel20:13 Shin ta aawuu neena k'ohanaw koyeeddawaa gidooppe
1Samuel20:14 Taana Asay wod'enaadan ta de'uwaa laytsaa ubbaan aggena siik'uwaa
1Samuel20:15 K'ay Goday Daawita morkkatuwaa ubbaa gadiyaappe d'ok'olleedda wodekka
1Samuel20:16 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel20:17 Yoonataani Daawita bare huup'iyaadan siik'eedda diraw
1Samuel20:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel20:19 Wontti peeshina omarssi baade
1Samuel20:20 Taani ayentto s'onggiyaawaa malataade
1Samuel20:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel20:22 Shin taani ta k'oomaa
1Samuel20:23 Neeninne taani haasayeedda k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa gidooppe
1Samuel20:24 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel20:25 Haroode bare uttiyaa sa'aan godaa lank'k'iyaan utteedda; Yoonataani aappe sintsa bazzuwaan utteedda; Abaneeri Saa'oola lank'k'iyaan utteedda; shin Daawita sa'ay mela de'ee.
1Samuel20:26 Saa'ooli he gallassaa ayinne gibeenna; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel20:27 Shin wonttetsa gallassikka
1Samuel20:28 Yoonataani
1Samuel20:29 I taanikka
1Samuel20:30 Saa'ooli Yoonataana bolla hank'k'uwaa ees's'i kesiide hawaadan yaageedda; «Laa geellanne makkalanchcha mishiratti na'aw
1Samuel20:31 Isseya na'ay ha sa'aa bollan de'eedda peeshan ubbaan neeni woy ne kawutetsay ek'k'enna. Hai kiittaade taw Aa ahissa; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel20:32 Hewaappe guyye Yoonataani bare aawuwaa Saa'oola
1Samuel20:33 Shin Saa'ooli Yoonataana wod'anaw tooraa Aa bolla s'onggeedda. Hewaa diraw
1Samuel20:34 Hank'k'uwaa ees'etiide maaddappe denddee ek'k'eedda; bare aawuu Daawita kawushsheedda diraw Yoonataani kayyottiide
1Samuel20:35 Wontta Yoonataani Daawitana gaketanaw gade biide barenanna itti yalaga na'aa akkiide beedda.
1Samuel20:36 Yoonataani na'aa
1Samuel20:37 Na'ay Yoonataana zubbii wod'd'eedda sa'aa gakkeedda wode
1Samuel20:38 K'aykka Yoonataani na'aa
1Samuel20:39 Na'ay ha yewuwaa ayinne erenna; Yoonataananne Daawita s'alaalay eriino.
1Samuel20:40 Yoonataani bare ola miishshaa na'aw immiide
1Samuel20:41 Na'ay beeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel20:42 Yoonataani Daawita
1Samuel21:1 Daawite k'eesiyaa Abimeleekakko Nooba katamaa beedda; Abimeleeki Daawitana gaketanaw kokkoriidde yiide
1Samuel21:2 Shin Daawite k'eesiyaa Abimeleeka
1Samuel21:3 Hai ne kushiyan ayay de'ii? Ichcheshu bashe ukitsaa woy de'eeddawaa ayaanne taw immaarikkii» yaageedda.
1Samuel21:4 Hewaappe guyye k'eesii Daawita
1Samuel21:5 Hewaappe guyye Daawite k'eesiyaa
1Samuel21:6 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel21:7 Saa'oola k'oomatuwaappe itti bitanii he gallassaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan naagiidde de'ee; Aa suntsay Doyk'a; I Eedooma biittaa asaa; Saa'oola mehiyaa heemmiyaawanttoo I kaappuwaa.
1Samuel21:8 Daawite Abimeleeka
1Samuel21:9 Shin Abimeleeki
1Samuel21:10 He gallassi Daawite denddiide
1Samuel21:11 Shin Akiisha oosanchchatuu
1Samuel21:12 Daawite unttunttu haasayaa bare wozanaan oyk'k'iide
1Samuel21:13 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel21:14 Akiishi bare oosanchchatoo
1Samuel21:15 Ha bitanii ta sintsan gooyanaadan hinttenttu aheeddawe
1Samuel22:1 Daawite Gaate katamaappe bak'atiide
1Samuel22:2 Metooteeddawanttu
1Samuel22:3 Daawite he saappe denddiide
1Samuel22:4 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel22:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel22:6 Daawitenne Aa Asay beetteeddawaa Saa'ooli siseedda; Saa'ooli Gib'aa katamaa matan de'iyaa deriyaan
1Samuel22:7 Saa'ooli unttuntta
1Samuel22:8 Hinttenttu ubbay ta bolla mak'etteeddita; ta na'ay Isseya na'aanna k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa c'ak'k'eteeddawaa ooninne taw odibeenna. Hintteppe itti asaynne taw k'arettenna; hachchewaadankka ta na'ay ta k'oomaa taana wod'isanaw dentseeddawaa ooninne taw odibeenna» yaageedda.
1Samuel22:9 Saa'oola oosanchchatuwaanna ek'k'eedda Edoomiyaa Doyk'i Saa'oola
1Samuel22:10 Abimeleeki Daawite ootsanabaa Med'inaa Godaa oochcheedda; yaatiide Daawitaw shink'k'aa immeedda; k'ay Piliss's'eemiyaa Gooliyaada mashshaakka aw immeedda» yaageedda.
1Samuel22:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel22:12 Saa'ooli Abimeleeka
1Samuel22:13 Saa'ooli Aa
1Samuel22:14 Abimeleeki kaatiyaa
1Samuel22:15 Taani aw S'oossaa oochchishin
1Samuel22:16 Kaatii
1Samuel22:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel22:18 Yaatina kaatii Doyk'a
1Samuel22:19 Hewaa bollakka k'eesatuwaa katamaa
1Samuel22:20 Shin Ahis'uuba na'aa Abimeleeka naanatuwaappe Abiyaataara geetettiyaa itti na'ay kessi akkiide
1Samuel22:21 Saa'ooli Med'inaa Godaa k'eesetuwaa wod'eeddawaa Daawitaw odeedda.
1Samuel22:22 Daawite Abiyaataara
1Samuel22:23 Simmi neeni taananna de'a; yayyoppa. Neena wod'anaw koyiyaa uray taana wod'anaw koyiyaawaa; shin neeni ta matan saro de'ana» yaageedda.
1Samuel23:1 «Piliss's'eema asatuu K'a'iila katamaa oliino; katsaakka bonk'k'iino» yaagiyaa oduwaa Daawite siseedda.
1Samuel23:2 Daawite Med'inaa Godaa
1Samuel23:3 Shin Daawita asatuu
1Samuel23:4 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel23:5 Daawitenne Aa Asay K'a'iila katamaa biide
1Samuel23:6 Abimeleeka na'ay Abiyaataare Daawitakko K'a'iila katamaa bak'atiyaa wode
1Samuel23:7 Daawite K'a'iila katamaa beeddawaa Saa'ooli sisiide
1Samuel23:8 K'a'iila katamaa biide
1Samuel23:9 Saa'ooli bare bolla iitabaa mak'k'eteeddawaa Daawite ereedda; k'eesiyaa Abiyaataara
1Samuel23:10 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Daawite
1Samuel23:11 K'a'iila katamaa Asay taana Saa'oolaw aatsiide immaneeshsha? Taani ne k'oomay siseeddawaadan Saa'ooli tumukka haa yaaneeshsha? Abeet Med'inaa Godaw
1Samuel23:12 Daawite
1Samuel23:13 Daawitenne usuppun s'eetu gidiyaa Asay K'a'iila katamaappe kesiide
1Samuel23:14 Daawite bazuwaa geesotuwaaninne Ziifa woran de'iyaa zoozetuwaan de'eedda. Saa'ooli Aa demmanaw ubbaa gallassi koyee; shin S'oossay Aa Saa'oola kushiyan aatsi immibeenna.
1Samuel23:15 Daawite Ziifa woran de'iyaa Horeesha giyaa saan de'ishshin
1Samuel23:16 Saa'oola na'aa Yoonataani denddiide
1Samuel23:17 «Yayyoppa; ta aawuwaa Saa'ooli neena kushiyaaninne bochchenna; neeni Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaatetana; taanikka neeppe garssana mooddana; haray atto ta aawuu Saa'oolekka hewaa ereedda» yaageedda.
1Samuel23:18 Unttunttu laaattuukka Med'inaa Godaa sintsan ittuu ittuwaanna c'aak'k'etteeddino; Daawite Horeeshan gamina Yoonataani bare soo beedda.
1Samuel23:19 Ziifa asatuu Saa'oolakko Gib'aa katamaa biide
1Samuel23:20 Nu kaatiyaw
1Samuel23:21 Saa'ooli unttuntta
1Samuel23:22 Biide ane gujjiidekka geeshshite; Daawite daro gede hak'a binttonne k'ay yaan ooni Aa be'eeddentto
1Samuel23:23 Daawite k'osettiyaa sa'aa ubbaa be'iide
1Samuel23:24 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel23:25 Saa'oolinne Aa Asay Daawita koyanaw beeddino. Daawite hewaa siseedda wode
1Samuel23:26 Saa'ooli deriyaappe itti bagga miyyiyaanna bee; Daawitenne Aa Asay hinkko bagga miyyiyaanna biino. Unttunttu Saa'oolappe bak'atanaw elleelliino; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel23:27 Shin kiitetteeddawe Saa'oolakko yiide
1Samuel23:28 Saa'ooli Daawita koyiyaawaa aggiide
1Samuel23:29 Daawite he saappe kesiide
1Samuel24:1 Saa'ooli Piliss's'eema asatuwaa yederssiyaa saappe simmina
1Samuel24:2 Israa'eeliyaa ubbaa giddoppe dooretteedda heezzu shaa asaa Saa'ooli akkiide
1Samuel24:3 Saa'ooli ogiyaa doonaan dorssaa ak'uwaa matan de'iyaa gonggoluwaakko yeedda; sheeshshaw uttanaw gonggoluwaa giddo geleedda. Daawitenne Aa Asay gonggoloo giduwaakko shiik'iide utteeddino.
1Samuel24:4 Daawita Asay Aa
1Samuel24:5 K'ans's'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel24:6 Daawite bare asatuwaa
1Samuel24:7 Daawite hawaadan seeriide
1Samuel24:8 Saa'ooli beeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel24:9 Yaatiide Daawite Saa'oola
1Samuel24:10 Ha gonggoluwaa giddon Med'inaa Goday neena hachche taw aatsi immeeddawaa neeni ne ayfiyaan be'aadda; taani neena wod'anaadan amareedawanttu taana dentsetseeddino; shin taani
1Samuel24:11 Ta aawoo
1Samuel24:12 Newaanne tawaa Med'inaa Goday pirddo; Med'inaa Goday neeni taana k'oheeddawaa haluwaa kesso; shin taani ne bolla ta kushiyaa dentsikke.
1Samuel24:13 Beni wode
1Samuel24:14 Israa'eeliyaa kaatii O bolla keseeddee? Neeni oona oyk'k'anaw koyay? Hayk'k'eedda kanaa woy kattolliyaa koyay?
1Samuel24:15 Med'inaa Goday nu giddon daannato; newaanne tawaa I pirddo; ta yewuwaa s'eelliide
1Samuel24:16 Daawite Saa'oolaw haasayiyaawaa wursseedda wode
1Samuel24:17 K'aykka Daawita
1Samuel24:18 Med'inaa Goday taana hachche new aatsi imminakka neeni taana wod'abeenna diraw
1Samuel24:19 Asay bare morkkiyaa demmiide k'ohennaan yeddiiyye? Neeni taw hachche ootseedda keekatetsaa diraw
1Samuel24:20 Haikka neeni Israa'eeliyaw kaatiyaa gidanawaanne Israa'eeliyaa kawutetsay ne maataa garssan ek'k'anawaa taani eray.
1Samuel24:21 Hai simmi taappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel24:22 Daawite Saa'oolaw c'aak'k'eedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel25:1 Sammeeli hayk'k'ina Israa'eeliyaa asatuu ubbay shiik'iide
1Samuel25:2 Maa'oonan itti bitanii de'ee; he bitaniyaw ak'uu K'armmeloosan de'ee; I daro dure; itti shaa deeshshatuunne heezzu shaa dorssatuu aw de'iino. I unttunttu isikiyaa K'armmeloosa kataman meedee.
1Samuel25:3 He bitaniyaa suntsay Naabaala; Aa machchatti suntsay Abigaalo. Iza eranchchanne malaa loa machchattio; shin I asinay mek'etsi baynna iita asaa. I Kaaleeba yara.
1Samuel25:4 Daawite woran de'iidde
1Samuel25:5 Daawite tammu wodallatuwaa hawaadan yaagiide kiitteedda; «Naabaalakko K'armmeloosa katamaa biide
1Samuel25:6 Saro de'ay! Neenikka ne golliyaa asaykka saree! New geeddawe ubbay saro de'ii!
1Samuel25:7 «Neeni dorssaa isikiyaa meediyaawaa taani sisaad; ne dorssaa heemmiyaawanttu nuunanna ittippe de'eedda wode
1Samuel25:8 Hewaa neeni ne k'oomatuwaa oochchooppe
1Samuel25:9 Daawita asatuu Naabaalakko gakkiide
1Samuel25:10 Naabaali Daawita k'oomatuwaa
1Samuel25:11 Ta ukitsaa
1Samuel25:12 Daawita asatuu simmiide guyye beeddino. Bi gakkiide Naabaali geeddawaa ubbaa Daawitaw odeeddino.
1Samuel25:13 Daawite bare asatuwaa
1Samuel25:14 K'oomatuwaappe ittuu Naabaala machchato Abigaalo hawaadan yaageedda; «Daawite woran de'iidde nu godaa
1Samuel25:15 Gidoppekka
1Samuel25:16 Nuuni nu dorssaa wudiyaa unttunttu matan heemmiyaa wode
1Samuel25:17 Hayanaa ha yewuwaa waatanenttonne k'oppa; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel25:18 Abigaala ellekka laau s'eetu komppo ukitsaanne laau ogoruwaa woyniyaa eessaa
1Samuel25:19 Yaataade k'oomatuwaa
1Samuel25:20 Bare hariyaa toggaadde deriyaana duge zanggaaraa wod'd'iyaa wode
1Samuel25:21 Daawite bare wozanaan
1Samuel25:22 Wontta guura gakkanaw
1Samuel25:23 Abigaala Daawita be'eedda wode
1Samuel25:24 Iza Aa gediyaan kunddaade
1Samuel25:25 Ha mek'etsi baynna iita bitaniyaabaa
1Samuel25:26 «Med'inaa Goday ero! Ne shemppu ero! Neeni suutsaa gussennaadaaninne ne kushiyan ne haluwaa kessennaadan
1Samuel25:27 Ha imotay taani ne k'oomatta new ta godaw aheeddawe neena kaalliyaa asatoo imetto.
1Samuel25:28 Hay ta godaw
1Samuel25:29 «Ayaa asaynne neena wod'anaw koyooppe
1Samuel25:30 Med'inaa Goday ta godaw ootsanaw haasayeedda keekatetsaa ubbaa ootsiyaa wodenne Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaateyiyaa wode
1Samuel25:31 gaasuu baynnan suutsaa gusseeddawaan woy bare haluwaa kesseeddawaan ta godaa wozanay dagammennanne hirggenna. Med'inaa Goday new keekeedda wode
1Samuel25:32 Daawite Abigaalo
1Samuel25:33 Neeni loo k'oppeedda dirawunne taani asaa suutsaa gussennaadaan ta kushiya c'igetennaadan diggeedda diraw
1Samuel25:34 Hewe bayinnawaa gidooppe
1Samuel25:35 Abigaala aw aheedawaa I kushiyaappe Daawite akkiide
1Samuel25:36 Abigaala simmaade Naabaalakko yiyaa wode
1Samuel25:37 Wontta Naabaali matsuwaa zaareeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel25:38 Tammu gallassaappe simmina
1Samuel25:39 Naabaali hayk'k'eeddawaa Daawite siseedda wode
1Samuel25:40 Daawita k'oomatuu K'armmeloosa katamaa Abigaalikko biide
1Samuel25:41 Abigaala biittan guufanna wutushaade
1Samuel25:42 Abigaala ellekka denddaade bare hariyaa toggaaddu; I danggaas'iretuu ichcheshatuu izo kaalliide beeddino; Daawita k'oomatta baade
1Samuel25:43 Daawite hawaappe kase Iziraa'eeliyaa Ahino'aamokka akkeedda; unttunttu laaattuukka Aa machatuwaa.
1Samuel25:44 Saa'ooli Daawita machchato
1Samuel26:1 Ziifa asatuu Saa'oolakko Gib'aa katamaa biide
1Samuel26:2 Hewaappe guyye Saa'ooli denddiide
1Samuel26:3 Saa'ooli Yasemoona sintsan de'iyaa Hakiila deriyaa bolla ogiyaa gas'aan dunkkaaneedda; shin Daawite he woran utteedda. Saa'ooli Aa kaalliide yaa beeddawaa eriide
1Samuel26:4 geeddiyaawantta yeddiide
1Samuel26:5 Daawite denddiide
1Samuel26:6 Daawite Hiitiyaa Abimeleekanne S'aruuya na'aa Yoo'aaba ishaa Abishaaya
1Samuel26:7 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel26:8 Abishaayi Daawita
1Samuel26:9 Shin Daawite Abishaaya
1Samuel26:10 K'aykka I Abishaaya
1Samuel26:11 Med'inaa Goday okkeedda kaatiyaa bolla taani kushiyaa dentsennaadan taana Med'inaa Goday teo. Ane Aa huup'isaan de'iyaa tooraanne haatsaa otuwaa akkaade dendda» yaageedda.
1Samuel26:12 Hewaappe guyye Daawite Saa'oola huup'isaan de'iyaa tooraanne haatsaa otuwaa akkeedda; unttunttu beeddino. Shin unttuntta ooninne be'ibeenna
1Samuel26:13 Daawite hefintsa pinniide
1Samuel26:14 Daawite Saa'oola olanchchatuwaanne Neera na'aa Abaneera
1Samuel26:15 Hewaappe guyye Daawite
1Samuel26:16 Neeni ootseeddabay loa gidenna. Med'inaa Goday ero! Neeninne ne olanchchatuu Med'inaa Goday okkeedda hinttenttu godaa naagibeenna diraw
1Samuel26:17 Saa'ooli Daawita k'aalaa gidiyaawaa eriide
1Samuel26:18 K'aykka I Saa'oola
1Samuel26:19 Haikka ta godaw
1Samuel26:20 Hai simmi Med'inaa Godaa sintsaappe haakkiide de'iyaa biittan ta suutsaa gussoppa; itti Asay akka shankkatanaw deriyaa huup'iyaa kesiyaawaadan
1Samuel26:21 Saa'ooli Daawita
1Samuel26:22 Daawite
1Samuel26:23 Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan s'illeeddabawunne ammanetteedabaw Med'inaa Goday Aa gatiyaa c'iggee. Neena Med'inaa Goday hachche ta kushiyan aatsiide immeedda; shin Med'inaa Goday okkeedda kaatiyaa bolla taani ta kushiyaa dentsanaw dosabeykke.
1Samuel26:24 Taani tumu hachche neena ashshowaadan Med'inaa Goday taanakka ashsho; k'ay metuwaa ubbaappe taana wotsi akko» yaageedda.
1Samuel26:25 Saa'ooli
1Samuel27:1 Daawite bare wozanaan
1Samuel27:2 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel27:3 Daawitenne Aa Asay Akiishaara Gaaten utteeddino. Asay ubbay bare soo asaa asaa akkiide beedda; Daawitekka bare machatuwaa
1Samuel27:4 «Daawite Gaate bak'ateedda» giyaawaa sisiide
1Samuel27:5 Daawite Kaatiyaa Akiisha
1Samuel27:6 He gallassi Akiishi S'ik'ilaaga katamaa Daawitaw immeedda; hachche gakkanawukka S'ik'ilaaga katamay Yihudaa kaatetuwaassa gidiide atteedda.
1Samuel27:7 Daawite Piliss's'eema biittan itti laytsanne oyddu aginaa de'eedda.
1Samuel27:8 Daawitenne Aa asatuu pude biide
1Samuel27:9 Daawite he biittaa oliyaa wode awudenne he biittan de'iyaa mac'c'awaa gidiina
1Samuel27:10 Akiishi
1Samuel27:11 Unttunttuppe itti asaynne Gaate katamaa yiide
1Samuel27:12 Akiishi Daawitan ammanettiide
1Samuel28:1 He wode Piliss's'eema asatuu Israa'eelatuwaa olanaw barenttu olanchchatuwaa shiishsheeddino. Akiishi Daawita
1Samuel28:2 Daawite
1Samuel28:3 Hawaappe kase baggan Sammeeli hayk'k'ina
1Samuel28:4 Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu shiik'iide yiide
1Samuel28:5 Saa'ooli Piliss's'eema olanchchatuwaa be'iide yayyeedda; Aa wozanaykka loytsi dagammeedda.
1Samuel28:6 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel28:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel28:8 Saa'ooli barena erissenna mala hara mayuwaa mayyiide
1Samuel28:9 Hewaappe guyye mishiratta
1Samuel28:10 Saa'ooli mishiratto
1Samuel28:11 Yaatina
1Samuel28:12 Shareechchatta Sammeela be'aade
1Samuel28:13 Kaatii
1Samuel28:14 Saa'ooli mishiratto
1Samuel28:15 Sammeeli Saa'oola
1Samuel28:16 Sammeeli
1Samuel28:17 Med'inaa Goday ta baggana kaseti odeeddawaa ootsi kichcheedda; Med'inaa Goday kawutetsaa neeppe bonk'k'i akkiide
1Samuel28:18 Neeni Med'inaa Godaw azazettabeena dirawunne Aa hank'k'uwaa suulliyaawaa Amaaleek'a asatuwaa bolla polabeenna diraw
1Samuel28:19 Neenanne Israa'eeliyaa
1Samuel28:20 Saa'ooli Sammeela oduwaa sisiide yayyeedda diraw
1Samuel28:21 He mishiratta Saa'oolakko yaade
1Samuel28:22 Hai taani ne k'oomatta giyaawaa hayyanaa sisa; neeni maade
1Samuel28:23 Hewaappe guyye Saa'ooli
1Samuel28:24 He mishirata ellekka bare son de'iyaa bolttiboltta maraa shukka bashaaddu; d'iiliyaa akka munak'aade
1Samuel28:25 Yaataade Saa'oolawunne Aa asatoo aatsina
1Samuel29:1 Piliss's'eema asatuu barenttu olanchchatuwaa ubbaa Afeek'an shiishsheeddino. Israa'eelatuu Iziraa'eelan de'iyaa haatsaa pulttiyaa matan utteeddino.
1Samuel29:2 Piliss's'eematuwaa kaappatuu barenttu s'eetatuwaa c'itaaninne shaatuwaa c'itan salppeeddino; Daawitenne Aa Asay Akiishaara ittippe guyye baggana salppeeddino.
1Samuel29:3 Piliss's'eematuwaa kaappatuu be'iide
1Samuel29:4 Shin Piliss's'eematuwaa kaappatoo Akiisha hank'k'ettiide
1Samuel29:5 K'ay mac'c'a asatuu yes's'iiddinne duriidde
1Samuel29:6 Hewaa diraw
1Samuel29:7 Neeni hai simmaade saruwaan ba; Piliss's'eematuwaa kaappatuwaa nashechchenawaa ayinne ootsoppa» yaageedda.
1Samuel29:8 Daawite Akiisha
1Samuel29:9 Akiishi Daawita
1Samuel29:10 Hai simmi wonttaanna denddaade
1Samuel29:11 Daawitenne Aa asatuu Piliss's'eema gadiyaa simmanaw wontta guuran denddeeddino; Piliss's'eema asatuukka pude Iziraa'eela beeddino.
1Samuel30:1 Daawitenne Aa asatuu heezzentso gallassi S'ik'ilaaga katamaa gakkeeddino. Amaaleek'a asatuu Neegeeba bazzuwaanne S'ik'ilaaga katamaa mayyeeddino; S'ik'ilaaga katamaa taman s'uuggeeddino.
1Samuel30:2 S'ik'ilaaga kataman de'iyaa machatuwaanne naanatuwaappe c'imaa gakkanaw de'iyaa ubbatuwaa omoodeeddino; unttuntta ubbaa akkiide afeedinoppe attina
1Samuel30:3 Daawitenne Aa asatuu S'ik'ilaaga katamaa gakkiyaa wode
1Samuel30:4 Yaatina
1Samuel30:5 Daawita mac'c'a asatuu laaatuu
1Samuel30:6 Asay Daawita shuchchaan c'addanaw haasayeedda diraw
1Samuel30:7 Daawite Abimeleeka na'aa k'eesiyaa Abiyaataara
1Samuel30:8 Daawite Med'inaa Godaa
1Samuel30:9 Daawitenne aanana de'iyaa usuppun s'eetu asatuu denddiide Bisoora Shaafaa gakkina
1Samuel30:10 Ayaw gooppe
1Samuel30:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel30:12 K'ay balasiyaa ayfiyaa melaappe bakkaanne laau wurc'c'o woyniyaa teeraa aw immeeddino; I miide mineedda; ayaw gooppe
1Samuel30:13 Daawite he bitaniyaa
1Samuel30:14 Nuuni Yihudaa asatuwaa bolla
1Samuel30:15 Daawite
1Samuel30:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel30:17 He gallassi omarssaappe biide wonttetsa gallassaa omarssay gakkanaw
1Samuel30:18 Amaaleek'a asatuu afeedda ubbabaa
1Samuel30:19 Asatuu omooddi afeedawaappe ayaynne pac'c'ibeenna; naanay woy c'imay
1Samuel30:20 K'ay Daawite dorssaanne miyaa wudiyaa ubbaa omoodeedda; Daawita Asay I omoodeedda wudiyaa hinkko mehiyaappe sintsanna laaggiide
1Samuel30:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Samuel30:22 Shin Daawitana beeddawanttu giddoppe itti itti patseena iita asatuu
1Samuel30:23 Daawite unttuntta
1Samuel30:24 Hinttenttu giyaawaa ooninne mayyenna. Olettanaw beeddawanttunne nubaa naagiidde hawaan gameeddawanttu itti laggetsaa shaakkana; ubbaawekka itti mala gidana» yaageedda.
1Samuel30:25 He gallassappe doommiide
1Samuel30:26 Daawite S'ik'ilaaga katamaa gakkeedda wode
1Samuel30:27 I hewaa Beeteele
1Samuel30:28 Aaro'eera
1Samuel30:29 Rakaala katamatuwaan de'iyaawanttoo
1Samuel30:30 Horima
1Samuel30:31 Kebroona katamatuwaan de'iyaawanttoo yeddeedda; Daawittenne Aa asatuu yuuyyeedda sa'atun de'iyaa asaw ubbaw yeddeedda.
1Samuel31:1 Piliss's'eema asatuu Israa'eeliyaa asatuwaana oletteeddino; Israa'eeliyaa asatuu Piliss's'eema asatuwaa sintsaappe bak'atteedino; daro Israa'eelatuu Gilbboo'a Deriyan hayk'k'eeddino.
1Samuel31:2 Piliss's'eema asatuu Saa'oolanne Aa attumawaa naanaa yederssi gakkiide
1Samuel31:3 Olay Saa'oola yuuyyi aad'd'iide unetseedda; wonddaafiyaa asatuu Aa demmeedda wode
1Samuel31:4 Saa'ooli bare ola miishshaa tookkiyaawaa
1Samuel31:5 Aa ola miishshaa tookkiyaawe Saa'ooli hayk'k'eeddawaa be'iide
1Samuel31:6 Hawaadan haniide
1Samuel31:7 Wombbaappenne Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe hefintsa baggana de'iyaa Israa'eeliyaa asatuu Israa'eeliyaa olanchchatuu bak'ateeddawaanne Saa'oolinne Aa naanay hayk'k'eeddawaa be'iide
1Samuel31:8 Wonttetsa gallassi Piliss's'eematuu anhatuwaa bollaappe ola miishshatuwaa k'aari akkanaw yiide
1Samuel31:9 Unttunttu Saa'oola k'ood'iyaa muuc'eeddinonne Aa ola miishshaa k'aari akkeeddino. Yaatiide barenttu d'amaashatuwaa golleninne barenttu asaa giddon s'oonuwaa awaayana mala
1Samuel31:10 Saa'oola ola miishshaa Asttaaroota geetettiyaa unttunttu s'oossatti golliyaa giddon wotseeddino; Saa'oola anhaa Beetishaana geetettiyaa katamaa gimbbiyaan misimaariyan d'ishiide sotteeddino.
1Samuel31:11 Piliss's'eema asatuu Saa'oola ootseeddawaa Gala'aaden de'iyaa Yaabeesha asatuu siseedda wode
1Samuel31:12 unttunttu mino asatuu ubbay k'amman denddi biide
1Samuel31:13 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel1:1 Saa'ooli hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel1:2 Heezzantso gallassi itti bitanii kayyoo bare mayuwaa peed'iide
2Samuel1:3 Daawite Aa
2Samuel1:4 Daawite Aa
2Samuel1:5 Oduwaa aheedda wodallaa Daawite
2Samuel1:6 Wodallay
2Samuel1:7 He wode Saa'ooli yuushshi s'eelliide taana be'eedda; taana s'eesina taani
2Samuel1:8 Saa'ooli taana
2Samuel1:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Saa'ooli taana
2Samuel1:10 I kunddeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel1:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel1:12 Unttunttu Saa'ooli
2Samuel1:13 Oduwaa aheedda wodallaa Daawite
2Samuel1:14 Daawite Aa
2Samuel1:15 Daawite bare asatuwaappe ittuwaa s'eesiide
2Samuel1:16 Daawite Amaaleek'iyaa
2Samuel1:17 Daawite Saa'oolawunne Aa na'aa Yoonataanaw hawaadan yaagi zilaaleedda.
2Samuel1:18 Yihudaa asaykka «Wonddaafiyaa» geetettiyaa ha zilaassaa tamaarana mala Daawite azazeedda; ha zilaassay Yaashaara mas'aafan s'aafetteedda.
2Samuel1:19 «Neenoo Israa'eelew
2Samuel1:20 Hawaa Gaate kataman odoppite; Ask'k'aloona ogetuwaankka awaayoppite. Hewaa sisooppe
2Samuel1:21 «Hinttenttoo Gilbboo'a deretoo
2Samuel1:22 Goora'etteeddawanttu suutsaappenne
2Samuel1:23 «Saa'oolinne Yoonataani asay siik'iyaawanttanne loiyaawantta; barenttu hayk'k'uwankka barenttu pas'ankka shaakettibeykkino. Unttunttu arggantsaappekka aad'd'iide elleelliyaawantta; gaammuwaappekka aad'd'iide minniyaawantta.
2Samuel1:24 «Israa'eeliyaa mac'c'a asatoo
2Samuel1:25 «Wolk'k'aamatuu olan waan kunddeeddinooshsha! Yoonataani ne d'ok'k'a gishuwaan goora'etti giseedda.
2Samuel1:26 Ta ishaa Yoonataanaa
2Samuel1:27 «Wolk'k'aamatuu waan kunddeeddinooshsha! Ola miishshaykka waan dippi geedde!» yaagiide Daawite zilaaleedda.
2Samuel2:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Daawite
2Samuel2:2 Daawite bare machchetuwaa laaatuwaa
2Samuel2:3 Daawite barenana de'iyaa asatuwaakka unttunttu soo asaa ubbaanna ahina
2Samuel2:4 Yihudaa asatuu Kebroone katamaa yiide
2Samuel2:5 asaa kiittiide unttuntta
2Samuel2:6 Haikka Med'inaa Goday aggena siik'uwaanne tumatetsaa hinttentta besso; k'ay hinttenttu ha keekatetsaa ootseedda diraw
2Samuel2:7 Hai zaari minnite; s'alite; ayaw gooppe
2Samuel2:8 Saa'oola olanchchatuwaa gadaaway Neera na'aa Abaneeri Saa'oola na'aa Iyaabustta akkiide
2Samuel2:9 Hewaappe kaala Gala'aade
2Samuel2:10 Saa'oola na'aa Iyaabustte Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaatetiyaa wode aw oytamu laytsaa; I laau laytsaa kaateteedda; shin
2Samuel2:11 Daawite Kebroonan Yihudaa asatuwaa bolla laappun laytsanne usuppun aginaa kaateteedda.
2Samuel2:12 Neera na'aa Abaneerinne Saa'oola na'aa Iyaabustte Asay Maahinaymappe Gabaa'oona katamaa beeddino.
2Samuel2:13 S'aruuyi na'ay Iyoo'aabinne Daawita Asay kes biide
2Samuel2:14 Yaatina
2Samuel2:15 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel2:16 Ittuu ittuwaa huup'iyaa oyk'k'iide
2Samuel2:17 He gallassi wolk'k'aama olay olettina
2Samuel2:18 S'aruuyi naanay heezzu Yoo'aabe
2Samuel2:19 Asaaheeli ushechcha woy haddirssa geenan Abaneera yederssuwaa sikkeedda.
2Samuel2:20 Abaneeri guyye zaari s'eelliide
2Samuel2:21 Abaneeri Aa
2Samuel2:22 K'aykka Abaneeri Asaaheela
2Samuel2:23 Shin Asaaheeli Aa yederssiyaawaa aggenaan is's'eedda. Hewaa diraw
2Samuel2:24 Shin Iyoo'aabinne Abishaayi Abaneera yedersseeddino; away wulliyaa wode
2Samuel2:25 Biiniyaama asatuu Abaneera guyyenna shiik'eeddino; unttunttu itti c'ita gidiide
2Samuel2:26 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Abaneeri Iyoo'aaba s'eesiide
2Samuel2:27 Iyoo'aabe Abaneera
2Samuel2:28 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel2:29 Abaneerinne Aa Asay he gallassaa k'ammaa ubbaa salppiidde Aaraba garaara beeddino; Yorddaanoosa Shaafaa pinneeddino. Guurana hametiidde Maahinayma simmeeddino.
2Samuel2:30 Iyoo'aabe Abaneera yederssiyaawaa bashiide
2Samuel2:31 Shin Daawita Asay Abaneera asaappenne Biiniyaama zaratuwaappe heezzu s'eetanne usuppun tammu asatuwaa wod'eeddino.
2Samuel2:32 Asaaheela anhaa akkiide
2Samuel3:1 Saa'oola asaynne Daawita Asay daro wodiyaa oletteeddino; Daawite olan min minniide biyaa wode
2Samuel3:2 Kebroone kataman Daawitaw naanay yeletteeddino; Iziraa'eeliyaa Ahino'aama yeleedda bayira na'ay Aminoona;
2Samuel3:3 K'armmeloosiyaa Naabaala amata Abigaala yeleedda na'ay Kilaabi laa'entsuwaa; Gashuura Kaatiyaa Talmmaaya naatta Maa'ika yeleedda Abeseeloomi heezzentsuwaa.
2Samuel3:4 Oyddentsuu Haggiiti na'aa Adooniyaa; ichcheshentsu Abiis'aali na'aa Shafaas'iyaa.
2Samuel3:5 Usuppuntsuu Daawita machchatti Egili na'aa Yitira'aama; ha naanay ubbay Kebroonan Daawitaw yeletteeddino.
2Samuel3:6 Saa'oola asaananne Daawita asaana olettiyaa wode
2Samuel3:7 Saa'oolaw Aata naatta Ris'ifo geetettiyaa itti garadatta de'aw; Iyaabustte Abaneera
2Samuel3:8 Abaneeri Aa haasayan darssi yilotiide Yaabustta
2Samuel3:9 Saa'oola zariyaappe kawutetsaa wotsi akkiide
2Samuel3:10 
2Samuel3:11 Iyaabustte Abaneeraw yayyeedda diraw
2Samuel3:12 Abaneeri Kebroonan de'iyaa Daawitekko
2Samuel3:13 Daawite
2Samuel3:14 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel3:15 Iyaabustte kiitaa yeddiide
2Samuel3:16 I asinay Baahuriima katamaa gakkanaw yeekkiide I geeduwaa kaalleedda; Abaneeri Aa
2Samuel3:17 Abaneeri Israa'eeliyaa c'imatuwaakko biide
2Samuel3:18 ane hekko hai polite! Ayaw gooppe
2Samuel3:19 Abaneeri Biiniyaama zaretoo dumma haasayeedda; hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel3:20 Abaneeri barenana laatamu asatuwaa akkiide
2Samuel3:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Abaneeri Daawita
2Samuel3:22 He wode Daawita asaynne Iyoo'aabe olaappe darobaa omoodiide simmeeddino; shin Abaneeri Kebroone kataman Daawitana de'enna; ayaw gooppe
2Samuel3:23 Iyoo'aabinne aanana de'iyaa olanchchatuu gakkiyaa wode
2Samuel3:24 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel3:25 Neera na'ay Abaneeri neena c'immanaw
2Samuel3:26 Iyoo'aabe Daawita sintsaappe kesiide
2Samuel3:27 Abaneeri Kebroone katamaa guyye simmiide yeedda wode
2Samuel3:28 Daawite ha yewuwaa siseeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel3:29 Aa suutsay Iyoo'aabanne Aa aawuwaa soo asaa ubbaa oochcho; ashuwaa bolla madutsay de'iyaa asay
2Samuel3:30 Hewaadan ootsiide
2Samuel3:31 Daawite Iyoo'aabanne aanana de'iyaa asaa ubbaa
2Samuel3:32 Abaneeri Kebroonan moogetteedda; kaatii bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'isiide duufuwaan yeekkeedda; Asay ubbaykka yeekkeedda.
2Samuel3:33 Kaatii Abaneeraw
2Samuel3:34 Aa kushii k'ashetti beenna; Aa gediikka sanssalatan k'ashetti beenna. Asay iita asatuwaa kushiyan hayk'k'iyaawaadan I hayk'k'eedda» yaagiide zilaaleedda. Asay ubbay Abaneeraw zaaretsiidekka yeekkeedda.
2Samuel3:35 Sa'ay poo'o de'ishshin
2Samuel3:36 Kaatii ootseeddawaa Asay ubbay be'iide nashetteedda; tumukka kaatii ootseedda ubbabay asaa ubbaa nashechcheedda.
2Samuel3:37 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel3:38 Kaatii bare k'oomatuwaa hawaadan yaageedda; «Israa'eeliyaa biittan wolk'k'aama asaynne kaappuu hayk'k'eeddawaa hinttenttu akeekikitee?
2Samuel3:39 Taani oketteedda kaatiyaa gidooppenne
2Samuel4:1 Saa'oola na'ay Yaabustte Abaneeri Kebroonan hayk'k'eeddawaa siseedda wode
2Samuel4:2 Saa'oola na'aa Yaabusttew c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaa laau kaappatuu de'iino; ittuwaa suntsay Ba'aana; yenkkuwaa suntsay Rekaaba; unttunttu Biiniyaama zariyaa gideedda Ba'erootiyaa Rimoona naanaa. Ba'eroota katamay Biiniyaama baggaadan paydetee;
2Samuel4:3 ayaw gooppe
2Samuel4:4 Saa'oola na'aa Yoonataanaw laau gedii sileedda na'ay de'ee; Saa'oolanne Yoonataana worii Iziraa'eeliyaappe gakkeedda wode
2Samuel4:5 Ba'erootiyaa Rimoona naanay Rekaabinne Ba'aani Yaabustte soo baanaw keseeddino; unttunttu biide seeta gallassi gakkeeddino; I awaappe shemppee.
2Samuel4:6 Unttunttu soy geliide zarggaa akkiyaawaa malatiide Yaabustta uluwaan c'addina hayk'k'eedda. Rekaabinne Aa ishaa Ba'aan leelan geleeddino.
2Samuel4:7 Unttunttu soy geliyaa wode
2Samuel4:8 Yaabustte huup'iyaa Kebroonan de'iyaa Daawitew ahiide kaatiyaa
2Samuel4:9 Shin Ba'erootiyaa Rimoona naanaa Rekaabanne Aa ishaa Ba'aana Daawite hawaadan yaageedda; «Metuwaa ubbaappe taana ashsheeda Med'inaa Goday ero!
2Samuel4:10 Itti bitanii taakko yiide
2Samuel4:11 Bare son bare arssaan giseedda s'illo bitaniyaa wod'eedda iita asatoo Aa haluwaa kessiyaawe ay keeshshaa iitanddeeshsha! Aa suutsaa taani hinttenttu kushiyaappe hai achchana; hinttentta taani biittaa bollappe d'ayssana!» yaageedda.
2Samuel4:12 Rekaabanne Ba'aana wod'anaadan Daawite bare olanchchatuwaa azazeedda; olanchchatuu unttuntta wod'eeddino; unttunttu kushiyaanne gediyaa k'ans's'i diggiide
2Samuel5:1 Israa'eeliyaa zariyaa ubbatuu Daawitakko Kebroone katamaa yiide
2Samuel5:2 Kase Saa'ooli nuw kaatiyaa gidiide de'iyaa wodekka
2Samuel5:3 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel5:4 Daawite kaatetiyaa wode aw hattamu laytsaa; oytamu laytsaa I kaateteedda.
2Samuel5:5 Kebroone kataman Yihudaa bolla laappun laytsanne usuppun aginaa I kaateteedda; Yerusaalamen Israa'eeliyaa ubbatuwaa bollanne Yihudaa bolla hattamanne heezzu laytsaa kaateteedda.
2Samuel5:6 Yerusaalamen de'iyaa Yaabuusa asatuwaa olanaw Daawitenne Daawita Asay beeddino; Yaabuusa asatuu
2Samuel5:7 Gidooppenne
2Samuel5:8 He gallassi Daawite bare asaa
2Samuel5:9 Daawite he geessuwaa oyk'k'iide
2Samuel5:10 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaa S'oossay aanana de'iyaa diraw
2Samuel5:11 S'iiroosa Kaatii Kiiraami Daawitaw asaa kiitteedda. Zigaa mudetsaa
2Samuel5:12 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa bolla Aa kaatiyaa ootsiide esseeddawaanne bare asaa Israa'eeliyaa diraw Aa kawutetsaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide bonchcheeddawaa Daawite ereedda.
2Samuel5:13 Daawite Kebroonappe Yerusaalame yeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel5:14 Yan aw yeletteedda attuma naanaa suntsay Shaamu'a
2Samuel5:15 Yibihaara
2Samuel5:16 Elishamaa'a
2Samuel5:17 Daawite Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaatiyaa gidiide oketteeddawaa Piliss's'eema asatuu siseedda wode
2Samuel5:18 Piliss's'eematuu k'aykka biide
2Samuel5:19 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel5:20 Daawite Ba'aali-Paraas'iima giyaa sa'aa biide
2Samuel5:21 Piliss's'eematuu barenttu eek'atuwaa he sa'aan yeggiide beeddino. Yaatina Daawitenne Aa Asay he eek'atuwaa akkiide afeedino.
2Samuel5:22 Piliss's'eematuu guyye simmiide biide
2Samuel5:23 Daawite Med'inaa Godaa laa'entsuwaakka oochchina
2Samuel5:24 Boo'iyaa huup'iyaan olaa kooshshaa neeni sisiyaa wode elleella. Ayaw gooppe
2Samuel5:25 Daawite Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan ootseedda; Gebaa'appe biide Gezeera gakkanaw
2Samuel6:1 Israa'eeliyaa giddoppe dooretteedda hattamu shaa asatuwaa Daawite laa'entsuwaa s'eesiide shiishsheedda.
2Samuel6:2 Daawittenne Aa Asay ubbay Yihudaan de'iyaa Ba'aala (K'iriyaatiyyi-Aarim) geetettiyaa katamaappe denddiide
2Samuel6:3 Unttunttu S'oossaa Taabootaa ooratsa gaariyan wotsiide
2Samuel6:4 Yaappe S'oossaa Taabootaa ahiyaa wode
2Samuel6:5 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay diitsaanne maasink'k'uwaa diis's'iidde
2Samuel6:6 Naakona katsaa bukkiyaa udduma gakkiyaa wode
2Samuel6:7 Uuzi Taabootaa bochcheedda diraw
2Samuel6:8 S'oossaa hank'k'uu Uuza shoc'eedda diraw
2Samuel6:9 He gallassi Daawite Med'inaa Godaw yayyiide
2Samuel6:10 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel6:11 Med'inaa Godaa Taabootay Gitaatiyaa Obeedi-Eedooma son heezzu aginaa gameedda; Med'inaa Goday aane Aa soo asaa ubbaa anjjeedda.
2Samuel6:12 Hewaappe simmiide
2Samuel6:13 Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa tookkeedda asatuu usuppunuwaa tanggeedda payduwaan payduwaan unttuntta essiide
2Samuel6:14 Daawite suufiyaa giyaa k'ac'inaappe dadetteedda eefuudiyaa mayyiide
2Samuel6:15 Inne Israa'eeliyaa asatuu ubbatuu nashechchan hombboc'iiddinne ulttuwaa punniidde Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa Daawita Katamaa aheeddino.
2Samuel6:16 Med'inaa Godaa Taabootay Daawita Katamaa geliyaa wode
2Samuel6:17 Daawite Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa wotsanaw d'ogeedda dunkkaaniyaa giddon Taabootaa ahiide wotseeddino; Daawite s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanne ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshsheedda.
2Samuel6:18 Daawite s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanne ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawaa Poleeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel6:19 Israa'eeliyaa asaw ubbaw
2Samuel6:20 Daawite bare soo asaa anjjanaw soo simmeedda wode
2Samuel6:21 Daawite
2Samuel6:22 Taani hawaappe aatsaade birokka taana toochchana; taani ta huup'iyaa zik'k'i ootsana. Shin neeni geedda mac'c'a k'oomatuwaa sintsan taani bonchchettana» yaageedda.
2Samuel6:23 Hewaa diraw
2Samuel7:1 Kaatii Daawite bare kaatiyaa gollen utteeddawaappe guyyiyaaninne Med'inaa Goday Aa
2Samuel7:2 timbbitiyaa odiyaa Naataana
2Samuel7:3 Naataan Daawita
2Samuel7:4 Shin he gallassaa k'amma Med'inaa Godaa k'aalay Naataanakko yiide
2Samuel7:5 «Ba; ta k'oomaa Daawita hawaadan yaaga; Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; ‹Taani de'ana golliyaa kees's'anawe taana gaade k'oppay?
2Samuel7:6 Ayaw gooppe
2Samuel7:7 Taani Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaanna yuuyyeedda sa'aa ubbaan
2Samuel7:8 «Hewaa diraw
2Samuel7:9 Neeni beedda sa'aa ubbaan taani neenana gidaad; ne morkkatuwaa ubbaa taani ne sintsaappe diggaad. Hai simmi taani ha sa'aan eretteedda wolk'k'aama asatuwaa suntsaadan ne suntsaa gitayana.
2Samuel7:10 K'ay taani ta asaw Israa'eeliyaw sa'aa immaade
2Samuel7:11 
2Samuel7:12 Ne laytsay wurina hayk'k'aadde
2Samuel7:13 Ta suntsaw golliyaa kees's'anawe Aa; taani Aa kawutetsaa araataa med'inaw minissa essana.
2Samuel7:14 Taani aw aawuwaa gidana; ikka taw na'aa gidanawaa. I baliyaa wode
2Samuel7:15 Shin taani ne sintsaappe diggeedda Saa'oolappe ta siik'uu aketeeddawaadan
2Samuel7:16 Ne zaratuunne ne kawutetsay ta sintsan med'inaw gamana; ne kawutetsaa araataykka med'inaw min ek'k'ana» yaagee› yaaga» yaageedda.
2Samuel7:17 Naataan S'oossay aw sas'aani k'onc'c'isseedda k'aalaa ubbaa Daawitaw odeedda.
2Samuel7:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel7:19 Abeet Ubbaa Mooddiyaa Med'inaa Godaw
2Samuel7:20 «Hawaappe aad'd'iyaawaa taani Daawite new ay gaanaw danddayayitaa? Ubbaa Mooddiyaa Med'inaa Godaw
2Samuel7:21 Neeni ne k'aalaa diraw
2Samuel7:22 «Abeet Ubbaa Mooddiyaa Med'inaa Godaw
2Samuel7:23 Neeni ne asaa ootsanaw wozeedda ne asaa Israa'eeliyaa malatiyaa hara kawutetsi sa'aa bollan baawa. Neeni unttunttoo ootseedda gitanne malalissiyaa oosotu gaasuwaan ne suntsay biittan sa'aan eretteedda. Neeni ne asaa sintsaappe hara kawutetsatuwaanne unttunttu s'oossatuwaa laaggaadda.
2Samuel7:24 Neeni ne asaa Israa'eeliyaa med'inaw newaa ootsaadda. Abeet Med'inaa Godaw
2Samuel7:25 «Med'inaa Godaa S'oossaw
2Samuel7:26 Hewan ne suntsay med'inaw gitatana; asaykka neena
2Samuel7:27 «Abeet Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaw
2Samuel7:28 Abeet Ubbaa Mooddiyaa Med'inaa Godaw
2Samuel7:29 Ne sintsan yaa med'inaw gamanaadan
2Samuel8:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel8:2 K'ay Moo'aabe asatuwaakka Daawite s'ooneedda. Gadiyaan I unttuntta gisisiide wodoruwaan likkeedda; laau wodoruwaan likketteedda ubbatuwaa wod'eedda; heezzentso wodoruwaan likketteeddawantta pas'a aggeeda. Yaatina Moo'aabe asatuu Daawitaw moodettiide giiraa giireeddino.
2Samuel8:3 Rahooba na'ay
2Samuel8:4 Daawite Aa asaappe itti shaanne laappun s'eetu para'a asatuwaana laatamu shaa gediyaa asatuwaa omoodeedda. Daawite gaaretuwaa goochchanaw s'eetu paratuwaa ashshiide
2Samuel8:5 Damask'k'o kataman de'iyaa Sooriyaa olanchchatuu S'ooba Kaatiyaa Hadaadi'eezera maaddanaw yeedda wode
2Samuel8:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel8:7 Hadaadi'eezera ola gadaawatuu oyk'k'iyaa work'k'aa gonddalliyaa Daawite akkiide
2Samuel8:8 Bes'aahanne Berotaaya geetettiyaa Hadaadi'eezera katamatuwaappe Kaatii Daawite nahaasiyaa giyaa birataa loytsi daruwaa akkeedda.
2Samuel8:9 Hadaadi'eezera olanchchatuwaa ubbaa Daawite s'ooneeddawaa Hamaata Kaatii Too'i siseedda.
2Samuel8:10 Hadaadi'eezera olettiide s'ooneedda diraw
2Samuel8:11 Kaatii Daawite ha miishshatuwaa Med'inaa Godaw dummayi wotseedda. K'ay Daawite bare s'ooneedda kawutetsatuwaappe ubbaappe
2Samuel8:12 
2Samuel8:13 Mas'iniyaa Zanggaaraan tammanne hosppun shaa Eedooma asatuwaa Daawite wod'i simmeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Samuel8:14 Daawite Eedooma biittaa ubbaan olanchchatuu geessuwaa med'd'eedda; yaatina he biittaa Asay ubbay Daawitaw moodeteedda. Daawite beedda sa'aa ubbaan Med'inaa Goday aw s'oonuwaa immeedda.
2Samuel8:15 Hewaadan ootsiide
2Samuel8:16 S'aruuyi na'ay Yoo'aabe olanchchatuu gadaawaa; Ahiluuda na'ay Yoosaafees'e haneeddabaa s'aafiyaawaa.
2Samuel8:17 Ahis'uuba na'ay S'aadook'inne Abiyaataara na'ay Abimeleeki k'eesetuwaa; Saraayi k'ay s'aafiyaa;
2Samuel8:18 Yoodaahe na'ay Banaayi Kalitaawatuwaanne Felitaawatuwaa (kaatiyaa naagiyaawanttu) bolla kaappuwaa. Daawita attuma naanay k'eesatuwaa.

2Samuel12:1 Med'inaa Goday Naataana Daawitakko kiitteedda; Naataan aakko yiide
2Samuel12:2 Dure bitaniyaw daro dorssaynne miizzay de'ee;
2Samuel12:3 shin mank'k'o bitaniyaw I shammiide heemmiyaa itti dorssaa marattippe harabay ayaynne baawa. He dorssatta aanananne Aa naanatuwaanna dic'c'aaddu; Iza Aa k'umaappe maw; Aa wanc'c'aappe ushawunne Aa kiwuwaan gisaw. He dorssatta aw mac'c'a na'aa mala.
2Samuel12:4 «Itti gallassi itti imatsay he dure bitaniyaa soo yeedda; shin durii bare dorssaappe woy bare miizzaappe akkiide shukkiide
2Samuel12:5 Daawite he dure bitaniyaa bolla hank'k'uwaa ees's'i kesiide Naataana
2Samuel12:6 K'ay I he dorssaa maratti diraw oyddu kushiyaa aatsiide c'igganaw koshshee; ayaw gooppe
2Samuel12:7 Naataani Daawita
2Samuel12:8 taani ne godaa golliyaa new immaad; ne godaa mac'c'a asatuwaakka ne kiwuwaan yeggaad; Israa'eeliyaa golliyaa asaanne Yihudaa golliyaa asaa taani new immaad. Hawe ubbaykka guus's'ooppe
2Samuel12:9 Hawaa mala iitabaa Aa sintsan ootsaadde
2Samuel12:10 Neeni taana kad'aade
2Samuel12:11 «Hewaa diraw Med'inaa Goday
2Samuel12:12 Neeni hewaa geeman ootsaadda; shin taani hawaa seeta gallassi Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa sintsan ootsana› yaagee» yaageedda.
2Samuel12:13 Daawite Naataana
2Samuel12:14 Neeni hawaa udaade

2Samuel12:17 Aa soo c'imatuu Aa biittappe dentsanaw Aa matan ek'k'eeddinno; shin biittappe denddennaan is's'eedda; I unttunttunna k'umaa mibeenna.
2Samuel12:18 Laappuntsa gallassi na'ay hayk'k'eedda. Daawita k'oomatuu na'aa hayk'k'uwaa odanaw yayyeeddino; «Na'ay pas'a de'ishshin nuuni Daawita haasayisseeddo; shin sisennan is's'eedda. Yaatina
2Samuel12:19 Bare k'oomatuu ittuu ittuwaanna saasukettiyaawaa Daawite be'eedda wode
2Samuel12:20 Daawite biittappe denddi ek'k'eedda. Meec'ettiide
2Samuel12:21 Aa k'oomatuu Aa
2Samuel12:22 Daawite unttuntta
2Samuel12:23 Shin na'ay hai hayk'k'ina

2Samuel12:29 Daawite bare olanchchatuwaa ubbaa shiishshiide

2Samuel12:31 He katamaa asaa yaappe kessiide
2Samuel13:1 Itti wode hawaadan haneedda. Daawita na'aa Abeseloomaw Taamaaro giyaa itti malaa loo michchata de'aw; Daawita na'ay Aminooni Taamaaro siik'eedda.
2Samuel13:2 Aa michchata Taamaara wodoro gideedda dirawunne I izo ayinne ootsanaw danddayennabaa aw malateedda diraw
2Samuel13:3 Shin Aminoonaw Daawita ishaa Shaama na'aa Yonadaaba geetettiyaa laggii de'ee; Yonadaabi daro hiilanchcha asaa.
2Samuel13:4 Yonadaabi Aminoona
2Samuel13:5 Yonadaabi Aminoona

2Samuel14:26 I barena dees'iyaa wode bare huup'iyaa binnaanaa k'ans's'issee; bare huup'iyaa binnaanaa k'ans's'issiyaa wode ubbaan miizaaniyaan wotsiide mazzanee; kaatiyaa miizaanaa likkiyaan laau kilonne heezzu s'eetu giraamiyaa dees'ee.

2Samuel15:29 Hewaa diraw

2Samuel15:33 Daawite Aa
