2Kings21:1 Minaase kaatetiyaa wode laytsay aw tammanne laaaa; I Yerusaalamen ishatamanne ichcheshu laytsaa kaateteedda. Aa aati suntsay Hefis's'iibo.
2Kings21:2 Med'ina Goday Israa'eeliyaa asaa sintsaappe laaggiide kesseedda asatuwaa de'uwaa wogaa
2Kings21:3 Aa aawuu Hizk'k'iyaase laaleedda
2Kings21:4 Med'ina Goday kase
2Kings21:5 Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa laau dabaabatuwaan saluwaa s'oolinttetoo ubbaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa giigisseedda.
2Kings21:6 Bare yeleedda na'aa taman s'uuggiide yarshsheedda. I bare huup'iyawukka bitiyaawaanne muruniyaawaa gidiide
2Kings21:7 Asheero giyaa s'oossatti misiliyaa
2Kings21:8 Israa'eeliyaa asaa taani azazeedda azazuwaa ubbaanne ta k'oomay Muse unttunttoo immeedda higgiyaa ubbaa naagiide ootsooppe
2Kings21:9 Shin Asay sisennan is's'eedda. Med'ina Godaa Israa'eeliyaa asaa sintsaappe d'aysseedda gade asaawaappekka aad'd'iyaa iitaa ootsana mala
2Kings21:10 Med'ina Goday timbbitiyaa odiyaa bare k'oomatuwaa baggana hawaadan yaageedda;
2Kings21:11 «Yihudaa Kaatii Minaase ha tuna kiitaa ootseedda; bareppe kase de'eedda Amoore asaa ubbaa nagaraappekka aad'd'iyaa iitaa ootseedda; Yihudaa asaa bare med'd'eedda eek'aa misiliyaw goynnissiide
2Kings21:12 taani Med'ina Goday Israa'eeliyaa S'oossay hawaadan yaagay; ‹Sisiyaa asaa ubbaa haytsaw iitiyaa bashshaa taani Yerusaalame bollanne Yihudaa bolla ahana hanay.
2Kings21:13 Taani Samaariyaa bolla goochcheedda wodoruwaa
2Kings21:14 Ta laatatuwaappe atteeddawantta taani olana; taani unttuntta unttunttu morkkatuwaa kushiyan aatsaade immana. Unttunttu morkketuu ubbay unttuntta oyk'k'ananne bonk'k'ana.
2Kings21:15 Unttunttu mayza aawotuu Gibs'eppe kesoodeppe doommi
2Kings21:16 Minaase Yihudaa asaa Med'ina Godaa sintsan nagaraa oosisseeddawaa bollakka gujjiide
2Kings21:17 Minaase haneedda harabay
2Kings21:18 Minaase hayk'k'iidde
2Kings21:19 Amoone kaatetiyaa wode
2Kings21:20 Aa aawuu Minaase ootseeddawaadan
2Kings21:21 I bare aawuu hametteedda ogiyaan ubbaan hametteedda; bare aawuu ootseedda eek'atoo ikka ootseeddanne unttunttoo goynneedda.
2Kings21:22 Med'ina Godaa
2Kings21:23 Amoona oosanchchatuu Aa bolla mak'ettiide
2Kings21:24 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings21:25 Amoone haneedda harabaynne I ootseeddabay ubbay Yihudaa Kaatetuu Taarikiyaa mas'aafan s'aafetti utteedda.
2Kings21:26 Amoone Uuza Ataakilttiyaa sa'aa giyaa sa'aan de'iyaa bare duufuwaan moogetteedda; Aa kotan Aa na'ay Iyoosiyaase kaateteedda.
2Kings22:1 Iyoosiyaase kaatetiyaa wode
2Kings22:2 Iyoosiyaase Med'ina Godaa sintsan suurebaa ootseedda; ushechcha haddirssa geenan bare mayza aawuwaa Daawita ogiyaan ubbaan hametteedda.
2Kings22:3 Kaatii Iyoosiyaase bare kaateteedda tammanne hosppuntsa laytsan
2Kings22:4 «Asay Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa ahina
2Kings22:5 K'eesiyaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu miishshaa Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa ooratsisiyaa kaappatoo immana mala oda. Unttunttukka Geeshsha Golliyaa ooratsiyaa oosanchchatoo
2Kings22:6 anas'etoo gimbbiyaawanttoonne shuchchaa massiyaawanttoo c'iggino. K'ay Geeshsha Golliyaa ooratsanaw
2Kings22:7 He kiitaa wochchiyaawanttu ammanettiyaa asaa gidiyaa diraw
2Kings22:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings22:9 Waanna s'aafii Saafaani kaatiyaakko simmi biide
2Kings22:10 K'aykka waanna s'afii Saafaani kaatiyaa
2Kings22:11 Kaatii Higgiyaa mas'aafan de'iyaa k'aalaa siseedda wode
2Kings22:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings22:13 «Biite; ta diraw
2Kings22:14 K'eesii Hilk'k'ii
2Kings22:15 Huldda unttuntta
2Kings22:16 Med'ina Goday hawaadan yaagee; ‹Be'ite
2Kings22:17 Unttunttu taana aggiide
2Kings22:18 «Med'ina Godaa oochchanaw hinttentta kiitteedda kaatiyaa hawaadan yaagite; ‹Med'ina Goday Israa'eeliyaa S'oossay neeni siseedda k'aalaa hawaadan yaagee;›
2Kings22:19 Taani ha sa'aa bollanne ha sa'aan de'iyaa asaa bolla
2Kings22:20 Hewaa diraw
2Kings23:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings23:2 Kaatii Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa pude kesseedda; Yihudaa Asay ubbay
2Kings23:3 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings23:4 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings23:5 Yihudaa katamatuwaaninne Yerusaalame yuushshuwaan de'iyaa d'ok'k'a gishuwaan ubbaan is'aanaa c'uwayanaadan Yihudaa kaatetuu suntseedda d'amaashatuwaa k'eesetuwaa ubbaa oosuwaappe keseedda. Ba'aalaw
2Kings23:6 Asheero giyaa s'oossatti misiliyaa Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaappe akkiide
2Kings23:7 Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa giddon goynno woga ootsiide
2Kings23:8 Iyoosiyaase k'eesetuwaa ubbaa Yihudaa katamatuwaappe aheedda; kase k'eesatuu is'aanaa c'uwayeedda d'ok'k'a sa'aa
2Kings23:9 D'ok'k'a sa'aa k'eesatuu Yerusaalamen Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa pude yiikkino; shin unttunttu hara k'eesetuwaana ittippe irshshuu gelibeenna ukitsaa miino.
2Kings23:10 Kaatii Iyoosiyaase Hinnooma Zanggaaraan de'iyaa Toofeeta geetettiyaa yarshshuwaa sa'aa tunisseedda. Yaatiide Molooka giyaa s'oossaw itti asaynne bare attuma na'aa woy bare mac'c'a naatto taman yarshshenaadan diggeedda.
2Kings23:11 Yihudaa kaatetuu Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa geliyaa penggiyaan awaaw dummayi wotseedda paratuwaa diggeedda. Awaa paratuu Naataani-Meleka giyaa kaappuwaa kifiliyaa matan de'iyaa dabaaban de'iino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings23:12 Akaaza golliyaa pook'iyaa bollan Yihudaa kaatetuu giigisisseedda yarshshuwaa sa'atuwaanne Minaase Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaw de'iyaa laau dabaabatuwaa giddon giigisseedda yarshshiyaa sa'atuwaa Kaatii Iyoosiyaase kinchcheedda. Unttuntta he saappe diggiide kinchchereetseedda; suuppaa K'ediroona zanggaaraan oleedda.
2Kings23:13 K'aykka kaatii Yerusaalame katamaappe away doliyaa baggana Dabire Zayite geetettiyaa deriyaappe gedissa baggan de'iyaa Tunatetsaa D'ok'k'a Deriyaa. He d'ok'k'a sa'atuu Israa'eeliyaa Kaatii Solomone Sidoonatuwaa s'oossatti Asttaarootiw
2Kings23:14 Kaatii Iyoosiyaase goynniyaa shuchchaa tuussatuwaakka mentsereetsiide
2Kings23:15 K'ay Israa'eeliyaa asaa nagaraa oosisseedda Nabaas'a na'ay Iyorbbaami Beeteelen d'ok'k'a sa'aan giigisseedda yarshshiyaa sa'aa Kaatii Iyoosiyaase kinchcheedda. He yarshshiyaa sa'aa shuchchatuwaakka mentsereetsiide
2Kings23:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings23:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan kaatii
2Kings23:18 Kaatii
2Kings23:19 Israa'eeliyaa kaatetuu Samaariyaa katamatuwaan oosissiide
2Kings23:20 I he d'ok'k'a gishuwaan ootsiyaa k'eesetuwaa ubbaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla wod'eedda; k'ay he yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla asaa mek'etsaa s'uuggeedda. Hewaa ubbaa ootsiide
2Kings23:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings23:22 Israa'eeliyaa mooddiyaa daannatu wodiyaappe doommiide
2Kings23:23 Shin Kaatii Iyoosiyaase kaateteedda tammanne hosppuntsa laytsan Yerusaalame kataman Med'ina Godaa bonchchanaw ha Paasigaa Baalay Med'ina Godaw bonchchetteedda.
2Kings23:24 K'ay k'eesatuwaa ubbaa kaappuu Hilk'k'ii Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan beetteedda mas'aafan s'aafetteedda higgiyaa k'aalaa minisanaadan
2Kings23:25 Muse higgiyaadan bare kumentsaa wozanaan
2Kings23:26 Gidooppenne Minaase Med'ina Godaa hank'k'etsanaw ootseedda iita oosuwaa ubbaa diraw
2Kings23:27 Hewaa diraw Med'ina Goday
2Kings23:28 Iyoosiyaase haneedda harabaynne I ootseeddabay ubbay Yihudaa Kaatetuwaa Taarikiyaa mas'aafan s'aafetti utteedda.
2Kings23:29 Iyoosiyaasa wode Gibs'e Kaatii Nakoy
2Kings23:30 Aa k'oomatuu Aa anhaa paraa gaariyan wotsiide
2Kings23:31 Iyo'akaazi kaatetiyaa wode
2Kings23:32 Bare mayza aawotuu ootseeddawaadan
2Kings23:33 Iyo'akaazi Yerusaalamen kaatetennaadan Gibs'e Kaatii Nakoy Hamaata geetettiyaa gadiyaan Ribila giyaa saan Aa k'achcheeda. Heezzu shaanne oyddu s'eetu kiilo giraame dees'iyaa s'agaraa biraanne hattamanne oyddu kiilo giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aa Yihudaa asaa giirisseedda.
2Kings23:34 Kaatiyaa Nakoy Iyoosiyaasa na'aa Eliyaak'iima Aa aawuwaa kotan kaateyeedda; yaatiide Aa suntsaa Iyo'aak'eema yaagiide laammeedda. Shin Iyo'akaaza Gibs'e afeedda; Iyo'akaazi yaan hayk'k'eedda.
2Kings23:35 Yaatina Iyo'aak'eemi Kaatii Nakoy oochcheedda giiraa biraanne work'k'aanne aw immeedda. He giiraa c'igganaw Yo'aak'eemi he biittaa Asay demmiyaa keeshshaa biraappenne work'k'aappe giiraa shiishsheedda.
2Kings23:36 Iyo'aak'eemi kaatetiyaa wode laytsay aw laatamanne ichchesha; I Yerusaalamen tammanne itti laytsaa kaateteedda. Aa daay suntsay Zabddo; Iza Ruuma kataman de'iyaa Padaaya naatto.
2Kings23:37 Iyo'aak'eemi bare mayza aawotuu ootseeddawaadan
2Kings24:1 Iyo'aak'eema wode Baabloone biittaa Kaatiyaa Naabukadanas'oore Yihudaa bolla woraajjeedda. Yaatina Iyo'aak'eemi aw heezzu laytsaa moodetteedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan zaariide
2Kings24:2 Med'ina Goday Baabloone biittaa c'uguwaa
2Kings24:3 Kaatii Minaase ootseedda nagaraa ubbaa diraw
2Kings24:4 
2Kings24:5 Iyo'aak'eemi haneedda harabaynne I ootseeddabay ubbay Yihudaa Kaatetuwaa Taarikiyaa mas'aafan s'aafetti utteedda.
2Kings24:6 Iyo'aak'eemi hayk'k'iidde
2Kings24:7 Gibs'e biittaa kaatii laa'entso bare gadiyaappe denddiide
2Kings24:8 Yo'aakiine kaatetiyaa wode laytsay aw tammanne hosppuna; Yo'aakiine Yerusaalamen heezzu aginaa kaateteedda. Aa daay suntsay Nehushtta; Iza Yerusaalamiyaa Elnaataana naatto.
2Kings24:9 Yo'aakiine bare aawuu ootseeddawaadan
2Kings24:10 He wode Baabloone Kaatiyaa Naabukadanas'oora olanchchatuu Yerusaalame yiide
2Kings24:11 Baabloone Kaatii Naabukadanas'oore he katamaa yeedda.
2Kings24:12 Yihudaa Kaatii Yo'aakiine
2Kings24:13 Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaaninne kaatiyaa gollen de'iyaa mas'uwaa ubbaa he saappe dentsiide afeedda. Med'ina Goday kase haasayeeddawaadan Kaatii Solomone Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan giigisseedda work'k'aa miishshatuwaa ubbaa Baabloone kaatii k'ans's'ereetseedda.
2Kings24:14 Naabukadanas'oore Yerusaalame asaa
2Kings24:15 Naabukadanas'oore Yo'aakiina omoodiide
2Kings24:16 He asaappe laappun shaatuu olanchchatuwaa; itti shaa asatuu dumma dumma kushiyaa hiillanchchatuwaa; unttunttu ubbaykka minanne olaa olettanaw danddayiyaawantta. I he ubbatuwaa Baabloona afeedda.
2Kings24:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings24:18 Sedek'k'iyaasi kaatetiyaa wode
2Kings24:19 Iyo'aak'eemi ootseeddawaadan
2Kings24:20 Med'ina Goday hank'k'etteedda diraw
2Kings25:1 Sedek'iyaasi kaateteedda udduppuntsa laytsi
2Kings25:2 Sedek'iyaasi kaateteedda tammanne ittentsiyaa laytsaa gakkanaw
2Kings25:3 Hewaa gaasuwaan biittan koshay suullina
2Kings25:4 Yaan de'ishshin katamaa yuushshuwaa gimbbii itti baggana koletteedda. Baabloone Asay katamaa yuuyyi aad'd'iide naagooppekka
2Kings25:5 shin Baabloone olanchchatuu kaatiyaa yederssiide
2Kings25:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings25:7 Sedek'iyaasa naanaa Sedek'iyaasi s'eellishin wod'eeddino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings25:8 Naabukadanas'oore Baabloonen kaateteedda tammanne udduppuntsa laytsi
2Kings25:9 Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa
2Kings25:10 Baabloone olanchchatuu ubbay kaatiyaa naagiyaawanttu kaappuwaa azazuwaan Yerusaalame katamaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa dirssaa gimbbiyaa ubbaa koleeddino.
2Kings25:11 Naabuzaradaani kataman atteeda asatuwaanne Yihudaan atteeda asatuwaa
2Kings25:12 Shin Naabuzaradaani wurssetsa hiyyeesatuwaappe amareedawantta woyniyaa turaa tokkanaadaaninne gadiyaa goshanaadan Yihudaan ashsheeda.
2Kings25:13 Baabloone asatuu Med'ina Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa nahaasiyaappe med'd'eedda tuussatuwaa
2Kings25:14 Hewaadankka k'ay keretuwaa
2Kings25:15 Kaatiyaa naagiyaawanttu kaappuu Naabuzaradaani muruta biraappenne muruta work'k'aappe med'etteedda tamaa kaashiyaa shaatatuwaakka kuyis'aarotuwaakka ubbaa akkiide afeedda.
2Kings25:16 Kaatii Solomone Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan oosettiyaabatoo med'd'eedda laau tuussatuu
2Kings25:17 Laau tuussatuu itti mala gidiide
2Kings25:18 Kaatiyaa naagiyaawanttu kaappuu Naabuzaradaani k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu Saraaya
2Kings25:19 K'ay he wode gakkanaw
2Kings25:20 Kaappuu Naabuzaradaani unttunttu ubbaa akkiide
2Kings25:21 Yan Ribila kataman
2Kings25:22 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings25:23 Kushiyaa immibeenna Yihudaa olaa gadaawatuunne olanchchatuu hewaa sisiide
2Kings25:24 Gedaalii unttunttoonne unttunttu olanchchatoo c'aak'k'iide
2Kings25:25 Shin laappuntsa aginaan kaatiyaa zariyaa gideedda Elishamaa'a na'aa Nataaniyaa na'ay Isimaa'eele tammu asaana Mis'ip'p'a biide
2Kings25:26 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Kings25:27 Ewiili-Marodaaki kaateteedda laytsi Yihudaa Kaatiyaa Ikkoniyaana k'ashuwaappe biliide maareedda. Hewe haneeddawe Ikkoniyaane omoodetti k'ashettiide beedda hattamanne laappuntsa laytsi
2Kings25:28 Ewiili-Marodaaki Ikkoniyaanana malo k'aalaa haasayiide
2Kings25:29 Hewaa diraw
2Kings25:30 Hachche hachche aw koshshiyaawaa ubbaa Baabloone kaatii immeedda.
1Chronicles1:1 Addaame Seeta yeleedda; Seete Heenoosa yeleedda; Heenoosi K'aynaana yeleedda;
1Chronicles1:2 K'aynaani Malaali'eela yeleedda; Malaali'eeli Yaareedda yeleedda;
1Chronicles1:3 Yaareed Heenooka yeleedda; Heenooki Maatusaala yeleedda; Maatusaali Laameeka yeleedda;
1Chronicles1:4 Laameeki Noha yeleedda. Nohe Seema
1Chronicles1:5 Yaafeeta attuma naanay Goomera
1Chronicles1:6 Goomera attuma naanay Ashkkanaaza
1Chronicles1:7 Yaawaana attuma naanay Eliisha
1Chronicles1:8 Kaama attuma naanay Kuusha
1Chronicles1:9 Kuusha attuma naanay Saaba
1Chronicles1:10 K'ay Kuushi Naamiruuda yeleedda. Naamiruudi sa'aan wolk'k'aama olanchchaa gideedda.
1Chronicles1:11 Mis'iraymi Ludeta
1Chronicles1:12 Patiroosata
1Chronicles1:13 Kanaane bayira na'aa Sidoonanne Aa teefa Heeta yeleedda;
1Chronicles1:14 k'ay Kanaane Yaabuusatuwa
1Chronicles1:15 Hiiwetuwaa
1Chronicles1:16 Ariwaadeta
1Chronicles1:17 Seema attuma naanay Elaama
1Chronicles1:18 Arifaakisaadi Shelaaha yeleedda; Shelaahi Eboora yeleedda.
1Chronicles1:19 Eboori laau naanaa yeleedda; ittuu yeletteedda wode sa'ay shaaketteedda diraw
1Chronicles1:20 Yok'is'aani Almmodaada
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoraama
1Chronicles1:22 Eebaala
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiira
1Chronicles1:24 Seemappe biide
1Chronicles1:25 Eboora
1Chronicles1:26 Saruuga
1Chronicles1:27 Abrahaama geetettiide s'eesettiyaa Abraama.
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahaama attuma naanay Yisaak'anne Isimaa'eela.
1Chronicles1:29 Unttunttu yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteedda. Isimaa'eela bayiray Nabaayoota; hewaappe simmina K'eedaare
1Chronicles1:30 Mishimaa'i
1Chronicles1:31 Yis'uri
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahaama k'oomatuu K'as'uri attuma naanay Ziimiraana
1Chronicles1:33 Midiyaama attuma naanay Eefa
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahaame Yisaak'a yeleedda. Yisaak'a attuma naanay Eesaanne Israa'eeliyaa.
1Chronicles1:35 Eesaa attuma naanay Elifaaza
1Chronicles1:36 Elifaaza attuma naanay Temaana
1Chronicles1:37 Ra'u'eela attuma naanay Nahaata
1Chronicles1:38 Eedooman koyro de'eedda Se'iira attuma naanay Los'aana
1Chronicles1:39 Los'aana attuma naanay Hooranne Homaama; Los'aana michchata Timinaa'o.
1Chronicles1:40 Shobaala attuma naanay Aaliwaana
1Chronicles1:41 Aana na'ay Dishoona. Dishoona attuma naanay Hemddaana
1Chronicles1:42 Es'eera attuma naanay Bilihaana
1Chronicles1:43 Israa'eelan ayaa kaatii kawutanappe kase Eedooma biittan kaateteedda kaatetuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Ba'oora na'ay Belaa'i kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Dinaaba.
1Chronicles1:44 Belaa'i hayk'k'ina
1Chronicles1:45 Yobaabi hayk'k'ina
1Chronicles1:46 Hushaami hayk'k'ina
1Chronicles1:47 Hadaadi hayk'k'ina

1Chronicles1:49 Shaa'uli hayk'k'ina

1Chronicles1:52 Oholiibaama
1Chronicles1:53 K'anaaza
1Chronicles1:54 Maagidi'eelanne Iraama. Hawanttu Eedooma kaappatuwaa.
1Chronicles2:1 Israa'eeliyaa attuma naanay hawantta: Roobeela
1Chronicles2:2 Daana
1Chronicles2:3 Kanaane Baatishu'ippe Yihuday yeleedda heezzu attuma naanay Eera
1Chronicles2:4 Yihudaa na'aa machchata Ti'imaara Yihudaw Paareesanne Zaraaha yelaaddu. Yihudaw ubbaanna ichcheshu attuma naanay de'iino.
1Chronicles2:5 Paareesa attuma naanay Hes'iroonanne Hamuula.
1Chronicles2:6 Zaraaha attuma naanay Zimira
1Chronicles2:7 Zaraaha zeretsaappe gideedda Karmma na'ay Akaani S'iiniyaa geetetti utteedda miishshaa omooduwaa akkiide
1Chronicles2:8 Etaana na'ay Azaariyaa.
1Chronicles2:9 Hes'iroone yeleedda naanay Yiraahima'eela
1Chronicles2:10 Raame Aminaadaaba yeleedda. Aminaadaabe Yihudaa zaratuwaa kaappuwaa Na'asoona yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:11 Na'asoone Salmoona yeleedda; Salmooni Boo'eeza yeleedda;
1Chronicles2:12 Boo'eeze Yoobeeda yeleedda; Yoobeedi Isseya yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:13 Isseyi bare bayira na'aa Eli'aaba
1Chronicles2:14 oyddentso na'aa Nataani'eela
1Chronicles2:15 usuppuntso na'aa Oos'eemanne laappuntsa na'ay Daawita yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:16 Isseya mac'c'a naanay S'aruuyonne Abigaalo. S'aruuyi naanay heezzatuu Abishaaya
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaala Amaasa yelaaddu; Amaasa aawuu Isimaa'eeliyaa Yetera.
1Chronicles2:18 Hes'iroona na'ay Kaaleebi bare machati Azuubina
1Chronicles2:19 Azuuba hayk'k'ina
1Chronicles2:20 Huuri Uura yeleedda; Uuri Bas'aali'eela yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:21 Hes'iroone usuppun tammu laytsaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles2:22 Sagubi Yaa'iira yeleedda. Yaa'iiri beni Gala'aade gadiyaan laatamanne heezzu katamatuwaa mooddeedda.
1Chronicles2:23 Shin Gashuuranne Sooriyaa kaatetuu Habooti-Yaa'iira katamatuwaa K'anaataanne aa heeratuwaa usuppun tammu katamatuwaa olettiide oyk'k'eeddino; yaan de'eedda Asay ubbay Gala'aade aawuwaa Maakira zariyaa.
1Chronicles2:24 Hes'iroone Kaaleeba Efiraataa giyaa saan hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles2:25 Hes'iroona na'aa bayiraa Yiraahima'eela na'ay bayray Raama; teefatuu Buuna
1Chronicles2:26 Yiraahima'eelaw Ataaro geetettiyaa hara machchata de'aw; Ataara Oonaama daayo.
1Chronicles2:27 Yiraahima'eela na'aa bayraa Raama naanay Ma'aas'a
1Chronicles2:28 Oonaama naanay Shammaayanne Yaade. Shammaaya naanay Nadaabanne Abishuura.
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuura machata Abihayila Ahibaananne Moliida yelaaddu.
1Chronicles2:30 Nadaaba attuma naanay Seledanne Afaayima; Seledi na'aa yelennaan hayk'k'eedda.
1Chronicles2:31 Afaayima na'ay Yishi'a; Yishi'a na'ay Sheeshaana; Sheeshaana na'ay Ahilaaya.
1Chronicles2:32 Shammaaya ishaa Yaade naanay Yeteranne Yoonataana; Yeteri na'aa yelennaan hayk'k'eedda.
1Chronicles2:33 Yoonataana naanay Peleetanne Zaaza. Hawanttu Yiraahima'eela zeretsaa.
1Chronicles2:34 Sheeshaanaw mac'c'awaappe attina
1Chronicles2:35 Sheeshaani bare k'oomaa Yaariha'aw bare mac'c'a naanatuwaappe ittinno immina naatta Attaaya yelaaddu.
1Chronicles2:36 Attaayi Naataana yeleedda; Naataani Zabaada yeleedda;
1Chronicles2:37 Zabaad Efilaala yeleedda; Efilaali Yoobeeda yeleedda;
1Chronicles2:38 Yoobeedi Yeeha yeleedda; Yeehu Azaariyaa yeleedda;
1Chronicles2:39 Azaarii Helees'a yeleedda; Helees'i Elaasa yeleedda;
1Chronicles2:40 Elaasi Sisimaaya yeleedda; Sisimaayi Shaaluuma yeleedda;
1Chronicles2:41 Shaaluumi Yik'aamiyaa yeleedda; Yik'aame Elishamaa'a yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:42 Yiraahima'eela ishaa Kaaleeba na'ay bayiray Meesha. Meesha na'ay Ziifa; Ziifa na'ay Mareesha; Mareesha na'ay Kebroona.
1Chronicles2:43 Kebroone naanay K'oraaha
1Chronicles2:44 Shemaa'i York'k'a'aama aawuwaa Rahaama yeleedda. Rek'eemi Shammaaya yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:45 Shammaaya na'ay Maa'oona. Maa'ooni Beetis'uura yeleedda.
1Chronicles2:46 Kaaleeba k'oomatta Eefa Haaraana
1Chronicles2:47 Yaahidaaya naanay Regeema
1Chronicles2:48 Kaaleeba k'oomatta Maa'ika Shebeeranne Tirihaana yelaaddu.
1Chronicles2:49 K'aykka Maa'ika Sha'aafanne Shawa yelaaddu. Sha'aafi Madimaana yeleedda. Shawi Maakibeenanne Gibaa'a yeleedda. Kaaleeba naatta Aakkiso.
1Chronicles2:50 Kaaleeba naanay haratuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino. Kaaleebi bare bayra na'aa Huura bare machchatti Efiraatin yeleedda. Huura naanay K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima aawuwaa Shobaala
1Chronicles2:51 Beeteleheeme aawuwaa Salmoonanne Beeti-Gadeera aawuwaa Hareefa.
1Chronicles2:52 K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima aawuwaa Shobaala yaratuu Haro'eetatanne Manuhoota yaratuwaappe baggatuwaa.
1Chronicles2:53 K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima yaratuu Yatirata
1Chronicles2:54 Beeteleheeme aawuwaa Salmoona yaratuu Nas'oofata
1Chronicles2:55 Yaabees'a kataman de'iyaa s'aafiyaawanttu yaratuu k'ay Tirata
1Chronicles3:1 Kebroone kataman Daawite yeleedda naanay; Iziraa'eeliyaa Ahino'aama yeleedda Aa bayray Aminoona. K'armmeloosiyaa Abigaala yeleedda Aa laa'entso na'ay Daaneela.
1Chronicles3:2 Gashuura gadiyaa Kaatiyaa Talmmaaya naatta Maa'ika yeleedda Aa heezzentso na'ay Abeselooma. Haggiita yeleedda Aa oyddentso na'ay Adooniyaana.
1Chronicles3:3 Abiis'aala yeleedda Aa ichcheshantso na'ay Shafaas'iyaa. Aa machata Egila yeleedda Aa usuppuntsa na'ay Yitira'aama.
1Chronicles3:4 Daawite he usuppun naanaa Kebroonan yeleedda. Daawite Kebroonan laappun laytsanne usuppun aginaa kaateteedda. K'ay Yerusaalamen hattamanne heezzu laytsaa kaateteedda.
1Chronicles3:5 Daawite Yerusaalamen yeleedda naanay oyddatuu Ami'eela naatta Berssaaba yeleedda Shima
1Chronicles3:6 K'ay hara udduppun attuma naanay Yibihaara
1Chronicles3:7 Nogaaha
1Chronicles3:8 Elishamaa'a
1Chronicles3:9 Ha attuma naanaa ubbaa bollakka Daawitaw hara machatuwaappe yeletteedda attuma naanay de'iino; k'ay Taamaara ha attuma naanaa michchato.
1Chronicles3:10 Kaatiyaa Solomone na'ay Robi'aama; Robi'aama na'ay Abiiya; Abiiya na'ay Asaa; Asaa na'ay Yoosaafees'a;
1Chronicles3:11 Yoosaafees'a na'ay Yoraama; Yoraama na'ay Akaaziyaasa; Akaaziyaasa na'ay Yo'aasha;
1Chronicles3:12 Yo'aasha na'ay Amesiyaasa; Amesiyaasa na'ay Ooziyaana; Ooziyaana na'ay Yo'aataama;
1Chronicles3:13 Yo'aataama na'ay Akaaza; Akaaza na'ay Hizk'k'iyaasa; Hizk'k'iyaasa na'ay Minaasa;
1Chronicles3:14 Minaase na'ay Amoona; Amoona na'ay Yoosiyaasa.
1Chronicles3:15 Yoosiyaasa na'ay bayray Yohanaana; laaentsuu Yo'aak'eema; heezzentsuu Sedek'iyaasa; oyddentsuu Shaaluuma.
1Chronicles3:16 Yo'aak'eema naanay Yo'aakiinanne Sedek'iyaasa.
1Chronicles3:17 Omoodettiide Baabloone beedda Yo'aakiina attuma naanay Salaatiyaala
1Chronicles3:18 Malkkiraama
1Chronicles3:19 Padaaya attuma naanay Zarubaabeelanne Shima. Zarubaabeela attuma naanay Mashulaamanne Hanaaniyaa; unttunttu michchatta Shalomiito.
1Chronicles3:20 Hawanttu bollan hara ichcheshu attuma naanay Zarubaabeelaw de'iino; unttunttukka Haashshuuba
1Chronicles3:21 Hanaaniyaa attuma naanay Palaas'iyaanne Yishaa'iyaa. Yishaa'iyaa na'ay Rafaaya; Rafaaya na'ay Arnnaana; Arnnaana na'ay Obaadiyaa; Obaadiyaa na'ay Shakaaniyaa;
1Chronicles3:22 Shakaaniyaw usuppun naanay de'ee; Shamaa'iyaa giyaa Aa na'aynne na'aa naanatuu
1Chronicles3:23 Na'aariyaa naanay heezzatuu Eliyoo'enaaya
1Chronicles3:24 Eliyoo'enaaya naanay laappunatuu Hodaawiyaa
1Chronicles4:1 Yihudaa zaratuu Paareesa
1Chronicles4:2 Shobaala na'ay Ra'aayi Yahaata yeleedda; Yahaati Ahumaayanne Lahaada yeleedda. Hawanttu S'oratu yaratuwaa.
1Chronicles4:3 Huuri bare daay Efiraatiw bayra na'aa; Huuri Beeteleheeme yeleedda. Es'aama attuma naanay Iziraa'eela
1Chronicles4:4 
1Chronicles4:5 Tak'oa aawuwaa Ashihuuraw Heelonne Naa'iro geetettiyaa laau mac'c'a asatuu de'iino.
1Chronicles4:6 Naa'ira Ahuzaama
1Chronicles4:7 Heela S'eereta
1Chronicles4:8 K'oos'i Anuuba
1Chronicles4:9 Yaabees'i bare ishatuwaa ubbaappe aad'd'i bonchchetee. Aa daaya
1Chronicles4:10 Yaabees'i Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa s'eesiide
1Chronicles4:11 Shuha ishay Kaluubi Mahiira yeleedda; Mahiiri Eshttoona yeleedda.
1Chronicles4:12 Eshttooni Beetiraafa
1Chronicles4:13 K'anaaza naanay Otini'eelanne Saraaya; Otini'eela naanay Hataatanne Ma'onootaaya.
1Chronicles4:14 Ma'onootaayi Oofira yeleedda. Saraayi Yoo'aaba yeleedda. Yoo'aabe Je-Harashiima yeleedda; Kushiyaa Hiillanchatuwaa gidiyaa asatuwaa yeleedda.
1Chronicles4:15 Yifune na'aa Kaaleeba naanay Ira
1Chronicles4:16 Yihaali'eela naanay Ziifa
1Chronicles4:17 Eezira naanay Yetera
1Chronicles4:18 Yihudaa gadiyaappe akkeedda machata Gadoora aawuwaa Yereedda
1Chronicles4:19 Nahaama michchati
1Chronicles4:20 Shimoona naanay Aminoona
1Chronicles4:21 Yihudaa na'aa Sheela zaratuu Leeka aawuwaa Eera
1Chronicles4:22 Haratuu k'ay Yok'iima
1Chronicles4:23 Hawanttu Nas'a'iimaaninne Gadeeran de'eedda urk'k'aa med'd'iyaa asatuwaa. Unttunttu kaatiyaa kiitaa ootsanaw aanana ittippe de'eeddino.
1Chronicles4:24 Simoona naanay Nemu'eela
1Chronicles4:25 Shaa'ula na'ay Shaaluuma; Shaaluuma na'ay Mibssaama; Mibssaama na'ay Mishimaa'a;
1Chronicles4:26 Mishimaa'a na'ay Hammu'eela; Hammu'eela na'ay Zakkuura; Zakkuura na'ay Shima.
1Chronicles4:27 Shimaw tammanne usuppun attuma naanaynne usuppun mac'c'a naanay de'iino; shin Aa ishatoo c'ora naanay baawa. Yihudaa zaratuwaadan Simoona zaratuu c'orattibeykkino.
1Chronicles4:28 Simoona zaratuu Berssaabeha katamaaninne Molaada
1Chronicles4:29 Baala
1Chronicles4:30 Baatu'eela
1Chronicles4:31 Beeti-Markkaboota
1Chronicles4:32 K'ay unttunttu mootsatuu Es'aama
1Chronicles4:33 Ba'aalaata gakkanaw
1Chronicles4:34 Simoona yaratuu kaappatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttu Mashobaaba
1Chronicles4:35 Yuu'eelanne Yoshiibiyaa na'aa Yeeha. Yeehu aawuwaa aawuu Asa'eela na'aa Saraaya.
1Chronicles4:36 Hara kaappatuu k'ay Eliyoo'enaaya
1Chronicles4:37 Ziiza. Ziizi Shifa na'aa; Shifi Alloona na'aa; Allooni Yadaaya na'aa; Yadaayi Shiimira na'aa; Shiimiri Shamaa'iyaa na'aa.
1Chronicles4:38 Simoona yaratuu kaappatuu hawantta. Unttunttu aawotuwaa zeretsay loytsi c'oratteedda.
1Chronicles4:39 Unttunttu barenttu mehiyaw heemmiyaa sa'aa koyanaw Gadoora geliyaa sa'aa matan de'iyaa wombbaw away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa sa'aa gakkanaw beeddino.
1Chronicles4:40 Itti loytsi araddeeda loo heemmiyaa sa'aa demmeeddino; he biittay woppaynne sarotetsay kumeedda aako biittaa. Beni wode he gadiyaan de'eeddawantu Kaama zeretsatuwaa.
1Chronicles4:41 Hawaappe k'ommo baggana suntsay s'aafetteedda Simoona zaratuu Yihudaa Kaatiyaa Hizk'k'iyaasa wode Gadoora gadiyaa biide
1Chronicles4:42 Simoona zaratuwaappe ichcheshu s'eetu asatuu Se'iira Deriyaakko beeddino. Unttunttu kaappatuu Palaas'iyaa
1Chronicles4:43 Amaaleek'a asatuwaappe kase bak'ati atteeddawantta Simoona asatuu d'aysseeddino. Unttunttu hachche gakkanaw he biittan de'iino.
1Chronicles5:1 Israa'eeliyaa na'aa bayiraa Roobeela yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. Roobeeli bayira na'aa; shin bare aawuwaa gisuwaa I tunisseedda diraw
1Chronicles5:2 Yihuday bare ishatuwaappe minneedda; Aa bayiratetsay Yooseefoo imetteeddawaa gidooppenne
1Chronicles5:3 Israa'eeliyaa na'aa bayiraa Roobeela attuma naanay Hanooka
1Chronicles5:4 Yuu'eela na'ay Shamaa'iyaa; Shamaa'iyaa na'ay Googa; Googa na'ay Shima;
1Chronicles5:5 Shima na'ay Mikiyaasa; Mikiyaasa na'ay Ra'aaya; Ra'aaya na'ay Ba'aala.
1Chronicles5:6 Ba'aala na'ay Asoore Kaatiyaa Tigilaati-Paleseeri omoodiide afeedda Ba'eera; Ba'eeri Roobeela zaratuwaa kaappuwaa.
1Chronicles5:7 Ba'eera dabbotuu
1Chronicles5:8 Belaa'a. Belaa'i Azaaza na'aa; Azaazii Shemaa'a na'aa; Shemaa'i Yuu'eela zariyaa. Yuu'eela zaratuu Aaro'eera kataman
1Chronicles5:9 Roobeela zaratuwaa mehii Gala'aaden c'oratteedda diraw
1Chronicles5:10 Saa'oola laytsan Aggaaratuwaa yaratuwaanna Roobeela yaratuu olettina
1Chronicles5:11 Gaade zaratuu Roobeela zaratuwaappe huup'issa baggan
1Chronicles5:12 Yuu'eeli koyro yaratoo kaappuwaa; Shafaami laa'entso yaratoo kaappuwaa. Yaa'inaaynne Shafaas'i Baasaanen utteedda yaratoo kaappatuwaa.
1Chronicles5:13 Unttunttu dabbotuu
1Chronicles5:14 Hawanttu Abihayila naanay Buuza zeretsaa. Buuzi Yaahida yeleedda; Yaahidi Yeshishaaya yeleedda; Yeshishaayi Mikaa'eela yeleedda; Mikaa'eeli Gala'aade yeleedda; Gala'aade Yaarooha yeleedda; Yaaroohi Huura yeleedda; Huuri Abihayila yeleedda.
1Chronicles5:15 Unttunttu aawotuwaa soo kaappuu Guna na'aa na'aa Abddi'eela na'aa Aaha.
1Chronicles5:16 Unttunttu Gala'aadeninne Baasaanen he biittatuwaa katamatuwaaninne Saaroona gadiyaan mehii heemettiyaa gishuwaan utteeddino.
1Chronicles5:17 Hawanttu ubbaa yeletay Yihudaa Kaatiyaa Yo'aataama wodenne Israa'eeliyaa Kaatiyaa Iyorbbaama wode yeletaa mazggobiyaan s'aafetteedda.
1Chronicles5:18 Roobeela zaratuwaappe
1Chronicles5:19 Unttunttu Aggaaratuwaa yaratuwaanna
1Chronicles5:20 Unttunttu he asatuwaana olettiide
1Chronicles5:21 Barenttu morkkatuwaappe ishatamu shaa gaalotuwaa
1Chronicles5:22 Olay S'oossaawaa gideedda diraw
1Chronicles5:23 Minaase zaratuwaappe bakka yaratuu Baasaaneppe doommiide
1Chronicles5:24 Unttunttu aawotuwaa soy kaappatuu Efeera
1Chronicles5:25 Shin ha zaratuu barenttu aawotuwaa S'oossaa naak'k'eddino; S'oossay unttunttu sintsaappe d'aysseedda he gadiyaa asatuwaa s'oossatuwaanna shaarmus'eeddino.
1Chronicles5:26 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles6:1 Leewiyaa naanay Gershshoona
1Chronicles6:2 K'ahaata naanay Amiraama
1Chronicles6:3 Amiraama naanay Aaroona
1Chronicles6:4 Elaazare Piinihaasa yeleedda; Piinihaasi Abishuu'a yeleedda; Abishuu'i Buuk'a yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:5 Buuk'i Uuza yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:6 Uuzi Zaraahiyaa yeleedda; Zaraahe Maraayoota yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:7 Maraayooti Amaariyaa yeleedda; Amaari Ahis'uuba yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:8 Ahis'uubi S'aadook'a yeleedda; S'aadook'e Ahima'aas'a yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:9 Ahima'aas'i Azaariyaasa yeleedda; Azaariyaasi Yohanaana yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaani Azaariyaasa yeleedda. Solomone Yerusaalamen kees'isseedda Geeshsha Golliyaa ootseedda k'eesii Azaariyaasa.
1Chronicles6:11 Azaariyaasi Amaariyaa yeleedda; Amaari Ahis'uuba yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:12 Ahis'uubi S'aadook'a yeleedda; S'aadook'e Shaaluuma yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:13 Shaaluumi Hilk'k'iyaa yeleedda; Hilk'k'ii Azaariyaasa yeleedda;
1Chronicles6:14 Azaariyaasi Saraaya yeleedda; Saraayi Yos'edeek'a yeleedda.
1Chronicles6:15 Med'inaa Goday Yihudaanne Yerusaalame Naabukadanas'ooran omoodisseedda wode Yos'edeek'ikka omoodettiide beedda.
1Chronicles6:16 Leewiyaa naanay Gershshoona
1Chronicles6:17 Gershshoona naanatuwaa suntsay Liibinanne Shima.
1Chronicles6:18 K'ahaata naanay Amiraama
1Chronicles6:19 Maraara naanay Maahilanne Musha. Barenttu aawuwaa gollen gollen s'aafetteedda Leewatuu yaratuu hawantta.
1Chronicles6:20 Gershshoona na'ay Liibina; Liibina na'ay Yahaata; Yahaata na'ay Ziimma.
1Chronicles6:21 Ziimma na'ay Yo'aaha; Yo'aaha na'ay Idda; Iddo na'ay Zaraaha; Zaraaha na'ay Ya'atiraaya.
1Chronicles6:22 K'ahaata na'ay Aminaadaaba; Aminaadaaba na'ay K'oraaha; K'oraaha na'ay Asiira;
1Chronicles6:23 Asiira na'ay Elk'k'aana; Elk'k'aana na'ay Ebiyaasaafa; Ebiyaasaafa na'ay Asiira;
1Chronicles6:24 Asiira na'ay Tahaata; Tahaata na'ay Uri'eela; Uri'eela na'ay Uuziyaana; Uuziyaana na'ay Shaa'ula.
1Chronicles6:25 Elk'k'aana naanay Amaasaayanne Ahimoota.
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimoota na'ay Elk'k'aana; Elk'k'aana na'ay S'ofaaya; S'ofaaya na'ay Nahaata;
1Chronicles6:27 Nahaata na'ay Eli'aaba; Eli'aaba na'ay Yirohaama; Yirohaama na'ay Elk'k'aana.
1Chronicles6:28 Sammeela na'ay bayiray Yuu'eela; teefay Abiiya.
1Chronicles6:29 Maraara na'ay Maahila; Maahila na'ay Liibina; Liibina na'ay Shima; Shima na'ay Uuza;
1Chronicles6:30 Uuza na'ay Shima; Shima na'ay Haggiiya; Haggiiya na'ay Asaaya.
1Chronicles6:31 Daawite Taabootaa Yerusaalame aheeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles6:32 Solomone Yerusaalamen Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'ana gakkanaw
1Chronicles6:33 Barenttu naanatuwaanna ittippe yes's'eeddawanttu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. K'ahaata yaratuwaappe yes's'iyaawe Hemaana. Hemaani Yuu'eela na'aa; Yuu'eeli Sammeela na'aa;
1Chronicles6:34 Sammeeli Elk'k'aana na'aa; Elk'k'aani Yirohaama na'aa; Yirohaami Eli'eela na'aa; Eli'eeli Tooha na'aa;
1Chronicles6:35 Toohi S'ufa na'aa; S'ufi Elk'k'aana na'aa; Elk'k'aani Mahaata na'aa; Mahaati Amaasaaya na'aa;
1Chronicles6:36 Amaasaayi Elk'k'aana na'aa; Elk'k'aani Yuu'eela na'aa; Yuu'eeli Azaariyaasa na'aa; Azaariyaasi S'afaaniyaa na'aa;
1Chronicles6:37 S'afaanii Tahaata na'aa; Tahaati Asiira na'aa; Asiiri Ebiyaasaafa na'aa; Ebiyaasaafi K'oraaha na'aa;
1Chronicles6:38 K'oraahi Yis'ihaara na'aa; Yis'ihaari K'ahaata na'aa; K'ahaati Leewiyaa na'aa; Leewii Israa'eeliyaa na'aa.
1Chronicles6:39 Aa dabbuu Asaafe Aa ushechcha baggana ek'k'ee. Asaafe Berekiyaa na'aa; Berekii Shima na'aa;
1Chronicles6:40 Shimi Mikaa'eela na'aa; Mikaa'eeli Ba'iseeya na'aa; Ba'iseeyi Malkkiyaa na'aa;
1Chronicles6:41 Malkkii Etaana na'aa; Etaani Zaraaha na'aa; Zaraahi Adaaya na'aa;
1Chronicles6:42 Adaayi Etaana na'aa; Etaani Ziimma na'aa; Ziimmi Shima na'aa;
1Chronicles6:43 Shimi Yahaata na'aa; Yahaati Gershshoona na'aa; Gershshooni Leewiyaa na'aa.
1Chronicles6:44 Unttunttuppe haddirssa bagganna unttunttu dabbotuu
1Chronicles6:45 Malluuki Hashaabiyaa na'aa; Hashaabii Amesiyaasa na'aa; Amesiyaasi Hilk'k'iyaa na'aa;
1Chronicles6:46 Hilk'k'ii Amoos'a na'aa; Amoos'i Baana na'aa; Baani Shemeera na'aa;
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeeri Maahila na'aa; Maahili Musha na'aa; Mushi Maraara na'aa; Maraari Leewiyaa na'aa.
1Chronicles6:48 Unttunttu dabbotuu Leewatuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaw ootsanaw suntsetteeddino.
1Chronicles6:49 Shin Aaroonenne Aaroona zeretsatuu is'aanaa c'uwayiino; yarshshiyaa sa'aan s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaakka yarshshiino. S'oossaa k'oomay Muse azazeeddawaadan
1Chronicles6:50 Aaroona yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. Aaroona na'ay Elaazara; Elaazara na'ay Piinihaasa; Piinihaasa na'ay Abishuu'a;
1Chronicles6:51 Abishuu'a na'ay Buuk'a; Buuk'a na'ay Uuza; Uuza na'ay Zaraahiyaa.
1Chronicles6:52 Zaraahiyaa na'ay Maraayoota; Maraayoota na'ay Amaariyaa; Amaariyaa na'ay Ahis'uuba;
1Chronicles6:53 Ahis'uuba na'ay S'aadook'a; S'aadook'a na'ay Ahima'aas'a.
1Chronicles6:54 Aaroona zaratuu barenttu zawaa giddon de'anaw unttunttu utetsaadan unttunttoo imetteedda sa'atuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. K'ahaata yaratuu koyro saamaa akkeeddino.
1Chronicles6:55 He saaman Yihudaan de'iyaa Kebroone katamaanne Kebroone yuushshuwaan de'iyaa hentsaa gadetuwaa unttunttoo immeeddino;
1Chronicles6:56 shin katamaa goshshaanne katamaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa mootsatuwaa Yifune na'aa Kaaleebaw immeeddino.
1Chronicles6:57 Aaroona naanaw Asay bak'ati biide attiyaa katamaa
1Chronicles6:58 Hiilenanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:59 Ashaananne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Beeti-Shemeshanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa immeeddino.
1Chronicles6:60 K'ay Biiniyaama zaratuwaappe Gebaa'anne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:61 Minaase yaratuu baggatuu gadiyaappe tammu katamatuwaa atteeda K'ahaata yaratoo saaman immeeddino.
1Chronicles6:62 Yisaakoora zaratuwaa gadiyaappe
1Chronicles6:63 Roobeela zaratuwaa gadiyaappe
1Chronicles6:64 Hewaadan ootsiide
1Chronicles6:65 K'ay Yihudaa zaratuwaa gadiyaappe
1Chronicles6:66 K'ahaata yaratuwaappe amareedawanttu barenttu katamatuwaa Efireema zaratuwaa katamatuwaappe akkeeddino.
1Chronicles6:67 Unttunttoo Asay bak'ati biide attiyaa katamatuwaa
1Chronicles6:68 Yok'ima'aamanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:69 Ayaaloonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Gaate-Rimmoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa immeeddino.
1Chronicles6:70 Minaase zaratuwaa baggatuwaappe Aneeranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Bilaamanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide
1Chronicles6:71 Minaase zaratuwaa baggatuwaappe Baasaanen de'iyaa Golaananne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Asttaarootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide
1Chronicles6:72 K'ay Yisaakoora zaratuwaappe K'aadeesanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:73 Raamootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Aaneemanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide
1Chronicles6:74 K'aykka Aaseera zaratuwaappe Maashaalanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:75 Huk'ook'anne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Rahoobanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide
1Chronicles6:76 Hewaadankka Nifttaaleema zaratuwaappe Galiilan de'iyaa K'edeeshanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:77 Atteeda Maraara yaratoo Zaabiloona zaratuwaappe Rimmoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Taabooranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide immeeddino.
1Chronicles6:78 K'ay Roobeela zaratuwaappe Yaarikko baggan
1Chronicles6:79 K'idemootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Mefa'aatanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide
1Chronicles6:80 K'aykka Gaade zaratuwaappe Gala'aaden de'iyaa Raamootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa
1Chronicles6:81 Haseboonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Yaa'izeeranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide unttunttoo immeeddino.
1Chronicles7:1 Yisaakooraw oyddu naanay de'iino; unttunttukka Tolaa'a
1Chronicles7:2 Tolaa'a naanay Uuza
1Chronicles7:3 Uuza na'ay Yiziraahiyaa. Yiziraahiyaa naanay Mikaa'eela
1Chronicles7:4 Barenttu aawotuwaa soy asaa yeletaadan olaw giigeedda olanchchatuu hattamanne usuppun shaa; ayaw gooppe
1Chronicles7:5 Yisaakoora zaratuwaappe olanchchatuu barenttu yeletaa mazggobiyaan paydettiide
1Chronicles7:6 Biiniyaamaw heezzu naanay de'iino; unttunttukka Belaa'a
1Chronicles7:7 Belaa'a naanay Es'iboona
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeera naanay Zamiira
1Chronicles7:9 Barenttu yeletaa mazggobiyaadan paydeteedda wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuu laatamu shaanne laau s'eeta gideeddino.
1Chronicles7:10 Yidi'eela na'ay Bilihaana. Bilihaana naanay Yi'uusha
1Chronicles7:11 hawanttu ubbatuu Yidi'eela naanaa. Unttunttu soy asaa kaappatuwaanne wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa. Barenttu yeletaadan paydeteedda olanchchatuu tammanne laappun shaanne laau s'eeta.
1Chronicles7:12 K'ay Shufiiminne Hufiimi Ira naanaa. Hushiimi Daana na'aa.
1Chronicles7:13 Nifttaaleema naanay Yaahis'i'eela
1Chronicles7:14 Minaase zaratuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Minaase Sooriyaa gadiyaappe akkeedda k'ubaatata yeleedda attuma naanay Asiri'eelanne Gala'aade aawuwaa Maakiina.
1Chronicles7:15 Maakiiri Hufiimaassinne Shufiimassi itti itti machchiyaa oochchiide immeedda. Maakiina michchati suntsay Maa'iko. Maakiina na'ay teefay S'alofihaada. S'alofihaad mac'c'a naanatuwaa s'alalaa yeleedda.
1Chronicles7:16 Maakiina machata Maa'ika aw naanaa yelaaddu. Bayira na'aa Peresha suntsaaddu; Peresha ishaa suntsay Shereesha. Peresha naanay Ulaamanne Rak'eema.
1Chronicles7:17 Ulaama na'ay Badaana. Hawanttu Minaase na'aa na'aa
1Chronicles7:18 Gala'aade michchata Hamolekeeta Ishooda
1Chronicles7:19 Shamidaa'a naanay Ahiyaana
1Chronicles7:20 Efireema na'ay Shutelaaha; Shutelaaha na'ay Bereeda; Bereeda na'ay Tahaata; Tahaata na'ay Elaada; Elaada na'ay Tahaata;
1Chronicles7:21 Tahaata na'ay Zabaada; Zabaada na'ay Shutelaaha. Efireemaw Ezeeranne Elaada geetettiyaa hara laau naanay de'iino. Unttunttu Gaate katamaa asatuwaa mehiyaa wuuishin
1Chronicles7:22 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles7:23 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles7:24 Efireemaw She'iiro giyaa naatta de'aw; Hirkki Beeti-Horoona
1Chronicles7:25 Efireema attuma na'ay Refaaha; Refaaha na'ay Resheefa; Resheefa na'ay Telaaha; Telaaha na'ay Tahaana;
1Chronicles7:26 Tahaana na'ay La'idaana; La'idaana na'ay Amihuuda; Amihuuda na'ay Elishamaa'a;
1Chronicles7:27 Elishamaa'a na'ay Nawa; Neewe na'ay Iyyaasa.
1Chronicles7:28 Efireema zaratuwaa biittay unttunttu de'iyaasay Beeteelenne Beeteele mootsatuwaa
1Chronicles7:29 K'ay Minaase zaratuwaa biittaa zawaan de'iyaa Beetishaananne Beetishaana mootsatuwaa
1Chronicles7:30 Aaseera attuma naanay Yimina
1Chronicles7:31 Barii'a attuma naanay Hebeeranne Birzzaawita aawuwaa Malkki'eela.
1Chronicles7:32 Hebeeri Yaafilees'a
1Chronicles7:33 Yaafilees'a attuma naanay Paasaaka
1Chronicles7:34 Yaafilees'a ishaa Shomeera attuma naanay Aaha
1Chronicles7:35 Aa ishaa Hotaama attuma naanay S'ofaaha
1Chronicles7:36 S'ofaaha attuma naanay Suha
1Chronicles7:37 Bees'era
1Chronicles7:38 Yetera attuma naanay Yifuna
1Chronicles7:39 Ulla attuma naanay Araaha
1Chronicles7:40 Hawanttu ubbatuu Aaseera zeretsaa. Unttunttu barenttu aawotuwaa soy asaa kaappatuwaanne dooretteedda wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa. Barenttu yeletaadan paydeteedda olanchchatuu laatamanne usuppun shaaa gideeddino.
1Chronicles8:1 Biiniyaama na'ay bayiray Belaa'a; teefay Ashibeela; heezzentsuu Ahiraaha;
1Chronicles8:2 oyddentsuu Noha; ichcheshentsu Raafa.
1Chronicles8:3 Belaa'a attuma naanay Adaara
1Chronicles8:4 Abishuu'a
1Chronicles8:5 Geera
1Chronicles8:6 Ehuuda attuma naanay Naa'imaana
1Chronicles8:7 
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaami bare machatuwaa Hushiimonne Baa'iro yeddeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles8:9 Shaharaami bare machati Hodeeshin Yobaaba
1Chronicles8:10 Ya'uus'a
1Chronicles8:11 I bare machati Hushiimin
1Chronicles8:12 Elppa'aala attuma naanay Ebeera
1Chronicles8:13 K'ay Shaharaami Barii'anne Shemaa'a yeleedda. Unttunttu Ayaaloona kataman de'iyaa barenttu soy asaa kaappatuwaa. Unttunttu Gaate kataman de'iyaa asaa yedersseeddino.

1Chronicles8:15 Zabaade

1Chronicles8:25 Yifidaaynne Panu'eeli Shaashak'a attuma naanaa.
1Chronicles8:26 Shaamisharaayi
1Chronicles8:27 Yaa'ireeshii
1Chronicles8:28 Hawanttu barenttu yeletaan Yerusaalamen utteedda barenttu soy asaa kaappatuwaa.
1Chronicles8:29 Gabaa'oona aawuu Yi'i'eeli Gabaa'oona kataman de'eedda. Aa machchatti suntsay Maa'iko.
1Chronicles8:30 Aa na'ay bayiray Abddoona; Aa attuma naanay haratuu S'uura
1Chronicles8:31 Gadoora
1Chronicles8:32 Mik'iloota. Mik'ilooti Shima yeleedda. Hawanttu k'ay Yerusaalamen de'iyaa barenttu dabbattuu matan de'eeddino.
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri K'iisa yeleedda; K'iisi Saa'oola yeleedda. Saa'ooli Yoonataana
1Chronicles8:34 Yoonataana na'ay Mariiba'aala; Mariiba'aali Mikiyaasa yeleedda.
1Chronicles8:35 Mikiyaasa attuma naanay Pittoona
1Chronicles8:36 Akaazi Yaho'aada yeleedda. Yaho'aad Alemeeta
1Chronicles8:37 Moos'i Biini'a yeleedda; Biini'i Raafa yeleedda; Raafi Elaasa yeleedda; Elaasi As'eela yeleedda.
1Chronicles8:38 As'eelaw usuppun attuma naanay de'iino. Unttunttu suntsay Azirik'aama
1Chronicles8:39 As'eela ishaa Esheek'aw heezzu naanay de'iino. Aa na'ay bayiray Ulaama; teefay Yi'uusha; heezzentsuu Elifelees'a.
1Chronicles8:40 Ulaama naanay wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa; unttunttu wonddaafiyaa asatuwaa. Ulaamaw s'eetanne ishatamuwaa gidiyaa naanaynne naanaa naanay de'iino. Hawanttu ubbatuu Biiniyaama zeretsaa.
1Chronicles9:1 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay bare yeletaan yeletaan s'aafetteedda; ha taarikii Israa'eeliyaa Kaatetuu mas'aafan de'ee. Yihudaa Asay ammanettibeenna diraw
1Chronicles9:2 Koyro simmeedda Israa'eeliyaa asay
1Chronicles9:3 Yihudaa zaratuwaappe
1Chronicles9:4 Yihudaa na'aa Paareesa yaratuwaappe Utaayi Yerusaalamen utteeddawanttu kaappuwaa. Utaayi Amihuuda na'aa; Amihuudi Omira na'aa; Omiri Imira na'aa; Imiri Baana na'aa.
1Chronicles9:5 Yihudaa na'aa Sheela yaratuwaappe Asaayinne Aa naanay Yerusaalamen utteeddawanttu kaappatuwaa.
1Chronicles9:6 Yihudaa na'aa Zaraaha yaratuwaappe Yi'u'eeli Yerusaalamen utteeddawanttu kaappuwaa. Yihudaa zaratuu paydina ubbaanna usuppun s'eetanne udduppun tamma.
1Chronicles9:7 Biiniyaama yaratuu kaappatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino. Kaappuu Saalu Mashulaama na'aa; Mashulaami Hodaawiyaa na'aa; Hodaawii Hassanuu'a na'aa. Kaappuu Yibinaayi Yirohaama na'aa. Kaappuu Eeli Uuza na'aa; Uuzi Miikira na'aa. Kaappuu Mashulaami Shafaayaa na'aa; Shafaas'i Ra'u'eela na'aa; Ra'u'eeli Yibiniyaa na'aa. Biiniyaama zaratuu paydina ubbaanna udduppun s'eetanne ishatamanne usuppuna.
1Chronicles9:8 
1Chronicles9:9 
1Chronicles9:10 Yerusaalamen de'eedda k'eesatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttu Yadaaya
1Chronicles9:11 S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan kaappotiyaa Azaariyaasa. Azaariyaasi Hilk'k'iyaa na'aa; Hilk'k'ii Mashulaama na'aa; Mashulaami S'aadook'a na'aa; S'aadook'e Maraayoota na'aa; Maraayooti Ahis'uuba na'aa.
1Chronicles9:12 Haratuu k'ay Yirohaama na'aa Adaayanne Adii'eela na'aa Ma'isaaya. Yirohaami Paashihuura na'aa; Paashihuuri Malkkiyaa na'aa. Adii'eeli Yaahizeera na'aa; Yaahizeeri Mashulaama na'aa; Mashulaami Mashilemiita na'aa; Mashilemiiti Imeera na'aa.
1Chronicles9:13 Barenttu soy asaw kaappotiyaa k'eesatuu itti shaanne laappun s'eetanne usuppun tamma. Hawanttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan ootsanaw danddayiyaa asatuwaa.
1Chronicles9:14 Yerusaalamen de'eedda Leewatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Haashshuuba na'ay Shamaa'e Maraara yara. Hashshuubi Azirik'aama na'aa; Azirik'aami Hashaabiyaa na'aa.
1Chronicles9:15 Haratuu k'ay Bak'ibak'aara
1Chronicles9:16 Haratuu k'ay Nas'oofa asatuwaa mootsatuwaan utteedda Obaadiyaanne Berekiyaa. Obaadi Shamaa'iyaa na'aa; Shamaa'e Galaala na'aa; Galaali Yidutuuna na'aa. Berekii Asa na'aa; Asay Elk'k'aana na'aa.
1Chronicles9:17 Geeshsha Golliyaa penggiyaa naagiyaawanttu Shaaluuma
1Chronicles9:18 Ha yaratuu kase away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa
1Chronicles9:19 Shaaluumi Ebiyaasaafa na'aa K'ore na'aa; I K'oraaha yara asaa. K'oraaha yaratuu kase Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa naageeddawaadan
1Chronicles9:20 Elaazara na'ay Piinihaasi beni wode K'oraaha yaratuu kaappuwaa; Med'inaa Goday aanana de'eedda.
1Chronicles9:21 Mashelemiyaa na'ay Zakkaraasi Gakketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa geliyaa penggiyaa naageedda.
1Chronicles9:22 Penggiyaa naaganaw dooretteeddawanttu ubbaanna laau s'eetanne tammanne laauwaa; hawanttu barenttu mootsan mootsan paydettiide s'aafetteeddino. Unttunttu yaratoo ha aawotetsaa immeeddawanttu Kaatiyaa Daawitanne timbbitiyaa odiyaa Sammeela.
1Chronicles9:23 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles9:24 Oyddu zoozetuun wulahaaninne
1Chronicles9:25 He mootsan de'iyaa unttunttu dabbotuu laappuntsa laappuntsa gallassan laametti naagiide
1Chronicles9:26 Penggiyaa naagiyaa oyddu kaappatuu Leewatuwaa; unttunttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaw
1Chronicles9:27 S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa naagiyaawanttunne k'ay guura guura kariyaa dooyiyaawanttu unttuntta gidiyaa diraw
1Chronicles9:28 Leewatuwaappe amareedawanttu goynniyaa wode go'ettiyaa miishshatoo aawotiino; he miishshatuwaa kare kessiyaa wodenne soo gelissiyaa wode unttunttu paydiino.
1Chronicles9:29 K'ay unttuttuppe ittuu ittuu Geeshsha Golliyaa gidduwaan go'ettiyaa hara miishshatoo
1Chronicles9:30 Shin k'eesatuwaa naanatuwaappe ittuu ittuu sawuwaa likkii likkiide walakkiino.
1Chronicles9:31 K'oraaha yaratuwaappe Shaaluuma bayira na'ay Matiite yarshshuwaa ukitsaa uukkiyaawoo aawotee.
1Chronicles9:32 K'ahaata yara gidiyaa unttunttu dabbatuwaappe amareedawanttu k'ay Sambbatan Sambbatan s'arp'p'eezan wotsiyaa ukitsaa giigissiyaa aawotetsaa oyk'k'eeddino.
1Chronicles9:33 Leewatuu zaratuwaappe amareeda kaappatuu Geeshsha Golliyaan yes's'iyaawantta. K'ammakka gallassikka unttunttu ootsiyaa diraw
1Chronicles9:34 Leewiyaa zaratuwaa soy asaa kaappatuu ubbay hawaappe k'ommonna s'aafetteeddawantta; unttunttu Yerusaalamen de'eeddino.
1Chronicles9:35 Gabaa'oona aawuu Yi'i'eeli Gabaa'oona kataman de'eedda. Aa machchatti suntsay Maa'iko.
1Chronicles9:36 Aa na'ay bayiray Abddoona; Aa naanay haratuu S'uura
1Chronicles9:37 Gadoora

1Chronicles9:40 Yoonataana na'ay Mariiba'aala; Mariiba'aali Mikiyaasa yeleedda.
1Chronicles9:41 Mikiyaasa naanay Pittoona
1Chronicles9:42 Akaazi Yaa'iira yeleedda. Yaa'iiri Alemeeta

1Chronicles10:1 Piliss's'eema asatuu Israa'eeliyaa asatuwaana oletteeddino. Israa'eeliyaa asatuu Piliss's'eema asatuwaa sintsaappe bak'atteedino. Daro Israa'eelatuu Gilbboo'a Deriyan hayk'k'eeddino.
1Chronicles10:2 Piliss's'eema asatuu Saa'oolanne Aa attuma naanaa yederssi gakkiide
1Chronicles10:3 Olay Saa'oola yuuyyi aad'd'iide unetteedda; wonddaafiyaa asatuu Saa'oola demmeedda wode
1Chronicles10:4 Saa'ooli bare ola miishshaa tookkiyaawaa
1Chronicles10:5 Aa ola shaluwaa tookkiyaawe Saa'ooli hayk'k'eeddawaa be'iide
1Chronicles10:6 Hawaadan haniide
1Chronicles10:7 Wombban de'iyaa Israa'eeliyaa asatuu ubbay barenttu olanchchatuu bak'ateeddawaanne Saa'oolinne Aa naanay hayk'k'eeddawaa siseedda wode
1Chronicles10:8 Wonttetsa gallassi Piliss's'eematuu anhatuwaa bollaappe olaa miishshatuwaa k'aari akkanaw yiide
1Chronicles10:9 Unttunttu Saa'oola k'ood'iyaa muuc'eeddinonne Aa ola shaluwaa k'aari akkeeddino. Yaatiide barenttu Eek'atuwaa golleninne barenttu asaa gidduwaan s'oonuwaa awaayana mala
1Chronicles10:10 Unttunttu Saa'oola olaa miishshaa barenttu s'oossatuwaa golletuwaappe ittuwaan wotseeddino; Aa guuggiyaakka barenttu s'oossaa Daagoona Eek'aa Gollen kak'k'eeddino.
1Chronicles10:11 Piliss's'eema asatuu Saa'oola ootseeddawaa ubbaa Gala'aaden de'iyaa Yaabeesha katamaa asatuu siseedda wode
1Chronicles10:12 unttunttu mino asatuu ubbay biide
1Chronicles10:13 Saa'ooli Med'inaa Godaw ammanettibeenna diraw hayk'k'eedda. Med'inaa Godaa k'aalaa I naagibeenna; Med'inaa Godaana zorettiyaawaa aggiide
1Chronicles10:14 
1Chronicles11:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles11:2 Kase Saa'ooli kaatiyaa gidiide de'iyaa wodekka
1Chronicles11:3 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles11:4 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay Yerusaalame katamaa beeddino. He wode Yaabuusa asatuu he sa'aan de'iyaa diraw
1Chronicles11:5 Yaabuusa asatuu Daawita
1Chronicles11:6 Daawite bare olanchchatuwaa
1Chronicles11:7 Daawite he geessuwaan de'eedda; hewaa diraw
1Chronicles11:8 Daawite Miilloppe doommiide
1Chronicles11:9 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday aanana de'iyaa diraw
1Chronicles11:10 Daawita asatuu minotuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino. Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaabaa haasayeeddawaadan
1Chronicles11:11 Daawita asatuu minotuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttuppe heezzatuu loytsi eretteeddawantta. Heezzatuwaappe koyruu Hakimoonappe yeedda Yaashobi'aama; Yaashobi'aami itti gede olan heezzu s'eetu asaa bare tooraan wod'eedda.
1Chronicles11:12 Heezzu mino asatuwaa giddon Aa kaalliide de'iyaawe Ahoohiyaa Dooddo na'aa Elaazara.
1Chronicles11:13 Piliss's'eema asatuu olettanaw Pasddaamima giyaa sa'aa shiik'eedda wode
1Chronicles11:14 
1Chronicles11:15 Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu Rafayma Wombban dunkkaaneedda wode
1Chronicles11:16 He wode Daawite geessuwaa giddon de'ee; Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu c'uguu Beeteleheemen de'ee.
1Chronicles11:17 Daawite haatsaa ushanaw amottiide
1Chronicles11:18 Heezzu mino asatuu Piliss's'eema asatuu dunkkaaneedda sa'aa pini biide
1Chronicles11:19 «Hawaa ushanawe taappe haakko! Barenttu shemppuwaa olettiide beedda ha asatuwaa suutsaa taani ushoo? Ayaw gooppe
1Chronicles11:20 Yoo'aaba ishay Abishaayi heezatoo kaappuuwaa. I bare tooraan heezzu s'eetu asatuwaa olettiide wod'eedda. Yaatiide ikka hara heezzatuwaadan eretteedda.
1Chronicles11:21 I laaentso heezatuwaappe aad'd'i bonchchetteedda asaa; I unttunttoo kaappo gideedda. Shin I he koyro heezzatuwaana k'ara gidena.
1Chronicles11:22 K'abs's'i'eelappe yeedda Yoodaahe na'ay Banaayi mino asaa; mino oosatuwaa ootseedda. I laau eretteedda Moo'aabe gadiyaa asatuu wod'eedda. K'ay shachchay dareedda itti gallassi ollaa giddo geliide
1Chronicles11:23 Banaayi geesay ichcheshu wad'aa gakkiyaa Gibs'e gade bitaniyaa adussa wod'eedda. Gibs'e bitaniyaa kushiyan shemayinniyaa wonddarashiyaa keeshshaa tooray de'ee; shin Banaayi gatimaa oyk'k'iide
1Chronicles11:24 Yoodaahe na'ay Banaayi hawantta ootseedda. Aa suntsaykka he heezzatuwaadan eretteedda.
1Chronicles11:25 I hattamatuwaa giddon daro bonchchetteedda; shin I heezzatuwaana gujjetena. Daawite Aa barena naagiyaa olanchchatoo kaappuuwaa keseedda.
1Chronicles11:26 Mino asatuu Yoo'aaba ishaa Asaaheela
1Chronicles11:27 Haroodappe yeedda Shammoota
1Chronicles11:28 Tak'oappe yeedda Ik'k'eesha na'aa Ira
1Chronicles11:29 Huushappe yeedda Sibbakaaya
1Chronicles11:30 Nas'oofappe yeedda Maahiraaya
1Chronicles11:31 Biiniyaama gadiyaan de'iyaa Gib'aa katamaappe yeedda Ribaaya na'aa Ittaaya
1Chronicles11:32 Ga'aasha Zanggaaraa matappe yeedda Huraaya
1Chronicles11:33 Baahiruumappe yeedda Azimaaweeta
1Chronicles11:34 Giizoonappe yeedda Hasheema
1Chronicles11:35 Haaraarappe yeedda Sakaara na'aa Ahi'aama
1Chronicles11:36 Makeerappe yeedda Hefeera
1Chronicles11:37 K'armmeloosappe yeedda Hes'ira
1Chronicles11:38 Naataana ishaa Yuu'eela
1Chronicles11:39 Amoonappe yeedda S'elek'a
1Chronicles11:40 Yatira yara gidiyaa Ira
1Chronicles11:41 Hiitiyaa Uuriyoona
1Chronicles11:42 Roobeela zariyaa gidiyaa Shiiza na'aa Adiina. I Roobeela zaratuwaa kaappuuwaa; aanana ittippe hattamu asatuu de'iino.
1Chronicles11:43 Hara mino asatuu k'ay Maa'ika na'aa Hanaana
1Chronicles11:44 Ashttaarappe yeedda Ooziyaana
1Chronicles11:45 Shiimira na'aa Yidi'eelanne Aa ishaa Tiis'appe yeedda Yooha
1Chronicles11:46 Mahaawaappe yeedda Eli'eela
1Chronicles11:47 S'ooba katamaappe yeedda Eli'eela
1Chronicles12:1 Daawite K'iisa na'aa Saa'oolappe bak'ati biide
1Chronicles12:2 Unttunttu wonddaafiyaa asatuwaa; K'ay barenttu ushechcha kushiyaaninne haddirssa kushiyan shuchchaa yambbarshshan olanaw danddayiino. Unttunttu Biiniyaama zariyaa gidiyaa Saa'oola dabbotuwaa.
1Chronicles12:3 Unttunttu kaappuu Ahi'eezera; Ahi'eezerappe simmina Yo'aasha; unttunttu Gibappe yeedda Shamaa'a naanaa. Haratuu k'ay Azimaaweeta naanaa gidiyaa Yizi'eelanne Pelees'a
1Chronicles12:4 hattamatuwaa giddon wolk'k'aama gidiide
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzaaya
1Chronicles12:6 K'oraaha yaratuwaa gidiyaa Elk'k'aana
1Chronicles12:7 Gadoorappe yeedda Yirohaama naanaa Yo'eelanne Zabaadiyaa.
1Chronicles12:8 Daawite mela biittaan de'iyaa bak'ati attiyaa sa'aan utti de'ishshin
1Chronicles12:9 Unttunttu kaappuu Es'eera; laaentsuu Obaadiyaa; heezzentsuu Eli'aaba;
1Chronicles12:10 oyddentsuu Mishimaanna; ichcheshentsu Ermaasa;
1Chronicles12:11 usuppuntsuu Attaaya; laappuntsuu Eli'eela;
1Chronicles12:12 hosppuntsuu Yohanaana; udduppuntsuu Elzzabaada;
1Chronicles12:13 tammantsuu Ermaasa; tammanne ittentsu Maakibanaaya.
1Chronicles12:14 Hawanttu Gaade zariyaa olanchchatoo kaappatuwaa. Unttunttuppe laafiyaawanttu S'eetoo kaappatuwaa; minniyaawanttu sha''aa kaappatuwaa.
1Chronicles12:15 Yorddaanoosa Shaafay
1Chronicles12:16 Biiniyaama zaratuwaappenne Yihudaa zaratuwaappe amareeda asatuu Daawitakko geessuwaa yeeddino.
1Chronicles12:17 Daawite unttunttunna gaketanaw kesiide
1Chronicles12:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles12:19 Daawite Piliss's'eematuwaanna ittippe gidiide
1Chronicles12:20 Daawite S'ik'ilaaga katamaa simmishin
1Chronicles12:21 Unttunttu ubbaykka s'alanne wolk'k'aama asaa gidiyaa diraw
1Chronicles12:22 Daawita olanchchatuu S'oossaa olanchchatuwaadan c'oraana gakkanaw
1Chronicles12:23 Med'inaa Goday haasayeeddawaadan Saa'oola kawutetsaa Daawitaw zaaranaw olaw danc'c'i giigiide
1Chronicles12:24 Gonddalliyaanne tooraa oyk'k'iide
1Chronicles12:25 Simoona zariyaappe olaw giigeedda s'alanne wolk'k'aama olanchchatuu laappun shaanne itti s'eeta.
1Chronicles12:26 Leewiyaa zariyaappe oyddu shaanne usuppun s'eeta.
1Chronicles12:27 Aaroona zaratuwaa kaappuu Yoodaaha; Yoodaahena ittippe heezzu shaanne laappun s'eetu asatuu de'iino.
1Chronicles12:28 K'ay S'aadook'e yalaga s'alanne wolk'k'aama asaa; S'aadook'a aawuwaa golliyaa asaappe laatamanne laau kaappatuu aanana ittippe de'iino.
1Chronicles12:29 Biiniyaama zariyaa gideedda Saa'oola dabbotuu heezzu shaa asaa. Shin Biiniyaama zariyaappe dariyaa bagga Asay Saa'oola golliyaa asaw he wodii gakkanaw ammanettiyaawantta.
1Chronicles12:30 Efireema zariyaappe barenttu aawotuwaa golliyaa asan eretteedda s'alanne wolk'k'aama asatuu laatamu shaanne hosppun s'eeta.
1Chronicles12:31 Daawita kaateyanaw baanaw dooretteedda Minaase zariyaappe baggatuu tammanne hosppun shaa.
1Chronicles12:32 K'ay Israa'eeliyaa Asay ayaa ootsanaw bessintto
1Chronicles12:33 Ola shaluwaa ubbaa oyk'k'iide
1Chronicles12:34 Nifttaaleema zariyaappe itti shaa kaappatuu de'iino; gonddalliyaanne tooraa oyk'k'iyaa hattamanne laappun shaa asatuu unttunttunna ittippe de'iino.
1Chronicles12:35 Daana zariyaappe olaw giigeedda asatuu laatamanne hosppun shaanne usuppun s'eeta.
1Chronicles12:36 Olaw kesanaw Aaseera zariyaappe giigeeddawanttu oytamu shaa.
1Chronicles12:37 Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe hefintsa away doliyaa baggan de'iyaa Roobeela zariyaappe
1Chronicles12:38 Ha olaw giigeedda olanchchatuu ubbay Daawita Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaateyanaw barenttu k'ofaa k'achchiide
1Chronicles12:39 Unttunttu dabbotuu unttunttoo koshshiyaawaa giigissi wotseedda diraw
1Chronicles12:40 Israa'eeliyaa asaw nashechchaa gidiyaa diraw
1Chronicles13:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles13:2 Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa
1Chronicles13:3 Saa'ooli kaateteedda wode sheneko giina
1Chronicles13:4 Daawite odeedda yewuu suure gideedda diraw
1Chronicles13:5 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles13:6 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay kiruubetuwaappe gidduwaan bare kawutetsaa araataa bolla utteedda S'oossaa suntsan s'eesetteedda S'oossaa Taabootaa ahanaw Yihudaa biittan de'iyaa Ba'aala geetettiyaa K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima katamaa beeddino.
1Chronicles13:7 S'oossaa Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa boray goochchiyaa ooratsa gaariyan wotsiide
1Chronicles13:8 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay diitsaanne maasink'k'uwaa diis's'iidde
1Chronicles13:9 Unttunttu Kiidoona giyaa saan de'iyaa katsaa bukkiyaa udduma gakkiyaa wode
1Chronicles13:10 Aa kushii Taabootaa bochcheedda diraw
1Chronicles13:11 Med'inaa Goday hank'k'ettiide Uuza wod'eedda diraw
1Chronicles13:12 He gallassi Daawite S'oossaw yayyeedda diraa
1Chronicles13:13 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles13:14 S'oossaa Taabootay Obeedi-Eedooma gollen Aa golliyaa asaana heezzu aginaa gameedda. Med'inaa Goday Aa golliyaa asaanne aw de'iyaa ubbabaa anjjeedda.
1Chronicles14:1 S'iiroosa Kaatii Kiiraami Daawitaw asatuwaa kiitteedda. Kiitetteedda asatuwaana golliyaa kees's'anaadan zigaa mudetsaanne k'ay shuchchaa massiyaawanttanne anaas'etuwaa aw yeddeedda.

1Chronicles16:6 K'eesiyaa Banaayinne Yahaa'i'eeli S'oossaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa sintsan ubbaa wode s'urumbbaa punnanaw suntsetteeddino.
1Chronicles16:7 He gallassi Daawite kasetiide

1Chronicles16:9 Aa sabbite; galataa yetsaa aw yes's'ite. Aa malalissiyaa kiitaa ubbaa odite.
1Chronicles16:10 Aa geeshsha suntsan c'eek'ettite; Med'inaa Godaa koyiyaawanttu wozanatuu nashettino.

1Chronicles16:24 Kawutetsatuu gidduwaan Aa bonchchuwaa

1Chronicles17:8 Neeni beedda sa'aa ubbaan taani neenana ittippe gidaad; ne morkkatuwaa ubbaa ne sintsaappe diggaad. Hai simmi taani ha sa'aan eretteedda wolk'k'aama asatuwaappe suntsaadan ne suntsaa gitayana.

1Chronicles17:10 
1Chronicles17:11 Ne laytsay wurina

1Chronicles17:13 Taani aw aawuwaa gidana; ikka taw na'aa gidana. Neeppe kase kaateteedda Saa'oolappe taani ta siik'uwaa akka diggeeddawaadan
1Chronicles17:14 Taani Aa ta asaa bollanne ta kawutetsaa bolla med'inaw suntsana; Aa kawutetsaa araataykka med'inaw min ek'k'ana» yaagee› yaaga» yaageedda.

1Chronicles17:20 «Abeet Med'inaa Godaw

1Chronicles17:22 Neeni ne asaa Israa'eeliyaa med'inaw nebaa ootsaadda. Abeet Med'inaa Godaw

1Chronicles22:9 Be'a; new itti saro na'i yelettanawaa. Aa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa morkkatuwaa ubbaanna taani Aa saro ootsana. Aa suntsay Solomona; taani I kaateteedda laytsan Israa'eeliyaa asaw sarotetsaanne woppaa immana.
1Chronicles22:10 I ta suntsaw Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'ana. I ta na'aa gidanawaa; taanikka aw aawuwaa gidana. Aa kawutetsaa araataa Israa'eelan med'inaw minissa essana› yaageedda.
1Chronicles22:11 «Haikka ta na'aw
1Chronicles22:12 Med'inaa Goday neena Israa'eeliyaa asaa bolla kaatiyaa ootsiyaa wode
1Chronicles22:13 Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana Israa'eeliyaa azazeedda azazuwaanne wogaa naagiyaawaa gidooppe
1Chronicles22:14 Taani daro tuggaan Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'anaw heezzu shaanne oyddu s'eetu kiilo giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aanne hattamanne oyddu shaa kiilo giraame dees'iyaa biraa shiishshay; k'ay zaway baynna nahaasiyaanne birataa shiishshay; k'aykka mitsaanne shuchchaa giigissaad. Gidoppekka
1Chronicles22:15 Ne matan daro oosanchchatuu de'iino; shuchchaa k'oo'iyaawanttunne massiyaawanttu

1Chronicles22:18 «Med'inaa Goday hinttenttu S'oossay hinttenana de'enneeyye? I hinttentta ubba saanna shemppissibeennee? Ha biittan de'iyaawantta I ta kushiyan aatsi immeedda diraw
1Chronicles22:19 Haikka Med'inaa Godaa hinttenttu S'oossaa koyanaw hinttenttu wozanaanne hinttenttu shemppuwaa immite. Med'inaa Godaa suntsaw kees'etteedda Geeshsha Golliyaa giddon Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaanne S'oossaa geeshsha miishshatuwaa ahiidde wotsanaadan
1Chronicles23:1 Daawite c'imeedda wode
1Chronicles23:2 Daawite Israa'eeliyaa kaaletsiyaawantta ubbatuwaa
1Chronicles23:3 Hattamu laytsanne hewaappe bollanna de'iyaa Leewatuu paydetteeddino; unttunttu ubbaanna hattamanne hosppun shaa attuma asaa gideeddino.
1Chronicles23:4 Hawanttu giddoppe Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaw aawotiyaa laatamanne oyddu shaatuwaa kaatii wotseedda. K'ay kaappatuwaanne pirddaa yeletatuwaa usuppun shaatuwaa wotseedda.
1Chronicles23:5 Penggiyaa naagiyaawantta oyddu shaatuwaa wotseedda. Med'inaa Godaa galatanaw Daawite med'd'eedda yetsaa miishshan S'oossaa galatiyaawantta oyddu shaatuwaa wotseedda.
1Chronicles23:6 Daawite Leewii yeleedda attuma naanaa Gershshoona
1Chronicles23:7 Gershshooni yeleedda attuma naanay La'idaananne Shima.
1Chronicles23:8 La'idaana attuma naanay heezza; unttunttukka Yihi'eela
1Chronicles23:9 Shima attuma naanay heezzatuu Shalomoota
1Chronicles23:10 Shima attuma naanay oyddatuu
1Chronicles23:11 Yaahati bayiraa Ziizi teefaa shin Yi'uushawunne Barii'assi naanay darenna; hewaa diraw
1Chronicles23:12 K'ahaata naanay oyddatuu Amiraama
1Chronicles23:13 Amiraama attuma naanay Aaroonanne Musa. Aaroonenne Aa zeretsay ubbaappe aad'd'o geeshsha gideeddawaa S'oossaw dumayanaadan dummateeddino. Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa sintsan is'aanaa c'uwayanaw
1Chronicles23:14 S'oossaa asaa gidiyaa Muse naanay Leewiyaa zaratuwaanna gatso paydetteeddino.
1Chronicles23:15 Muse naanay Gershshoomanne Eleezera.
1Chronicles23:16 Gershshooma naanatuwaa giddoppe kaappuu Shabu'eela.
1Chronicles23:17 Eleezera na'ay Rahaabi kaappuwaa. Eleezaraw hara na'i baawa; shin Rahaabiyaa naanay loytsi c'ora.
1Chronicles23:18 Yis'ihaara naanatuwaa kaappuu Shalomiita.
1Chronicles23:19 Kebroone na'ay bayiray Yiriiya; laaentsuu Amaariyaa; heezzentsuu Yahaazi'eela; oyddentsuu Yik'ami'aama.
1Chronicles23:20 Uuzi'eela na'ay bayiray Mikiyaasa; laaentsuu Yishiyaa.
1Chronicles23:21 Maraara naanay Maahilanne Musha. Maahila naanay Elaazaranne K'iisha.
1Chronicles23:22 Elaazare mac'c'a naanatuwaappe attina
1Chronicles23:23 Musha naanay heezzatuu Maahila
1Chronicles23:24 Leewiyaa yeletaan barenttu zariyaaninne gollen barenttu suntsan mazggabetteeddawanttu hawantta; laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollanna de'iyaa Leewiyaa zaratuu ubbay Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan ootseeddino.
1Chronicles23:25 Daawite
1Chronicles23:26 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles23:27 Daawite wurssetsan azazeedda azazuwaadankka laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollanna de'iyaa Leewatuu paydetteeddino.
1Chronicles23:28 Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan ootsiyaa Aaroona zeretsatuwaa maaddino. S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan laau dabaabatuwaan ootsino; Miyiyaan de'iyaa kifiletuwaan
1Chronicles23:29 K'ay unttunttu S'oossaa sintsan wotsiyaa oytsaw
1Chronicles23:30 K'ay unttunttu ubbaa gallassi wonttanne omarssi
1Chronicles23:31 
1Chronicles23:32 Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaanne Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Sa'aa naaganaadaaninne Aaroona zeretsatuwaappe garssana unttuntta maaddanaadan Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa aawotetsay Leewatoo imetteedda.
1Chronicles24:1 Aaroona zaratuwaa oosuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Aaroona naanay Nadaaba
1Chronicles24:2 Shin Nadaabinne Abiihu na'aa yelennaan barenttu aawuwaappe kase hayk'k'eeddino. Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles24:3 Daawite Aaroona zeretsaa unttunttu oosuwaadan oosuwaadan c'itan shaakkeedda. Elaazara yaraappe S'aadook'inne Itaamaara yaraappe Abimeleeki Daawita maaddeeddino.
1Chronicles24:4 Elaazara yaratuu 16 c'uguwaan shaakettina
1Chronicles24:5 Elaazara yaratuu giddoninne Itaamaara yaratuu giddon Geeshsha Golliyaw kaappatuunne S'oossaa oosoo kaappatuu de'iyaa diraw
1Chronicles24:6 Elaazara yaratuunne Itaamaara yaratuu barenttu kaalaa saamaa kesseeddino. Leewiyaa zariyaa gideedda Nataani'eela na'ay s'aafii Shamaa'e unttuntta mazggabeedda. Kaatiinne Aa kaappatuu
1Chronicles24:7 Ha asatuu saamaa kessina
1Chronicles24:8 Heezzentsuu Hariima gakkeedda. Oyddentsuu Sa'oorima gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:9 Ichcheshentso Malkkiyaa gakkeedda. Usuppuntsuu Miyaamiina gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:10 Laappuntsuu Hak'k'oos'a gakkeedda. Hosppuntsuu Abiiya gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:11 Udduppuntsuu Iyyaasa gakkeedda. Tammantsuu Shakaaniyaa gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:12 Tammanne ittentsu Eliyaashiba gakkeedda. Tammanne laaentsuu Yaak'iima gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:13 Tammanne heezzentsuu Huppa gakkeedda. Tammanne oyddentsuu Yesheka'aaba gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:14 Tammanne ichcheshentsu Bilgga gakkeedda. Tammanne usuppuntsuu Imeera gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:15 Tammanne laappuntsuu Heziira gakkeedda. Tammanne hosppuntsuu Happis'ees'a gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:16 Tammanne udduppuntsuu Pataahiyaa gakkeedda. Laatamantsuu Yihezk'k'eela gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:17 Laatamanne ittentsu Yaakiina gakkeedda. Laatamanne laaentsuu Gamuula gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:18 Laatamanne heezzentsuu Dalaaya gakkeedda. Laatamanne oyddentsuu Ma'aaziyaa gakkeedda.
1Chronicles24:19 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa S'oossay unttunttu mayza aawuwaa Aaroona bagganna azazeeddawaadan
1Chronicles24:20 Leewiyaa zaratuwaa kaappatuu haratuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Yehidaayi Shabu'eela baggana Amiraama zariyaa.
1Chronicles24:21 Yishe Rahaabiyaa zarii kaappuwaa.
1Chronicles24:22 Yahaati Shalomiita baggana Yis'ihaara zariyaa.
1Chronicles24:23 Yiriiyi
1Chronicles24:24 Shamiiri Mikiyaasa baggana Uuzi'eela zariyaa.
1Chronicles24:25 Zakkaraasi Mikiyaasa ishaa Yishiyaa baggana Uuzi'eela zariyaa.
1Chronicles24:26 Maahili
1Chronicles24:27 Yaa'iziyaa naanay heezzatuu Shohaama
1Chronicles24:28 Maahila naanay laaatuu Elaazaranne K'iisha. Elaazaraw attuma na'i baawa.
1Chronicles24:29 K'iishaw Yiraahima'eela geetettiyaa itti attuma na'ay de'ee.
1Chronicles24:30 Mushaw Maahila
1Chronicles24:31 Kase unttunttu dabbotuu
1Chronicles25:1 Daawitenne ola gadaawatuu Asaafa naanatuwaappe
1Chronicles25:2 Asaafa naanay Zakkuura
1Chronicles25:3 Yidutuuna naanay Gadaaliyaa
1Chronicles25:4 Hemaana naanay Buk'k'iyaa
1Chronicles25:5 Hawanttu ubbay kaatiyaw timbbitiyaa odiyaa Hemaana naanaa. S'oossay kase immana geeddawaadan
1Chronicles25:6 Hawanttu ubbay Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan daalaa k'aatsanaw
1Chronicles25:7 Hawanttu laatamanne oyddu asatuu daro eray de'iyaa asatuwaa. Unttunttu dabbotuu; Med'inaa Godaw yetsan looheeddawantta; unttunttu ubbaanna laau s'eetanne hosppun tammanne hosppuna.
1Chronicles25:8 Unttunttu barenttu kiitaa shaakki eranaw daruu guutsay
1Chronicles25:9 Koyro saamay Asaafa na'aa Yooseefo gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:10 Heezzantso saamay Zakkuura gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:11 Oyddentso saamay S'ara gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:12 Ichcheshentso saamay Nataaniyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:13 Usuppuntsa saamay Buk'k'iyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:14 Laappuntsa saamay Asaari'eela gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:15 Hosppuntsa saamay Yishaa'iyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:16 Udduppuntsa saamay Mataaniyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:17 Tammantsa saamay Shima gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:18 Tammanne ittentsiyaa saamay Uuzi'eela gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:19 Tammanne laaentsa saamay Hashaabiyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:20 Tammanne heezzentsa saamay Shabu'eela gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:21 Tammanne oyddentso saamay Matiitiyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:22 Tammanne ichcheshantsa saamay Yaarimoota gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:23 Tammanne usuppuntsa saamay Hanaaniyaa gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:24 Tammanne laappuntsa saamay Yoshibak'aasha gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:25 Tammanne hosppuntsa saamay Hanaana gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:26 Tammanne udduppuntsa saamay Malloota gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:27 Laatamantsa saamay Eli'aata gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:28 Laatamanne ittentsiyaa saamay Hotiira gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:29 Laatamanne laaentsa saamay Giddaltta gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:30 Laatamanne heezzentsa saamay Maahizi'aata gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles25:31 Laatamanne oyddentso saamay Romamtti'eezera gakkeedda; I
1Chronicles26:1 Geeshsha Golliyaa penggiyaa naagiyaawanttu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Koyruu K'oraaha yaraappe Asaafa baggana K'ore na'aa Mashelemiyaa.
1Chronicles26:2 Mashelemee laappun attuma naanaa yeleedda; unttunttu barenttu yeletaa maaran Zakkaraasa
1Chronicles26:3 Elaama
1Chronicles26:4 S'oossay Obeedi-Eedoomakka anjjeedda diraw
1Chronicles26:5 Ami'eela
1Chronicles26:6 K'ay Obeedi-Eedooma na'ay Shamaa'ekka usuppun attuma naanaa yeleedda; unttunttu mino asaa gideedda diraw
1Chronicles26:7 Shamaa'iyaa naanay Ootina
1Chronicles26:8 Hawanttu ubbatuu Obeedi-Eedooma zeretsaa; unttunttu
1Chronicles26:9 Mashelemiyaw mino naanaynne mino dabbotuu de'iino; unttunttu ubbaanna tammanne hosppuna.
1Chronicles26:10 Maraara yaraappe Hoosayyookka naanay de'iino. Shiimiri bayira na'aa gidenna; shin Aa aawuu Aa kaappuuwaa ootseedda.
1Chronicles26:11 Aa ishatuu Hilk'k'iyaa
1Chronicles26:12 Geeshsha Golliyaa penggiyaa naagiyaawanttu barenttu golliyaa asaa kaappatuwaanna
1Chronicles26:13 Penggiyaa ubbaa naaganaw barenttu gollen gollen guutsay gitay saamaa kesseeddino.
1Chronicles26:14 Away doliyaa Penggiyaa giyaa penggiyaa naagiyaa saamay Sheleemiyaa gakkeedda. Loo zoriyaa Aa na'aa Zakkaraasa Huup'issa Penggiyaa geetettiyaa penggiyaa naagiyaa saamay gakkeedda.
1Chronicles26:15 Obeedi-Eedooma Gedissa Penggiyaa giyaa penggiyaa naagiyaa saamay gakkeedda. Aa naanaa miishshaa minjjiyaa golliyaa naagiyaa saamay gakkeedda.
1Chronicles26:16 Awaay wulliyaa Penggiyaanne bolla ogiyaa baggana de'iyaa Shalekoota Penggiyaa geetettiyaa penggetuwaa naagiyaa saamay Shufiimanne Hoosa gakkeedda. Naagu kaallan kaallan gakkee.
1Chronicles26:17 Gallassan gallassan away doliyaa baggana usuppun Leewatuu naagiino. Huup'issa baggana oyddatuu naagiino. Gedissa baggana oyddatuu naagiino. K'ay laau laau miishshaa minjjiyaa golliyaa naagiino.
1Chronicles26:18 Awaay wulliyaa baggana dabaabaw afiyaa ogiyaa oyddatuu naagiino. K'ay dabaabaa gidduwaa laaatuu naagiino.
1Chronicles26:19 Simmi k'oraaha yaratoonne Maraara yaratoo imetteedda pengge naago kiitay hawaa.
1Chronicles26:20 Akiiya geetettiyaa Leewii S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa shaluwaanne S'oossaw dummayi wotseedda imotaa naaganaw suntsetteedda.
1Chronicles26:21 Gershshoona na'aa La'idaana yaraappe Yihi'eeli dumma dumma golliyaa asaw aawotee.
1Chronicles26:22 Yihi'eela naanay Zetaamanne Aa ishaa Yuu'eela; unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa miishshaa naaganaw suntsetteeddino.
1Chronicles26:23 Amiraama yaratoo
1Chronicles26:24 Muse na'aa Gershshooma yara gidiyaa Shabu'eeli Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa miishshaa naagiyaawanttu kaappatuu bolla suntsetteedda.
1Chronicles26:25 I Gershshooma ishaa Eleezera baggana Shalomiitaw dabbotee. Eleezeri Rahaabiyaa yeleedda; Rahaabii Yishaa'iyaa yeleedda; Yishaa'ii Yoraama yeleedda; Yoraame Ziikira yeleedda; Ziikiri Shalomiita yeleedda.
1Chronicles26:26 Kaatii Daawite
1Chronicles26:27 Ha shaluwaa Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa ooratsanaw dummayi wotseedda asatuu ha miishshaa kase olaappe omooddi wotseeddino.
1Chronicles26:28 K'ay timbbitiyaa odiyaa Sammeeli
1Chronicles26:29 Yis'ihaara yaratuwaappe Kanaanenne Aa naanay Geeshsha Golliyaappe karenna de'iyaa kiitan Israa'eeliyaa asaa ayissanawunne daannatanaw suntsetteeddino.
1Chronicles26:30 Kebroone yaratuwaappe Hashaabeenne Aa dabbotuu
1Chronicles26:31 Kebroone yaratuwaappe kaappotiyaawe Yiriiya. Daawite kaateteedda oytamantso laytsan koyina
1Chronicles26:32 Aawotuwaa golliyaa asaw kaappotiyaa Yiriiya dabbotuu minotuu laau shaanne laappun s'eeta. Kaatii Daawite S'oossaa oosuwaa ubbawunne kaatiyaa oosuwaa ubbaw unttunttu Roobeela zaratuwaa biittaa bolla
1Chronicles27:1 Barenttu c'uguwaan c'uguwaan kawutetsaa ayisseedda Israa'eeliyaa golliyaa asatuwaa kaappatuu
1Chronicles27:2 Koyro aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Zabddi'eela na'aa Yaashobi'aama; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee.
1Chronicles27:3 Yaashobi'aami Paareesa zeretsaa; I koyro aginaw olanchchatuu kaappatuwaa gadaawuwaa.
1Chronicles27:4 Laaentso aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Ahoohiyaa Dodaaya; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee. Aappe kaalliyaawe Mik'iloota.
1Chronicles27:5 Heezzantso aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe k'eesiyaa Yoodaahe na'aa Banaaya; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee.
1Chronicles27:6 Banaayi hattamu eretteedda asatuwaa giddon mino asaa gidiide
1Chronicles27:7 Oyddentso aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Yoo'aaba ishaa Asaaheela; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee. Aa kotan Aa na'ay Zabaade kaappoteedda.
1Chronicles27:8 Ichcheshentso aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Yis'ihaara yaraappe Shamihuuta; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee.
1Chronicles27:9 Usuppuntsa aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Tak'oappe yeedda Ik'k'eesha na'aa Ira; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee.
1Chronicles27:10 Laappuntsa aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Efireema zariyaappe Piloonappe yeedda Helees'a; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee.
1Chronicles27:11 Hosppuntsa aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Huushappe yeedda Sibbakaaya; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee. Sibbakaayi Yihudaa zarenne Zaraaha yara.
1Chronicles27:12 Udduppuntsa aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Biiniyaama zare gideedda Anatootiyaa Abi'eezera; Aa c'uguwaan laatamanne oyddu shaa Asay de'ee.
1Chronicles27:13 Tammantsa aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Nas'oofappe yeedda
1Chronicles27:14 Tammanne ittentsiyaa aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Piraatoonappe yeedda
1Chronicles27:15 Tammanne laa'entso aginaan kesiyaa c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawe Nas'oofappe yeedda
1Chronicles27:16 Israa'eeliyaa zeretsaa ayissanaw suntsetteeddawanttu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Roobeela zariyaa ayissiyaawe Ziikira na'aa Eleezera. Simoona zariyaa ayissiyaawe Maa'ika na'aa Shafaas'iyaa.
1Chronicles27:17 Leewiyaa zariyaa ayissiyaawe K'amu'eela na'aa Hashaabiyaa. Aaroona zariyaa ayissiyaawe S'aadook'a.
1Chronicles27:18 Yihudaa zariyaa ayissiyaawe Daawita ishaa Eeliha. Yisaakoora zariyaa ayissiyaawe Mikaa'eela na'aa Omira.
1Chronicles27:19 Zaabiloona zariyaa ayissiyaawe Obaadiyaa na'aa Yishimaa'iyaa. Nifttaaleema zariyaa ayissiyaawe Aziri'eela na'aa Yaarimoota.
1Chronicles27:20 Efireema zariyaa ayissiyaawe Azaaziyaa na'aa Hoshee'a. Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe away wulliyaa baggan de'iyaa Minaase zaratuwaappe bagga ayissiyaawe Padaaya na'aa Yuu'eela.
1Chronicles27:21 Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe away doliyaa bagga Gala'aaden de'iyaa Minaase zaratuwaappe bagga ayissiyaawe Zakkaraasa na'aa Idda. Biiniyaama zariyaa ayissiyaawe Abaneera na'aa Ya'isi'eela.
1Chronicles27:22 Daana zariyaa ayissiyaawe Yirohaama na'aa Azaari'eela. Hawanttu Israa'eeliyaa zeretsaa ayissiyaawantta.
1Chronicles27:23 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa asaa saluwaa s'oolinttiyaadan c'orissana geedda diraw
1Chronicles27:24 S'aruuyi na'ay Yoo'aabe asaa payduwaa doommeedda; shin paydi wurssibeenna. Asaa paydeedda gaasuwaan S'oossay Israa'eeliyaa asaa bolla hank'k'etteedda. Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles27:25 Kaatiyaa miishshaa minjjiyaa sa'aw aawotiyaawe Adii'eela na'aa Azimaaweeta. Gas'ariyan
1Chronicles27:26 Biittaa goshiyaa goshshanchchatuwaa bolla aawotiyaawe Kaluuba na'aa Eezira.
1Chronicles27:27 Woynniyaa turaa sa'atoo aawotiyaawe Raamappe yeedda Shima. Woynniyaa eessaa minjjiyaa sa'aw aawotiyaawe Shafaamappe yeedda Zabdda.
1Chronicles27:28 Away wulliyaa bagga Geziyan de'iyaa wogarawunne unttunttoo aawotiyaawe Gedeerappe yeedda Ba'aalihanaana. Zayitiyaa minjjiyaa sa'aw aawotiyaawe Yo'aasha.
1Chronicles27:29 Saaroona Dembban heemettiyaa miizzaw aawotiyaawe Saarooniyaa Shiis'iraaya. Wombban hemettiyaa miizzaw aawotiyaawe Adilaaya na'aa Shafaas'a.
1Chronicles27:30 Gaalotoo aawotiyaawe Isimaa'eeliyaa Obiila. Haretoo aawotiyaawe Meronootiyaa Yehidaaya.
1Chronicles27:31 Dorssatoonne deeshshatoo aawotiyaawe Aggaari zariyaappe Yaaziiza. Hawanttu ubbay Daawita ak'uwaa bolla aawoteedawantta.
1Chronicles27:32 Daawita aawuwaa ishay Yoonataani s'aafii
1Chronicles27:33 Akis'oofeeli k'ay kaatiyaa zoriyaawaa. Arkkiyaa Hushaayi kaatii siik'iyaa asaa.
1Chronicles27:34 Akis'oofeeli hayk'k'ina
1Chronicles28:1 Israa'eeliyaa kaappatuu ubbay Yerusaalamen shiik'anaadan Kaatii Daawite azazeedda; hewaa diraw
1Chronicles28:2 Kaatii Daawite denddi ek'k'iide
1Chronicles28:3 Shin S'oossay taana
1Chronicles28:4 Taani Israa'eeliyaa bolla med'inaw kaatetanaadan
1Chronicles28:5 Med'inaa Goday taw c'ora naanaa immeedda; ta naanaa ubbaappe Med'inaa Godaa kawutetsaa araatan uttiide
1Chronicles28:6 «S'oossay taana
1Chronicles28:7 I hai ootsiyaawaadan sintsappekka ta azazuwaanne ta higgiyaa minniide naagooppe
1Chronicles28:8 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles28:9 «Solomona
1Chronicles28:10 Haikka Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'anaw Med'inaa Goday neena dooreeddawaa dogoppa. Minnaade kiitaa kiiteta» yaageedda.
1Chronicles28:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles28:12 K'aykka Daawite aw Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa dabaabaa kees's'anaw bare k'ofaan de'iyaa halchchuwaa
1Chronicles28:13 Hewaadankka Daawite k'eesatuu nne Leewatuu c'ugotuu barenttu kiitaa ootsana maaraa
1Chronicles28:14 K'aykka Daawite hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteedda dumma dumma miishshatuwaa med'd'anaw woyssa keeshshaa dees'iyaa work'k'aanne woyssa keeshshaa dees'iyaa biraa koshshintto s'aafiide
1Chronicles28:15 Hewanttukka
1Chronicles28:16 S'oossaa sintsan ukitsaa wotsiyaa work'k'aa s'arp'p'eezatuwaa
1Chronicles28:17 work'k'aa oyk'k'iyaawaa
1Chronicles28:18 is'aanaa c'uwayiyaa geeshsha work'k'aa saas'iniyaa. Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa bolla barenttu k'efiyaa mic'c'iide kammiyaa
1Chronicles28:19 Daawite
1Chronicles28:20 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles28:21 S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa oosuwaa ubbaw k'eesatuu nne Leewatuu suntsetti utteeddino. Kushiyaa hiillaa eray de'iyaa Asay ubbay neena oosuwaa ubbaan maaddana. Kaappatuunne Asay ubbay new ubbabankka azazettana» yaageedda.
1Chronicles29:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Chronicles29:2 Taani taw de'iyaa wolk'k'aa keeshshaa ta S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaw work'k'aan oosettanabaw work'k'aa
1Chronicles29:3 Ta S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa taani loytsa siik'iyaa diraw
1Chronicles29:4 Geeshsha Golliyaa godaa mayzzanaw s'eetu shaa kiilo giraame dees'iyaa geeshsha work'k'aanne laau s'eetanne oytamu shaa kiilo giraame dees'iyaa geeshsha biraa immaad.
1Chronicles29:5 Kushiyaa hiillatuu ootsana oosuwaa ubbaw
1Chronicles29:6 Israa'eeliyaa golliyaa asatuwaa Kaappatuu
1Chronicles29:7 Unttunttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa oosoo itti s'eetanne laappun tammu shaa kiilo giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aa
1Chronicles29:8 Alo shuchchay de'iyaa Asay ubbay miishshaa naagiyaa Leewiyaa Gershshoona yara gidiyaa Yihi'eela baggana Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa miishshaa minjjiyaa gollew immeedda.
1Chronicles29:9 Asay bare sheniyaan bare kumentsaa wozanaan Med'inaa Godaw immeedda diraw nashetteedda; Kaatii Daawitekka loytsi nashetteedda.
1Chronicles29:10 Hewaa diraw
1Chronicles29:11 Abeet Med'inaa Godaw
1Chronicles29:12 Duretaynne bonchchu neeppe yee; neeni ubbabaa moodasaa. Wolk'k'aynne minotay ne kushiyaanna; neeni asaa ubbaa d'ok'k'issanawunne minisanaw danddayaasa.
1Chronicles29:13 Haikka nu S'oossaw
1Chronicles29:14 «Nuuni hawaa keeshshabaa Immanaw tanne ta asaynne oonee? Ayaw gooppe
1Chronicles29:15 Kase nu aawotuwaa ubbaadan nuunikka ne sintsan betenne imatsaa. Ha sa'aa bollan nu de'uwaa laytsay kuwaadan aad'd'iyaawaa; nuuni hayk'oppe attanaw danddayokko.

1Chronicles29:24 Kaappatuu ubbay

1Chronicles29:26 Isseya na'ay Daawite Israa'eeliyaa ubbaa bolla kaateteedda.
1Chronicles29:27 Daawite Israa'eeliyaa bolla oytamu laytsaa kaateteedda; Kebroonan I laappun laytsaa kaateteedda; Yerusaalamen hattamanne heezzu laytsaa kaateteedda.
1Chronicles29:28 Daawite daro laytsaa de'iide
