2Chronicles3:1 Solomone aawuu Daawite Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Gollii kees'ettana sa'aa Mooriyaa giyaa deriyaan Yerusaalamen giigissi wotseedda. He sa'ay Med'inaa Goday Daawitaw barena besseedda
2Chronicles3:2 Solomone bare kaateteedda oyddentso laytsan
2Chronicles3:3 Solomone S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'anaw baaseeda baasuwaa geesay usuppun tammu wad'aa; gomppay laatamu wad'aa.
2Chronicles3:4 Geeshsha Golliyaa geliyaa sa'aan de'iyaa baranddaa gomppay Geeshsha Golliyaa gomppaakka keeshshaa laatamu wad'aa; geesay laatamu wad'aa. Aa gidduwaa geeshsha work'k'aan sheeshsheedda. 3:4 Laatamu wad'aa: Ibraawetsuu itti s'eetanne laatamu wad'aa gee.
2Chronicles3:5 Wuygge adaraashiyaa s'idiyaa s'alalan lik'i kammeedda; muruta work'k'aan sheeshsheedda; yaatiide zambbaa misiliyaaninne sanssalatan alleek'k'isseeda.
2Chronicles3:6 Geeshsha Golliyaa alo shuchchaan alleek'k'issee; I alleek'k'isseeda work'k'ay Pariwayma gadiyaappe yeedda work'k'aa.
2Chronicles3:7 Maretuwaa
2Chronicles3:8 Solomone Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha sa'aa kees's'eedda. He sa'aa geesay Geeshsha Golliyaa gomppaadan laatamu wad'aa; gomppay laatamu wad'aa. He sa'aa godaa laatamu shaa kiilo giraame s'altta work'k'aan sheeshsheedda.
2Chronicles3:9 Unttunttu go'etteedda misimaarii ichcheshu s'eetanne laappun tammu giraame work'k'aappe med'etteedda. Pook'iyaan de'iyaa kifiletuwaakka work'k'aan sheeshsheedda.
2Chronicles3:10 Solomone Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha Sa'aan laau kiruubetuwaa misiletuwaa massi giigissiide
2Chronicles3:11 He kiruubetuwaa k'efii mic'etteedda
2Chronicles3:12 Laaentso kiruubiyaw koyro k'efii ichcheshu wad'aa gidiide
2Chronicles3:13 Ha laau kiruubetuwaa k'efii mic'etteedda
2Chronicles3:14 Solomone saluwaa malatiyaa mayuwaappe
2Chronicles3:15 Solomone Geeshsha Golliyaa sintsan ittuwaa ittuwaa geesay hattamanne ichcheshu wad'aa aduk'k'iyaa laau tuussatuwaa med'isseedda
2Chronicles3:16 K'ay sanssalataa gitiyaadan med'isseedda
2Chronicles3:17 Tuussatuwaappe ittuwaa Geeshsha Golliyaa sintsan ushechcha baggana

2Chronicles9:1 Saaba kaatata Solomone waariyaa sisaade
2Chronicles9:2 Solomone iza oochcheeddawaa ubbaa odeedda; I iziw birshshennan aappe geemmi atteedabay ayaynne baawa.

2Chronicles9:4 Aa maaddan shiik'iyaa k'umaa

2Chronicles9:7 Ubbaa wode ne sintsan eek'k'iide
2Chronicles9:8 Neenan nashettiidde
2Chronicles9:9 Yaagaade kaatata 4
2Chronicles9:10 (Ofiirappe work'k'aa aheedda
2Chronicles9:11 Kaatii Solomone he sanddaliyaappe Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa
2Chronicles9:12 Kaatii Solomone Saaba kaatata amottaade Aa oochcheeddawaa ubbaa iziw immeedda. Aa aw aheedawaappe daruwaa I iziw immeedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles9:13 Solomone laytsan laytsan akkiyaa work'k'ay laatamanne heezzu shaa kiilo giraame dees'iyaawaa.
2Chronicles9:14 Hewe zalanchchatuwaappe akkeedda k'aras'aanne Araba gadiyaa kaatetuwaa ubbaappenne Israa'eeliyaa gadiyaa mooddiyaawanttuppe akkeedda work'k'aanne biraa gujjennaana.
2Chronicles9:15 Kaatii Solomone laau s'eetu wogga gonddalletuwaa k'os's'eedda work'k'aappe med'isseedda; itti itti gonddalliyan laappun kiilo giraame gidiyaa work'k'ay geleedda.
2Chronicles9:16 K'aykka I heezzu s'eetu k'eeri gonddalletuwaa k'os's'eedda work'k'aappe med'isseedda; itti itti k'eeri gonddalliyan laau kiilo giraame gidiyaa work'k'ay geleedda. Kaatii he gonddalletuwaa Liibaanoosa Wora Golliyaa geetettiyaa gollen wotseedda.
2Chronicles9:17 K'aykka kaatii danggarssaa zaaliyaappe itti wolk'k'aama kawutetsaa araataa med'isseedda
2Chronicles9:18 Kawutaa araatay de'iyaa sa'aa pude kesanaw yed'd'iyaa usuppun ditsatuu de'iino. Gediyaan yed'd'anaw kawutetsaa araatanna gatsiide
2Chronicles9:19 He araataa pude kesiyaa usuppun detsatuwaan ya baggananne ha baggana itti itti gaammuwaa misilii
2Chronicles9:20 Kaatii Solomone ushshaa ushiyaa miishshaa ubbay work'k'aappe oosetteedda; Liibaanoosa Wora Gollen de'iyaa shaluwaa ubbaykka muruta work'k'aappe oosetteedda. Solomone wode biray ubbakka goiyaabaadan paydetti erenna.

2Chronicles9:23 Sa'aan de'iyaa kaatetuu ubbay Aa sintsa aad'd'anawunne S'oossay Aa wozanaan wotseedda aad'd'eeda era sisanaw koyino.

2Chronicles20:3 Yaatina
2Chronicles20:4 Yihudaa Asay ubbay Med'inaa Godaappe maaduwaa koyanaw ittippe shiik'eedda; unttunttu Med'inaa Godaappe maaduwaa koyanaw Yihudaa katamatuwaa ubbaappe yeeddino.
2Chronicles20:5 Yoosaafees'e Yihudaanne Yerusaalame shiik'uwaa giddon
2Chronicles20:6 Hawaadan yaageedda
2Chronicles20:7 Abeet nu S'oossaw

2Chronicles20:9 ‹Nu bolla iitabay
2Chronicles20:10 «Haikka Amoonatuu
2Chronicles20:11 Nuuni ootseeddabaw unttunttu nuw zaareeddabaa be'a. Neeni nuw immeedda laata gadiyaappe unttunttu nuuna yederssanaw yeeddino.
2Chronicles20:12 Abeet nu S'oossaw
2Chronicles20:13 Yihudaa Asay ubbay barenttu k'eeri naanatuwaanna
2Chronicles20:14 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles20:15 S'oossaa Ayyaanay Yahaazi'eela bolla wod'd'ina
2Chronicles20:16 Hinttenttu wontti unttuntta bolla kesite. S'iis'a giyaa pudetsan Yiru'eela mela biittaan de'iyaa zanggaaraa wurssetsan hinttenttu unttuntta demmana.
2Chronicles20:17 Ha olaa olettiyaawanttu hinttentta gidikkita. Hinttenttu sa'aa sa'aa oyk'k'i ek'k'iide
2Chronicles20:18 Yoosaafees'e deemuwaa sa'aa gatsiide goynneedda; hewaaddankka
2Chronicles20:19 K'ahaata yaraappenne K'oraaha yaraappe amareeda Leewatuu ek'k'iide
2Chronicles20:20 Unttunttu guura guuran denddiide

2Chronicles20:22 Unttunttu mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawaanne galatiyaawaa doommeedda wode
2Chronicles20:23 Amoonatuunne Moo'aabatuu Eedoomatuwaa bolla denddiide

2Chronicles20:28 Unttunttu Yerusaalame gakkiide
2Chronicles20:29 Israa'eeliyaa morkkatuwaa Med'inaa Goday allaga biittan de'iyaa kawutetsatuu ubbay siseedda wode
2Chronicles20:30 Yaatiide S'oossay Yoosaafees'aw ubbaa baggana shemppuwaa immeedda diraw
2Chronicles20:31 Yoosaafees'e Yihudaan kaatetiyaa wode
2Chronicles20:32 Yoosaafees'e bare aawuwaa Asaa ogiyaan hametteedda; I he ogiyaappe sheri gibeenna; Med'inaa Godaa sintsan I suurebaa ootseedda.

2Chronicles20:34 Yoosaafees'e haneedda harabay
2Chronicles20:35 Itti wode
2Chronicles20:36 Yaatiide Yoosaafees'e aanana zaliyaa wolk'k'aama markkabatuwaa med'd'anaw mayyetteedda. He markkabatuwaa Ees'iyooni-Gaabira kataman med'isseeddino.

2Chronicles23:1 Laappuntsa laytsan Yoodaahe minniide
2Chronicles23:2 Unttunttu Yihudaa biittaa ubbaa yuuyyiide
2Chronicles23:3 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles23:4 Hinttenttu ootsanaw bessiyaabay hawaa: Sambbata gallassan ha Geeshsha Golliyaa geliyaa k'eesetuwaappenne Leewatuwaappe heezzu kushiyaappe itti kushii penggiyaa naagite;
2Chronicles23:5 k'ay heezzu kushiyaappe itti kushii kaatiyaa gollen de'ite; heezzu kushiyaappe itti kushii k'ay Baasuwaa Penggiyaan de'ite. Asay ubbay Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa dabaabaa shiik'o.
2Chronicles23:6 K'eesetuwaappenne ootsiyaa Leewatuwaappe attina
2Chronicles23:7 «Leewatuu ubbay barenttu ola miishshaa barenttu kushiyan kushiyan oyk'k'iide
2Chronicles23:8 Leewatuunne Yihudaa Asay ubbay k'eesii Yoodaahe azazeeddawaa ubbaa ootseeddino. K'eesii Yoodaahe Sambbatan oosuwaappe kesanaw bessiyaa Leewatuwaa kessiide yeddibeenna. Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles23:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles23:10 Asay ubbay ola miishshaa bare kushiyan bare kushiyan oyk'k'iide
2Chronicles23:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles23:12 Asay wos's'iiddenne kaatiyaa sabbiidde hombboc'iyaawaa Ataala siseedda wode
2Chronicles23:13 Kaatii penggiyaan bare tuussaa matan ek'k'eeddawaa be'aaddu. Kaappatuunne s'urumbbaa punniyaawanttu kaatiyaa matan de'iino; Yihudaa Asay ubbay nashettiidde
2Chronicles23:14 K'eesii Yoodaahe olanchchatuu kaappatuwaa
2Chronicles23:15 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles23:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles23:17 He wode Asay ubbay Ba'aala Eek'aa Golliyaa biide
2Chronicles23:18 Yoodaahe k'eesetuwaanne Leewatuwaa Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa oosoo kaappuwaa ootsiide suntseedda. Unttunttu kiitay Muse higgiyan s'aafetteeddawaadan Med'inaa Godaw s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawaanne Kaatii Daawite odeeddawaadan mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawaanne baalaa bonchchissiyaawaa.
2Chronicles23:19 Higgiyan s'aafetteeddawaadan tuna Asay ittuunne gelennaadan Yoodaahe Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa penggiyaan naagiyaawantta wotseedda.
2Chronicles23:20 Yoodaahe s'eetuwaa kaappatuwaa
2Chronicles23:21 Yaatina Yihudaa Asay ubbay nashetteedda. Ataalla kaatiyaa gollen mashshaan hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles24:1 Yo'aashi kaatetiyaa wode
2Chronicles24:2 K'eesii Yoodaahe de'eedda laytsaa ubbaan Yo'aashi Med'inaa Godaa sintsan suurebaa ootseedda.
2Chronicles24:3 Yoodaahe Yo'aashaw laau mac'c'awantta immeedda; unttunttu aw attuma naanaanne mac'c'a naanaa yeleeddino.

2Chronicles24:5 Yo'aashi k'eesetuwaanne Leewatuwaa shiishshiide
2Chronicles24:6 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles24:7 He iita mishiratto Ataalo kaalliyaa asatuu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa bayzzidiggeedino; unttunttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan de'iyaa geeshsha shaluwaa ubbaa akkiide
2Chronicles24:8 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles24:9 S'oossaa k'oomay Muse mela biittaan de'iidde
2Chronicles24:10 Kaappatuunne Asay ubbay nashettiidde
2Chronicles24:11 Saas'inii Leewatuu baggana kaatiyaa oosanchchatuwaakko gakkina
2Chronicles24:12 He miishshaa kaatiinne Yoodaahe Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa kiitaa wochchanaw suntsetteedda asatoo immiino. Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa ooratsanaw shuchchaa massiyaawanttanne anaas'etuwaa
2Chronicles24:13 Oosanchchatuu S'oossaa Geeshsha Gollii bayeeddawaa min ootsiide
2Chronicles24:14 Oosanchchatuu Geeshsha Golliyaa ooras's'isuwaa poleedda wode
2Chronicles24:15 Yoodaahe loytsi c'immiidde hayk'k'eedda; I hayk'k'iyaa wode Aa laytsay s'eetanne hattama.
2Chronicles24:16 Yoodaahe Israa'eelan S'oossawunne S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaw loobaa ootseedda diraw
2Chronicles24:17 Yoodaahe hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles24:18 Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa barenttu mayza aawotuwaa S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa aggiide
2Chronicles24:19 Asay barekko simmanaadan Med'inaa Goday timbbitiyaa odiyaawantta unttunttukko kiitteedda; timbbitiyaa odiyaawanttu unttunttu bolla markkatteeddino; shin unttunttu sisennan is's'eeddino.
2Chronicles24:20 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles24:21 Hewaappe guyye Asay Aa bolla mak'etteedda. Kaatii unttunttu azazina
2Chronicles24:22 Kaatii Yo'aashi Zakkaraasa aawuu Yoodaahe barew ootseedda keekatetsaa hassayennan aggiide
2Chronicles24:23 He laytsay laamettiyaa wode
2Chronicles24:24 Sooriyaa olanchchatuu payduwaan guutsa; shin Yihudaa Aasi Med'inaa Godaa barenttu aawotuwaa S'oossaa aggeeda diraw
2Chronicles24:25 Sooriyaa olanchchatuu aappe shaakettiyaa wode
2Chronicles24:26 Yo'aasha bolla mak'etteeddawanttu Amoonii Shimaati na'aa Zabaadanne Moo'aabe Shiimiriiti na'aa Yihozabaada.

2Chronicles26:4 Aa aawuu Amesiyaasi ootseeddawaadan
2Chronicles26:5 S'oossaa yashshatetsaa barena tamaarisseedda Zakkaraasi pas'a de'eedda wodiyaan
2Chronicles26:6 Ooziyaane Piliss's'eematuwaanna olettanaw kesiide
2Chronicles26:7 Ooziyaane Piliss's'eematuwaa
2Chronicles26:8 Amoona asatuu Ooziyaanaw giireeddino. Ooziyaane loytsi minneedda diraw
2Chronicles26:9 K'ay Ooziyaane Zooziyaa Penggiyaa matan
2Chronicles26:10 Aw c'ora mehii de'iyaa diraw
2Chronicles26:11 K'aykka Ooziyaanaw olaw giigeedda loytsi daro olanchchatuu de'iino. Olanchchatuu s'aafii Yi'i'eelinne kaappuu Ma'iseeyi olanchchatuu suntsaa mazggobiyaan s'aafeeddino. Unttunttu kaappuu gadaawaa Hanaaniyaa.
2Chronicles26:12 Barenttu aawotuwaa gollew kaappotiyaa mino asatuu laau shaanne usuppun s'eeta.
2Chronicles26:13 Kaatiyaa morkkatuwaanna olettiide
2Chronicles26:14 Ooziyaane olanchchatuu ubbaw gonddalliyaa
2Chronicles26:15 Yerusaalamen de'iyaa kushii hiillaa eriyaa asatuwaa Kaatii Ooziyaane azaziide
2Chronicles26:16 Shin Ooziyaane minneedda wode otoretteedda; Aa kunddetsaw kaaletseedda. Ooziyaane Med'inaa Godaa bare S'oossaa yedeedda; I is'aanaa c'uwayiyaa saas'iniyaan is'aanaa c'uwayanaw Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa geleedda.
2Chronicles26:17 K'eesii Azaariyaasinne Med'inaa Godaa k'eesatuu hosppun tammatuu Aa geeduwaa kaalliide geleeddino; he k'eesatuu mino asatuwaa.
2Chronicles26:18 K'eesetuu Kaatiyaa Ooziyaana teiide
2Chronicles26:19 Shin Ooziyaane is'aanaa c'uwayanaw is'aanaa c'uwayiyaa miishshaa bare kushiyan oyk'k'i uttiide hank'k'etteedda. Ooziyaane k'eesetuwaa hank'k'ettiide
2Chronicles26:20 K'eesiyaa kaappuu Azaariyaasinne hara k'eesatuu ubbay aakko s'eelliyaa wode
2Chronicles26:21 Kaatii Ooziyaane hayana gakkanaasikka he harggiyaana de'eedda; Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa geliyaasaappekka ek'k'eedda. He harggiyaa gaasuwaan dumma gollen barekka de'eedda. He wode Aa na'ay Yo'aataame kaatiyaa gollen de'iide
2Chronicles26:22 Kaatii Ooziyaane haneedda harabaa ubbaa koyroppe wurssetsaa gakkanaw Amoos'a na'ay
2Chronicles26:23 Ooziyaane hayk'k'iidde

2Chronicles27:2 Bare aawuu Ooziyaane ootseeddawaadan

2Chronicles27:4 Yihudaa gezziyaan katamatuwaa kees's'eedda; woray dariyaa deriyaan geesuwaanne adussa gimbbiyaa gimbbeedda.
2Chronicles27:5 Yo'aataame Amoona kaatiyaanna olettiide s'ooneedda. Amoonatuu he laytsi heezzu shaanne oyddu s'eetu kiilo giraame dees'iyaa biraa

2Chronicles28:1 Akaazi kaatetiyaa wode
2Chronicles28:2 I kase de'eedda Israa'eeliyaa kaatetuwaa ogiyaan hametteedda. Ba'aalaw goynnanaadan nahaasiyaa siilisiide
2Chronicles28:3 K'ay Hinnooma Zanggaaraan is'aanaa c'uwayeedda; Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa asaa sintsaappe laaggiide kesseedda asatuwaa de'uwaa wogaa
2Chronicles28:4 Akaazi Asay goynniyaa d'ok'k'a gishuwaan
2Chronicles28:5 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles28:6 Yihudaa Aasi Med'inaa Godaa barenttu mayza aawotuwaa S'oossaa aggeeda diraw
2Chronicles28:7 Efireema zariyaa gidiyaa mino olanchchay Ziikiri kaatiyaa na'aa Ma'iseeya
2Chronicles28:8 Israa'eeliyaa Asay barenttu dabbatuwaappe laau s'eetu shaa mac'c'a asaa
2Chronicles28:9 Med'inaa Godaa suntsan timbbitiyaa odiyaa Odeedda giyaa itti bitanii Samaariyaan de'ee. Odeedi Samaariyaa yiyaa olanchchatuwaanna gaketanaw kesiide
2Chronicles28:10 Haikka Yihudaa asaynne Yerusaalame Asay hinttenttoo mac'c'anne attuma ayiliyaa gidiide
2Chronicles28:11 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles28:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles28:13 Hewaappe
2Chronicles28:14 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles28:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles28:16 He wode Kaatii Akaazi Asoore kaatii barena maaddanaadan kiitaa kiitteedda.
2Chronicles28:17 Ayaw gooppe
2Chronicles28:18 Piliss's'eema asatuu k'ay Yihudaa bargguwaanne Neegeeba woran de'iyaa katamatuwaa olettiide Beeti-Shemesha
2Chronicles28:19 Yihudaa Kaatii Akaazi Yihudaa asaa nagaraa oosisseedda gishshawunne Med'inaa Godaw ammanettibeenna diraw
2Chronicles28:20 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles28:21 Akaazi Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaappe
2Chronicles28:22 Kaatii Akaazi bare huup'iyaw bare tuggaa wode Med'inaa Godaw ammanettena hanotaa kasewaappe gujji gujjiide beedda.
2Chronicles28:23 Barena s'ooneedda Damask'k'o s'oossatoo yarshshiidde
2Chronicles28:24 Akaazi Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa shaluwaa ubbaa itti sa'aa shiishshiide kinchchereetseedda. S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa penggetuwaa gorddeedda. Yaatiide Yerusaalamen ubbasaan barew yarshshiyaa sa'aa esseedda.
2Chronicles28:25 Akaazi hara s'oossatoo is'aanaa c'uwayanaw Yihudaan de'iyaa katamatuwaa ubbaan goynniyaa d'ok'k'a sa'aa med'd'eedda. Yaatiide Med'inaa Godaa bare aawotuwaa S'oossaa hank'k'etseedda.
2Chronicles28:26 Akaazi haneedda harabaynne I ootseeddabay ubbay koyroppe wurssetsaa gakkanaw Yihudaa Kaatetuunne Israa'eeliyaa Kaatetuwaa Taarikiyaa mas'aafan s'aafetti utteedda.
2Chronicles28:27 Akaazi hayk'k'iidde
2Chronicles29:1 Hizk'k'iyaase kaatetiyaa wode
2Chronicles29:2 Aa mayza aawuu Daawite ootseeddawaadan
2Chronicles29:3 Hizk'k'iyaase bare kaateteedda koyro laytsan
2Chronicles29:4 K'eesetuwaanne Leewatuwaa ahissiide
2Chronicles29:5 Hawaadan yaageedda; «Leewatoo
2Chronicles29:6 Ayaw gooppe
2Chronicles29:7 Unttunttu k'ay Geeshsha Golliyaa penggetuwaa gorddeeddino; s'omppiyaakka toysseeddino. Geeshsha Golliyaan Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaw is'aanaa c'uwayibeykkino
2Chronicles29:8 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles29:9 Hewaa gaasuwaan nu aawotuu mashshaan hayk'k'eeddino; nu attuma naanay
2Chronicles29:10 «Med'inaa Godaa hank'k'uu ees's'iyaawe nu bollappe kichchana mala
2Chronicles29:11 Ta naatoo
2Chronicles29:12 He sa'aan de'iyaa Leewatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta: K'ahaata yaraappe Amaasaaya na'aa Mahaatanne Azaariyaasa na'aa Yuu'eela. Maraara yaraappe Abddi na'aa K'iisanne Yihaali'eela na'aa Azaariyaasa. Gershshoona yaraappe Ziimma na'aa Yo'aahanne Yo'aaha na'aa Edeena.
2Chronicles29:13 Els's'aafaana yaraappe Shiimiranne Yi'u'eela. Asaafa yaraappe Zakkaraasanne Mataaniyaa.
2Chronicles29:14 Hemaana yaraappe Yihi'eelanne Shima. Yidutuuna yaraappe Shamaa'iyaanne Uuzi'eela.
2Chronicles29:15 Unttunttu barenttu dabbotuwaa
2Chronicles29:16 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles29:17 Unttunttu koyro aginaan
2Chronicles29:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles29:19 K'ay Kaatii Akaazi kaatetiide de'iyaa wode
2Chronicles29:20 Kaatii Hizk'k'iyaase wonttetsa gallassi guuran denddiide
2Chronicles29:21 Unttunttu kawutetsaa diraw
2Chronicles29:22 K'eesetuu korumatuwaa shukkiide
2Chronicles29:23 Nagaraa yarshshoo haniyaa deeshsha orggetuwaa kaatiyaa sintsanne shiik'eedda asaa sintsa aheeddino; ahina unttunttu ubbay barenttu kushiyaa deeshshatuwaa bolla wotseeddino.
2Chronicles29:24 K'eesetuu deeshshatuwaa shukkiide
2Chronicles29:25 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles29:26 Leewatuu Daawite kase yetsaa yes's'eedda miishshatuwaa oyk'k'ina
2Chronicles29:27 He wode unttunttu s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaadan Hizk'k'iyaase azazeedda. S'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawe doometteedda wode
2Chronicles29:28 S'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawe polettana gakkanaw
2Chronicles29:29 K'eesetuu yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawaa poleedda wode
2Chronicles29:30 Kaatii Daawitenne timbbitiyaa odiyaa Asaafe s'aafeedda galataa mazimuriyaa Med'inaa Godaw yes's'anaadan Kaatii Hizk'k'iyaasinne kaappatuu Leewatuwaa azazeeddino; Leewatuu nashechchan galattiide
2Chronicles29:31 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Chronicles29:32 He shiik'eedda Asay aheedda s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa paydu laappun tammu korumatuwaa
2Chronicles29:33 K'ay ittippetetsaa yarshshotuu usuppun s'eetu korumatuwaanne heezzu shaa dorssatuwaa.
2Chronicles29:34 Shin s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ubbaa shukkiide
2Chronicles29:35 S'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa
2Chronicles29:36 Hewaappe guyyiyaan

2Chronicles30:4 He k'ofay kaatiyaanne shiik'eedda asaw loo k'ofa gideedda.
2Chronicles30:5 Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles30:6 Kaatiinne kaatiyaa kaappatuu azazina

2Chronicles30:11 Gidooppenne

2Chronicles30:13 Laaentso aginaan irshshuu gelibeenna ukitsaa Baalaa bonchchanaw loytsi daro Asay Yerusaalamen shiik'eedda.
2Chronicles30:14 Unttunttu denddiide
2Chronicles30:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan

2Chronicles30:17 He shiik'uwaa giddon geeyibeenna daro asatuu de'iino. Hewaa diraw
2Chronicles30:18 Efireema zariyaappe
2Chronicles30:19

2Chronicles31:3 Med'inaa Godaa higgiyan S'aafetteeddawaadan guuranne omarssi
2Chronicles31:4 Med'inaa Godaa higgiyan s'aafetteeddawaadan
2Chronicles31:5 Hizk'k'iyaase hewaa azazo saannakka

2Chronicles31:17 Barenttu aawotuwaa gollen gollen paydetti utteedda k'eesatookka immeeddino. K'ay laytsay laatamu gakkeeddanne laatamuwaappe bolla gideedda Leewatoo barenttu oosuwaadan oosuwaadan barenttu c'uguwaan c'uguwaan shaakkite paydeteeddawanttu unttunttu gakkiyaawaa shaakki immeeddino.

2Chronicles36:22 Parsse Kaatii K'iiroosi kaateteedda koyro laytsan
2Chronicles36:23 «Parsse Kaatii K'iiroosi hawaadan yaagee; ‹Med'inaa Goday
Ezra1:1 Paarise Kaatii K'iiroosi kaateteedda koyro laytsan
Ezra1:2 «Paarise Kaatii K'iiroosi hawaadan yaagee; ‹Med'ina Goday saluwaa S'oossay sa'aa kawutetsatuwaa ubbaa taw immeedda; k'ay Yihudaan de'iyaa Yerusaalamen taani aw Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'anaadan taana suntseedda.
Ezra1:3 S'oossaa asaa gideedda ooninne yaa bo. Aa S'oossay aanana gido! Hinttenttu Yihudaan de'iyaa Yerusaalame biide
Ezra1:4 Dumma dumma biittan de'iyaa Asay ubbay Ayhudatuwaappe atteedawanttu biraa
Ezra1:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Ezra1:6 K'ay unttunttu shooruwaan de'iyaawanttukka barenttu sheniyaan immeeddawaa bolla gujjiide
Ezra1:7 Hewaa bollakka k'ay Kaatii K'iiroosi Naabukadanas'oore Yerusaalameppe afiide bare s'oossatuwaa gollen wotseedda Med'ina Goda Golliyaa miishshatuwaa immeedda.
Ezra1:8 Paarise Kaatii K'iiroosi miishshatuwaa wotsiyaa golliyaa kaappuwaa Mitiredaatan kesissiiddinne paydissiide
Ezra1:9 Simmeedda miishshaa paydu hawaa: hattamu work'k'aa saanetuwaa
Ezra1:10 work'k'aappe oosetteedda hattamu miishshatuwaa

Ezra5:1 He wodiyaan timbbitiyaa odiyaawanttu Haagenne Iddo na'ay Zakkaraasi Yihudaaninne Yerusaalamen de'iyaa Ayhuda asatoo Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa suntsan timbbitiyaa odeeddino.

Ezra5:7 hawaadan yaagee: «Kaatiyaa Daariyoosa

Ezra5:12 Nu aawotuu saluwaa S'oossaa hank'k'etseedda diraw

Ezra9:1 Ha ubbabay haneeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Ezra9:2 K'ay barenttoonne barenttu naanaw Ayhuda gidenna mac'c'a naanatuwaappe machato ootsiide akkeeddino; hewaappe denddeeddawaan geeshsha zeretsatuu Ayhuda gidenawanttunna walaketteeddino. Kaaletsiyaawanttunne kaappatuu ammanettennawantta gidiide

Ezra9:10 «Shin nu S'oossaw
Ezra9:11 Timbbitiyaa odiyaa ne k'oomatuwaa baggana neeni hawaadan yaagaadda; ‹Hintte laattanaw geliyaa gadii he gadiyaan de'iyaa asaa tunatetsaappe denddeeddawaan tuneedda; ha gas'aappe biide

Ezra9:14 Yaatina
Ezra9:15 Med'ina Godaw
Ezra10:1 Iziri S'oossaa Golliyaa sintsan kunddi yeekkiide woossiyaa wodenne nagaraakka paas'iyaa wode
Ezra10:2 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Ezra10:3 Hewaa diraw ta godaw
Ezra10:4 Ha yewuwaa nuuni wooti ootsanentto
Ezra10:5 Iziri denddi ek'k'iide
Ezra10:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Ezra10:7 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Ezra10:8 Ha heezzu gallassaa giddon he sa'aa shiik'enna ooninne de'oppe
Ezra10:9 He geetetteedda heezzu gallassatuu wurennan de'ishshin
Ezra10:10 Hewaappe guyiyaan Iziri denddi ek'k'iide
Ezra10:11 Hai hinttenttu nagaraa Med'inaa Godaw
Ezra10:12 He sa'aan shiik'eedda shiik'uu barenttu kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide
Ezra10:13 Shin asaa paydu c'ora; iray wolk'k'aam bukkiyaa balgguwaa. Yaatiyaa diraw
Ezra10:14 Hewaa diraw
Ezra10:15 Asaaheela na'ay Yoonataaninne Tiik'iwaa na'ay Yaahizaayi s'alalay unttunttu k'ofaa p'alk'k'eeddino; k'ay Mashulaaminne Leewiyaa gideedda Shabbataayi p'alk'k'iyaawantta maaddeeddino.
Ezra10:16 Hewaa diraw
Ezra10:17 Koyro aginaan koyro gallassay gakkiyaa wode
Ezra10:18 Ayhuda gidenna mac'c'a asatuwaappe machchiyaa akkeedawanttu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. K'eesetuwaappe: Yos'edeek'a naanaa gideedda Iyyaasunne Aa ishatuwaa yaraappe Ma'iseeya
Ezra10:19 Hawanttu barenttu Ayhuda gidenna machchetuwaa yeddanaw c'aak'k'eeddino; k'ay barenttu naak'uwaa diraw
Ezra10:20 Imeera yaran Ayhuda gidenna machchetuwaa akkeedawanttu Hanaananne Zabaadiyaa.
Ezra10:21 Hariima yaratuwaappe Ma'iseeya
Ezra10:22 Paashihuura yaratuwaappe Eliyoo'enaaya
Ezra10:23 Leewatuwaappe: Yozabaada
Ezra10:24 Mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawanttuppe: Eliyaashiba. Penggiyaa naagiyaawanttuppe: Shaaluuma
Ezra10:25 K'ay hara Israa'eeliyaa asaappe: Paroosha yaratuwaappe Raamiyaa
Ezra10:26 Elaama yaratuwaappe Mataaniyaa
Ezra10:27 Zattu yaratuwaappe Eliyoo'enaaya

Nehemiah1:1 Hakaaliyaa na'aa Nahimiyaa k'aalay hawaa. Ars's'ekissisi Paarise biittan kawutoodeppe laatamantso laytsan
Nehemiah1:2 Ta ishatuwaappe ittuu
Nehemiah1:3 Unttunttu zaariide
Nehemiah1:4 Taani hawaa ubbaa siseedda wode uttaade yeekkaad. Daro gallassaa kayyotta s'oomaadde
Nehemiah1:5 «Med'ina Godaw
Nehemiah1:6 taani ne k'oomay k'ay ne k'oomatuwaa gideedda Israa'eeliyaa asaa diraw k'ammanne gallassi neena woossiyaa woosaa ne haytsay siso; ne ayfiikka duge taakko s'eello. Nuuni Israa'eeliyaa Asay ootseedda nagaraa ubbaa new paas'ay; tumukka taaninne ta mayza aawotuu neena naak'k'eeddo.
Nehemiah1:7 Nuuni ne bollan loytsi iita nagaraa ootseeddo; neeni ne k'oomaa Muse bagganna nuu immeedda azazuwaa
Nehemiah1:8 Ne k'oomaa Musew neeni hawaadan yaagaadde odeedda k'aalaa hayyanaa k'oppa; ‹Hinttenoo
Nehemiah1:9 Shin hinttenttu taakko simmiide
Nehemiah1:10 «Hawanttu neeni ne wolk'k'aama wolk'k'aaninne ne mino k'esiyaan woza akkeedda ne k'oomatuwaanne ne asatuwaa.
Nehemiah1:11 Abeet Med'etaa Godaw
Nehemiah2:1 Ars's'ekissisi kaateteedda laatamantso laytsan
Nehemiah2:2 Hewaa diraw
Nehemiah2:3 «Kaatii med'inaw de'o! Ta mayza aawotuu moogetteedda katamay kolettiide d'ayina
Nehemiah2:4 Kaatiikka zaariide
Nehemiah2:5 kaatiyaa hawaadan yaagaad; «Kaatiyaw
Nehemiah2:6 He wode
Nehemiah2:7 K'aykka kaatiyaa taani hawaadan yaagaad; «Kaatiyaw
Nehemiah2:8 K'ay Geeshsha Golliyaa gimbbiyaa dirssaa penggiyaa giigissanaw
Nehemiah2:9 Kaatii taananna amareeda olaa gadaawatuwaanne paraa asatuwaa yeddeedda; unttunttunna ittippe Efiraas'iisa Shaafaappe away wulliyaa bagga biittaa baade gakkaade
Nehemiah2:10 Shin Beeti-Horoona gade asaa gideedda Sanbbalaas'inne Amoona gadiyaa kaappuwaa gideedda S'oobbii
Nehemiah2:11 Taani Yerusaalame yaade heezzu gallassaa yaan gamaad.
Nehemiah2:12 Gido shin
Nehemiah2:13 Taani bilahiyaan denddaade
Nehemiah2:14 Hewaappe simmaade

Nehemiah3:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Nehemiah3:2 Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Iyaarkko Asay gimbbeedda. Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Imira na'ay Zakkuuri gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:3 Hassinaa'a naanay Moliyaa Penggiyaa gimbbiyaa dirssaa gimbbeeddino. Unttunttu pengge mitsaa essiide
Nehemiah3:4 Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Hak'k'oos'a na'aa gideedda Ooriyoona na'ay Maremooti gimbbeedda. Aa gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Mashezaabeela na'aa Berekiyaa na'ay Mashulaami gimbbeedda. Aa gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Ba'aana na'ay S'aadook'e gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:5 Aa gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Tak'oa katamaa asatuu gimbbeeddino; gido shin
Nehemiah3:6 Paaseeha na'ay Yoodaahenne Basoodiyaa na'ay Mashulaami ec'a Penggiyaa gimbbiyaa dirssaa gimbbeeddino. Unttunttu pengge mitsaa essiide
Nehemiah3:7 Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Gabaa'oona katamaa asaa gidiyaa Malaas'eenne Meronoota katamaa asaa gideedda Yadooni gimbbeeddino. K'ay Gabaa'oonanne Mis'ip'p'a katamatuwaa asatuukka unttunttunna ittippe gidiide
Nehemiah3:8 Work'k'aa tigiyaa Harihaaya na'ay Uuzi'eeli unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa gimbbeedda. K'ay Aa gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa shittuwaa med'd'iyaa Hanaanii gimbbeedda. Unttunttu laau ittippe Aako Gimbbiyaa geetettiyaa sa'aa gakkanaw
Nehemiah3:9 Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Huura na'ay
Nehemiah3:10 Harumaafa na'ay Yadaayi bare golliyaappe sintsa baggana de'iyaa sa'aa gimbbeedda. Aa gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Hashaabaniyaa na'ay Has's'uushi gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:11 Hariima na'ay Malkkeenne Paahati-Moo'aaba na'ay Hashshuubi Aa gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aanne Ittoonne Adussa Gimbbiyaa gimbbeeddino.
Nehemiah3:12 Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Halloheesha na'ay
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuuninne Zaanoha kataman de'iyaa asatuu ittippe Zanggaaraa Penggiyaa gimbbiyaa dirssaa gimbbeeddino. Unttunttu penggiyaan sank'k'aa aatsiide
Nehemiah3:14 Rekaaba na'ay
Nehemiah3:15 Kolihooza na'ay
Nehemiah3:16 Hewaappe kaalliyaawaa Azibuuk'a na'ay
Nehemiah3:17 Hewaappe kaalliyaawaa Baana na'aa Rehuuma aawotetsaa giddon de'iyaa
Nehemiah3:18 Aappe kaalliyaawaa Henadaada na'ay
Nehemiah3:19 Unttunttu gas'aan de'iyaa sa'aa Iyyaasu na'ay
Nehemiah3:20 Aappe kaalliyaawaa Zabbaaya na'ay Baaruki gimbbiyaa gas'aappe doommi
Nehemiah3:21 Aappe kaalliyaawaa Hak'k'oos'a na'aa gideedda Ooriyoona na'ay Maremooti Eliyaashiba golliyaa penggiyaappe doommi
Nehemiah3:22 Aappe kaalliyaa heera gadiyaan de'iyaa k'eesatuu gimbbeeddino.
Nehemiah3:23 Unttunttuppe kaalliyaawaa Biiniyaamenne Hashshuubi barenttu golliyaa sintsan de'iyaa sa'aa gimbbeeddino. Unttunttuppe kaalliyaawaa Anaaniyaa na'aa gideedda Ma'iseeya na'ay Azaare bare golliyaa miyyiyaan de'iyaa sa'aa gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:24 Aappe kaalliyaawaa Azaariyaa golliyaappe doommi
Nehemiah3:25 Uzaaya na'ay Paalaali gimbbiyaa zuuk'eti simmo saappe doommi
Nehemiah3:26 Geeshsha Golliyaa k'oomatuu
Nehemiah3:27 Unttunttuppe kaalliyaawaa Tak'oa katamaa Asay gimbbiyaappe sintsan hara baggana de'iyaasaappe biide
Nehemiah3:28 Itti itti k'eesatuu kka Paraa Penggiyaa gimbbiyaa dirssaappe k'ommonna de'iyaa barenttu golliyaa sintsanna
Nehemiah3:29 Unttunttuppe kaalliyaawaa Imeera na'ay S'aadook'e bare golliyaa sintsan de'iyaa sa'aa gimbbeedda. Aappe kaalliyaawaa Away doliyaa Penggiyaa naagiyaa Shakaaniyaa na'ay Shamaa'e gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:30 Aappe kaalliyaawaa Sheleemiyaa na'ay Hanaaniinne S'alaafaw usuppuntsa na'aa gideedda Hanuuni gimbbeeddino. Unttunttuppe kaalliyaawaa Berekiyaa na'ay Mashulaami bare de'iyaa kifiletuwaa sintsan de'iyaa sa'aa gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:31 Aappe kaalliyaawaa S'omoosiyaa gimbbiyaa dirssaa Penggiyaa sintsan de'iyaa Geeshsha Golliyaa k'oomatuunne zalanchchatuu golliyaa gakkanaw de'iyaa sa'aa work'k'aa tigiyaa Malkki gimbbeedda. K'aykka I gimbbiyaa gas'an bolla baggana de'iyaa kifiliyaa gakkanaw de'iyaa sa'aakka gimbbeedda.
Nehemiah3:32 Work'k'aa tigiyaawanttunne zalanchchatuu he kifiliyaappe doommiide
Nehemiah4:1 Nuuni gimbbiyaa dirssaa kiitaa doommeeddawaa Sanbbalaas'i siseedda wode hank'k'uwaa ees's'i kesseedda; k'ay loytsi yilotiide
Nehemiah4:2 Bare laggetuwaanne Samaariyaa olanchchatuu sintsan I hawaadan yaageedda; «Hawanttu

Nehemiah4:4 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Nehemiah4:5 Unttunttu naak'uwaa gentsoppa; unttunttu nagaraakka ne sintsaappe mule k'uc'c'oppa. Ayaw gooppe

Nehemiah4:9 Shin nuuni nu S'oossaakko woosseeddo; unttuttuppe denddeeddawaan k'ammanne gallassi naagiyaa naaganchchatuwaakka wotseeddo.

Nehemiah4:11 Nu morkketuu
Nehemiah4:12 Gido shin

Nehemiah4:15 Nu morkketuu nuuna k'ohanaw mak'k'eteeddawaa nuuni ereeddawaa unttunttu siseeddino. K'ay S'oossaykka unttunttu mak'k'uwaa hada kesseeddawaa akeekeeddino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Nehemiah4:16 He wodiyaappe doommiide
Nehemiah4:17 Gimbbiyaa dirssaa gimbbiyaawanttunne koshshiyaawaa tookkiyaawanttu ubbay itti kushiyan ola miishshaa oyk'k'iide
Nehemiah4:18 Gimbbiyaa oosuwaa ootsiyaa ubbay mashshaa bare s'eessan danc'c'i danc'c'i utteedda. Malakataa punniyaawekka ubbaa wode taappe shaaketti erenna.
Nehemiah4:19 Asaa kaaletsiyaawantta
Nehemiah4:20 Hewaa diraw
Nehemiah4:21 Oosuwaa wonttumaatsa saluu zoiyaa wodiyaappe doommiide

Nehemiah9:9 «Neeni kase nu mayza aawotuwaa Gibs'e gadiyaan gakkeedda tuggaa be'aadda; k'ay Zo'o Abbaa geetettiyaa abbaa matan de'iidde unttunttu
Nehemiah9:10 Gibs'e kaatii
Nehemiah9:11 Abbaa yaanne haanne shaakkaade
Nehemiah9:12 Israa'eeliyaa asaa gallassi shaariyaa tuussaan kaaletsaade
Nehemiah9:13 «Neeni saluwaappe wod'd'aade
Nehemiah9:14 Geeshsha ne Sambbataa unttunttu bonchchana mala
Nehemiah9:15 Unttunttu koshateedda wode saluwaappe k'umaa immaadda; k'ay unttunttu saametteedda wode zaallaappe haatsaa pulttissaadda. Neeni unttunttoo immanaw c'aak'k'eedda gadiyaa geliide laattana mala azazaadda.
Nehemiah9:16 «Shin nu mayza aawotuu otoretteeddino. Odina sisenna morggiyaa orddo gidiide
Nehemiah9:17 Azazettenan is's'eeddino; k'ay neeni unttunttoo ootseedda malalissiyaabaa ubbaa hassayibeykkino. Unttunttu morggiyaa orddo gideeddino; k'ay barenttu makkalaappe denddeeddawaan
Nehemiah9:18 «Unttunttu maraa malatiyaa eek'aa med'd'iide
Nehemiah9:19 ne daro maarotetsaa diraw
Nehemiah9:20 Unttuntta tamaarissana mala
Nehemiah9:21 Oytamu laytsaa ubbaa unttunttu woran hamettiyaa wode
Nehemiah9:22 «Barenttu zawaan de'iyaa gas'aa biittatuwaanne kawutetsatuwaa unttunttu s'ooniide oyk'k'anaadan ootsaadda. Sihoona geetettiyaa kaatii mooddiyaa Haseboona gadiyanne Ooga geetettiyaa kaatii mooddiyaa Baasaane gadiyaa unttunttu laatteeddino.
Nehemiah9:23 Unttunttu zeretsatuwaa payduwaa saluwaa s'oolinttiyaadan darissaadda. Kase unttunttu aawaatoo gelissananne laatissana gaade neeni odeedda gadiyaa unttuntta gelissaadda.
Nehemiah9:24 Unttunttu Kanaane gadiyaa laatteeddino; he gadiyaan de'iyaa Kanaane asaa ubbaa unttunttu sintsan neeni kawushshaadda. Unttunttu Kanaane asaa bollan
Nehemiah9:25 K'ay unttunttu yuushshuu gimbbetteedda katamatuwaanne aradda biittaa s'ooniide akkeeddino; k'aykka loobay ubbay kumeedda golliyaa
Nehemiah9:26 «Gidooppekka
Nehemiah9:27 Hewaappe denddeeddawaan unttuntta unetsiyaa morkkatuwaa kushiyan aatsa immaadda; morkketuu unttuntta unetseedda wode neekko waasseeddino. Unttunttu waasuwaa saluwaan gida sisaadde ne maarotetsaa daruwaadan
Nehemiah9:28 «Shin unttunttu shemppuwaa demmiide zaaretsiide
Nehemiah9:29 «Ne higgiyaakko unttunttu simmana mala
Nehemiah9:30 Gidooppenne
Nehemiah9:31 Shin neeni keekanne maariyaa S'oossaa gidiyaa diraw
Nehemiah9:32 «Nu S'oossaw

Nehemiah9:34 Nu kaatetuu
Nehemiah9:35 Neeni unttunttu kawutetsan unttunttoo wolk'k'aama anjjuwaa immaadda; k'ay aakonne mokkiyaa biittaakka unttunttoo immaadda; shin unttunttu new goynnibeykkinonne barenttu iita oosuwaappe simmibeykkino.

Nehemiah11:1 Asaa kaaletsiyaawanttu Yerusaalamen de'eeddino. K'ay hinkko asaappekka tammuwaappe ittuu ittuu geeshsha kataman Yerusaalamen de'ana mala
Nehemiah11:2 Yerusaalamen de'anaw barenttu sheniyaan mayyeedda asaa ubbaa Asay anjjeedda.
Nehemiah11:3 Hara katamatuwaan de'iyaa Israa'eeliyaa asay
Nehemiah11:4 Yihudaanne Biiniyaama zariyaappe yeedda kaaletsiyaawanttu Paareesa yara gideedda Ataayanne Sheela yara gideedda Ma'iseeya. Ataayi Ooziyaana na'aa; Ooziyaane Zakkaraasa na'aa; Zakkaraasi Amaariyaa na'aa; Amaari Shafaas'iyaa na'aa; Shafaas'i Malaali'eela na'aa.
Nehemiah11:5 Ma'iseeyi Baaruka na'aa; Baaruki Kolihooza na'aa; Kolihoozi Hazaaya na'aa; Hazaayi Adaaya na'aa; Adaayi Yoyaariiba na'aa; Yoyaariibi Zakkaraasa na'aa.
Nehemiah11:6 Paareesa yaraappe wolk'k'aama gideedda 468 asatuu Yerusaalamen de'eeddino.
Nehemiah11:7 Biiniyaama zariyaappe yeedda kaaletsiyaawanttu Saala
Nehemiah11:8 
Nehemiah11:9 Ziikira na'ay Yuu'eeli unttunttu kaappuwaa; k'ay Hassanuu'a na'ay Yihuday kataman laa'entso maaragii de'iyaa kaappuwaa.
Nehemiah11:10 K'eesetuwaappe yeedda kaaletsiyaawanttu Yoyaariiba na'aa Yadaaya
Nehemiah11:11 
Nehemiah11:12 Unttunttunna ittippe S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa oosuwaa ootseeddawanttu ubbaanna 822. K'ay hara kaaletsiyaawe Adaaya; Adaayi Yirohaama na'aa; Yirohaami Palaaliyaa na'aa
Nehemiah11:13 Adaayaana ittippe de'iyaa Asay ubbaanna 242. K'aykka hara kaaletsiyaawe Amaashasaaya; Amaashasaayi Azaari'eela na'aa; Azaari'eeli Ahizaaya na'aa; Ahizaayi Mashilemoota na'aa; Mashilemooti Imeera na'aa.
Nehemiah11:14 Amaashasaayaana ittippe de'iyaa olanchchatuu ubbaanna 128. Unttunttu kaappuu Haggidoolima na'aa Zabddi'eela.
Nehemiah11:15 Leewatuwaappe yeedda kaaletsiyaawanttuppe ittuu Shamaa'iyaa; Shamaa'e Hashshuuba na'aa; Hashshuubi Azirik'aama na'aa; Azirik'aami Hashaabiyaa na'aa; Hashaabii Buuna na'aa.
Nehemiah11:16 K'ay haratuu Shabbataayanne Yozabaada; unttunttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaappe karenna oosettiyaa oosotoo aawotiyaa Leewatuu kaappatuwaa.
Nehemiah11:17 K'aykka haray Mataaniyaa; I galataa woosaa woossiyaa wode galataa mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawanttoo kaappuwaa; I Asaafa yaraappe yeletteedda Zabdda na'aa na'aa
Nehemiah11:18 Ubbaanna 284 Leewatuu geeshsha kataman Yerusaalamen de'eeddino.
Nehemiah11:19 Penggiyaa naagiyaawanttuppe Ak'k'uuba
Nehemiah11:20 Atteeda k'eesatuu
Nehemiah11:21 Shin Geeshsha Golliyaa k'oomatuu Yerusaalame kataman itti baggana de'iyaa Ofeela geetettiyaa heeraan de'eeddino. S'iihinne Gishippinne laau unttuntta kaaletsiyaawantta.
Nehemiah11:22 Yerusaalamen de'iyaa Leewatoo kaappuu Uuza. I Baana na'aa; Baani Hashaabiyaa na'aa; Hashaabii Mataaniyaa na'aa; Mataanii Miika na'aa. Uuzi Geeshsha Golliyaan yes's'iyaawanttoo kaappuwaa gideedda Asaafa yara.
Nehemiah11:23 Unttunttu hachche hachche ootsanabaw kaatiyaappe unttunttoo imetteedda azazuu de'ee.
Nehemiah11:24 Yihudaa na'aa Zaraaha yaraappe yeletteedda Mashezaabeela na'aa Pataahe Israa'eeliyaa asaa s'eelliyaa ubbabaw unttunttu doonaa gidiide
Nehemiah11:25 Asaappe daratu barenttu goshshaa goshshaa matan de'iyaa k'eeri katamatuwaan de'eeddino. Hewaa diraw

Nehemiah12:14 Malluuka yaraa kaappuu Yoonataana. Shabaaniyaa yaraa kaappuu Yooseefo.

Nehemiah12:19 Yoyaariiba yaraa kaappuu Matanaaya. Yadaaya yaraa kaappuu Uuza.
Nehemiah12:20 Sallaaya yaraa kaappuu K'aallaaya. Amooka yaraa kaappuu Ebeera.

Nehemiah12:32 Hoshaayinne Yihudaa kaaletsiyaawanttuppe baggatuu unttuttuppe guyyenna kaalliino.

Nehemiah12:37 Pulttuwaa Penggiyaakko gakkowaappe guyyiyaan

Nehemiah12:39 K'ay hewaappekka simmiide
Nehemiah12:40 Mazimuriyaan S'oossaa galatiyaa laau c'uguukka S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaakko gakkeeddino; k'ay taanikka taananna ittippe de'iyaa kaaletsiyaawaana gakkaad.

Nehemiah12:46 Kase Daawitanne Asaafa wodiyaappe doommiidekka mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawanttu c'uguwaa kaaletsiyaawanttu S'oossaa yetsan galatanawunne bonchchanaw de'iyaawe erettiide de'iyaawaa.
Nehemiah12:47 Zarubaabeela laytsaaninne Nahimiyaa laytsan Israa'eeliyaa ubbay mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawanttoonne penggiyaa naagiyaawanttoo bessiyaa k'ommuwaa hachche hachche immeeddino; k'ay Leewatookka unttunttoo dummayeedda k'ommuwaa immeeddino. Esther1:4 Kaatii itti s'eetanne hosppun tammu gallassaa kumentsaa bare kawutetsaa duretetsaanne bare bonchcho anggaa ubbaa c'ora gallassaa unttuntta besseedda.
Esther1:5 He gallassatuwaappe guyyiyaan
Esther1:6 He sa'aan de'iyaa dabaabay
Esther1:7 Ittuu ittuwaappe dumma gideedda work'k'aa burc'c'ukkuwaan ushay asaw imettee; kaatiikka bare lootetsaan daro loa woyniyaa eessaa darssi immeedda.
Esther1:8 Itti itti Asay bare koyowaa keeshshaa ushee; hewaa kaatii kasetiide
Esther1:9 He wode kaatata Ass's'iinakka mac'c'a asaa baalaa kaatiyaa gollen giigissaaddu.

Esther2:1 Hewaappe simmiide
Esther2:2 He wode kaatiyaa gollen ootsiyaa k'oomatuu Aa hawaadan yaageeddino; «Loo malaana de'iyaa wodoro mac'c'a naanaa koyiide
Esther2:3 ne kawutetsaa gidduwaan de'iyaa biittatuwaa ubbaan kaappatuwaa suntsaa. Unttunttukka loo malaanna de'iyaa wodoro mac'c'a naanaa dooriide
Esther2:4 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Esther2:5 Hewan Suusa kataman kaatii de'iyaa saan itti Marddikiyoosa geetettiyaa Ayhuda gadiyaa Asay de'ee. Ikka Yaa'iira na'aa; Yaa'iiri Shima na'aa; Shimi Biiniyaama zariyaa gideedda K'iisa na'aa.
Esther2:6 Baabloone Kaatii Naabukadanas'oore Yihudaa Kaatiyaa Yo'aakiinanne hara Ayhuda asaa olan omoodiide afeedda wode
Esther2:7 I he gadiyaan de'iidde
Esther2:8 Kaatii kesseedda awaayuwaanne azazuwaa maaran
Esther2:9 Hegaayi Asttirin
Esther2:10 Marddokiyoosi iziw kasetiide odeeddawaadan
Esther2:11 K'aykka Marddokiyoosi Asttiri pas'atetsaanne iziw haniyaawaa eranaw
Esther2:12 Itti itti gellayatta kaatiyaakko gelanaappe kasetaade mac'c'awanttoo azazetto maaraadan
Esther2:13 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Esther2:14 K'amma gelaade
Esther2:15 Hewaa gidoode
Esther2:16 Ars's'ekissisi kaateteedda laappuntsa laytsan
Esther2:17 Kaatii hara mac'c'awanttu ubbaappe aatsiide
Esther2:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Esther2:19 Wodoratuu laaentsuwaa shiik'eedda wode Marddokiyoosi kaatiyaa golle penggiyaan matay immetina utteedda.

Job1:1 Uus'a giyaa biittan Iyyooba giyaa itti bitanii de'ee; I tooshii bayinnanne suure asaa; S'oossaw yayyiide
Job1:2 Aw laappun attuma naanatuunne heezzu mac'c'a naanatuu yeletteeddino.
Job1:3 Mas'uwaa gidooppe
Job1:4 Aa attuma naanatuu barenttu son barenttu son
Job1:5 Gibiraa gallassatuu poletteedda wode
Job1:6 Itti gallassi S'oossaa kiitanchchatuu Med'inaa Godaa sintsan beettanaw yeeddino; Sees'aanaykka k'ay unttunttunna yeedda.
Job1:7 Med'inaa Goday Sees'aanaa
Job1:8 Med'inaa Goday Sees'aanaa
Job1:9 Sees'aanay
Job1:10 Aanne Aa soo asaanne aw de'iyaawaa ubbaa neeni diraade naagabeykkii? I ootsiyaa oosuwaa ubbaa neeni anjjeedda diraw
Job1:11 Shin neeni ne kushiyaa yeddaade
Job1:12 Med'inaa Goday Sees'aanaa
Job1:13 Itti gallassi Iyyooba attuma naanatuunne mac'c'a naanatuu barenttu bayira ishaa son miiddenne woyniyaa eessaa ushiidde de'iino.
Job1:14 Yaatishin itti bitanii Iyyoobakko yiide
Job1:15 Saaba biittaa asatuu akeekenan yiide
Job1:16 I biro haasayishin
Job1:17 I biro haasayishin
Job1:18 I biro haasayishin
Job1:19 wolk'k'aama gotii akeekenan bazzuwaappe denddiide
Job1:20 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Job1:21 hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani ta aatti uluwaappe kallo yelettaad; hayk'k'iyaa wodekka taani akkaade biyaabay baawa. Med'inaa Goday immeedda; Med'inaa Goday zaariide akkeedda. Med'inaa Godaa suntsay galatetto» yaageedda.
Job1:22 Ha ubbankka Iyyoobi nagaraa ootsibeenna; S'oossaa amaassalibeenna.

Job3:2 
Job3:3 «Taani shahaaretteedda k'ammaynne taani yeletteedda gallassay c'oo d'ayino!
Job3:4 He gallassay d'uma gido; Bolla S'oossay he gallassaa sheneko go; Aa bollan poo'uukka poo'oppo.
Job3:5 Leeleedda d'umaynne shaannochchuu Aa goozo; Aa shaarii kammo; Aa poo'uwaakka d'umay gentso.
Job3:6 He gallassaa k'ammaa d'ip'p'i go d'umay oyk'k'o. Laytsaa giddon de'iyaa gallassatuwaan I paydettoppo; aginatuwaa payduwaankka geloppo.
Job3:7 He gallassaa k'ammay k'ammiide wonttoppo; nashshechchaa ililssaykka an sisettoppo.
Job3:8 Leewaataana giyaa dawiyaa dentsetsanaw looheedda shareechchotuu he gallassaa shek'k'ino.
Job3:9 He k'ammaw bakkaaliyaa s'oolinttii poo'oppo; poo'uwaa naagiidekka demmoppo; wontta s'alk'k'iikka aw s'alk'k'ettoppo.
Job3:10 He k'ammay taani ta aatti uluwaan shahaarettennaadaaninne ha metuwaa be'ennaadan teibeenna diraw
Job3:11 «Taani ta aatti uluwaan haatsaa kesaarikkitaashsha! Ta aatti uluwaappe yeletta wod'd'anne hayk'k'aarikkitaasha!
Job3:12 Ta aata taana ayaw bare kiwuwaan idimmaadeeshsha? Bare d'antsaakka taana ayaw d'antsaadeeshsha?
Job3:13 He wode taani hayk'k'eeddawaa gidintto
Job3:14 Koletteedda sa'atuwaa barenttoo zaaretsi kees's'eedda sa'aa kaatetuwaannanne unttuntta zoriyaawanttunna
Job3:15 work'k'ay de'iyaanne barenttu golliyaan biraa kuntseedda mooddiyaawanttunna ittippe duufuwaan gisaaddi shin!
Job3:16 Woy aatti uluwaappe boshettiide yeletteedda na'aadan
Job3:17 Duufuwan iitatuu barenttu iita oosuwaa aggiino; yaan daaburanchchatuukka shemppiino.
Job3:18 He sa'aan k'ashetto asatuukka shemppiide nashettiino; oosuwaa oosissiyaawanttu waasuwaa unttunttu hewan sissikkino.
Job3:19 Guutsay daruukka yaan de'ee; ayiliikka bare godaw ayilettiyaasaappe kesee.
Job3:20 «Metuwaan de'iyaawanttoo poo'uu ayaw imetteedee? De'uu c'ammiyaawanttoo
Job3:21 hayk'k'uu yanddeeshsha giide amottina

Job3:23 Ogii bayi kichcheedda uraw
Job3:24 Kayyuu taw k'uma gideedda; ta oolii aggenaan goggiyaa haatsaa mala.
Job3:25 Taani yayyeeddawe ta bolla gakkeedda; taani dagammeeddawekka taanan haneedda.
Job3:26 Taw metoppe attina
