Proverbs10:1 Hawanttu Solomona leemisatwaa. Aad'd'eeda eranchcha na'ay bare aawuwaa nashechchee; shin booza na'ay bare aato kayyoyee.
Proverbs10:2 Nagaran demmeedda miishshay goenna; shin s'illotetsay hayk'k'uwaappe ashshee.
Proverbs10:3 Med'inaa Goday s'illotuwaa koshshayissenna; shin nagaranchchatuwaa amuwaa polissenna.
Proverbs10:4 Azallatetsay mank'k'issee; shin minniide ootsiyaawe dureyee.
Proverbs10:5 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha uray katsaa boniyaan shiishshee; shin katsaa c'akkiyaa wode gemishshiyaa uray kawushee.
Proverbs10:6 S'illo Asay anjjettee; shin nagaranchchaa doonaa makkalay kamee.
Proverbs10:7 S'illuwaa suntsay anjjuwaan s'eesettiidde de'ee; shin nagaranchchatuwaa suntsay dogettee.
Proverbs10:8 Aad'd'eeda eranchchatuu azazeeddawaa ootsiino; shin boozatetsan c'oo doonatiyaawanttu bashshaw biino.
Proverbs10:9 Suure Asay saro de'ee; shin geella uray bare bayzzuwaan oyk'k'ettee.
Proverbs10:10 Asaa bolla simiyaa uray metuwaa ayee. Boozatetsan c'oo doonatiyaawanttu bashshaw biino.
Proverbs10:11 S'illuwaa haasayay de'uwaa pulttiyaa; shin nagaranchchaa haasayay makkalatetsa gentsee.
Proverbs10:12 Is'uu palumiyaa dentsetsee; shin siik'uu bayzzuwaa ubbaa paydenna.
Proverbs10:13 Wozanaama Asay aad'd'eeda eran haasayee; shin booza uray s'aman shoc'ettee.
Proverbs10:14 Aad'd'eeda eranchchatuu eraa dagayiino; shin booza haasayaa haasayiyaa uray barena bayzzee.
Proverbs10:15 Duriyaa miishshay diretteedda katamaa mala
Proverbs10:16 S'illo uraa Aa loo oosuu de'oo kaaletsee; shin iita uraa wurssetsay muruwaa ahee.
Proverbs10:17 Seerina eeno giyaa uray de'uwaa ogiyaan hamettee; shin seerina is's'iyaa uray balee.
Proverbs10:18 Is's'iidde bare is's'iyaawaa erissenna uray worddanchcha; zigirssaa laaliyaa uraykka booza.
Proverbs10:19 Daro haasayaa giddon nagaray d'ayenna; shin bare doonaa shiishshi akkiyaa uray aad'd'eeda eranchcha.
Proverbs10:20 S'illuwaa ins's'arssay tigetteedda geeshsha biraa mala; shin iita uraa k'ofaw gatii guutsa.
Proverbs10:21 S'illo uraa haasayay daro asaa goee; shin boozatuu barenttu wozanaa pac'an hayk'k'iino.
Proverbs10:22 Med'inaa Godaa anjjuu dure kessee; I he duretetsan metuwaa walakkenna.
Proverbs10:23 Booza uraw iitabaa ootsiyaawe kaassa mala; shin wozanaama uray aad'd'eeda eratetsan nashettee.
Proverbs10:24 Iita uray hirggeeddabay Aa bolla gakkanawaa; shin s'illuu amotteeddawe imettanawaa.
Proverbs10:25 Gotuu denddiide aad'd'oode
Proverbs10:26 C'aalay achchaa zilissiyaawaadaaninne c'uway ayifiyaa poogiyaawaadan
Proverbs10:27 Med'inaa Godaw yayyiyaawe laytsaa adussee; shin nagaranchcha uraa laytsay k'aammee.
Proverbs10:28 S'illo uray sintsanna nashechchay yaana giide naagee; shin iita uray sintsanna yaana giide naagiyaawe ayaynne baawa.
Proverbs10:29 Med'inaa Godaa ogii s'illotoo bak'ati attiyaa sa'aa; shin iitaa ootsiyaawanttoo bashshaa.
Proverbs10:30 S'illotuu de'iyaasaappe shodettikkino; shin iitatuu biittaa bolla de'ikkino.
Proverbs10:31 S'illo Asay aad'd'eeda eratetsaa haasayee; shin geellabaa haasayiyaa ins's'arssay k'ans's'ettana.
Proverbs10:32 S'illo Asay bessiyaa haasayaa eree; shin iita Asay geella haasayee.
Proverbs11:1 Med'inaa Goday wordduwaa miizaanan likkiyaawantta is's'ee; shin likke miizaanan likkiyaawanttun nashettee.
Proverbs11:2 Otoruu yiyaa wode kawushshatetsay yee; shin ashkketetsaana aad'd'eeda eratetsay yee.
Proverbs11:3 S'illotuwaa unttunttu suuretetsay kaaletsee; shin ammanettennawantta unttunttu geellatetsay d'ayissee.
Proverbs11:4 Hank'k'uwaa gallassi duretetsay goenna; shin s'illotetsay hayk'k'uwaappe ashshee.
Proverbs11:5 Borii bayinna uraa ogiyaa Aa s'illotetsay suurissee; shin iita uray bare iitatetsan kunddee.
Proverbs11:6 Suuretuwaa unttunttu s'illotetsay ashshee; shin ammanettennawantta unttunttu amuu p'ire gidiide oyk'k'ana.
Proverbs11:7 Iita Asay hayk'k'iyaa wode
Proverbs11:8 S'illuu metuwaappe attee; Aa diraw iitaa bolla metuu yee.
Proverbs11:9 S'oossaa erenna bitanii bare doonaan asaa d'ayissee; shin s'illotuu eran attiino.
Proverbs11:10 S'illotuu bonchchettiyaa wode
Proverbs11:11 S'illotuwaa anjjuwaa gaasuwaan katamay dic'c'ee; shin iita uraa haasayay katamaa d'ayissee.
Proverbs11:12 Bare shooruwaa kad'iyaa uraw wozanay baawa; shin akeekanchcha uray c'ou gee.
Proverbs11:13 Zigiriyaa Asay s'uuraa laalee; shin ammanettiyaa Asay s'uuraa gentsee.
Proverbs11:14 Kaaletsiyaawe d'ayooppe
Proverbs11:15 Erenna uraw waase gidiyaa Asay tumuwaappe metootana; hewaappe waase gidennaan is's'iyaawe loa.
Proverbs11:16 Uluu keeka mishirata bonchchettaw; shin mek'etsaa iita Asay duretetsaa s'alala durettee.
Proverbs11:17 Keeka Asay barew loobaa ootsee; shin mek'etsaa iita Asay barena k'ohee.
Proverbs11:18 Iita Asay demmiyaa miishshay c'imiyaa miishshaa; shin s'illotetsaa zeriyaa uray tumu woytuwaa c'akkana.
Proverbs11:19 S'illotetsan minniide de'iyaa uray pas'a de'ana; shin iitatetsaa kaalliyaa uray hayk'k'ana.
Proverbs11:20 Med'inaa Goday iita k'ofay de'iyaa asatuwaa is's'ee; shin suure hamettiyaawanttun nashettee.
Proverbs11:21 Iita Asay murettenan attena; shin s'illotuu attanawantta.
Proverbs11:22 Adussa k'ofi bayinna puulanchcha mac'c'a mishirati puulay guduntsaa siid'iyaan aatseedda work'k'aa alleek'k'uwaa mala.
Proverbs11:23 S'illotuwaa amuwaa poluu loo s'alala; shin iitatuwaa amuwaa poluu hank'k'uwaa s'alala.
Proverbs11:24 Itti itti asatuu barenttu miishshaa asaw c'oo laaliino; shin unttunttu ak'uu yaa daree. Hara asatuu k'ay barenttu miishshaw loytsi uuzetiino; shin unttunttu ak'uu haa pac'c'ee.
Proverbs11:25 Keeka Asay durettana; haratuwaa maaddiyaa Asay maadettana.
Proverbs11:26 Katsay alina zalanaw minjjiyaa uraa Asay shek'k'ee. Shin bare katsaa Asay koyiyaa wode ziliyaa asaa anjjee.
Proverbs11:27 Loobaa minisiide koyiyaa uray nashshechchaa demmee; shin iitabaa koyiyaa uraa iitabay demmee.
Proverbs11:28 Bare duretetsan ammanettiyaa Asay kunddana; shin s'illotuu balgguwaa mitsaadan daashana.
Proverbs11:29 Bare soo asaa bolla c'abbuwaa dentsiyaa uray go'ettanabay ayaynne baawa. Boozatuukka aad'd'eeda eranchchatoo k'ooma gidana.
Proverbs11:30 S'illo Asay de'uwaa ayifiyaa ayifiyaa mitsaa mala; shemppuwaa ashshiyaawanttu aad'd'eedda eranchchatuwaa.
Proverbs11:31 S'illotuu sa'aan barenttu oosuwaa gatiyaa akkiyaawaa gidooppe

Proverbs12:3 Asaa iitatetsay minisiide essenna; shin s'illotuwaa s'ap'uu k'aas's'enna.
Proverbs12:4 Wozanaama mishirata bare asinaw kallachchaa mala; shin bare asinaa kawushshiyaa mishirata Aa mek'etsaa miyaa ajaajjiyaa mala.
Proverbs12:5 S'illotuwaa k'ofay suure; shin iitatuwaa zorii c'imuwaa.
Proverbs12:6 Iitatuwaa haasayay asaa wod'anaassa; shin s'illotuwaa haasayay unttuntta ashshee.

Proverbs12:11 Bare biittaa minisi ootsiyaa uray katsaa kallee; shin patsennabaa yederssiyaa uraw akeekay pac'c'eeddawaa.
Proverbs12:12 Iitatuu nagaranchcha asatuwaa omooduwaa akkanaw amottiino; shin s'illotuwaa s'ap'uu daashiide de'ana.

Proverbs12:16 Booza uraa hank'k'uu ellekka erettee; shin c'inc'c'a Asay boriyaa kad'iide aad'd'ee.
Proverbs12:17 Tumuwaa haasayiyaa Asay suurebaa odee; shin wordduwaa markkay wordduwaan odee.
Proverbs12:18 Akeekenan haasayiyaa haasayay c'ubiyaadan c'addee; shin aad'd'eeda eranchchaa ins's'arssay patsee.
Proverbs12:19 Worddo haasayay guutsa wodiyaassa; shin tumo haasayay med'inaw de'ana.
Proverbs12:20 Iitaa k'oppiyaawanttu wozanaan c'imuu de'ee; shin sarobaa zorettiyaawanttu wozanaan nashechchay kumee.
Proverbs12:21 S'illotuwaa metuu gakkenna; shin iitatoo metoppe attina
Proverbs12:22 Med'inaa Goday worddanchchatuwaa is's'ee; shin tumanchcha asatuwaan I nashettee.
Proverbs12:23 C'inc'c'a Asay bare eraa k'osee; shin boozatuu barenttu boozatetsaa odiino.
Proverbs12:24 Minniide ootsiyaa uray deriyaa mooddee; shin azallay moodettee.
Proverbs12:25 Hirggiyaawe asaa nashshechchaa diggee; shin lootetsaanna de'iyaa haasayay Aa nashechchee.
Proverbs12:26 S'illo Asay bare shooruwaa zoriidde
Proverbs12:27 Azalla Asay shankkatiide aheedda ashuwaa katsenna; shin min ootsiide demeedda uray bare duretaw bonchchuwaa immee.
Proverbs12:28 S'illotetsaa ogiyaan de'uu de'ee; he ogiyaan hayk'k'uu baawa.
Proverbs13:1 Eranchcha na'ay bare aawuwaa seeraa sisee; shin k'iliic'iyaawe seeraa sisenna.
Proverbs13:2 Asay bare doonaappe kesiyaa k'aalan loobaa akkee; shin ammanttennawanttu makkalabaa amottiino.
Proverbs13:3 Bare doonaa naagiyaa uray bare shemppuwaa naagee; shin ellekka haasayiyaa uray barena d'ayissee.
Proverbs13:4 Azallay amottee; shin ayaanne demmenna; shin minniide ootsiyaawanttu kallana.
Proverbs13:5 S'illo asatuu wordduwaa haasayaa is's'iino. Shin iita asatuwaa haasayay yeellayeenne kawushshee.
Proverbs13:6 Suure de'uwaa de'iyaa uraa Aa s'illotetsay naagee; shin nagaranchchaa Aa nagaray kunddisee.
Proverbs13:7 Barena dure malatissiyaa Asay de'ee; shin aw ayaynne baawa; haray k'ay barena hiyyeesaa malatissiyaawe de'ee; shin aw daro duretay de'ee.
Proverbs13:8 Asay bare shaluwaan bare shemppuwaa wozanaw danddayee; shin hiyyeesaa yashissiyaawe baawa.
Proverbs13:9 S'illotuwaa s'omppii pooc'umi poo'ee; shin iitatuwaa s'omppii to'ana.
Proverbs13:10 Otoruu walassaa yelee; shin zoriyaa akkiyaawanttu aad'd'eeda eranchcha.
Proverbs13:11 Daaburi bayinnan demmeedda miishshay ellekka d'ayee; shin min ootsiide demmeedda duretay
Proverbs13:12 Koyiyaawe polettennaan gamiyaawe kayyoyee; shin amotteeddawe polettiyaawe nashechchee.
Proverbs13:13 Zoriyaa kad'iyaa uray metuwaan gelee; shin azazuwaa bonchchiyaa uray saruwaan de'ana.
Proverbs13:14 Aad'd'eeda eranchchay immiyaa timirttii de'uwaa pultto; hewe Asay hayk'k'uwaa p'iriyaappe kessi akkanaw maaddee.
Proverbs13:15 Akeekay de'iyaa uray bonchchetee; shin ammanettennan aggiyaawe bashshaw afee.
Proverbs13:16 C'inc'c'a Asay ubbay eran ootsee; shin boozay bare boozatetsaa k'onc'c'issee.
Proverbs13:17 Asay kiitteedda iita kiitanchchay
Proverbs13:18 Seeraa is's'iyaa Asay hiyyeeseenne yeellatee; shin seerina sisiyaa uray bonchchetee.
Proverbs13:19 Amotteeddawaa demmiyaawe loytsi nashechchee; shin iitatuu iitaappe haakkanaw koyikkino.
Proverbs13:20 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha asatuwaana hamettiyaa Asay aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidee; shin booza asatuwaana hamettiyaa Asay metuwaan gelee.
Proverbs13:21 Nagaranchchatuwaa iita kaac'ay kaallee; shin s'illotuu loo oosuwaa woytuwaa akkana.
Proverbs13:22 Loo Asay bare naanatuwaa naanatuwaa laatissee; shin nagaranchchaa duretay s'illoo dagattee.
Proverbs13:23 Hiyyeesaa goshshay daro katsaa ayifanaw danddayee; shin suure pirdday pac'c'eeddawaa gaasuwaan d'ayee.
Proverbs13:24 K'ayis'eeriyaan wad'd'anaw k'arettiyaa uray bare na'aa is's'ee; shin bare na'aa siik'iyaa uray minniide seeree.
Proverbs13:25 S'illuu Aa uluu kallana gakkanaw mee; shin nagaranchchay koshattee.
Proverbs14:1 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha mishirata bare golliyaa kees's'aw; shin boozata bare golliyaa bare kushiyan kolaw.
Proverbs14:2 Suure hamettiyaa Asay Med'inaa Godaw yayyee; shin bare ogiyaa geellayiyaa asay Med'inaa Godaa kad'ee.
Proverbs14:3 Booza haasayay Aa zokkiyaw S'amaa ayee; shin aad'd'eeda eranchchatuwaa ins's'arssay unttuntta naagee.
Proverbs14:4 Booratuu bayinna saan yeesii mela de'ee; shin new goshiyaa wolk'k'aama booratuu de'ooppe
Proverbs14:5 Ammanettiyaa markkay ubbaa gede tumuwaa odee; shin wordduwaa markkay wordduwaa s'alala haasayee.
Proverbs14:6 K'iliic'iyaawe aad'd'eeda eratetsaa koyee; shin demmenna; akeekay de'iyaa Asay eratetsaa demmanawe Aa waayissenna.
Proverbs14:7 Booza asaappe haakka; ayaw gooppe
Proverbs14:8 C'inc'c'a Asay bare ootsiyaawaa eriyaa diraw
Proverbs14:9 Boozatuu nagaraa ootsiide
Proverbs14:10 Bare wozanaa kayyuwaa izaawu eree; Aa nashechchaakka ooninne aanana kos's'enna.
Proverbs14:11 Iitatuwaa Gollii kolettenna; shin suuretuwaa gollii minniide de'ana.
Proverbs14:12 Asaw likke malatiyaa ogii de'ee; shin biina
Proverbs14:13 Miichchankka wozanay kayyotti eree; nashshechchaa wurssetsaykka kayyuwaa gidanaw danddayee.
Proverbs14:14 Iita Asay bare iita oosuwaa gatiyaa akkana; loo asaykka bare loo oosuwaa gatiyaa akkana.
Proverbs14:15 Booza Asay ubbaa ammanee; shin c'inc'c'ay akeekiide tanggee.
Proverbs14:16 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha asay Med'inaa Godaa yayyee; iitaappekka haakkee; shin boozay alaalle geenanne elleellee.
Proverbs14:17 Elle hank'k'ettiyaa asatuu booza oosuwaa ootsiino. Shin c'inc'c'atuu danddayanchcha.
Proverbs14:18 Boozatuu barenttu boozatetsaa gatiyaa akkiino; shin c'inc'c'atuu eratetsaa kallachchaadan wotsanawantta.
Proverbs14:19 Iita asatuu loo asatuwaa sintsan hokkiide
Proverbs14:20 Hiyyeesay bare shooruwankka dosettenna; shin duretoo daro laggetuu de'iino.
Proverbs14:21 Bare shooruwaa kad'iyaa Asay nagaraa ootsee; shin hiyyeesaa maaddiyaawe anjjetteedawaa.
Proverbs14:22 Iitabaa mak'ettiyaawanttu baliino gidikkinoo? Shin loobaa ootsanaw halchchiyaawanttu tumatetsaanne aggena siik'uwaa demmiino.
Proverbs14:23 Minniide ootsiyaawaan ubbaan goay de'ee; shin c'oo mela haasayay hiyeesatetsaa s'alala ayee.
Proverbs14:24 Aad'd'eeda eranchchatoo unttunttu duretetsay kallachchaa; shin boozatuu barenttu boozatetsaa gujji gujjiide booziino.
Proverbs14:25 Tumu markkay shemppuwaa ashshee; shin wordduwaa markkay baletsee.
Proverbs14:26 Med'inaa Godaw yayyiyaa uraw mino geessuu de'ee. I Aa naanatookka bak'atiide attiyaa sa'aa gidanawaa.
Proverbs14:27 Med'inaa Godaw yayyiyaawe de'uwaa pultto; hewaa diraw
Proverbs14:28 Kaatiyaa gitatetsay I mooddiyaa asaa c'oratetsaana; shin I mooddiyaa Asay d'ayooppe
Proverbs14:29 Danddayanchcha asaw wolk'k'aama akeekay de'ee; shin elle hank'k'ettiyaa Asay bare boozatetsaa k'onc'c'issee.
Proverbs14:30 Woppu geedda wozanay bollaa pas'a wotsee; shin k'anaatii bollaw ajaajjiyaa harggiyaa mala.
Proverbs14:31 Hiyyeesatuwaa naak'k'iyaa Asay unttuntta Med'd'eeddawaa c'ashee; shin metootanchchatoo keekkiyaa Asay S'oossaa bonchchee.
Proverbs14:32 Iitatuu barenttu iita oosuwaan kunddana; shin s'illotuu barenttu suuretetsan hayk'k'uwaappe naagettana.
Proverbs14:33 Akeekanchcha asaa wozanaan aad'd'eeda eratetsay kumeedda; shin boozatuu aad'd'eeda eratetsaa ayaanne erikkino.
Proverbs14:34 S'illotetsay itti kawutetsaa asaa d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u ootsee; shin nagaray ay asanne kawushshee.
Proverbs14:35 Kaatii eranchcha k'ooman nashettee; shin yeellayiyaa oosuwaa ootsiyaa k'oomaa hank'k'ettee.

Proverbs15:3 Med'inaa Godaa ayifetuu ubbasaa s'eelliino; iitaa ootsiyaawanttakka louwaa ootsiyaawanttakka be'iino.
Proverbs15:4 Liik'o haasayay de'uwaa mitsaa mala; shin c'imiyaa haasayay ayaanaa mentsee.
Proverbs15:5 Booza Asay bare aawuwaa seeraa kad'ee; shin bare aawuwaa seeraa akkiyaa Asay c'inc'c'a.
Proverbs15:6 S'illo uraa golliyaan daro miishshay de'ee; shin iitaw geliyaa miishshay metuwaa ayee.

Proverbs15:12 K'iliic'iyaa Asay seeriyaawaa dosenna; aad'd'eeda eranchchatuwaappekka zoriyaa oochchenna.
Proverbs15:13 Wozanay nashetina

Proverbs15:16 Walassay de'iyaa wolk'k'aama ak'uwaappe Med'inaa Godaa yashshatetsay de'iyaa guutsabay keeka.

Proverbs15:18 Hank'k'ettiyaa Asay walassaa kessee; shin hank'k'ettanaw elleellenna Asay walassaa irs's'issee.
Proverbs15:19 Azalla uraa metuu Aa ogiyaa ubbaan aguntsa dirssaa mala; shin suure uraa ogii dembbaa.
Proverbs15:20 C'inc'c'a na'ay bare aawuwaa nashechchee; shin booza na'ay bare aato kad'ee.

Proverbs15:31 De'uwaa immiyaa zoriyaa sisiyaa Asay aad'd'eeda eranchchatuwaana ittippe de'ana.

Proverbs19:29 K'iliic'iyaawanttoo pirdday
Proverbs20:1 Daro matsoyiyaa ushshaa ushiyaawe daro bidiseenne walassee; matsottiyaa Asay wozanay pac'c'eedda asaa.
Proverbs20:2 Kaatiyaa hank'k'uu gaammuwaa gudetsaa mala; Aa yiloyiyaa Asay bare shemppuwaa bolla pirddee.
Proverbs20:3 Palumiyaappe gas'an de'iyaawe aawoo bonchcho; shin booza Asay ubbay walak'ettanaw elleellee.
Proverbs20:4 Azalla goshshanchchay wodiyaa naagiide goshenna; hewaa diraw
Proverbs20:5 Asaa wozanaa halchchuu c'iimmo ollaa giddon de'iyaa haatsaa mala; shin wozanaama Asay hewaa duuk'k'iide kessee.
Proverbs20:6 Daro asatuu barenttu keekkatetsaa odiino; shin tumu ammanettiyaa asaa demmanawe oonee?
Proverbs20:7 S'illo Asay tooshii bayinna de'uwaa de'ee; Aa kaalliide
Proverbs20:8 Kaatii pirddanaw bare kawutetsaa araatan utteedda wode
Proverbs20:9 «Ta wozanaa geeshshaad; taanan nagarikka baawa» yaaganaw danddayiyaa Asay de'aneeshsha?
Proverbs20:10 Med'inaa Goday wordduwaa miizaanan yiggiyaawanttanne likke gidennaban makkiyaawantta is's'ee.
Proverbs20:11 Na'ay geeshshanne suure gidiyaawe I ootsiyaa oosuwaan erettee.
Proverbs20:12 Sisiyaa haytsaanne s'eelliyaa ayifiyaanne
Proverbs20:13 Gemishuwaan ne wodiyaa wurssoppa; neeni hiyyeessana. Beegotta; yaatooppe
Proverbs20:14 Shammiyaa asay
Proverbs20:15 Eray kumeedda haasayay work'k'aappekka ink'k'uwaa giyaa daro alo shuchchaappekka aad'd'eeda alobaa.

Proverbs20:20 Asay bare aawuwaa woy bare aato shek'k'ooppe

Proverbs28:5 Iita asatoo suure pirddaabay gelenna; shin Med'inaa Godaw goyinniyaawanttoo ubbabaykka gelee.
Proverbs28:6 Geella asaa gidiide
Proverbs28:7 Higgiyaa naagiyaa wodallay akeekanchcha. Shin patsenna shufurotuwaanna zuppetiyaawe bare aawuwaa yeellayee.
Proverbs28:8 Miishshaa dichchaw immiyaawaaninne yeluwaan durettiyaa Asay he mas'uwaa hiyyeesatoo keekkiyaa asaw shiishshee.
Proverbs28:9 Higgiyaa sisanaappe giide
Proverbs28:10 Suuretuwaa iita ogiyaa kaaletsiyaa uray bare bookkeedda ollaan barew kunddana; shin geeshsha Asay loobaa laattana.
Proverbs28:11 Dure Asay barena aad'd'eeda eranchcha giide k'oppee; shin akeekay de'iyaa hiyyeesay Aa paac'c'ee.
Proverbs28:12 S'illotuu s'ooneedda wode
Proverbs28:13 Bare nagaraa gentsiyaa uray aac'enna; shin paas'iyaawenne nagaraa aggiyaawe maarettanawaa.
Proverbs28:14 Med'inaa Godaw ubbaa gede yayyiyaa Asay anjjetteedawaa; shin bare wozanaa guzuntsiyaa Asay metuwaan gelana.
Proverbs28:15 Hiyyeesaa asaa mooddiyaa iita daannay gudiyaa gaammuwaanne koshateedda babark'k'iyaa mala.
Proverbs28:16 Wozani pac'c'eedda daannay bare asaa naak'k'ee; shin asaa naak'k'iyaawaa is's'iyaawe daro laytsaa mooddana.
Proverbs28:17 Asaa wod'eedda Asay hayk'k'ana gakkanaw bak'atiidde de'ee; Aa ooninne shiishshi akkena.
Proverbs28:18 Borii bayinnan hamettiyaa uray k'ohettennan attanawaa; shin geella Asay itti kutsan kunddana.
Proverbs28:19 Bare gadiyaa ootsiyaa uray katsaa kallee. Shin shufurotuwaa kaalliyaa uray ubbaa gede hiyyeesiide de'ee.
Proverbs28:20 Ammanetteeda uray daro anjjettana; shin durettanaw jaamiyaawe murettenan attena.
Proverbs28:21 Shaakkiide maaddiyaawe loenna; shin Asay guutsa ukitsaa diraw giidekka
Proverbs28:22 Uuzetiyaa uray durettanaw jaamee; barena hiyyeesatetsay oyk'k'anawaakka erenna.
Proverbs28:23 Asaa c'oo sabbiyaa uraappe seeriyaa uray guyyeppe galatettee.
Proverbs28:24 Bare aawuwaappenne bare aattippe wuuiide
Proverbs28:25 Uuzetiyaa uray walassaa dentsee; shin Med'inaa Godaan ammanettiyaawe kallee.
Proverbs28:26 Barenan ammanettiyaa Asay booza; shin aad'd'eeda eratetsan hamettiyaawe saro de'ee.
Proverbs28:27 Hiyyeesaw immiyaa uraw pac'c'enna; shin unttuntta be'anaappe giide c'iilimmiyaawe shek'aa akkana.
Proverbs28:28 Iita asatuu suntsettiyaa wode
Proverbs29:1 Daro gede seerina is's'iide
Proverbs29:2 S'illo asatuu suntsettiyaa wode Asay nashettee; shin iitatuu biittaa mooddiyaa wode Asay oolee.
Proverbs29:3 Aad'd'eeda eraa dosiyaa Asay bare aawuwaa nashechchee; shin woshummiyaa mac'c'a asatuwaa heeraan yuuyyiyaa Asay bare miishshaa wurssee.
Proverbs29:4 Tumuwaa pirddiyaa kaatii bare kawutetsaa woppu ootsee; shin mattaayiyaa maanaw yoratiyaawe bare kawutetsaa bayzzee.
Proverbs29:5 Bare shooruwaa sabbiide haasayiyaa uray
Proverbs29:6 Iita Asay gitii oyk'k'iyaawaadan
Proverbs29:7 S'illo Asay hiyyeesaa maataa bonchchee; shin iita Asay hewaa mala eraa ubbakka erenna.
Proverbs29:8 K'iliic'iyaawanttu kataman walassaa dentsiino; shin aad'd'eeda eranchcha asatuu hank'k'uwaa irs's'isiino.
Proverbs29:9 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha Asay booza asaa pirdda golle afooppe
Proverbs29:10 Suutsaa gussanaw jaamiyaa asatuu suure asaa is's'iino; k'ay s'illo asaakka wod'anaw koyiino.
Proverbs29:11 Booza Asay bare hank'k'uwaa yeddi bessee; shin aad'd'eeda era Asay bare hank'k'uwaa mittee.
Proverbs29:12 Itti suntsetteedda uray wordduwaa oduwaa akkooppe
Proverbs29:13 Hiyyeesaynne asaa naak'k'iyaa Asay ittibaa kos's'iino; unttunttu laaookka ayifiyaa Med'inaa Goday s'eelissee.
Proverbs29:14 Itti kaatii hiyyeesaw suure pirddooppe
Proverbs29:15 K'ayis'eeriinne seeray naanaatoo aad'd'eedda eraa immee; shin yedan dic'c'eedda na'ay bare aato kawushshee.
Proverbs29:16 Iita asatuu dariyaa wode
Proverbs29:17 Ne na'aa seera; yaatooppe
Proverbs29:18 S'oossay kaaletsiyaa kaalesuwaa akkena derii yeda; shin higgiyaa naagiyaa uray anjjetteedawaa.
Proverbs29:19 K'oomay c'o odo s'alan seeretti erenna; oduu aw gelinttokka I azazettena.
Proverbs29:20 Elleellee elleellee haasayiyaa uraa be'a erayishsha? Aappe booza uraw sintsanaw daro hidootay de'ee.
Proverbs29:21 Ne k'oomaw na'atetsaappee doommina
Proverbs29:22 Hank'k'etiyaa Asay walassaa dentsetsee; elle yilotiyaa Asay daro nagaraa ootsee.
Proverbs29:23 Otoruu asaa kawushshee; shin hokkiyaa ayyaanay de'iyaa Asay bonchchetee.
Proverbs29:24 Kayisuwaanna shaakkiyaa uray barena is's'iyaa asaa; I dabaaban tumuwaa odooppekka muretee; tumuwaa odana d'ayooppe k'ay
Proverbs29:25 Asaw yayyiyaawe he uraw p'ire gidee; shin Med'inaa Godaan ammanettiyaa Asay saro de'ee.
Proverbs29:26 Darotuu suntsatetsay de'iyaa asatuwaa awuddashiino; shin suure pirdday Med'inaa Godaa mataappe beettee.
Proverbs29:27 S'illotuu nagaranchchatuwaa shenetiino; nagaranchchatuukka suure uraa shenetiino.

Proverbs30:3 Taani aad'd'eeda eraa tamaarabeykke; Geeshsha S'oossaabaakka ayaanne erikke.
Proverbs30:4 Saluwaa pude kesiide
Proverbs30:5 S'oossay odiyaa k'aalay ubbay tuma; barekko bak'atiide biyaa ubbaw I gonddalle.
Proverbs30:6 Aa k'aalaa bolla ayaanne gujjoppa; gujjooppe I neena seerana; neeni worddanchcha gidiyaawaakka I k'onc'c'issana.

Proverbs30:8 Koyiruwaan

Proverbs30:12 Daro tunaa tuni uttiide
Proverbs30:13 Otoruwaa kumeedda asatuunne asaa kad'iide s'eelliyaa asatuu de'iino.
Proverbs30:14 Unttunttu achchay mashshaa mala gidina
Proverbs30:15 Ullatsatiw laau mac'c'a naanatuu de'iino. Unttunttu
Proverbs30:16 Hewanttukka: duufuwaa
Proverbs30:17 Bare aawuwaa k'iliic'iyaa na'aa ayifiyaa
Proverbs30:18 Taana heezzubatuu maalalissiino; oyddentsuu ubbaa taw gelenna.
Proverbs30:19 Hewanttukka: arggantsay saluwaana paalliyaa paaluwaa

Proverbs30:21 Heezzu yewotuwaan biittay k'aas's'ee; oyddentsuwaa ubbaa tookkanawukka danddayibeenna.
Proverbs30:22 Hewanttukka: ayilii kaateteedda wode
Proverbs30:23 asay is's'eedda mishirata asinaa geleedda wodenne
Proverbs30:24 Sa'aa bolla oyddu guutsa med'etatuu de'iino; shin unttunttu loytsi aad'd'eeda eranchcha.

Proverbs31:1 Hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteedda haasayay
Proverbs31:2 «Laa ta na'aw
Proverbs31:3 mac'c'a asan ne wolk'k'aa wurssoppa; he kaatetuwaa bayzziyaa mac'c'a asatuwaan ne akataa d'ayissoppa.
Proverbs31:4 «Limu'eelaa
Proverbs31:5 Unttunttu ushiyaa wode higgiyaa baliino; naak'etteedda asaa maataa sheneko giino.
Proverbs31:6 Matsoyiyaa ushshaa hayk'k'ana haniyaa urawunne sa'ay iiteedda uraw immite.
Proverbs31:7 Unttunttu barenttu mank'k'otetsaanne barenttu tugga de'uwaa dogana mala ushino.
Proverbs31:8 «Barenttu metuwaa odanaw danddayennawanttu diraw neeni oda; maaddiyaawe bayinnawanttu maataa diraw neeni dendda.
Proverbs31:9 Unttunttoo suure pirddaa pirdda; hiyyeesatuwaanne metootanchchatuwaa maataa naaga» yaagaade tamaarissaaddu.
Proverbs31:10 Wozanaama machchato ooni demmanaw danddayii? Ink'k'uwaa giyaa alo shuchchaappekka iza alaw.
Proverbs31:11 I asinay izo ubbabankka ammanee; aw de'anaw bessiyaawaappe ayaynne pac'c'enna.
Proverbs31:12 Aa bare de'uwaa laytsaa ubbaan aw loobaappe attina
Proverbs31:13 Suufiyaanne layinuwaa Aa koyaadde
Proverbs31:14 Aa zalanchchatuwaa markkabatuwaa mala; bare k'umaa haakko biittaappe ayaw.
Proverbs31:15 Aa bare soo asaw k'umaa katsanawunne bare mac'c'a k'oomatoo oosuwaa gishanaw
Proverbs31:16 Gadiyaa Aa koyaadde shammaw; bare kushiyan ootsaade demmeedda shaluwaan woyniyaa turaa tokkaw.
Proverbs31:17 Aa gooba oosanchcha gidiyaawaa s'alala gidennaan
Proverbs31:18 Aa bare wod'iyaa demmanaw minnaade zalaw; Aa ootsaadde k'amissiyaa diraw
Proverbs31:19 Aa bare sinddiriitan suk'k'aade
Proverbs31:20 Aa hiyyeesatoonne metootanchchatoo barewaappe c'oo immaw.
Proverbs31:21 I soo Asay ubbay hoiyaa mayuwaa mayyeedda diraw
Proverbs31:22 Arssaa bollan hiis's'iyaa mayuwaa sikkaw; liinuwaappe dadetteedda ochchaa teeraa malatiyaa mayuwaakka barew mayyaw.
Proverbs31:23 Gadiyaa c'imatuu shiik'iyaa dubbushan I asinay bonchchetteedda asaa.
Proverbs31:24 Liinuwaappe mayuwaanne sak'k'iyaa ootsa ootsaade
Proverbs31:25 Iza minonne bonchcho asaa; yiyaa laytsatoo iza ubbakka hirggukku.
Proverbs31:26 Aad'd'eeda eran Aa haasayaw; ammantsiyaa zorii I ins's'arssaappe kesee.
Proverbs31:27 Aa bare soo asaa de'uwaa injjeyanaw ubbaa gede oosuwaa ootsaadde de'aw; azalla hanuu I bollan beetti erenna.
Proverbs31:28 Izi naanatuu denddi ek'k'iide
Proverbs31:29 «Loobaa ootseedda daro mac'c'a asatuu de'iino; shin neeni unttunttu ubbaappe aad'd'aasa» yaagee.
Proverbs31:30 Malaa lootetsay allaalle kessenna; puulikka d'ayana; shin Med'inaa Godaw yayyiyaa mishirata
Proverbs31:31 Aa ootseeddabaw ubbaw iw izi kushiyaa zaarite; iza ootseedda oosuu ubbay dabaaban izo galatisso.

Ecclesiastes1:14 Saluwaappe garssa baggan haneeddawaa ubbaa taani be'aad; shin ubbabaykka mela; c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaawaa mala.

Ecclesiastes3:5 Shuchchaa laalanaw wodii de'ee; shuchchaa shiishshanawukka wodii de'ee. K'oomettanaw wodii de'ee; k'ay shaakkettanawukka wodii de'ee.

Ecclesiastes4:10 K'ay

Ecclesiastes4:16 Itti kaatii mooddiyaa Asay paydu bayinna c'ora gidanaw danddayee. Shin kawutaappe I kichchiyaa wode

Ecclesiastes5:6 Neena ne doonay nagaran yeggennaadan
Ecclesiastes5:7 Daro akumuwaa akumettooppenne woy k'ay darobaa haasayooppenne he ubbaykka mela; hewaa diraw
Ecclesiastes5:8 Itti kawutetsay bare biittan de'iyaa hiyyeesatuwaa naak'k'ishiininne pirddaa geellayishin neeni be'ooppe
Ecclesiastes5:9 Haray attina
Ecclesiastes5:10 Biraa dosiyaa uraw biri gidi erenna; durettanaw siik'iyaa uraykka miishshaa kalli erenna. Shin ha ubbaykka mela.

Ecclesiastes5:12 Oosuwaa ootsiyaa Asay guutsa min

Ecclesiastes5:16 Asi kallo yelettiide

Ecclesiastes6:1 Saluwaa gufantsan asaa bolla gakkiyaa loytsi iitabaa taani be'aad.
Ecclesiastes6:2 S'oossay asaw mas'uwaa
Ecclesiastes6:3 Itti Asay s'eetu naanatuwaa gakkanaw yeliide
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes6:5 I aawaa poo'uwaa be'ibeenna; de'uwaabaykka ayentto eribeenna. Hinkko bitaniyaawaappe aad'd'iide shemppiyaawe Aa.
Ecclesiastes6:6 Hewaa diraw
Ecclesiastes6:7 Asi daaburiide ootsiyaa ubbay barew miyaawaa demmanaassa; shin Aa uluu awudenne gidanawaa gi erenna.
Ecclesiastes6:8 Yaatina
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ayifiyaan be'iyaawe amottiyaawaappe keeka. K'ay hewekka c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaawaa mala mela.
Ecclesiastes6:10 Haniyaabay ubbaykka kasetiide kuushetti utteedda. Itti itti Asay waananaw de'intto
Ecclesiastes6:11 Haasayay c'orattiyaa wode
Ecclesiastes6:12 Hada gidiide
Ecclesiastes7:1 Gatii alo gideedda loo shittuwaappe loo suntsay aad'd'ee; yelettiyaa gallassaappekka hayk'k'iyaa gallassay loa.
Ecclesiastes7:2 Gibiraa golliyaa biyaawaappe
Ecclesiastes7:3 Miichchaappe kayyuu keeka; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ubbaa gede nashechchiyaawaa s'alalaa k'oppiyaa uray de'ooppe
Ecclesiastes7:5 Eeyyatuu sabbiide yes's'iyaa yetsaa sisiyaawaappe
Ecclesiastes7:6 Eeyyaa miichchay
Ecclesiastes7:7 Sugetsaa oosuu aad'd'eeda eranchchaa booza kessee; magans's'aa asaappe akkiyaawekka wozanaa bayzzee.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Ay yewoo gidooppenne
Ecclesiastes7:9 Hank'k'uu azallatuu haluwaa kesanaw go'ettiyaa miishshaa gidiyaa diraw
Ecclesiastes7:10 «Hai wodiyaappe kase aad'd'eeda wodii ayaw keeka gideedee?» gaade oochchoppa; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ha sa'aan Asay ubbay aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidanaw koshshee; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes7:12 Miishshay asaa iitaappe kammiide ashshiyaawaadan
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ane S'oossay ootseeddawaa akeeka! S'oossay geellayeeddabaa ooni suurissanaw danddayii?
Ecclesiastes7:14 New ubbabay giigeedda wodiyaan nashetta; k'ay metuu gakkiyaa wodiyaankka akeeka; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ha mela gideedda laytsan tawaan darobaa taani be'aad. Hewekka
Ecclesiastes7:16 Hewaa diraw
Ecclesiastes7:17 K'ay wodii bayinnan neeni hayk'k'ennaadan
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ha ubbankka S'oossaw yayyiyaa uray
Ecclesiastes7:19 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay aad'd'eeda eranchchatoo immiyaa wolk'k'ay tammu katamatuwaa mooddiyaa asatoo wolk'k'aappe daree.
Ecclesiastes7:20 S'illobaa s'alala ootsiidde
Ecclesiastes7:21 Asay haasayiyaa k'aalaa muliyaa hayzzaadde polana gooppa; neeni muliyaa hayzzana gooppe
Ecclesiastes7:22 K'ay neenikka ne huup'iyaan haratuwaa shek'k'eeddawaa ne wozanay eree.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hawaa ubbaa taani aad'd'eeda eratetsan pilggaade s'eellaaddi; yaataade
Ecclesiastes7:24 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay ubbaa gedekka haakuwaan de'iyaawaanne c'iimmabaa; yaatina
Ecclesiastes7:25 Taani eranaw
Ecclesiastes7:26 Taani hayk'k'uwaappe aad'd'iide c'ammiyaa hara ittibaa pilgga s'eellaade demmaad; hewekka
Ecclesiastes7:27 Eranchchay hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani kaala kaalaade
Ecclesiastes7:28 Hewekka
Ecclesiastes7:29 Taani k'oraade demmeedda harabay
Ecclesiastes8:1 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha asaa mala Asay oonee? Yewotuwaa ubbaa biletsaa eriyaawe oonee? Aad'd'eeda eratetsay pashikkissiide
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kaatiyaw azazetta; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ubbaa wode iita oosuwaa ootsoppa; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ubbabaa ootsanaw kaatiyaw maatay de'ee; yaatina
Ecclesiastes8:5 Aa azazuwaa poliyaa uray murettena; aad'd'eeda eranchcha Asay likke gidiyaa wodiyaanne ootsiyaa ogiyaa eree.
Ecclesiastes8:6 Itti asaa bollan dees'o metuu gakkinttonne
Ecclesiastes8:7 Sintsappe hanana timbbitiyaa eriyaawe baawa; hewaa diraw
Ecclesiastes8:8 Shemppuu shaakkettiide biyaa gallassi oyk'k'iide
Ecclesiastes8:9 Saluwaa gufantsan haniyaawaa ubbaa taani akeekaade k'oppiyaa wode
Ecclesiastes8:10 K'ay iita asatuu bonchchuwaan moogettishina be'aad. Hewaappe aad'd'iyaawekka k'ay
Ecclesiastes8:11 Aassi halchchiide iitabaa ootsiyaa gaasuu
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nagaranchchay s'eetu gede iitabaa ootsishina
Ecclesiastes8:13 Iitatuu S'oossaa yayyenna diraw
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ha sa'aan oosettiyaa itti hadabay de'ee; hewekka
Ecclesiastes8:15 Hewaa diraw
Ecclesiastes8:16 Taani aad'd'eeda eratetsay ayentto eranawunne Asay ha sa'aa bollan daaburiyaa daaburaa akeekanaw halchchaad; wurssetsan Asay gemishuwaa d'ayiide ootsiyaa duus's'enna oosuu de'iyaawaa be'aad.
Ecclesiastes8:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ha ubbaa yewotuwaabaa adussa wodiyaa taani k'oppeeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Ecclesiastes9:2 Dummatetsay bayinnan de'ishiina
Ecclesiastes9:3 Asaa ubbaa kaac'ay ittuwaa gidiyaawe
Ecclesiastes9:4 Hayk'k'eedda gaammuwaappe pas'a de'iyaa kanay keeka; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pas'a de'iyaa asatuu itti gede hayk'k'anaw de'iyaawaa eriino; shin hayk'k'eeddawanttu ayaanne erikkino. Unttunttu mulekka dogetti kichcheeddawanttu gidiyaa diraw
Ecclesiastes9:6 Unttunttu siik'uu
Ecclesiastes9:7 Baade
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ubbaa wode ne mayuu bootsa gido; ne huup'iyankka zayitiyaa oketa.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Saluwaappe garssa baggana S'oossay new immeedda ha mela de'uwaan
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ne kushii ootsanaw demmeeddawaa ubbaa ne kumentsaa wolk'k'an ootsa; ayaw gooppe
Ecclesiastes9:11 Taani saluwaappe garssaana harabaakka be'aad; hewekka
Ecclesiastes9:12 Hewaa bollakka k'ay
Ecclesiastes9:13 Saluwaa gufantsuwan taani be'eeddabay harabaykka de'ee; hewekka aad'd'eeda eratetsay wolk'k'aama leemiso gidiyaawaa.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Itti biittan itti guutsa Asay de'iyaa k'eeri katamatta de'aw; he katamatto itti wolk'k'aama kaatii olanaw denddee. Izo dooddeedda.
Ecclesiastes9:15 K'ay
Ecclesiastes9:16 Taani
Ecclesiastes9:17 Hewaa gidooppekka
Ecclesiastes9:18 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay olaa miishshaappe loa; shin itti nagaranchcha Asay daro loobaa bayzzee.
Ecclesiastes10:1 Hayk'k'eedda uduns's'etuu sawiyaa zayitiyaa shittuwaa s'ink'k'etsanaw danddayiino; hewaadankka
Ecclesiastes10:2 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha asaa wozanay Aa ushechchaw kaaletsee; shin booza asaa wozanay haddirssaw kaaletsee.
Ecclesiastes10:3 Eeyya Asay ogiyaan hamettiyaa wodekka
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ne kaappuu ne bollan hank'k'ettooppenne
Ecclesiastes10:5 Saluwaa gufantsan taani be'eedda hara iitabay de'ee; hewekka deriyaa mooddiyaawanttu ootsiyaa naak'uwaa.
Ecclesiastes10:6 Eeyyatuu daro d'ok'k'a suntsatetsaa oyk'k'iide de'iyaa wode
Ecclesiastes10:7 Taani
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ollaa bookkiyaa uray he ollaan I kunddana; k'ay gimbbiyaa dirssaa koliyaa uraa shooshshay dukkana.
Ecclesiastes10:9 Shuchchaa Aa sa'aappe aatsi yeggiyaa uray he shuchchaan deshettee; k'ay mitsaa k'oo'iyaa uraykka he mitsan deshettee.
Ecclesiastes10:10 Dulddumeedda kalttaa poshennan c'oo k'oo'ooppe
Ecclesiastes10:11 Shooshshay dukki diggina
Ecclesiastes10:12 Aad'd'eeda eranchchaa haasayay aw bonchchuwaa imissee; shin eeyyay bare doonaappe keseedda k'aalan I barew metuwaan gelee.
Ecclesiastes10:13 Eeyyay bare haasayaa booza k'aalan doommiide
Ecclesiastes10:14 Eeyyay darobaa haasayee. Gidooppenne
Ecclesiastes10:15 Eeyya Asay bare oosuwaan daaburee; I bare golle biyaa ogiyaa erenna.
Ecclesiastes10:16 K'eeri na'aa gideedda kawuunne wontta guuraanna gibiraa giigissiide
Ecclesiastes10:17 Bonchchetteedda kawuunne matsuwaassa gidennaan wolk'k'aanne minotetsaa demmanaw maaran miyaanne ushiyaa kaappatuu de'iyaa biittata galatetteeddaano.
Ecclesiastes10:18 Bitanii azalla gidooppe
Ecclesiastes10:19 K'umaa miyaawaaninne woyniyaa eessaa ushiyaawan nashechchay beettee; shin miishshay ubbabaa shammee.
Ecclesiastes10:20 Sisiyaawe baawa gaade ne wozanaa k'ofaan gidooppenne

Ecclesiastes11:4 C'arkkuwaa hanotaa naagiyaa ooninne katsaa zerenna; k'ay shaarii denddanaw naagiyaa ooninne bare katsaa c'akkenna.
Ecclesiastes11:5 C'arkkuu hak'anna bintto
Ecclesiastes11:6 Wontta guuran gidinakka omarssan
Ecclesiastes11:7 Poo'uu nashechchiyaawaa. Awa ayifiyaa be'iyaawekka loobaa.
Ecclesiastes11:8 Asi loytsi adussa laytsaa ha sa'aan de'ooppe
Ecclesiastes11:9 Neenoo yalagaw
Ecclesiastes11:10 Hewaa diraw

Ecclesiastes12:2 awaynne poo'uu

Ecclesiastes12:5 He wodii Asay d'ok'k'a sa'atuwaa kesanawunne aakko ogetuwaanna hemettanaw yayyiyaa wode

Ecclesiastes12:14 S'oossay oosuwaa ubbaa bollan

Isaiah1:1 Ooziyaane
Isaiah1:2 Salotuwaan de'iyaawanttoo
Isaiah1:3 Booray bare godaa eree; hariikka barena mooddeeddawaa zadaluwaa eree; shin Israa'eelatuu erikkino; ta asatuu akeekikkino.
Isaiah1:4 «Nagaraa ootsiyaa kawutetsaw
Isaiah1:5 Hintte ayaw makkalaa bolla makkalaa gujji gujji biitee? Ayaw k'aykka murettanaw koyiitee? Hintte kumentsaa huup'ii saketteedda; hintte kumentsaa wozanaykka daabureedda.
Isaiah1:6 Gediyaa birad'd'iyaappe huup'iyaa binnaanaa gakkanaw pas'atetsay baawa; madutsay
Isaiah1:7 «Hintte gaddii dirk'k'aletiide bayana; hintte katamatuukka taman s'uugetteeddino; hintte goshshaa hintte s'eellishin
Isaiah1:8 Yerusaalame katamay woyniyaa turaa naagiyaa daasiyaadan
Isaiah1:9 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday nuw amareeda zaratuwaa ashshenentto
Isaiah1:10 Hinttenoo
Isaiah1:11 Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Hintte yarshshuwaa daruu taw ayaa goii? Hanno gakkanaw hintte taw shiishsheedda s'uugetteedda orgge dorssatuwaanne d'iikkeedda mehiyaa mod'd'uwaa yarshshuwaa taani kallaad; korumaa booratuwaa
Isaiah1:12 Hintte taw goyinnanaw yiyaa wode
Isaiah1:13 Simmi hada yarshshuwaa ahiyaawaa aggite! Hintte c'uwissiyaa is'aanay taana sheneyee; aginaa s'eeruwaa hintte bonchchiyaa gallassaa
Isaiah1:14 Aginaa s'eeruwaa hintte bonchchiyaa gallassaanne keeretteedda hintte baalaa gallassatuwaa taani is's'aad; unttunttu taw tookuwaa gideeddino; taani unttuntta tookkaadde daaburaad.
Isaiah1:15 «Hintte kushiyaa mic'c'iide
Isaiah1:16 Meec'ettite; geeyite; hintte iita oosuwaa ta sintsaappe diggite. Iitaa ootsiyaawaa aggite;
Isaiah1:17 loobaa ootsanaw tamaarite. S'illo pirddaa koyite; unetteeddawanttu morggiyaa oyk'k'ite. Aawuu bayinnawanttoo pirddite; asinay hayk'k'eedda mac'c'a asatoo mootettite» yaagee.
Isaiah1:18 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday
Isaiah1:19 Hintte eeno giide
Isaiah1:20 Shin hintte is's'aaddi giide makkalooppe
Isaiah1:21 Ammanetteeda wolk'k'aama katamata waanaade sharmus'a gidaadee! Iza kase suure pirdday kumeeddaano; s'illotetsay kase I giddon de'eedda; shin hai asaa wod'iyaawanttu izi giddon de'iino.
Isaiah1:22 Ne biray shi'i kichcheedda; ne loo woyniyaa eessaykka haatsaana yeeletteedda.
Isaiah1:23 Hintte daannatuu makkalanchchatuwaanne kayisotuwaa lagetuwaa gideeddino; unttunttu ubbatuukka mattaayiyaa dosiinonne miishshaa yederssiino; aawuu bayinnawanttoo pirddikkino; asinay hayk'k'eedda mac'c'a asatuwaa mootuu unttunttukko shiik'enna.
Isaiah1:24 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah1:25 Taani ta kushiyaa ne bolla wotsana; ne shi'owaa k'uls's'us's'issaade geeshshana; neenana walaketteeddabaa ubbaa geeshshaade yedissana.
Isaiah1:26 Taani beniwanttu mala daannatuwaa
Isaiah1:27 S'iyoonee suure pirddan
Isaiah1:28 Shin makkalanchchatuunne nagaranchchatuu laauukka meana; Med'inaa Godaa aggiyaawanttu d'ayana.
Isaiah1:29 Wotsanaw doseedda wolaa diraw
Isaiah1:30 Bonc'c'ii k'ok'k'ofettiyaa wolaadan
Isaiah1:31 Minuu dalaa gidanawaa; Aa oosuukka s'iifa gidanawaa; unttunttu ittippe s'uugettanawantta; he tamaa toyissiyaawe d'ayana.
Isaiah2:1 Yihudaa biittaabaanne Yerusaalame katamaabaa Amoos'a na'ay Isiyaasi be'eeddawe hawaa.
Isaiah2:2 Wurssetsa gallassatuwaan Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Gollii kees'etteedda derii deretuwaa ubbaappe d'ok'k'iide beettana; zoozetuwaa ubbatuwaappekka bollaanna d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana. Kawutetsatuwaan de'iyaa Asay ubbay aakko zattana.
Isaiah2:3 Daro Asay yiide
Isaiah2:4 Kawutetsatuwaappenne kawutetsatuwaappe gidduwaan I pirddananne daro asatuwaa palumiyaa shaakkana. Unttunttu barenttu mashshaa maraashaa
Isaiah2:5 Hinttenoo
Isaiah2:6 S'oossaw
Isaiah2:7 Unttunttu gaddii biraynne work'k'ay kumeeddawaa; unttunttu shaloo zaway baawa. Unttunttu gaddii paray kumeeddawaa; unttunttu paraa gaaretoo zaway baawa.
Isaiah2:8 Unttunttu gaddii eek'atuwaan kumeeddawaa; unttunttu barenttu kushii ootseedda oosoo hokkiide goyinniino.
Isaiah2:9 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah2:10 Med'inaa Godaa dagamaappenne Aa anggaa bonchchuwaappe attanaw zaallaakko biite; biittaa giddon k'osettite!
Isaiah2:11 Asaa otoruu giiyana; Aa kilahuukka siilana; he gallassi Med'inaa Godaa s'alalay d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana.
Isaiah2:12 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday itti gallassaa keereedda. He gallassi otorettiyaawantta
Isaiah2:13 adussanne d'ok'k'a gidiyaa Liibaanoosa zigatuwaanne Baasaane wolaa ubbaa d'ayissana;
Isaiah2:14 d'ok'k'a deretuwaakka zoozatuwaakka dembbayana;
Isaiah2:15 katamaa naagiyaa adussa miis'atuwaa ubbaanne katamaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa mino gimbbetuwaa zik'k'issana;
Isaiah2:16 S'oossay gitanne loiyaa markkabatuwaakka haatsaan mitissana.
Isaiah2:17 Asaa otoruu zik'k'i gaana; Aa ayyuukka d'ayana. He gallassi Med'inaa Godaa s'alalay d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana;
Isaiah2:18 eek'aa ubbaykka ubbaanna d'ayana.
Isaiah2:19 Med'inaa Goday ha gadiyaa k'aatsanaw denddiyaa wode
Isaiah2:20 He gallassi Asay goyinnanaw med'd'eedda barenttu biraa misiletuwaanne barenttu work'k'aa misiletuwaa oc'c'otoonne hara kafotoo olana.
Isaiah2:21 Med'inaa Goday ha gadiyaa k'aatsanaw denddiyaa wode
Isaiah2:22 Simmi hayk'k'iyaa asan ammanettiyaawaa aggite! Asay ay maaddanee?
Isaiah3:1 Be'ite
Isaiah3:2 minotuwaanne olanchchatuwaa
Isaiah3:3 olaa gadaawatuwaanne gadiyaa ayissiyaawantta
Isaiah3:4 Taani yalaga attuma naanatuwaa unttunttu kaappuwaa kessana; guutsaa naanay unttuntta mooddana.
Isaiah3:5 Asay asaa bolla
Isaiah3:6 Itti Asay bare aawuwaa golliyaan bare ishatuwaappe ittuwaa oyk'k'iide
Isaiah3:7 I he gallassi bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'issiide
Isaiah3:8 Yerusaalame ganddigaaree; Yihuday kunddee; ayaw gooppe
Isaiah3:9 Unttunttu somuwaa malay unttunttu bolla markkattee; unttunttu barenttu nagaraa Sodooma asaadan awaayiino; barenttu nagaraa k'ossikkino. Unttunttoo aayye ana! Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah3:10 S'illotoo
Isaiah3:11 Iitatoo aayye ana! Unttunttoo iitana; ayaw gooppe

Isaiah3:15 Ta asaa ayaw kinchcheretsiitee? Hiyyeesatuwaa somuwaa ayaw gaac'c'iitee?» yaagee Goday
Isaiah3:16 Med'inaa Goday K'aykka
Isaiah3:17 Hewaa diraw

Isaiah3:19 haytsaa gutichchaa

Isaiah3:21 siid'iyaa migiduwaa
Isaiah3:22 minjja mayuwaa
Isaiah3:23 heregaa

Isaiah4:1 He gallassi laappun mac'c'a asatuu itti attumawaa oyk'k'iide
Isaiah4:2 He gallassi Med'inaa Godaa mitsaa tashii loananne bonchchettana; Israa'eeliyaa asaappe atteedawanttoo he gadiyaa katsay c'eek'k'onne bonchchuwaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah4:3 S'iyoonen attiyaawanttu
Isaiah4:4 Goday S'iyoone mac'c'a asatuwaa k'itaa meec'c'ana; pirddaa Ayaanaaninne s'uuggiyaa Ayaanan suutsaa gussiyaa bayzzuwaa Yerusaalameppe I geeshshana.
Isaiah4:5 Med'inaa Goday S'iyoone Deriyaa ubbaa bollanne yan shiik'iyaawanttu bolla gallassi shaariyaanne c'uwaa
Isaiah4:6 I gallassaa aawaa suuluwaappe ashshiyaa kuwaanne gotiyaappenne iraappe bak'ati attiyaasaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah5:1 Taani ta siik'iyaawoo Aa woyniyaa turaa tokkiyaa sa'aawaa siik'uwaa yetsaa yes's'ana. Taani siik'iyaawoo tu'eteedda zooziyaan woyniyaa turaa tokkiyaa sa'ay de'ee.
Isaiah5:2 Biittaa bookkiide
Isaiah5:3 Yaatina
Isaiah5:4 Taani ta woyniyaa turaa sa'aw ootseeddawaappe haraa ayaa ootsanawe atteedee? Loo ayfiyaa ayifee yaagaade naagishin
Isaiah5:5 Hai taani ta woyniyaa turaa sa'aa
Isaiah5:6 Taani he sa'aa bayeedda biittaa ootsana. He turay s'unk'k'ettennanne bulettenna; yaatina
Isaiah5:7 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday
Isaiah5:8 Sa'ay d'ayina
Isaiah5:9 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday taana hawaadan yaageedda; «He wolk'k'aama golletuu onana; he loo golletuwaan de'anaw Asay d'ayana.
Isaiah5:10 Tammu waatsaa booratuwaan tokkeedda woyniyaa ayifiyaappe itti oto gidiyaa gumetteedda woyniyaa eessaa s'alalay kesana; tammu k'una katsaa zerina
Isaiah5:11 Matsoyiyaa ushshaa koyanaw wontta guuraanna denddiyawanttoonne woyniyaa eessan s'uugettana gakkanaw
Isaiah5:12 Unttunttu shoobiyaan maasink'k'uu
Isaiah5:13 Yaatina
Isaiah5:14 Duufuu bare gomppaa aassee; bare doonaakka zaway bayinnawaa hanggee; Yerusaalamen de'iyaa wolk'k'aama asaanne yenkko daro asaa
Isaiah5:15 Asay ubbay tooshettananne kawushana; otorettiyaawanttu ubbaykka kawushana.
Isaiah5:16 Shin Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday
Isaiah5:17 He wode dorssatuu barenttu k'ooruwaan heemettiyaawaadan heemettana; dorssaa maratuu koletteedda duretuwaa golliyaa sa'aa maana.
Isaiah5:18 C'imuwaa wodoruwaan nagaraa
Isaiah5:19 «Ane S'oossay elleello! Nuuni be'ana mala
Isaiah5:20 Iitaa loa louwaa iita yaagiyaawanttoo
Isaiah5:21 Barena
Isaiah5:22 Woynniyaa eessaa ushiyaawan eretteeddawanttoonne matsoyiyaa ushshaa walakkanaw goobiyaawanttoo aayye ana!
Isaiah5:23 Mattaayiyaa akkiide
Isaiah5:24 Tamaa lac'uu dalaa oyk'k'iyaawaadaaninne mela maatay ees's'i d'ayiyaawaadan
Isaiah5:25 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah5:26 S'oossay haakuwaan de'iyaa kawutetsatoo malaataa d'ok'k'an essee; sa'aa gas'an de'iyaa morkketuukka suyk'k'ee. Unttunttukka ellekka jaamiide
Isaiah5:27 Unttunttu giddon daaburiyaabaynne wobbiyaabay baawa; unttunttuppe ittuunne gemishenna woy gisenna. S'eessan danc'c'iyaa Sak'k'iikka bilettenna; unttunttu c'aammaa dafuukka duus's'enna.
Isaiah5:28 Unttunttu tooray saataanna de'ee; unttunttu wonddaafiikka waas'etteedda. Unttunttu paratuwaa s'uguntsay zaallaa shuchchaa mala; unttunttu paraa gaaretuwaa yinggiretsay gotiyaa mala.
Isaiah5:29 Unttunttu guduukka gaammoo mala; wodalla gaammotuwaadan gudiino; unttunttu daariidde
Isaiah5:30 He gallassi unttunttu wolk'k'aama abbaa guntsaadan
Isaiah6:1 Kaatii Ooziyaane hayk'k'eedda laytsi Goday bollaninne d'ok'k'a araatan utteeddawaa be'aad; Aa mayuu Geeshsha Golliyaa kumeedda.
Isaiah6:2 Suraafeela geetettiyaa kiitanchchatuu aappe bollaanna de'iino; itti itti suraafeeliyaw usuppun k'efetuu de'iino; laau k'efetuwaan bare somuwaa kammee; laau k'efetuwaan bare gediyaa kammee; laau k'efetuwaan paallee.
Isaiah6:3 Ittuu ittuwaanna
Isaiah6:4 Unttunttu s'eessaa kooshshaan Geeshsha Golliyaa baasuu k'aas's'eedda; k'ay Geeshsha Gollii c'uwaan kumeedda.
Isaiah6:5 Yaatina
Isaiah6:6 Suraafeelatuwaappe ittuu yarshshiyaa sa'aappe k'ap'eedda tamaa bonk'k'uwaa akkiide paalliidde
Isaiah6:7 Tamaa bonk'k'uwaan ta doonaa bochchiide
Isaiah6:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Goday
Isaiah6:9 Goday hawaadan yaageedda; «Ba; ha asaw

Isaiah6:11 Yaatina
Isaiah6:12 Taani Med'inaa Goday asaa haassana; biittaakka mela kessana.

Isaiah7:4 Aw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Naagetta; hirggoppa; Sooriyaa asaa
Isaiah7:5 « ‹Sooriyaa gadiyaa Asay Efireema asaananne Ramaaliyaa na'aanna ne bolla iitabaa mak'ettiide
Isaiah7:6 «Ane Yihudaa gadiyaan woraajjiide
Isaiah7:7 Gidooppenne
Isaiah7:8 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah7:9 K'ay Samaarii Efireema biittaw huup'iyaa; Ramaaliyaa na'ay Samaariyaa katamaw huup'iyaa; hintte ammanuwaan minniide ek'k'ennan d'ayooppe
Isaiah7:10 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Akaazaw;

Isaiah7:12 Shin Akaazi
Isaiah7:13 Yaatina
Isaiah7:14 Yaatooppe
Isaiah7:15 I iitaa is's'anawunne louwaa dooranaw eriyaa wode
Isaiah7:16 Shin na'ay iitaa is's'anawunne louwaa dooranaw eranaappe kasetiide

Isaiah7:18 He gallassay gakkiyaa wode
Isaiah7:19 Yaatina
Isaiah7:20 He gallassi Goday Efiraas'iisa Shaafaappe hefintsa baggaappe huup'iyaa k'ans's'iyaa asaa s'eesana; ikka Asoore gadiyaa kaatiyaa; I yiide
Isaiah7:21 He gallassi itti Asay mes's'i itti maatsa miizzanne laau deeshshatuwaa s'alalaa ashshana.
Isaiah7:22 Gidooppekka
Isaiah7:23 He gallassi itti shaa biran washettiyaa shaa woyniyaa anotuu de'iyaa saan ubbaan kinddichchuunne aguntsa s'alalay mokkana.

Isaiah8:2 K'eesiyaa Ooriyoonanne Yibaarakiyaa na'aa Zakkaraasa ammantsiyaa markkatuwaa ootsaade taani suntsana» yaageedda.
Isaiah8:3 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah8:4 Na'ay
Isaiah8:5 Med'inaa Goday k'aykka taw hawaadan yaagiide haasayeedda;
Isaiah8:6 «Ha Asay loddan goggiyaa Salihooma haatsatuwaa is's'iide
Isaiah8:7 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah8:8 Kis's'iide goggiidde
Isaiah8:9 Hinttenoo kawutetsatto
Isaiah8:10 Olaa olettanaw mak'ettite; shin hintte mak'k'uu laalettana; hintte halchchuwaa haasayite; shin hintte halchchuwaa halana; ayaw gooppe
Isaiah8:11 Med'inaa Goday bare mino kushiyaa ta bolla wotsiide
Isaiah8:12 «Ha Asay makkala mak'k'o giyaawaa ubbaa makkala mak'k'o gooppite; unttunttu yayyiyaabaw yayyoppite woy dagammoppite.
Isaiah8:13 Hintte geeshsha gaanaw bessiyaawe Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaa; hintte aw yayyanawunne dagammanaw besse.
Isaiah8:14 I geeshsha sa'aa gidanawaa; shin Yihudaa gadiyaa asawunne Israa'eeliyaa gadiyaa asaw I d'ubbiyaa shuchchaanne kunddissiyaa zaallaa gidanawaa; Yerusaalamen de'iyaa asaw I gitiyaanne p'ire gidanawaa.
Isaiah8:15 Unttunttuppe daruu d'ubettana; kunddiidekka meana; p'iriyaan oyk'ettiidekka omoodettana» yaageedda.
Isaiah8:16 Taani odeeddawaa naaga; ta erissiyaa k'oomatuu giddon higgiyaa attama.
Isaiah8:17 Taani bare somuwaa Yaak'ooba zaratuwaappe gentsiyaa Med'inaa Godaa naagana; k'ay aan ammanettana.
Isaiah8:18 Taananne taw Med'inaa Goday immeedda naanatuwaa be'ite. Nuuni S'iyoone Deriyan de'iyaa Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaappe Israa'eeliyaw malaatanne markka.
Isaiah8:19 «Saasukkiidenne zuuzummiide haasayiyaa shareechchotuwaanne moyttilliyaa haasayissiyaawantta oochchite» yaagiide hinttena zoriyaa Asay de'ee. Hayk'k'eeddawantta pas'a de'iyaawanttubaa oochchiyaawaappe

Isaiah9:1 Gidooppenne
Isaiah9:2 D'uman hametiyaa Asay wolk'k'aama poo'uwaa be'eedda; k'ay bara d'uma gadiyaan de'iyaawanttoo poo'uu poo'eedda.
Isaiah9:3 Neeni kawutetsaa asaa darissaadda; unttunttoo nashshechchaa gujjaadda; Asay katsaa c'akkiyaa wode nashettiyaawaadan
Isaiah9:4 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah9:5 Woraajjiyaa olanchchatuwaa c'aammaynne suutsan munak'etteedda mayuu ubbay taman eetsiyaabaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah9:6 Na'ay nuw yeletteedda! Attuma na'i nuw imetteedda! Kawutetsay Aa hashiyaan wod'd'ana; Aa suntsay
Isaiah9:7 Aa kawutetsaa daruwawunne Aa sarotetsaw zaway baawa; hachchippe doommiide

Isaiah9:9 Asay ubbay

Isaiah9:11 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah9:12 Away doliyaa baggaappe Sooriyaa gadiyaa asatuunne away wulliyaa baggaappe Piliss's'eema gadiyaa asatuu barenttu doonaa hanggiide
Isaiah9:13 Gidooppenne
Isaiah9:14 Hewaa diraw

Isaiah9:16 Ha asaa kaaletsiyaawanttu
Isaiah9:17 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah9:18 Iitatetsay tamaadan s'uuggee; kinddichchuwaanne aguntsaa mi d'ayissee; sikkeedda woray ees's'ina
Isaiah9:19 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaa hank'k'uwaan gaddii s'uugettanawaa; asaykka taman eetsiyaabaa mala gidanawaa; ooninne bare ishaa ashshanaw k'oppenna.
Isaiah9:20 Unttunttu ushechcha baggappe bonk'k'ana; shin koshattanna; haddirssa baggappe maana; shin kallikkino; unttunttu barenttu yeleedda naanatuwaa maana.
Isaiah9:21 Minaase Efireema
Isaiah10:1 Iita higgiyaa kessiyaawanttoonne uk'k'unniyaa s'uufiyaa s'aafiyaawanttoo aayye ana!
Isaiah10:2 Hewaan unttunttu mank'k'otuwaa pirddaa geellayiino; hiyyeesatuwaa maataakka sugiino. Yaatiide ametuwaa ak'uwaanne aatta aawuu bayinna naanatuwaakka bonk'k'iino.
Isaiah10:3 Haakko gadiyaappe yiyaa metuwaan I hinttena muriyaa wode
Isaiah10:4 Hintte olan hayk'k'ana; k'achchiide goochchina
Isaiah10:5 Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Ta yiloo gatimaa gideeddanne ta ees's'iyaa hank'k'oo s'amaa gideedda Asoore gadiyaa asaw aayye ana!
Isaiah10:6 Taani Asooretuwaa S'oossaa erenna kawutetsaa bolla kiittana; unttunttu duretaa ubbaa omooddanaadaaninne bonk'k'anaadan
Isaiah10:7 Shin Asoore kaatii hawaa halchchibeenna; Aa wozanaykka hawaadan k'oppibeenna. I halchcheeddawe kawutetsatuwaa ubbaanna d'ayissanaassa.
Isaiah10:8 I c'eek'ettiidde
Isaiah10:9 Kalnno katamay Karkkamiisha katamaa mala gidenneeyye? Hamaata katamay Arifaada katamaa mala gidenneeyye? Samaariyaa katamaykka Damask'k'o katamaa mala gidenneeyye?
Isaiah10:10 Yerusaalameninne Samaariyaan de'iyaa masetteedda eek'aa misiletuwaappe dariyaa misiletoo goyinniyaa kawutetsatuwaa muranaw
Isaiah10:11 Taani Samaariyaa katamaa bollanne aan de'iyaa eek'aa misiletuwaa bolla ootseeddawaadan
Isaiah10:12 Goday S'iyoone Deriyaa bollanne Yerusaalame bolla bare ootsiyaa oosuwaa ubbaa poleeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah10:13 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah10:14 Asay kafuwaa golliyaan kushiyaa yeddiyaawaadan
Isaiah10:15 Tumu kalttay barenan k'ans's'iyaa bitaniyaappe
Isaiah10:16 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah10:17 Israa'eeliyaa Poo'uu tamaa gidanawaa; Israa'eeliyaa Geeshshaykka lac'uwaa gidanawaa; yaatiide Aa aguntsaanne Aa kinddichchuwaa itti gallassi s'uuggananne maana.
Isaiah10:18 S'oossay bare wora mitsaa bonchchuwaanne bare aradda gadiyaa bonchchuwaa d'ayissana; simmi hewe harggiyaa Asay siliyaawaadan silana.
Isaiah10:19 Aa woran attana mitsatuu loytsi guutsaa gidiyaa diraw
Isaiah10:20 He gallassan Israa'eeliyaappe atteedawaanttu barena shoc'eeddawanttun zemppikkino; shin unttunttu tumuwaappe Med'inaa Godaan
Isaiah10:21 Atetsay
Isaiah10:22 Neenoo Israa'eeliyaw
Isaiah10:23 Ee
Isaiah10:24 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah10:25 S'ii guutsaa wodiyaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah10:26 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday Oreeba giyaa shuchchaa matan Miidiyaamatuwaa shoc'eeddawaadan
Isaiah10:27 He gallassi
Isaiah10:28 Morkkiyaa wotaadaratuu Aata katamaa geleeddino; Migiroonan aad'd'eedino; barenttu olaa miishshaakka Mikimaasa kataman wotseeddino.
Isaiah10:29 Unttunttu gadiyaa aad'd'iyasaana pinniide
Isaiah10:30 Galliima asaw
Isaiah10:31 Maadimeena giyaa katamaa Asay bak'ateedda; Gebiima asaykka bare shemppoo k'osetteedda.
Isaiah10:32 Hachche morkkiyaa wotaadaratuu Nooba kataman de'iino; yan unttunttu barenttu kushiyaa k'aatsiidde
Isaiah10:33 Be'ite
Isaiah10:34 S'oossay sikkeedda wora kalttan k'ans's'ana; Liibaanoosikka Wolk'k'aama sintsan kunddana.
Isaiah11:1 Issey durumaappe aac'ay kesana; Aa s'ap'p'uwaappe ayfiyaa tashii kesana.
Isaiah11:2 Med'inaa Godaa Ayyaanay
Isaiah11:3 Med'inaa Godaw yayyiyaawaan I nashetee; bare ayfii be'eeddawaan c'oo pirddenna; woy bare haytsay siseeddawaan c'oo pirddenna.
Isaiah11:4 Shin hiyyeesatoo I s'illuwaan pirddana; sa'aan de'iyaa metootanchchatu yewuwaakka I suuretetsan pirddana. I bare ins's'arssaa gatiman sa'aa shoc'ana; bare doonaa shemppuwaan iitatuwaa wod'ana.
Isaiah11:5 S'illotetsay Aa s'eessaw danc'c'o gidanawaa; ammanettiyaawekka Aa miyyiyaw sak'k'iyaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah11:6 Jeerii dorssaa maraanna ittippe de'ana; maahiikka deeshshaa maraanna ittippe gisana; miizzaa maraanna
Isaiah11:7 Miizzatanne babantsaa geetettiyaa do'ay ittippe maana; unttunttu maratuukka ittippe gisana; gaammuu booraadan utulaa maana.
Isaiah11:8 D'antsaa d'ammiyaa na'ay shooshshaa ollaan kaa'ana; d'antsaa duutseedda na'ay wod'iyaa shooshshaa ollaan bare kushiyaa yeddana.
Isaiah11:9 Ta geeshsha deriyaan ooninne k'ohettenna
Isaiah11:10 He gallassi Issey s'ap'uu asaw malaataa gidiide ek'k'ana; kawutetsaa ubbay Aa koyana; I de'iyaa sa'aykka bonchchettana.
Isaiah11:11 He gallassi Goday bare asaa atotetsaa Asooreppe
Isaiah11:12 Kawutetsatoo malaataa I d'ok'k'u ootsiide dentsana; Israa'eeliyaappe laaletteeddawantta ittippe gatsana; Yihudaappe piskki geeddawanttakka sa'aa oyddu miizaanappe I shiishshana.
Isaiah11:13 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah11:14 Unttunttu away wulliyaa baggan de'iyaa Piliss's'eema gadiyaa bolla paalliide wod'd'ana; away doliyaa baggan de'iyaa asaakka unttunttu ittippe bonk'k'ana. Unttunttu Eedooma bollanne Moo'aaba bolla barenttu kushiyaa wotsana; Amoonatuukka unttunttoo azazettana.
Isaiah11:15 Med'inaa Goday Gibs'e miyyiyaan de'iyaa Zo'o Abbaa ubbaanna melissana; bare las'iyaa c'arkkuwaana bare kushiyaa Efiraas'iisa Shaafaa bolla dentsana. Yaatiide Asay mela ellekka pinnana mala
Isaiah11:16 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gibs'e gadiyaappe kesiyaa wode ogii de'eeddawaadan
Isaiah12:1 He wode hintte hawaadan yaagana: «Abeet Med'inaa Godaw
Isaiah12:2 «Be'ite
Isaiah12:3 Ashshiyaa pulttotuwaappe haatsaa hintte nashshechchan duuk'k'ana.
Isaiah12:4 He gallassi k'ay hintte hawaadan yaagana: «Med'inaa Godaa galatite! Aa suntsaakka s'eesite. Aa oosotuwaa kawutetsatuwaa ubbaa giddon erissite. Aa suntsay d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u geeddawaa awaayite.
Isaiah12:5 Med'inaa Goday wolk'k'aama oosuwaa ootseedda diraw
Isaiah12:6 Israa'eeliyaa Geeshshay hintte giddon d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u geedda diraw
Isaiah13:1 Amoos'a na'aa Isiyaasaw S'oossay Baabloonewaa k'onc'c'issina be'eeddawe hawaa.
Isaiah13:2 Mela deriyaa bolla banddiraa essite; hintte k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide
Isaiah13:3 Taani hank'k'etteeddawantta murana mala
Isaiah13:4 C'ora Asay c'abbottiyaawaadan
Isaiah13:5 Med'inaa Godaynne I bare hank'k'uwaa polissanaw go'ettiyaa miishshatuu biittaa ubbaa d'ayissanaw
Isaiah13:6 Med'inaa Godaa gallassay mateedda diraw yeekkite! He gallassay Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama S'oossaa mataappe bashshaadan yaana.
Isaiah13:7 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah13:8 Unttunttu dagammana; oytsaynne yeellay unttuntta oyk'k'ana. Yeluu oyk'k'eedda mishirattiidan
Isaiah13:9 Be'ite; mek'etsaa iisiide
Isaiah13:10 Saluwaa s'oolinttetuunne s'oolinttetuwaa c'itatuu barenttu poo'uwaa immennan is's'ana; awa ayfii doliide d'umana; aginayikka poo'ennan aggana.
Isaiah13:11 S'oossay hawaadan yaagee
Isaiah13:12 Atteeda Asay alo work'k'aappe aad'd'iide alana; Ofiira work'k'aappekka aad'd'iide alana.
Isaiah13:13 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah13:14 Shankkaappe bak'atiyaa gaaraadan
Isaiah13:15 Beetteeddawe ooninne c'adettana; oyk'k'etteeddawe ooninne mashshaan hayk'k'ana.
Isaiah13:16 Unttunttu guutsaa naanay unttunttu sintsan busakettana; unttunttu golletuukka bonk'k'ettanawaa; unttunttu mac'c'a asatuwaannakka wolk'k'an hara attuma asatuu gakettana.
Isaiah13:17 Be'ite
Isaiah13:18 Unttunttu wonddaafetuu wodallatuwaa wod'iino; guutsa naanatuwaakka yeddi maarikkino; unttunttu ayfii purggaiyaa naanatookka k'arettenna.
Isaiah13:19 Kawutetsatoo bonchchuwaa
Isaiah13:20 He gadiyaan mulekka Asay uttenna; woy yeletaappe yeletaa gakkanawukka yan Asay de'enna; Araba asaykka yan bare dunkkaaniyaa tolenna; dorssaa wudiyaa heemmiyaawanttukka yan barenttu wudiyaa allas's'issiino.
Isaiah13:21 Shin yan bazzuwaa do'atuu allas's'ana. Worakanatuu unttunttu golliyaa kumana; gutattuu hewan de'ana; bazzuwaa deeshshatuu hewan guppana.
Isaiah13:22 Unttunttu golletuwaan babark'k'ii waassana; unttunttu bonchcho kaatiyaa golletuwaankka worakanay boc'c'anna. Aa wodii matatteedda; gallassaykka gamenna.
Isaiah14:1 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa asaw k'arettana; Israa'eeliyaakka zaaretsiide doorana. Unttuntta unttunttu buzo gadiyaan wotsana; imatsatuu yiide unttunttunna gakettiide
Isaiah14:2 Daro kawutetsay Israa'eeliyaa asaa akkiide
Isaiah14:3 Med'inaa Goday hinttena hintte tuggaappe
Isaiah14:4 hintte Baabloone kaatiyaa bolla hawaadan yaagiide k'iliic'ana; «Uk'k'unniyaawe waan aggeedee; Aa hank'k'uwaa suuluukka waan atteedee!
Isaiah14:5 Med'inaa Goday Kawutetsatuwaa s'amaanne mooddiyaawanttu gatimaa mentseedda.
Isaiah14:6 Unttunttu asaa wurssetsi bayinna hank'k'uwaan shoc'eeddino. Barentta s'ooneedda asatuwaa k'ans's'ennan unetsiide de'eeddino.
Isaiah14:7 Biittaa ubbay unttunttuppe shemppiide
Isaiah14:8 Haray attina
Isaiah14:9 «Neeni yiyaa wode
Isaiah14:10 Unttunttu ubbaykka hawaadan yaagana; ‹Hekko neenikka nuwaadan
Isaiah14:11 Kase diitsaa diis's'iidde sabbiyaa ne bonchchuu Si'ooliyaan duge geleedda. Duuchchatuu neeni gisiyaa gisuwaa; gus'unetuukka neeni mayiyaa afilaa gidana› yaagana.
Isaiah14:12 «Neenoo wontta na'aw
Isaiah14:13 Neeni ne wozanaan
Isaiah14:14 Shaaretuu de'iyaa d'ok'k'aappekka huup'iyaw pude aad'd'ana; taani taana Ubbaappe d'ok'k'iyaa S'oossaa mala ootsana› yaagaadda.
Isaiah14:15 Shin neeni Si'ooliyaan
Isaiah14:16 «Neena be'iyaawanttu
Isaiah14:17 sa'aa bazzuwaa kesseeddawe
Isaiah14:18 «Kawutetsatuwaa kaatetuu ubbay bare duufuwaan duufuwaan bonchchuwaan gisana.
Isaiah14:19 Shin neeni is's'etteedda tashiyaadan
Isaiah14:20 Neeni mooguwaakka unttunttunna ittippe moogettakka; ayaw gooppe
Isaiah14:21 Unttunttu aawotuwaa nagaraa diraw
Isaiah14:22 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Taani unttunttu bollan denddana; unttunttu suntsaa
Isaiah14:23 Taani Baabloone Gutatta de'iyaasaanne haatsay eelliyaasaa ootsana; bashshaa pus'an taani Aa pittana. Taani Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday hawaa oday» yaagee.
Isaiah14:24 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagiide c'aak'k'eedda; «Taani halchcheeddawaadan hanana; taani k'oppeeddawaadankka polettana.
Isaiah14:25 Taani Asoore gadiyaa bitaniyaa ta gadiyaan mentsereetsana; ta deretuwaa huup'iyaan taani Aa yed'd'ana; Aa k'ambbaray unttunttu bollaappe
Isaiah14:26 Sa'aw muliyaw k'ofetteedda k'ofay hawaa; kawutetsatuwaa ubbaa bollan mic'etteedda kushiikka hawaa.
Isaiah14:27 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday hawaa k'oppeedda diraw
Isaiah14:28 Kaatii Akaazi hayk'k'eedda laytsi odetteedda k'aalay hawaadan yaagiyaawaa;
Isaiah14:29 «Hinttenoo Piliss's'eema asatoo ubbatuukka
Isaiah14:30 Hiyyeesatuwaa bayira naanay k'umaa maana; metootanchchatuu woppu giide gisana. Shin taani ne zariyaa koshan wurssana; k'ay neeppe atteedawaanttakka wod'ana.
Isaiah14:31 «Neenoo penggiyaw
Isaiah14:32 Kawutetsay kiitteeddawanttoo waagiide zaaranee? Med'inaa Goday ‹S'iyoono kees's'ee; k'ohetteedda Aa Asay I giddon k'osetti attiyaasaa demmeeda› yaagana» yaagiyaa k'aalay odetteedda.
Isaiah15:1 Moo'aaba biittaw S'oossay odeedda k'aalay hawaa: Moo'aaben de'iyaa Eera giyaa katamay itti k'amma kolettiide d'ayeedda; k'ay Moo'aaben de'iyaa K'iira giyaa katamaykka itti k'amma kolettiide d'ayeedda.
Isaiah15:2 Diboona katamaa Asay barenttu eek'aa golliyaan yeekkanaw d'ok'k'a sa'aa keseeddino. Moo'aaba gadiyaa Asay Nabonne Medaaba giyaa katamatoo hewaadan yeekkee. Huup'ii ubbay boatikichcheedda; buuchchaa ubbaykka meedetteedda.
Isaiah15:3 Ogii de'iyaa saan ubbaan unttunttu maak'aa mayyeeddino; golliyaa bollan dembbayi kees's'osaaninne dabaabaa bolla ubbaan unttunttu yeekkiinonne afotsaa holssayiino.
Isaiah15:4 Haseboona katamaa asaynne Elaale katamaa Asay waassiino; unttunttu waasuwaa kooshshaykka Yahaas'a giyaasaa gakkanaw sisettee. Hewaa diraw
Isaiah15:5 Taani Moo'aabaw wozanaappe yeekkaad; aan de'iyaa Asay S'oo'aaronne Egilaati-Shaliishiyaa giyaa katamatoo bak'ateedda. Unttunttu Luhiita ogiyaan yeekkiidde biino; baggatuu k'ay Horonayma biyaa ogiyaan
Isaiah15:6 Nimiriima haatsatuu to'eeddino; maatay meleedda; aac'aykka shulleedda; irs's'abay ubbaykka d'ayeedda.
Isaiah15:7 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah15:8 Moo'aaba yuushshuu ubbay waaso s'alalaa gideedda; unttunttu waasuu Egilayimanne Bi'eeri-Eliima gakkanaw sisettee.
Isaiah15:9 Dimoona katamaa haatsatuu suutsaa s'alalaa gideeddino; taani Dimoona katamaa bolla hewaappekka dariyaawaa ahana. Moo'aabappe kessi akkiide yiyaawanttu bollanne he gadiyaan pas'a atiide de'iyaawanttu bolla gaammuwaa yeddaade wurssana.
Isaiah16:1 Moo'aaba Asay bazzuwaa biyaa ogiyaan de'iyaa Selaa'a katamaappe yalaga dorssaa orggetuwaa Yerusaalamen de'iyaa biittaa mooddiyaawoo yeddite.
Isaiah16:2 Moo'aaba mac'c'a Asay barenttu de'iyaa golliyaappe gas'an laaletteedda kafotuwaadan
Isaiah16:3 Moo'aaba Asay Yihudaa asaa hawaadan yaagana; «Nuuna zorite; suure pirddite; seeta gallassan hintte kuwaa k'ammaadan kuwayite. Yederssettiyaawantta k'osite; bak'ati yeeddawanttakka aatsi immoppite.
Isaiah16:4 Moo'aabappe yedersseeteeddawanttu hintte giddon de'ino; unttuntta d'ayissiyaawanttuppe unttunttu k'osetti attiyaasaa gidite. Unttuntta uk'k'unniyaawanttu wureeddino; bashshay atteeda; unttunttu tuggayiyaawanttukka gadiyaappe d'ayeeddino.
Isaiah16:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah16:6 Yihudaa Asay hawaadan yaagana; «Moo'aaba gadiyaa Asay ay keenaa otorettintto
Isaiah16:7 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah16:8 Haseboona shooyk'atuunne Siibima woyniyaa tokkiyaa sa'atuu d'ayeeddino; unttunttoo tashii Yaa'izeera gakkiide
Isaiah16:9 Taani Yaa'izeera katamaw yeekkiyaawaadan
Isaiah16:10 Katsaa ayifiyaan kumeedda shoyk'aappe nashechchaynne hashshu guussay aketeedda. Woynniyaa tokkiyaa saankka mazimurii yes'ettenna. Nashechchan woyniyaa teeraa gumiyaa sa'aan gumiyaabay baawa. Taani gumiyaawanttu ililiya ililssaakka d'ayissaad.
Isaiah16:11 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah16:12 Moo'aabe bare d'ok'k'a sa'aa booppenne
Isaiah16:13 Med'inaa Goday kasetiide
Isaiah16:14 Shin hai Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Konttiraatiyaa oosanchchaa laytsaa payduwaadan
Isaiah17:1 Damask'k'o katamaabaa S'oossay hawaadan yaagee; «Be'ite
Isaiah17:2 Aruura katamatuu Asay de'enna sa'aa gidanawantta; hewan mehiyaa wudii allas's'ana; unttunttu yashissiyaawekka de'enna.
Isaiah17:3 Efireemeppe geesatuu
Isaiah17:4 S'oossay hawaadan yaagee; «He gallassi Israa'eeliyaa bonchchuu k'aarettana; Aa mod'd'uukka shoorana.
Isaiah17:5 Israa'eelii c'akkiyaawe ek'uwaan de'iyaa katsaa shiishshi oyk'k'iide
Isaiah17:6 Wogaraa k'aatsi simmina
Isaiah17:7 He gallassi Asay barena Med'd'eeddawaakko s'eelana; barenttu ayfiyaakka Israa'eeliyaa Geeshshaakko zaarana.
Isaiah17:8 Unttunttu barenttu kushiyan giigisseedda yarshshiyaa sa'aa s'eellikkino; Asheero giyaa eek'atti misiliyaa gidinakka

Isaiah17:12 Be'a

Isaiah17:14 Sa'ay k'ammiyaa wode
Isaiah18:1 Top'p'iyaa shaafatuwaappe hefintsa baggana de'iyaa k'efetuu giirettiyaa biittaw aayye ana!
Isaiah18:2 He gaddii kiitettiyaa asatuwaa Nayle Shaafaa bollaanna kiittee; k'ay shombbok'uwaa woliwoluwaan wotsiide
Isaiah18:3 Hinttenoo
Isaiah18:4 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah18:5 Katsaa c'akkiyaa wodiyaappe kase
Isaiah18:6 Unttunttu ubbaykka deriyaa huup'iyaan de'iyaa
Isaiah18:7 He wode adussanne liik'o asaappe
Isaiah19:1 Gibs'e biittaa S'oossay hawaadan yaagee; «Be'ite
Isaiah19:2 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama S'oossay hawaadan yaagee; «Taani Gibs'e gadiyaa asaa Gibs'e asaa bolla dentsana; unttunttu barenttu giddon ishay ishaana
Isaiah19:3 Gibs'e asaa ayyaanay gagettana; taani unttunttu halchchuwaa hada ootsana. Unttunttu eek'atuwaanne moyttilliyaa haasayissiyaa asatuwaa
Isaiah19:4 K'ay taani Gibs'e gadiyaa asaa itti mek'etsi bayinna godaa kushiyan aatsaade immana; itti mek'etsi bayinna kaatii unttuntta mooddana» yaagee Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday.
Isaiah19:5 Nayle Shaafaa haatsay melana; shaafaykka leelan leelan meli aggana.
Isaiah19:6 Zeero haatsatuu s'ink'k'ana; Gibs'e pulttotuu guus's'ananne toana. Shombbok'otuunne c'aretuu shullana;
Isaiah19:7 Nayle Shaafaa matan de'iyaa sa'atuu
Isaiah19:8 Moliyaa oyk'k'iyaawanttu kayyottana. Nayle Shaafaan gitiyaa yeggiyaa ubbatuu yeekkana; haatsaan gitiyaa yeggiyaawanttukka doc'c'ana.
Isaiah19:9 Paatetteedda talbbaappe liinuwaa ootsiyaawanttu
Isaiah19:10 Shimaynnetuunne keraa ootsiyaa ubbatuukka kayyotana.
Isaiah19:11 S'o'aane katamaa mooddiyaawanttu mulekka eeyya; aad'd'eeda eranchcha giyaa Gibs'e kaatiyaa zoriyaawanttu zoriikka damma. Yaatina
Isaiah19:12 Ne aad'd'eeda eranchcha asatuu yaatina hai hak'an de'iino? Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday Gibs'e bolla ootsanaw halchcheeddawaa ane unttunttu new odinonne neena erissino.
Isaiah19:13 S'o'aane katamaa mooddiyaawanttukka eeyyeeddino; Memppiisa katamaa mooddiyaawanttukka c'imetteeddino. Gibs'e asaa zariyaa giddoppe asaa kaaletsiyaawantta giide wotseeddawanttu Gibs'e baletseeddino.
Isaiah19:14 Med'inaa Goday unttunttu giddon geella ayaanaa walakkeedda; yaatina
Isaiah19:15 Gibs'ew Aa huup'ii woy Aa goyinay
Isaiah19:16 He gallassi Gibs'e gadiyaa Asay mac'c'a asaa mala gidanawaa. K'ay Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday unttunttu bollan wus'akkiyaa Aa kushiyaa be'iide
Isaiah19:17 Yihudaa gaddii Gibs'e gadiyaa asaa yashshiyaawaa gidanawaa; Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday unttunttu bollan ootsanaw k'oppeedda k'ofaa diraw
Isaiah19:18 He gallassi Gibs'e gadiyaan de'iyaa ichcheshu katamatuu Kanaane k'aalan haasayiyaawanttanne Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaw ammanettanaw c'aak'k'iyaawantta gidana. He katamatuwaappe ittuu
Isaiah19:19 He gallassi Gibs'e biittaw gidduwaan
Isaiah19:20 Hewe Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaw Gibs'e gadiyaan malaatanne markka gidanawaa; unttunttu barena uk'k'unniyaawanttuppe denddeeddawaan Med'inaa Godaakko waassiyaa wode
Isaiah19:21 He wode S'oossay Gibs'e gadiyaan eretteeddawaa gidanawaa; Gibs'e asaykka he gallassi S'oossaa erananne yarshshuwaanne katsaa yarshshuwaa akki yiide
Isaiah19:22 Med'inaa Goday Gibs'e shoc'ana; shoc'ananne patsana. Unttunttukka Med'inaa Godaakko simmana; ikka unttunttu watiwatuwaa sisiide
Isaiah19:23 He gallassi Gibs'eppe Asoore gakkanaw aakko oge kesana; Asoore Asay Gibs'e
Isaiah19:24 He gallassi Israa'eelii Gibs'enanne Asoorena heezzentso biittaa gidiide
Isaiah19:25 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday unttuntta hawaadan yaagiide anjjana; «Ta asaw Gibs'ee
Isaiah20:1 Asoore gadiyaa Kaatii Sarggooni kiitteedda olaa gadaaway yiide
Isaiah20:2 he wode Med'inaa Goday Amoos'a na'aa Isiyaasa hawaadan yaageedda; «Ba; ne bollappe maak'aa k'aara; ne gediyaappekka ne c'aammaa kessa» yaageedda; Isiyaasi S'oossay geeddawaadan haniide
Isaiah20:3 Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaageedda; «Ta k'oomay Isiyaasi Gibs'enne Toop'p'iyaa bollan gakkiyaabaw malaataa gidana mala
Isaiah20:4 Hewaadan Asoore kaatii
Isaiah20:5 Toop'p'iyaan ammanettiyaawanttunne Gibs'en c'eek'ettiyaawanttu yayyiide yeellatana.
Isaiah20:6 Abbaa matan de'iyaa Asay he gallassi hawaadan yaagana; ‹Be'ite
Isaiah21:1 Abbaa matan de'iyaa bazzoo odetteedda s'oossaa k'aalay hawaa. Gedissa baggappe gotiyaa c'arkkuu suraggiidde yiyaawaadan
Isaiah21:2 Itti yashshiyaa sas'ay taw k'onc'c'eedda. Aatsi immiyaawe aatsi immee; omoodiyaawe omoodee; Elaama biittaw
Isaiah21:3 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah21:4 Taana yiic'oyee; taana yashshay kokkorssee; taani amotteedda omarssay taw kokkorssaw laametteedda.
Isaiah21:5 Taani be'eedda sas'aan unttunttu gibiraa giigisseeddino; mins's'aafiyaakka hiis's'eeddino; yaatiide miinonne ushiino. Yaatishin
Isaiah21:6 Goday taana hawaadan yaageedda; «Ba; s'omoosiyaa asaa wotsa; I bare be'iyaawaa odo.
Isaiah21:7 Gammaama mehiyaa toggiyaawantta
Isaiah21:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah21:9 Be'ite
Isaiah21:10 Hinttenoo

Isaiah22:1 Sas'aa Wombbaa giyaa sa'aabaw S'oossay odeedda k'aalaa. Hintte ubbay golliyaa bollan dembbayiide ootseedda sa'aa keseeddawe ayaasee?
Isaiah22:2 Neenoo waasuu
Isaiah22:3 Hintte kaappatuu ubbay ittippe bak'ateeddino; unttunttu wonddaafii bayinan c'oo omoodetteeddino; unttunttu haako sa'aa bak'atooppenne beetteedda ubbatuu oyk'k'etteeddino.
Isaiah22:4 Hewaa diraw
Isaiah22:5 Goday
Isaiah22:6 Elaame bare paraa gaaretuwaananne paraa asatuwaana bare wonddaafiyaa oyk'k'iide yeedda; K'iira gadiyaa wotaadaratuu k'ay barenttu gonddalletuwaa giigisseeddino.
Isaiah22:7 Loytsi loiyaa hintte zanggaaratuu paraa gaaretuwaan kumeeddino; paraa asatuu Yerusaalame katamaa penggiyaa sintsan ek'k'eeddino.
Isaiah22:8 I Yihudaa geessotuwaa k'aareedda. He gallassi hintte wora golliyaan de'iyaa kaatiyaa olaa miishshatuwaa s'eelleeddita.
Isaiah22:9 K'ay hintte Daawita Katamaa giddon koletteeddasay dareeddawaa be'eeddita; zik'k'a sa'aa shiik'eedda haatsaa dagayi de'iita.
Isaiah22:10 Yaatiide hintte Yerusaalamen de'iyaa golletuwaa paydeeddita; gimbbiyaa mintsanaw golletuwaa koleeddita.
Isaiah22:11 Kase ec'a dalbbantsan de'iyaa haatsaa zaariide
Isaiah22:12 He gallassi Goday
Isaiah22:13 Shin be'ite

Isaiah22:15 Goday

Isaiah22:21 Ne mayuwaa Aa mayzzana; ne danc'c'iyaawankka Aa danc'c'isana; ne suntsatetsaakka aw aatsaade immana. I Yerusaalamen de'iyaa asawunne Yihudaa asaw aawuwaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah22:22 Taani Daawita golliyaa k'ulppiyaa Aa hashiyaan wotsana; I dooyana; ooninne gorddenna; k'ay I gorddana; ooninne dooyenna.
Isaiah22:23 Taani Aa ammantsiyaa sa'aan shikaaliyaadan d'ogana; I bare aawuwaa golliyaw bonchcho kaatetuwaa araataa gidanawaa.

Isaiah31:1 Maaduwaa koyanaw duge Gibs'e wod'd'iyaawanttoonne paran ammanettiyaawanttoo aayye ana! C'ora gidiyaa diraw paraa gaaretuwaan
Isaiah31:2 Shin ikka bashshaa ahanaw danddayiyaa aad'd'eeda eranchcha; bare geeddawaakka aggena; iitatuwaa golliyaa asaa bollanne iitabaa ootsiyaawantta maaddiyaawanttu bolla denddana.

Isaiah31:9 
Isaiah32:1 Be'ite
Isaiah32:2 Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan c'arkkuwaappe geemmiyaa saa
Isaiah32:3 S'eelliyaa asatuu ayfii c'iilimmenna; sisiyaawanttu haytsaykka hayzzana.
Isaiah32:4 Tafitafiyaa asatuwaa wozanay erananne akeekana. Deeddotiyaa asatuwaa ins's'arssaykka suure geeshshiide haasayana.
Isaiah32:5 Hawaappe sintsanaw eeyyi bonchcho asaa geetettenna. Iita Asay bonchchettenna.
Isaiah32:6 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah32:7 Uuzetiyaawaa uuzii iita; metootanchchay suurebaa haasayiide
Isaiah32:8 Loo uray loobaa halchchee; he loo halchchuwan minniide de'ee.
Isaiah32:9 Hinttenoo k'ofay bayinnan de'iyaa mac'c'awanttoo
Isaiah32:10 Itti laytsaappe guutsaa aad'd'ishshin
Isaiah32:11 Hinttenoo ishaluwaan de'iyaa mac'c'awanttoo
Isaiah32:12 Loiyaa shoyk'aynne ayfiyaa dors's'os's'eedda woynnii d'ayeedda diraw
Isaiah32:13 Aguntsaa buuraynne kinddichchuu ta asaa gaden mokkeedda. Asay nashettiide de'eedda golletuwaassinne nashshechchan de'eedda ha katamaw yeekkite.
Isaiah32:14 Miis'ay attana; daro Asay de'iyaa katamatuukka onana; geessuunne wochchiyaa gimbbetuu med'inaw mela gidanawaa; unttunttu wora haretuu nashettiyaasaanne dorssaa wudii hamettiyaasaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah32:15 Hewenne
Isaiah32:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Isaiah32:17 S'illotetsaa oosuu sarotetsaa gidanawaa; s'illotetsaa ayifiikka med'inaw woppatetsaanne ammanettiide de'iyaawaa gidanawaa.
Isaiah32:18 Ta Asay sarotetsay de'iyaa sa'aan
Isaiah32:19 Shachchaan woray diippooppenne
Isaiah32:20 he haatsaa ubbaa matan hintte katsaa zeriide
Isaiah33:1 Neenoo
Isaiah33:2 Abeet Med'inaa Godaw
Isaiah33:3 Ne kooshshay guuguntsaadan guummiyaa wode Asay bak'atee; neeni nuuna maaddanaw dendda ek'k'iyaa wode
Isaiah33:4 Gondduu shiik'iyaawaadan
Isaiah33:5 Med'inaa Goday bollan de'iyaa diraw
Isaiah33:6 I hinttenttoo hintte wodiyaa mintsiyaawaa
Isaiah33:7 Be'ite
Isaiah33:8 Aakko ogetuu oneeddino; ogiyaanna aad'd'iyaawe aggeeda. I bare c'aak'k'eteedda c'aak'uwaa koleedda; katamatuwaakka kad'eedda. Asaakka demibeena.
Isaiah33:9 Biittay kayyoteenne labbanee. Liibaanoosi yeellatiide melee; Saaroona giyaa aradda dilbbay mela biittaa gideedda. Baasaane giyaa deriyaaninne K'armmeloosa deriyaan de'iyaa mitsatuwaa haytsay k'ok'k'ofettee.
Isaiah33:10 Med'inaa Goday kawutetsatoo hawaadan yaagee; «Hai taani denddana; hai taani bonchchettana; hai taani d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana.
Isaiah33:11 Hintte utulaa shahaariide
Isaiah33:12 Asay taman s'uugetteedda bidintsaa mala gidanawaa; k'ay k'ans's'ettiide
Isaiah33:13 Hinttenoo
Isaiah33:14 S'iyoonen de'iyaa nagaranchchatuu yayyeeddino; S'oossaw gidennawantta kokkorssay oyk'k'eedda. Hewaa diraw
Isaiah33:15 S'illotetsan hamettiyaawe
Isaiah33:16 he uray d'ok'k'asaan de'ana. I bak'atiide attana sa'aykka mino zaallaa de'uwaa gidanawaa; Aa ukitsaykka aw imettana; I ushiyaa haatsaykka pac'c'enna.
Isaiah33:17 Hintte ayifetuu kaatiyaa Aa puulaana be'ana; haakkiide de'iyaa biittaakka be'ana.
Isaiah33:18 Hintte wozanay
Isaiah33:19 Hintte k'areti bayinna asatuwaa
Isaiah33:20 Nuuni nu baalaa bonchchiyaa S'iyoone katamaa be'ite! Woppu giide de'iyaasaa
Isaiah33:21 Shin Med'inaa Goday nuw he sa'aan bare wolk'k'aama wolk'k'aa k'onc'c'issana. He sa'ay aakko shaafatuunne goggiyaa haatsatuwaa mala gidanawaa. Laaggiyaa woluwoluu Aa bollaanna baanaw danddayenna; wolk'k'aama markkabiikka yaana aad'anaw danddayenna.
Isaiah33:22 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah33:23 Ne wodoruwaa k'ashuu sholeedda; markkabiyaa tuussaa Aa sa'aan minisi oyk'k'anaw woy sharaakka s'agaaganaw danddayenna. He wode daro omoodiide aheeddabay shaakettana; haray attina
Isaiah33:24 S'iyoonen de'iyaa ooninne
Isaiah34:1 Hinttenoo
Isaiah34:2 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah34:3 Unttunttuppe wod'eeddawanttu olettana; unttunttu anhay s'ink'k'ana. Wogga deretuu unttunttu suutsan kametana.
Isaiah34:4 Saluwaa s'oolinttetuu ubbay siilana; salotuu warak'ataadan s'aas'ettana. Unttunttu s'oolinttetuu ubbay woyniyaappe haytsay k'ok'ofettiyaawaadan
Isaiah34:5 Ta mashshay salotuwaa giddon alana gakkanaw ushsheedda. Be'ite
Isaiah34:6 Med'inaa Godaw Boos'ira giyaa kataman yarshshuu
Isaiah34:7 K'ay mentsatuu
Isaiah34:8 Ayaw gooppe
Isaiah34:9 Goggiyaa Eedooma haatsatuu shidiyaw
Isaiah34:10 Tamaykka k'amman gallassan toenna; Aa c'uwaykka med'inaw c'uwattana. Eedooma biittay yeletaappe yeletaa gakkanaw
Isaiah34:11 Shin s'inggilliinne k'us'arssay Aa laattana; guttotuunne k'uuruu aan de'ana. S'oossay Eedooma bolla koletsaa likkiyaa wodoruwaanne melatetsaa likkiyaa tumbbiyaa piddi ootsiide yeddana.
Isaiah34:12 He gadiyaan kaatetiyaawe d'ayana; kaappatuukka hewaappe kichchana.
Isaiah34:13 Aa golletuwaan aguntsay
Isaiah34:14 Wora do'atuu godaretuwaana gakettana; tuna ayyaanatuu ittuu ittuwaanna s'eesettana; k'amma s'alahetuu wod'd'iide
Isaiah34:15 Gutatta yan golliyaa kees's'ana; k'uuk'k'ulleedda k'uuk'k'ulletuwaa hap'p'aade k'os'ana. Bare maratuwaakka bare k'efetuwaa garssan hap'p'ana; k'ay gac'etuu barenttu laggiyaanna laggiyaanna he sa'aa shiik'ana.
Isaiah34:16 Med'inaa Godaa mas'aafaappe koyiide nabbabite. S'oossaa doonay azazeedda dirawunne Aa ayyaanay shiishsheedda diraw
Isaiah34:17 I unttunttoo saamaa kesseedda; Aa kushii unttunttoo gadiyaa wordduwaan shaakkeedda; unttunttu Aa med'inaw mooddana; yeletaappe yeletaa gakkanaw
Isaiah35:1 Biittaa bazzuunne mela biittay nashettana; Mela biittay nashshechchaa pooc'u giidde
Isaiah35:2 I daroppe c'iishshaana; pooc'u giide nashshechchan yes's'ana. Liibaanoosa bonchchuunne K'armmeloosanne Saaroona gitatetsay imettana; unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa bonchchuwaanne nu S'oossaa gitatetsaa be'ana.
Isaiah35:3 Daabureedda kushetuwaanne arggaac'eedda gulbbataa mintsetsite.
Isaiah35:4 Wozanaan yashshay de'iyaawantta
Isaiah35:5 He wode
Isaiah35:6 Wobbatuwaa geniyaadan guppana; duudetuukka nashshechchan yes's'ana; bazzuwaan haatsay melosaan pulttuu d'uuk'k'ana.
Isaiah35:7 S'uuggiyaa shafii dagatteedda haatsaa gidanawaa; mela biittay haatsaa pulttana; worakanatuu allas's'iyaasan maatay mak'k'aynne c'arii dolana.
Isaiah35:8 Yan aakko ogii de'ana; ikka Geeshshatetsaa Ogiyaa geetettana. Geeshsha gidennawanttu he ogiyaanna aad'd'ikkino. Shin I geeshshatuwaassa gidanawaa; iita eeyyatuu aan simerettikkino.
Isaiah35:9 Yan gaammuu de'enna; yashshiyaa do'atuukka hewaana aad'd'ikkino; yaanikka beettikkino; shin wozetteeddawanttu s'alalay hamettana.
Isaiah35:10 Med'inaa Goday wozeeddawanttu simmana; yes's'iiddi

Isaiah36:9 Neeni
