1Thessalonians1:2 Nuuni woosaan S'oossaa galatiidde
1Thessalonians1:3 Nuuni nu S'oossaa
1Thessalonians1:4 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians1:5 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians1:6 K'ay hinttenttu daro waayettooppekka
1Thessalonians1:7 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians1:8 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians1:9 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians1:10 K'ay S'oossaa Na'ay Yesuusi
1Thessalonians2:1 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians2:2 Shin nuuni hinttekko yaanaappe kase Pilip'p'isiyoosa giyaa katamaan waayetteeddawaanne boretteeddawaa hinttenttu eriita; daro p'alk'k'etsay de'ooppekka
1Thessalonians2:3 Nuuni hinttena woossiyaawe baliide woy tunatetsaan woy geniyaan gidenna.
1Thessalonians2:4 Shin S'oossay wonggalaa hadaraa akkanaw nuuni ammanettiyaawantta gidina
1Thessalonians2:5 Nuuni hinttekko c'immiyaa haasayaanna
1Thessalonians2:6 Nuuni asaappe
1Thessalonians2:7 Nuuni Kiristtoosi kiitteeddawantta gidiidde
1Thessalonians2:8 Hinttenttu nuw daro alo gideedda diraw
1Thessalonians2:9 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians2:10 Nu de'uu hinttenttu matan
1Thessalonians2:11 Nuuni hinttenttoo huup'iyaan huup'iyaan aawuu bare naanaw haniyaawaadan haneeddawaa eriita.
1Thessalonians2:12 Nuuni hinttena zoreeddo; mentsetseeddonne hinttenttoo markkatteeddo. Hewenneekka hinttena s'eeseedda S'oossaa nashechchiyaa de'uwaa hinttenttu de'anaadananne Aa kawutetsaanne Aa bonchchuwaa gelanaaddaana.
1Thessalonians2:13 Hintte nuuppe S'oossaa k'aalaa tuma gideeddawaadan akkeedda wode
1Thessalonians2:14 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians2:15 He Ayihudatuu Godaa Yesuusanne nabatuwaa wod'eeddino; k'ay nuuna yedersseeddino. Unttunttu S'oossaa nashechchikkino; asaa ubbaakka is's'iino.
1Thessalonians2:16 Ayihuda gidenna Asay attana mala
1Thessalonians2:17 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians2:18 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians2:19 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians2:20 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians3:1 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians3:2 Hinttena zoranaadaaninne hinttenttu ammanuwaan hinttena minisanaadan
1Thessalonians3:3 Ha waayiyaa gaasuwaan hintteppe ooninne guyye simmenna mala
1Thessalonians3:4 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians3:5 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians3:6 Shin hai S'imootoosi hinttenttu matappe nuukko yiide
1Thessalonians3:7 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians3:8 Godan minniide hinttenttu de'ooppe
1Thessalonians3:9 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians3:10 Nuuni hinttena be'anawunne hinttenttu ammanoo pac'c'eeddawaa kuntsanaw
1Thessalonians3:11 Nu Aawuu
1Thessalonians3:12 Nuuni hinttena loytsi siik'iyaawaadan
1Thessalonians3:13 Nu Goday Yesuusi bare geeshshatuwaa ubbaanna yiyaa wode
1Thessalonians4:1 Simmi wurssetsaan
1Thessalonians4:2 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians4:3 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians4:4 Hinttenttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan geeshshatetsaaninne bonchchuwaan hinttenttu machchiyaanna wooti de'anentto eranaw besseeppe attin
1Thessalonians4:5 S'oossaa erenna ammanenna asatuwaadan
1Thessalonians4:6 Nuuni k'ay kase hinttenttoo odeeddawaadaninne hinttena minisi zoreeddawaadan
1Thessalonians4:7 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians4:8 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians4:9 Hintte hinttenttu huup'iyaan ittuu ittuwaa siik'anaadan
1Thessalonians4:10 K'ay Mak'idooniyaa biittaa ubbaan de'iyaa ishatuwaa ubbatuwaa tumu hinttenttu siik'iita. Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians4:11 Nuuni kase hinttenttoo odeeddawaadan
1Thessalonians4:12 Hewaa gidooppe
1Thessalonians4:13 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians4:14 Nuuni Yesuusi hayk'k'eeddawaanne k'ay hayk'uwaappe I denddeeddawaa ammaneetto; hewaadankka
1Thessalonians4:15 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians4:16 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians4:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Thessalonians4:18 Hewoo
1Thessalonians5:1 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians5:2 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians5:3 Asay
1Thessalonians5:4 Shin nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians5:5 Hintte ubbay poo'uwaa asanne gallassaa asaa; nuuni k'ammaa asaa woy d'umaa asaa gidokko.
1Thessalonians5:6 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians5:7 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians5:8 Shin nuuni gallassaa asaa gidiyaawanttu wogaan de'anaw bessee. Nuuni ammanuwaanne siik'uwaa tiraan wotsiyaa olaa miishshaadan oyk'k'iide
1Thessalonians5:9 Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians5:10 Nuuni pas'a gidina woy hayk'k'eeddawantta gidina
1Thessalonians5:11 Hewaa diraw
1Thessalonians5:12 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians5:13 Unttunttu ootsiyaa oosuwaa diraw
1Thessalonians5:14 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians5:15 Ooninne iitaa diraw iitaa zaarenna mala naagettite; shin ubbaa wode
1Thessalonians5:16 Ubbaa wode nashettite.
1Thessalonians5:17 Ubbaa wode k'ans's'ennaan S'oossaa woossite.
1Thessalonians5:18 Ubbabaan galatite. Ayaw gooppe
1Thessalonians5:19 Geeshsha Ayaanaa tamaa toyissoppite.
1Thessalonians5:20 Timbbitiyaa k'aalaa kad'oppite.
1Thessalonians5:21 Ubbabaakka paac'c'ite. Loobaa oyk'k'ite.
1Thessalonians5:22 Iita oosuwaa ubbaappe haakkite.
1Thessalonians5:23 Sarotetsaa S'oossay bare huup'ew hinttena ubbabaan polo geeshsho; k'ay nu Goday Yesuusi Kiristtoosi yiyaa wode
1Thessalonians5:24 Hinttena s'eesiyaawe ammanetteedawaa; k'ay hewaa I polana.
1Thessalonians5:25 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1Thessalonians5:26 Ishatuwaa ubbaa geeshsha yeruwaa yeriide sarotite.
1Thessalonians5:27 Hintte ha dabddaabbiyaa geeshsha ishatuwaa ubbaw nabbabanaadan
1Thessalonians5:28 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ittippe gido.
2Thessalonians1:1 Nuuni P'awuloosi
2Thessalonians1:2 S'oossaa nu Aawuwaappenne Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosappe
2Thessalonians1:3 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians1:4 Hewaa diraw
2Thessalonians1:5 Hinttenttu waayettiyaa S'oossaa kawutetsaw bessiyaawantta gidiide paydettana mala
2Thessalonians1:6 S'oossay tumu pirddaa pirddana. Goday Yesuusi bare wolk'k'aama kiitanchchatuwaanna tamaa lac'uwaa giddon saluwaappe yiyaa wode
2Thessalonians1:7 
2Thessalonians1:8 K'ay S'oossay barena erennawanttanne nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa wonggalaa mishiraachchoo azazettenawantta murana.
2Thessalonians1:9 He gallassi I bare geeshshatuwaan bonchchettanawunne k'ay barena ammaniyaa ubbatuwaan sabettanaw yiyaa wode
2Thessalonians1:10 
2Thessalonians1:11 Nuuni hinttenttoo ubbaa wode S'oossaa woossiyaawe hewaassa. Nu S'oossay s'eeseedda de'oo hinttentta bessiyaawantta giide paydanaadan
2Thessalonians1:12 Hewaan nu S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaaninne k'ay nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsan
2Thessalonians2:1 Hai nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians2:2 timbbitiyaa Asay hinttenttoo odiyaawaan woy hara asaappe siseedda k'aalaan
2Thessalonians2:3 Hinttentta ooninne ay ogiyaaninne baletsoppo. Ayaw gooppe
2Thessalonians2:4 Asay goyinniyaa ubbabaanne Asay S'oossaa giyaa ubbabaa I is's'ana. I barena unttunttu ubbaappe d'ok'k'u ootsana. K'ay haray atto S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa geli uttiidekka
2Thessalonians2:5 Hinttenttu hassaykkitee? Taani hewaa hinttenttoo hinttenanna de'aadde odaaddi.
2Thessalonians2:6 I bare wodiyaan yaanaappe attin
2Thessalonians2:7 Ayaw gooppe
2Thessalonians2:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
2Thessalonians2:9 He makkalanchchay Sees'aanaa oosuwaan yiide
2Thessalonians2:10 Hewaadankka
2Thessalonians2:11 Hewaa diraw
2Thessalonians2:12 
2Thessalonians2:13 Shin Goday siik'iyaa nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians2:14 S'oossay hinttentta nuuni hinttenttoo odeedda nu mishiraachchuwaa k'aalaa baggana s'eeseeddawe
2Thessalonians2:15 Simmi nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians2:16 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi bare huup'iyaan k'ay S'oossay
2Thessalonians2:17 
2Thessalonians3:1 Wurssetsaan nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians3:2 K'ay Asay ubbay ammanenna diraw
2Thessalonians3:3 Shin Goday ammantsiyaawaa; I hinttena mentsetsananne k'ay iitaappekka naagana.
2Thessalonians3:4 Nuuni hinttena azaziyaawaa hinttenttu hai ootsiyaawaanne k'ay sintsappekka ootsanawaa Goday nuuna hinttewaan ammantsee.
2Thessalonians3:5 Goday hinttenttu wozanaa S'oossaa siik'uwaakkonne Kiristtoosi immiyaa danddayaakko kaaletso.
2Thessalonians3:6 Nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians3:7 Ayaw gooppe
2Thessalonians3:8 Nuuni hintteppe oossinne tookuwaa gidenna mala
2Thessalonians3:9 Nuuni hewaa ootseeddawe hinttenttu nuwaadan haniide de'anaadan
2Thessalonians3:10 Ayaw gooppe
2Thessalonians3:11 Ayaw gooppe
2Thessalonians3:12 Nuuni hewanttu mala asatuu maara de'uwaa de'anaadaaninne ootsiide k'umaa maanaadan
2Thessalonians3:13 Shin hinttenttu nuunaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
2Thessalonians3:14 K'ay nuuni ha dabddaabbiyaan kiitteedda kiitaw azazettena uray ooninne de'ooppe
2Thessalonians3:15 Shin ishaadan Aa seeriteppe attin
2Thessalonians3:16 Sarotetsaa Goday bare huup'iyaan hinttenttoo ubbaa wodenne ubbaa baggana sarotetsaa immo. Goday hinttenanna ubbaanna gido.
2Thessalonians3:17 Taani P'awuloosi
2Thessalonians3:18 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna gido.
1Timothy1:1 Nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaynne nuuni be'ana giide nashechchan naagiyaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi azazeedda azazuwaadan
1Timothy1:2 ammanuwaa baggana ta tumu na'aw
1Timothy1:3 Taani Mak'idooniyaa baade new geeddawaadan
1Timothy1:4 Unttunttu tossaa odiyaawaanne barenttu zariyaa gayriyaawaa agganaadan oda. Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy1:5 Ha azazoo waanna k'ofay geeshsha wozanaappe
1Timothy1:6 Itti itti asatuu hawaa aggiide
1Timothy1:7 Unttunttu ayaa haasayinttonne woy barenttun ammanettiide odiyaabay ayentto erikkino; shin S'oossaa higgiyaa tamaarissiyaawantta gidanaw koyyiino.
1Timothy1:8 Asay bessiyaawaadan higgiyan goettooppe
1Timothy1:9 Ittibaa akeekanaw koshshee. Higgii loo asaw med'ettibeenna. Shin higgiyaa mentsiyaawanttoo
1Timothy1:10 woshummanaw kajjeeliyaawanttoo
1Timothy1:11 He tumo timirttii anjjetteedda S'oossay taani awaayana mala
1Timothy1:12 Taani ootsiyaa kiitaan taw wolk'k'aa immeedda nu Godaa Kiristtoosa Yesuusa galatay. Taana bare oosanchchaa suntsiide
1Timothy1:13 Taani hawaappe kase Aa boriyaawaa
1Timothy1:14 K'ay nu Goday zaway baynna bare aad'd'o keekatetsaa ta bollan gussiide
1Timothy1:15 Kiristtoosa Yesuusi nagaranchchatuwaa ashshanaw ha sa'aa yeedda giyaa haasayay ammanetteedawaanne Asay ubbay tuma giide akkanaw bessiyaawaa. Ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa nagaranchchay taana.
1Timothy1:16 Shin med'inaa de'uwaa akkanaw Aan ammananaw bessiyaa asaw taani leemisuwaa gidanaadan
1Timothy1:17 Ayfiyaan beettena med'inaa S'oossaw Ittoo
1Timothy1:18 Ta na'aa S'imootoosaa
1Timothy1:19 Ammanuunne loo suure wozanay new de'o. Ittuu ittuu barenttu suure wozanaa yeggi aggiide
1Timothy1:20 S'oossaa boriyaawaa aggana mala
1Timothy2:1 Nuuni S'oossaa malatiyaawaan
1Timothy2:2 
1Timothy2:3 Asay ubbay attanaadaaninne tumatetsaa eranaadan koyyiyaa nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaa sintsan hawe loiyaabaanne nashechchiyaawaa.
1Timothy2:4 
1Timothy2:5 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy2:6 I asaa ubbaa wozanaw barena ubbaw immeedda. S'oossay bare wodiyaan asaa ubbaa wozanaw koyiyaawaa bessiyaa markkay hawaa.
1Timothy2:7 Taani S'oossaa k'aalaa odiyaawaa
1Timothy2:8 Hewaa diraw
1Timothy2:9 Hewaadan k'ay mac'c'awanttukka bessiyaa mayuwaa yashshatetsaaninne barentta mooddiyaawaan mayyino. S'oossaw yayyay giyaa mac'c'a asaa bessiyaawaadan
1Timothy2:10 
1Timothy2:11 Mac'c'awunna ubbabaan moodettaadde
1Timothy2:12 Taani mac'c'awunna c'ou gaade de'uu gayippe attin
1Timothy2:13 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy2:14 Hewaana c'imettaade S'oossaa higgiyaa mentsaadduppe attin
1Timothy2:15 Shin mac'c'awunna ammanuwaan
1Timothy3:1 Ooninne woosa golliyaa kaaletsiyaawaa gidanaw koyyooppe
1Timothy3:2 Woosa golliyaa kaaletsiyaa uray borissennawaa
1Timothy3:3 matsottennawaa
1Timothy3:4 naanay aw azazettiyaawaanne bonchchiyaawaa
1Timothy3:5 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy3:6 Otoruwaan sugettiid
1Timothy3:7 S'alahiyaa kaappuwaa boriyaaninne p'iriyaan gelenna mala
1Timothy3:8 Hewaadan k'ay woosa golliyaa maaddiyaawanttu Asay bonchchiyaawantta
1Timothy3:9 ammanuwaa s'uuraa geeshsha wozanaa k'ofaan naagiyaawantta gidanaw bessee.
1Timothy3:10 Hewanttu kasetiide paac'ettanaw koshshee. Paac'iyaa aad'd'owaappe guyyiyaan
1Timothy3:11 Hewaadankka k'ay unttunttu machchatuu Asay bonchchiyaawantta
1Timothy3:12 Woosa golliyaa maaddiyaawe itti machchatti s'alalay de'iyaawaanne k'ay bare naanaanne bare golliyaa loytsi ayissiyaawaa gidanaw bessee.
1Timothy3:13 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy3:14 Taani neekko ellekka baana gaade hawaa new s'aafay.
1Timothy3:15 Shin taani beennaan gamooppe
1Timothy3:16 Nu ammanuwaa s'uuray wolk'k'aama gidiyaawaa ooninne sid'anaw danddayenna. Kiristtoosi ashuwaan k'onc'c'eedda; I s'illuwaa gidiyaawaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay markkatteedda. Kiitanchchatuukka Aa be'eeddino; Ayihuda gidenna Asay aabaa odina siseedda. Sa'aan de'iyaa Asay Aa ammaneedda; bonchchuwaan I saluwaa beedda.
1Timothy4:1 Itti itti Asay wurssetsaa wodiyaan ammanuwaa agganawaa Geeshsha Ayyaanay k'onc'c'iyaan odeedda. Unttunttu worddo ayyaanatoo azazettana; k'ay s'alahatuwaa timirttiyaa kaallana.
1Timothy4:2 Hawaa mala timirttii
1Timothy4:3 Hawanttu mala asatuu akkiyaawaanne geliyaawaa k'ay itti itti k'ommo katsaa miyaawaa diggiino. Shin ammaniyaawanttunne tumatetsaa eriyaawanttu S'oossaa galateeddawaappe guyyiyaan maana mala
1Timothy4:4 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy4:5 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy4:6 Hewaa diraw
1Timothy4:7 Shin ammaniyaa asaw loenna haasayaappenne k'ay c'ima mac'c'a asaa tossaappe bak'ata. K'ay S'oossaa malatiyaawaan neena loohissa.
1Timothy4:8 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy4:9 Ha haasayay Asay ubbay akkanaw bessiyaa tumu haasaya.
1Timothy4:10 Nuuni hewaa demmanaw daabureettonne loytsi ootseetto; hewoo nuuni hidootaa wotseeddawe asaa ubbaa
1Timothy4:11 Hawaa azazanne tamaarissa.
1Timothy4:12 Neeni yalaga gidiyaa diraw
1Timothy4:13 Taani yaana gakkanaw asaw S'oossaa mas'aafaa nabbabiyaawaani
1Timothy4:14 Timbbitiyaa odiyaawanttu haasayinanne c'imatuu barenttu kushiyaa ne bolla wotsina
1Timothy4:15 Ne dichchay asaa ubbaw k'onc'c'ana mala
1Timothy4:16 Ne huup'iyaanne ne timirttiyaa naaga. Neeni hewaa ootsooppe
1Timothy5:1 C'ima asaa ne aabba bonchchiyaawaadan bonchchappe attin
1Timothy5:2 k'ay c'ima mac'c'a asaa ne aattiidan
1Timothy5:3 Bare s'alalaa gideedda tumu ametuwaa bonchcha.
1Timothy5:4 Shin amattiw naanay woy naanaa naanay de'ooppe
1Timothy5:5 Ayaa maaduukka baynna bare de'iyaa tumu amatta S'oossay immana gaade nashechchan naaga uttaaddu. K'ay gallassinne k'amma S'oossay izo maaddana mala
1Timothy5:6 Shin barena ishalissiyaa amatta pas'a de'ooppekka
1Timothy5:7 K'ay ooninne unttuntta borenna mala
1Timothy5:8 Shin barenttuwoo k'ay ubbaappe aatsiide
1Timothy5:9 Usuppun tammu laytsay kumibeenna amatti suntsaa maziggobiyaan s'aafoppa. Hewaa bollan k'ay iza itti asinaappe haraa gelabeennawunno gidanaw koshshee.
1Timothy5:10 Naanaa dichchiyaawan
1Timothy5:11 Shin yalaga ametuwaa yekkonttu suntsaanna gatsa s'aafoppa. Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy5:12 Koyro ammanuwaa kad'eedda diraw
1Timothy5:13 Hewe baynnaan oosuwaa d'ayiide itti golliyaappe hara golliyaa yuuyyiidde
1Timothy5:14 Hewaa diraw
1Timothy5:15 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy5:16 Ammaniyaa mishirattiw hak'ankka dabbo amatuu de'ooppe
1Timothy5:17 Loytsi heemmiyaa c'imatuu
1Timothy5:18 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy5:19 Laau woy heezzu markkay baynnaan
1Timothy5:20 Haratuu yayana mala
1Timothy5:21 Neeni ayinne asaa deemuwaa s'eellennan
1Timothy5:22 O bollaaninne elleellaade ne kushiyaa wotsoppa. Haratuwaa nagaraan geloppa. Neena geeshshatetsaan naaga.
1Timothy5:23 Neeni ubbaa wode sakettiyaa dirawunne ne uluwaa diraw
1Timothy5:24 Itti itti asatuwaa nagaray be'anaw k'onc'c'e; unttunttu nagaray unttuntta pirddanaw unttunttuppe sintsaw aad'd'ee. Shin haratuu nagaray guyyeppe k'onc'c'ee.
1Timothy5:25 Hewaadankka
1Timothy6:1 S'oossaa suntsaynne nu timirttii borettenna mala
1Timothy6:2 Ammaniyaa asaa ayiliyaa gideeddawanttoo unttunttu godatuu unttunttoo ishaa gidiyaa diraw
1Timothy6:3 Ooninne dumma timirttiyaa tamaarissiyaawaa gidooppe
1Timothy6:4 
1Timothy6:5 K'ay unttunttu huup'ii ootsenna. Tumatetsay baynna asatuwaanakka palumaa kaaletsee. Unttunttu S'oossaa malatiyaawaan durettana giide k'oppiino. Neeni he asatuwaappe shaaketta.
1Timothy6:6 Shin taw de'iyaabay taw gidana giyaa uraa S'oossaa malatiyaawe dureyee.
1Timothy6:7 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy6:8 Shin miyaabaynne mayiyaabay de'ooppe
1Timothy6:9 Shin durettanaw koyyiyaawanttu paac'iyaaninne p'iriyaan geliino; k'ay daro asaa bashshawunne d'ayoo goochchi afiyaa daro eeyanne k'ohiyaa amuwaan kunddiino.
1Timothy6:10 Ayaw gooppe
1Timothy6:11 Shin neenoo
1Timothy6:12 Ammanuwaa baas'iyaa loytsa baas'eta. Daro asaa sintsan loo markkaa markkattaade
1Timothy6:13 Ubbabaw de'uwaa immiyaa S'oossaa sintsaaninne
1Timothy6:14 Nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosi k'onc'c'ana gakkanaw
1Timothy6:15 Aa k'onc'c'etsaa
1Timothy6:16 Hayk'k'ennawe itti Aa s'alalaa. Ooninne Aakko shiik'anaw danddayenna poo'uwaan de'ee. Ooninne Aa be'ibeenna; k'ay be'anawukka danddayenna. Bonchchuunne med'inaa wolk'k'ay aw gido. Ameni.
1Timothy6:17 Hai ha wodiyaan dure gidiyaawanttu otorettennaadaaninne k'ay nuuni nashettanaadan
1Timothy6:18 Unttunttu loobaa ootsanaadan
1Timothy6:19 Hewaa yaatiyaawaan unttunttu sintsaw barenttoo mino baaso gidiyaa shaluwaa barenttoo shiishshino. Hewaappe guyyiyaan
1Timothy6:20 S'imootoosaa
1Timothy6:21 Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy1:1 Taani P'awuloosi
2Timothy1:2 ta siik'o na'aa S'imootoosaw ha dabddaabbiyaa s'aafay. S'oossaa Aawuwaappenne nu Godaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusappe
2Timothy1:3 Ta zaratuu ootseeddawaadan
2Timothy1:4 Taani ne afotsaa hassaya hassayaade nashettana mala
2Timothy1:5 Neenan de'iyaa worddo baynna ammanuwaa hassayay. He ammanuu beni ne daay daay Loydininne ne daay Ewuniik'in de'iyaa ammanuwaa mala; k'ay neenankka hewe de'iyaawaa eraad.
2Timothy1:6 Hewaa diraw
2Timothy1:7 Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy1:8 Simmi
2Timothy1:9 S'oossay bare k'ofaaninne bare aad'd'o keekatetsan nuuna ashshiide
2Timothy1:10 Shin hai ha aad'd'o keekatetsay nuuna ashshiyaa Kiristtoosi Yesuusa yuussaan nuw k'onc'c'eedda. K'ay hayk'uwaa wolk'k'aakka I d'ayisseedda. Wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa baggana bayenna de'uwaa nuw k'onc'c'isseedda.
2Timothy1:11 Taani Yesuusi kiitteeddawaanne Ayihuda gidenna asaa tamaarissiyaawaa gidaade
2Timothy1:12 K'ay taani ha metuwaa akkiyaawe hewaa diraassa. Shin taani ammaneeddawaa eriyaa diraw
2Timothy1:13 Taani neena tamaarisseedda tumu k'aalaa leemisuwaa uda oyk'k'aade
2Timothy1:14 Nu giddon de'iyaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa baggana new hadaraa immeedda loobaa naaga.
2Timothy1:15 Iisiyaa giyaa biittaan de'iyaa ubbatuu taappe bak'ateeddawaa eraasa; unttunttu giddon Pigeluusinne Hermogeneesi de'iino.
2Timothy1:16 Henesifooru taana daro wode mentsetseedda diraw
2Timothy1:17 Shin Roome giyaa katamaa gakkeeddasaanna taana loytsi koyyiide demmeedda.
2Timothy1:18 He gallassi Godaappe maarotetsaa demmanaadan
2Timothy2:1 Simmi ta na'aw
2Timothy2:2 K'ay daro markkatuu de'iyaa saan taappe neeni siseedda yewatuwaa haratuwaa tamaarissanaw danddayiyaa ammanetteeda asatoo hadaraa imma.
2Timothy2:3 Kiristtoosa Yesuusaw ammanetteeda wotaadaraadan
2Timothy2:4 Olaa biyaa wotaadaray bare kaappuwaa nashechchanaw
2Timothy2:5 K'ay wotsaan keesetiyaa uraykka wogaadan wos's'ana d'ayooppe
2Timothy2:6 Daro daaburiide ootseedda biittaa goshiyaa bitanii shiik'eedda katsaappe barena gakkiyaawaa koyro akkanaw bessee.
2Timothy2:7 Neeni ubbabaa akeekanaadan
2Timothy2:8 Taani wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaawaadan
2Timothy2:9 Taani wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaa diraw
2Timothy2:10 Hewaa diraw
2Timothy2:11 Hawe
2Timothy2:12 Nuuni genc'c'ooppe
2Timothy2:13 Nuuni ammanettennaan aggooppekka
2Timothy2:14 Neeni ne asaa hawaa hassayissa; unttunttu k'aalaan palumettenna mala
2Timothy2:15 Neeni S'oossaa tumatetsaa k'aalaa suuretetsaan odiyaawaanne k'ay Aa oosoo yeellatenna oosanchcha gidaade
2Timothy2:16 Shin ha sa'aw injjetiyaa maaddenna haasayaappe neena naaga. Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy2:17 K'ay unttunttu tamaarissiyaawe bollaa c'ittuwaadan ubbasaa gakkanaassa. He tamaarissiyaawanttuppe laaatuu Hemeneyoosanne Piliis'oosa.
2Timothy2:18 Unttunttu tumuwaa ogiyaa aggiide
2Timothy2:19 Gidooppekka
2Timothy2:20 Itti wolk'k'aama gollen work'k'aappenne biraappe med'etteedda miishshaa s'alalaa gidennaan
2Timothy2:21 Hewaa diraw
2Timothy2:22 Shin neeni iita wodallatetsaa amuwaappe bak'ata. Barentta maaddanaw geeshsha wozanaappe Godaa s'eesisiyaawanttunna ittippe
2Timothy2:23 Shin eeyatuwaa palumiinne ayinne erennawanttu palumii walassaa kaaletsiyaawaa eraade aappe bak'ata.
2Timothy2:24 Godaa k'oomay ubbaw keekiyaawaa
2Timothy2:25 K'ay I barena is's'iyaawantta ashikketetsan seeriyaawaa gidanaw bessee. Unttunttu barenttu nagaraappe simmiide
2Timothy2:26 K'ay unttunttu barenttu wozanaa k'ofaw simmiide
2Timothy3:1 Shin wurssetsa gallassi waayissiyaa wodii yaanawaa akeeka.
2Timothy3:2 Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy3:3 siik'uu baynnawantta
2Timothy3:4 ubbaa erikke giyaawantta
2Timothy3:5 Unttunttu S'oossaw goyinniyaawaa malatiino; shin Aa wolk'k'aa kaddeeddino. Hewanttu mala asatuwaakko shiik'oppa.
2Timothy3:6 Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy3:7 
2Timothy3:8 Yaaneesinne Yambbareesi Muse yewuwaa p'alk'k'owaadan
2Timothy3:9 Shin Yaaneesa eeyatetsaynne Yambbareesa eeyatetsay k'ay k'onc'c'eeddawaadan
2Timothy3:10 Shin neeni ta timirttiyaa
2Timothy3:11 ta yedesaanne ta waayiyaa be'aadda. Ans's'ookiyaanne
2Timothy3:12 Tumatetsaan Kiristtoosi Yesuusan S'oossaa malatiide de'anaw dosiyaa ubbay yederssettana.
2Timothy3:13 Shin iita asatuunne baletsiyaawanttu haratuwaa baletsiiddenne barenttu huup'ew baliidde
2Timothy3:14 Shin neeni he tumatetsaa ooppe tamaareeddenttonne eraade
2Timothy3:15 Neeni guutsa na'atetsaappe doommaade Kiristtoosi Yesuusa ammanaade
2Timothy3:16 S'oossaa Mas'aafaa ubbaan S'oossaa Ayyaanay de'ee. K'ay he mas'aafatuu S'oossaw ootsiyaa Asay kumentsanne loo oosuwaa ubbaw giigeeddawaa gidana mala
2Timothy3:17 
2Timothy4:1 Taani neena S'oossaa sintsaaninne
2Timothy4:2 K'aalaa oda. Wodii injjetina injjetana d'ayina
2Timothy4:3 Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy4:4 Unttunttu tumu yewuwaa sisiyaawaa aggiide
2Timothy4:5 Shin neeni ubbabaan ne huup'iyaa naaganaw bessee. Waayiyaa danddaya. Wonggalaa mishiraachchuwaa odiyaawe ootsiyaa oosuwaa ootsa. S'oossaa k'oomaadan
2Timothy4:6 Taana gidooppe
2Timothy4:7 Taani loo baas'iyaa baas'etaaddi; wotsaa wos's'aadde wurssaad; ammanuwaakka naagaad.
2Timothy4:8 Sintsappe taw s'illotetsaa kalachchay giigi utteedda. Hewaa s'illo pirddaa pirddiyaa Goday he gallassi taw immana. K'ay Kiristtoosi k'onc'c'anawaa dosiyaa ubba saappe attin
2Timothy4:9 Taakko ellekka yaanaw minna.
2Timothy4:10 Ayaw gooppe
2Timothy4:11 Luk'aasa s'alalay taananna de'ee. Mark'k'oossi taana kiitaan loytsi maaddanaw danddayiyaa diraw
2Timothy4:12 Shin taani Tikik'oosa Efesoona giyaa katamaa kiittaad.
2Timothy4:13 Neeni yaadde
2Timothy4:14 Birataa k'os's'iyaa Iskkinddiri taana daro k'oheedda; Goday aw Aa oosuwaadan zaarana.
2Timothy4:15 I nuuni odiyaawaa loytsi p'alk'k'iyaa diraw
2Timothy4:16 Koyro taana mootiyaa wode
2Timothy4:17 Shin taani kumentsaa kiitaa Ayihuda gidenna Asay ubbay sisanaw odana mala
2Timothy4:18 Goday taana iitabaa ubbaappe ashshiide
2Timothy4:19 P'irisk'k'illiw
2Timothy4:20 Erass's'oosi K'oronttoosa giyaa katamaan atteedda. Shin S'irofiimoosi saketteedda diraw
2Timothy4:21 Balgguu wod'd'anaappe kase yaanaw minna. Ewubuluusi
2Timothy4:22 Goday ne ayyaanaanna gido. Aad'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna gido. Ameni.
Titus1:1 Yesuusi Kiristtoosi kiitteedda taani P'awuloosi
Titus1:2 Worddotenna S'oossay nuw ha med'inaa de'uwaa daro wodiyaappe kase immana geedda.
Titus1:3 S'oossay nuuna ashshiyaawe likke wodiyaan bare k'aalaan hawaa k'onc'c'isseedda; I hadariide taana azazeeddawaadan
Titus1:4 Ammanuwaa ittippetetsaan ta tumu na'aa new Tiitoo
Titus1:5 Taani neena K'ars's'eesan aggaade yeeddawe
Titus1:6 C'imay borettennawaanne itti machchatti s'alalay de'iyaawaanne ammaniyaa naanay de'iyaawaa gidanaw bessee; Aa naanay shaluwaa bayizziyaabaaninne woy azazettenaan is's'iyaaban Asay amaassalenawantta gidanaw bessee.
Titus1:7 Ayaw gooppe
Titus1:8 Shin imatsaa mokkiyaawaanne loobaa dosiyaawaa gidanaw bessee; k'ay akeekanchchaa
Titus1:9 Ammanettiyaa de'uu beettiyaa timirttiyaanna giigiyaa k'aalaa I loytsi oyk'k'o. Yaatooppe haratuwaa tumu ammanuwaa tamaarissiyaawaan mentsetsanawunne k'ay hewaa is's'iyaawanttakka zoranaw danddayanawaa.
Titus1:10 Ayaw gooppe
Titus1:11 Unttunttu tamaarissanaw bessena pokkiyaa ogiyaan miishshaa demmanaw tamaarissiyaawaan golliyaa ubbaa bayzziyaa diraw
Titus1:12 Unttunttu giddoppe ittuu
Titus1:13 I markkattowe tuma; hewaa diraw
Titus1:14 
Titus1:15 Barenttu huup'ew geeshsha gideeddawanttoo ubbabaykka geeshsha; shin tunatoonne ammanennawanttoo unttunttu wozanaa k'ofaynne unttuntta suure wozanay tuneedda diraw
Titus1:16 Unttunttu barenttu S'oossaa eriyaawaa k'onc'c'iyaan odiino; shin unttunttu sheneyiyaawantta
Titus2:1 Shin neeni de'uwaa demmanaw giigiyaa timirttiyaa tamaarissanaw bessee.
Titus2:2 C'ima attuma Asay ammanuwaan
Titus2:3 Hewaadankka c'ima mac'c'a Asay geeshsha de'uwaa de'iyaawantta
Titus2:4 Unttunttu S'oossaa k'aalay borettenna mala
Titus2:5 
Titus2:6 Hewaadankka yalaga attuma asatuu barentta naagana mala zora.
Titus2:7 Neeni ne huup'ewukka loo oosuwaa ubbaan unttunttoo leemiso gida; neeni tamaarissiyaawankka ammanettiyaawaanne bonchchettiyaawaa gida.
Titus2:8 Ne morkketuu nuuna zigiriyaabay unttunttoo d'ayiyaa wode unttunttu yeellatana mala
Titus2:9 Ayiletuu barenttu godatoo azazettana malanne
Titus2:10 Unttunttu barenttu godatuwaappe wuuenna mala
Titus2:11 Ayaw gooppe
Titus2:12 He aad'd'o keekatetsay nagaraa oosuwaanne ha alamiyaa amuwaa nuuni agganaadaaninne nu huup'iyaa naagiide
Titus2:13 Nuuni nu wolk'k'aama S'oossay
Titus2:14 Iita oosuwaa ubbaappe I nuuna wozanawunne loobaa ootsanaw amottiyaa bare geeshsha asaa kessanaw
Titus2:15 Neeni hawaa tamaarissa
Titus3:1 Unttunttu mooddiyaawanttoonne maatay de'iyaawanttoo moodettanaw
Titus3:2 
Titus3:3 Ayaw gooppe
Titus3:4 Shin nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaa keekatetsaynne asaa I siik'iyaa siik'uu k'onc'c'eedda wode
Titus3:5 I bare maarotetsaadankka
Titus3:6 S'oossay bare aad'd'o keekatetsan nuuni s'illanaadaaninne
Titus3:7 
Titus3:8 Ha haasayay ammanetteedawaa; S'oossaa asatuu loo oosuwaa ootsanaw giiganaadan
Titus3:9 Shin eeyatetsaa palumaappe
Titus3:10 Shaakotetsaa med'd'iyaa uray geella asaa gidiyaawaanne bare huup'iyaan pirddiide nagaraa ootsiyaawaa eraade
Titus3:11 
Titus3:12 Taani Ars's'emaasa woy Tikik'oosa neekko kiittiyaa wode
Titus3:13 Higgiyaa eriyaa Zeenaasinne Ap'iloosi ogiyaa biyaa wode
Titus3:14 Nu asaykka maaddenna asaa gidiide attena mala
Titus3:15 Taananna de'iyaa ubbatuu neena saro saro geeddino. Nuuna ammanuwaan siik'iyaawantta saro saro ga. S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna ittippe gido. Ameni.
Philemon1:1 Taani P'awuloosi
Philemon1:2 ne gollen shiik'iyaa ammaniyaawanttoo
Philemon1:3 S'oossaa nu Aawuwaappenne nu Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosappe aad'd'o keekatetsaynne sarotetsay hinttenttoo gido.
Philemon1:4 Neeni S'oossaa asatuwaa siik'iyaawaanne Godaa Yesuusa ammaniyaawaa taani sisiyaa diraw
Philemon1:5 
Philemon1:6 Neeni ne ammanuwaa haratuwaanna shaakkiyaawe nuw Kiristtoosi Yesuusa baggana yiyaa loobaa ubbaa erissana mala
Philemon1:7 Ayaw gooppe
Philemon1:8 Hewaa diraw
Philemon1:9 Taani P'awuloosi c'imeeddawe
Philemon1:10 Taani k'ashuwaan de'aadde aw aawuwaa gideedda ta na'aa Anaasimoosa diraw
Philemon1:11 I kase neena goenna; shin hai neenakka taanakka tumu goee.
Philemon1:12 Taani wozanaappe dosiyaa Anaasimoosa neekko yeddowe ta wozanaa yeddowaa. Taani wonggalaa diraw k'ashetta utta de'ishshin
Philemon1:13 
Philemon1:14 Shin neeni ne sheniyaadan ootsanaawaa koyyayippe attin
Philemon1:15 Anaasimoosi guutsa wodiyaa neeppe shaaketteeddawe
Philemon1:16 Simmi hawaappe sintsaw Anaasimoosi ayiliyaa gidenna; shin ayiliyaappe I loytsi aad'd'ee; I taw ay keena siik'o ishee! K'ay I new asaa baggaanakka Godaa baggaanakka ay keena aad'd'eedda ishaa gidanddeeshsha!
Philemon1:17 Simmi neeni taana ne laggetsaa giyaawaa gidooppe
Philemon1:18 I new bayizzeeddabay woy Aa bolla new ac'uu de'ooppe
Philemon1:19 He ac'uwaa taani c'iggana gaade
Philemon1:20 Ee
Philemon1:21 Taani geeddawaappe daruwaa neeni ootsanaawaa eraade
Philemon1:22 K'ay hinttenttu ellekka taw imatsay shemppiyaa golliyaa giigissite. Ayaw gooppe
Philemon1:23 Kiristtoosi Yesuusa diraw
Philemon1:24 K'ay taananna ittippe ootsiyaa Mark'k'oossi
Philemon1:25 Godaa Yesuusi Kiristtoosa aad'd'o keekatetsay hinttenttu ayyaanaanna gido.
Hebrews1:1 S'oossay beni wode
Hebrews1:2 Shin ha wurssetsa wodiyaan
Hebrews1:3 Na'ay S'oossaa bonchcho poo'uwaa p'oolee; k'ay kumentsaa S'oossaa eeshshaa akkiide
Hebrews1:4 S'oossay aw immeedda suntsatetsay kiitanchchatuwaappe d'ok'k'a gidiyaawaadankka
Hebrews1:5 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews1:6 K'ay S'oossay bare bayira Na'aa ha sa'aa yeddana haniidde
Hebrews1:7 S'essay kiitanchchatuwaabaa haasayiidde
Hebrews1:8 Shin bare Na'aawaa haasayiidde
Hebrews1:9 Neeni s'illotetsaa siik'aade; naak'uwaa is's'aadda. S'oossay
Hebrews1:10 S'oossay hawaadan yaagee; «Godaw
Hebrews1:11 Hewanttu ubbay d'ayana; shin neeni de'ana. Unttunttu ubbaykka afilaadan wurana.
Hebrews1:12 Neeni unttuntta gaabiyaadan dakkoyana; k'ay unttunttu afilaadan laamettanawantta. Shin neeni neenakka; ne laytsay ubbaakka wurenna» yaagee.
Hebrews1:13 Shin S'oossay bare kiitanchchatuwaappe ittuwaanne
Hebrews1:14 Kiitanchchatuu ubbay S'oossaw ootsanawunne atotetsaa demmana asatuwaa maaddanaw S'oossay kiitteedda ayyaanatuwaa gidikkinooyee?

Hebrews7:1 Ha Malkki-S'edek'k'i
Hebrews7:2 Abraahaamo bare omoodeedda ubbaappe asiraataa kessiide
Hebrews7:3 Malkki-S'edek'k'aw daaya woy aawuu
Hebrews7:4 Nu aawotuwaa kaappuu Abraahaamo olaan omoodiide
Hebrews7:5 K'eesaa gidiyaa Leewiyaa zaratuu Israa'eeliyaa asaappe
Hebrews7:6 Malkki-S'edek'k'i Leewiyaa zare gidenna; shin Abraahaamoppe asiraataa akkiide
Hebrews7:7 K'ay anjjiyaawe anjjettiyaawaappe d'ok'k'u giyaawe paluntsenna.
Hebrews7:8 Itti baggana
Hebrews7:9 Hawaadan haasayanaw haray atto
Hebrews7:10 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews7:11 Israa'eeliyaa asaw higgii Leewiyaa zeretsatuwaa k'eesetetsaa baggana imetteedda. He k'eesetetsaa kiitay balay baynnawaa gidooppe
Hebrews7:12 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews7:13 Ha yewuu haasayetteedda uray hara zarii; Aa zariyaappe ooninne yarshshiyaasaan k'eesaadan ootsibeenna.
Hebrews7:14 Nu Goday Yihudaa zariyaappe yeeddawe eretteeddawaa gidiyaa diraw
Hebrews7:15 Malkki-S'edek'k'a mala hara k'eesay yeeddawaa gidintto
Hebrews7:16 I asaa higgiyaaninne wogaan k'eesa gidibeenna; shin wurenna de'uwaa wolk'k'aan k'eesa gideedda.
Hebrews7:17 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews7:18 Beni de'iyaa higgii laafanne maaddennawaa gidiyaa diraw atteedda.
Hebrews7:19 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews7:20 Hewaa bollan k'ay S'oossaa c'aak'uukka de'ee; haratuu k'eesa gideedda wode
Hebrews7:21 Shin Yesuusi c'aak'uwaan k'eesa gideedda; S'oossay Aa
Hebrews7:22 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews7:23 Kase k'eesatuwaa payduu c'ora; ayaw gooppe
Hebrews7:24 Shin Yesuusi med'inaw de'iyaa diraw
Hebrews7:25 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews7:26 Nuw giigiyaa hawaa mala
Hebrews7:27 Hara k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappatuwaadan
Hebrews7:28 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews8:1 Nuuni haasayiyaa wolk'k'aamabay hawaa; saluwaan Ubbaappe Bolla S'oossay uttiyaa kawutetsaa oydiyaappe ushechcha baggana utteedda k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu
Hebrews8:2 Geeshsha Sa'aaninne tumu Dunkkaaniyaan I ootsee; he Dunkkaanii Asay esseeddawaa gidennaan
Hebrews8:3 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu ubbay imuwaanne yarshshuwaa S'oossaw immanaw suntsetteedda diraw
Hebrews8:4 Simmi sa'aan I de'iyaawaa gidooppe
Hebrews8:5 Unttunttu k'eesatuwaadan ootsiyaa kiitay saluwaan de'iyaa oosoo tumu leemisuwaanne eeshuwaa; ayaw gooppe
Hebrews8:6 Shin Yesuusi gaannatiyaa c'aak'uu kasewaappe aad'd'iyaawaadankka
Hebrews8:7 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews8:8 Shin unttuntta boriidde
Hebrews8:9 He c'aak'uu taani Gibs'e gadiyaappe
Hebrews8:10 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews8:11 Unttunttuppe ooninne bare shooruwaa
Hebrews8:12 Taani unttunttu naak'uwaa maarana; unttunttu nagaraakka laa'entso hassaykke» yaagee.
Hebrews8:13 S'oossay ooratsa c'aak'uwaa giide haasayiyaawan koyrowaa ec'iseedda; k'ay ec'iyaabaynne wuriyaabay ellekka d'ayana.
Hebrews9:1 Koyro c'aak'k'oo S'oossaw goyinniyaa wogaynne Asay ootseedda Geeshsha Gollii de'ee.
Hebrews9:2 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews9:3 Laa'entso gaaridduwaa guyye baggana Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha Sa'aa geetettiyaa Dunkkaanii de'ee.
Hebrews9:4 Aa gidduwaan is'aanaa c'uwayanaw work'k'aappe ootseedda saas'iniinne ubba saanna work'k'aan sheeshsheedda K'aalaa c'aak'uwaa Taabootay de'ee. He K'aalaa c'aak'uwaa Taabootan mannay de'iyaa work'k'aa s'aaruu
Hebrews9:5 He k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa Taabootaappe bolla baggana atto giyaa sa'aa k'umiyaa barenttu k'efiyaan gentsiyaa bonchcho kiruubetuu de'iino; shin ha ubbabaa hai wurssi odanaw danddayokko.
Hebrews9:6 Hewe hewaadan giigi de'ishshin
Hebrews9:7 Shin k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa s'alalay laa'entso Dunkkaaniyaa laytsaappe itti gede geliidde bare dirawunne erennaan Asay ootseedda nagaraa diraw
Hebrews9:8 Koyro Dunkkaanii ek'k'ide'ishshin
Hebrews9:9 He Dunkkaanii ha wodew leemisuwaa; hewaa giyaawe S'oossaw immiyaa imuunne yarshshuu goyinniyaawaa suure wozanaa balay baynnawaa ootsanaw danddaykkino.
Hebrews9:10 Hewanttu muussaabaa
Hebrews9:11 Shin Kiristtoosi hawaan de'iyaa loobaw k'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuwaa gidiide yi diggeedda. I geliide ootsiyaa Dunkkaanii ubbaappe aad'd'iyaawaanne balay baynnawaa; k'ay he Dunkkaaniyaa Asay ootsibeenna; ha med'etteedda sa'aabaakka gidenna.
Hebrews9:12 Kiristtoosi Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha sa'aa geliyaa wode
Hebrews9:13 Tuneedda asaa bolla korumaa suutsaanne deeshshaa suutsaa c'ac'c'afiide
Hebrews9:14 Med'inaa Geeshsha Ayaanaa baggana balay baynna yarshshuwaadan
Hebrews9:15 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews9:16 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews9:17 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews9:18 Haray atto
Hebrews9:19 Ayaw gooppe

Hebrews9:22 Higgii giyaawaadan
Hebrews9:23 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews9:24 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews9:25 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu laytsaan laytsaan bare suutsaa gidennawaa oyk'k'iide
Hebrews9:26 Hewaa gidintto
Hebrews9:27 Asay ubbay itti gede hayk'k'anaw bessee; hewaappe guyyiyaan S'oossay asaa pirddana.
Hebrews9:28 Hewaadankka
Hebrews10:1 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews10:2 S'oossaw goyinniyaa Asay bare nagaraappe ubbaanna geeyyeeddabaa gidintto
Hebrews10:3 Shin Asay laytsan laytsan he yarshshuwaan bare nagaraa hassayee.
Hebrews10:4 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews10:5 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews10:6 Neeni s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaaninne
Hebrews10:7 Taani he wode
Hebrews10:8 Yarshshuu yarshshettana mala
Hebrews10:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Kiristtoosi
Hebrews10:10 Yesuusi Kiristtoosi S'oossay koyyeeddawaa ootseedda diraw
Hebrews10:11 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuu hachche hachche ek'k'iide
Hebrews10:12 Shin Kiristtoosi nagaraa diraw
Hebrews10:13 S'oossay sintsappe Kiristtoosa morkkatuwaa Kiristtoosaw gediyaan yed'd'iyaawaa ootsana gakkanaw
Hebrews10:14 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews10:15 K'ay Geeshsha Ayyaanay nuw markkattiidde
Hebrews10:16 «Taani he gallassatuwaappe guyyiyaan
Hebrews10:17 K'ay hewaappe guyyenna
Hebrews10:18 S'oossay he nagaraa atto geedda wode
Hebrews10:19 Simmi taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo
Hebrews10:20 Kiristtoosi nuw ooratsa ogiyaanne de'uwaa ogiyaa gaaridduwaa baggana
Hebrews10:21 Nuw S'oossaa gollen suntsetteedda wolk'k'aama k'eesay de'iyaa diraw
Hebrews10:22 Nuuni suure wozanaanna
Hebrews10:23 Nuw immana geedda S'oossay ammantsiyaa diraw
Hebrews10:24 Ittuu ittuwaanna waan siik'ettanenttonne k'ay loo oosuwaa wooti ootsanentto
Hebrews10:25 Ittuu ittuu shiik'uwaa dooyaa ootsiide shiik'iyaawaadan
Hebrews10:26 Nuuni tumatetsaa era akki diggiide
Hebrews10:27 Shin yashshiyaa pirddaa naagiyaawenne S'oossaa is's'iyaa ubbaa maanaw wolk'k'aama tamay de'ee.
Hebrews10:28 Muse higgew azazettena uray
Hebrews10:29 S'oossaa Na'aa kad'eedda uray
Hebrews10:30 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews10:31 De'uwaa S'oossaa kushiyan kunddanawe daro yashshiyaawaa.
Hebrews10:32 Hinttenttoo S'oossaa poo'uu poo'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Hebrews10:33 Itti itti gede hinttentta asaa sintsan boreeddinonne pas'a kaa'eeddino; k'ay hara wode hewaadan ootseeddawanttunnanne ittippe de'eeddita.
Hebrews10:34 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews10:35 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews10:36 S'oossay koyyiyaawaa ootsiide
Hebrews10:37 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews10:38 Ta s'illuu ammanettiide de'anawaa. Shin ooninne guyye simmooppe
Hebrews10:39 Nuuni ammanettiide atteeddawanttu bagga gidiyaawaappe attin
Hebrews11:1 Ammanuwaa giyaawe
Hebrews11:2 S'oossay beni c'ima asaw markkattawe
Hebrews11:3 Saluunne sa'aynne S'oossaa k'aalaan med'etteeddawaa ammanuwaan nuuni ereetto; hewaa diraw
Hebrews11:4 Aabeeli K'aayeelawaappe aad'd'iyaa yarshshuwaa S'oossaw yarshsheeddawe ammanuwaana. S'oossay Aa imuwaabaa markkattiidde
Hebrews11:5 Heenooki hayk'k'ennan saluwaa beeddawe ammanuwaana; S'oossay afeedda diraw
Hebrews11:6 Ammanuu baynnaan ooninne S'oossaa nashechchanaw danddayenna; ayaw gooppe
Hebrews11:7 Nohe be'anaw danddayenna sintsaappe hananabaw S'oossay
Hebrews11:8 Abraahaamo laattanaadan
Hebrews11:9 Abraahaamo S'oossay barew immana geedda gadiyaan hara biittaa asaadan de'eeddawe ammanuwaana; S'oossay he immana geeddawaa barenanna ittippe laattana Yisaak'ananne Yak'oobanna Dunkkaaniyaan de'eedda.
Hebrews11:10 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews11:11 Saara bare huup'ew haray atto ec'aadekka
Hebrews11:12 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews11:13 He asatuu ubbatuu ammanuwaan hayk'k'eeddino; barenttoo S'oossay immana geeddawaakka akkibeykkino; shin haakuwaan hewaa be'iide
Hebrews11:14 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews11:15 Unttunttu he yeggiide kesseedda gadiyaa simmanaw k'oppeeddawaa gidintto
Hebrews11:16 unttunttu hewaa aggiide
Hebrews11:17 Abraahaamo Yisaak'a yarshshanentto woy yarshshenentto
Hebrews11:18 
Hebrews11:19 Abraahaamo S'oossay Yisaak'a haray atto
Hebrews11:20 Yisaak'i sintsappe hananabaw Yaak'oobanne Eesaa anjjeeddawe ammanuwaana.
Hebrews11:21 Yaak'oobi hayk'k'ana haniidde
Hebrews11:22 Yooseefo hayk'k'anaw matiidde
Hebrews11:23 Muse yeletteeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Hebrews11:24 Muse dic'c'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Hebrews11:25 Nagaraan Muse guutsa wodiyaa nashettanawaappe
Hebrews11:26 Wodeppe demmana woytaa I tishshi ootsiide s'eello diraw
Hebrews11:27 Kaatiyaa hank'k'oo Muse yayyenaan
Hebrews11:28 Hayk'uwaa kiitanchchay Israa'eeliyaa asaw bayira naanaa bochchennaadan
Hebrews11:29 Israa'eeliyaa Asay mela biittan hamettiyaawaadan
Hebrews11:30 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Iyyarkko giyaa katamaa shuchchaa dirssaa laappu gallassaa yuuyyi yuuyyi aad'd'owaappe guyyiyaan
Hebrews11:31 C'aaratta Ra'aaba yewuwaa k'oriyaawantta loytsa mokkeedda diraw
Hebrews11:32 Simmi harabaa gujjaade ayaa odoo? Geedoonabaa
Hebrews11:33 Unttunttu kaatiyaa ubbaanna olettiide s'ooneeddawenne s'illobaa ootseeddawe ammanuwaana; yaatiide S'oossay immana geeddawaa akkeeddino; gaammotuwaa doonaakka gorddeeddino.
Hebrews11:34 Wolk'k'aama tamaa toyisseeddino; kuussa mashshaappe atteeddino; unttunttu daaburanchcha; shin minneeddino; k'ay olaan minniide
Hebrews11:35 Mac'c'awanttu barenttu hayk'k'eeddawantta hayk'uwaappe denddina akkeeddino. K'ay haranttu k'ashuwaappe bilettanawaa is's'iide
Hebrews11:36 Haratuwaa bolla Asay k'iliic'i kaa'eedda; lissuwaan shoc'etteeddinonne santsalataan k'ashettiide
Hebrews11:37 Shuchchaan c'adetteeddino; magaaziyan laau kesiide p'alk'k'etteeddino; paac'etteeddino; mashshaan hayk'k'eeddino; unttunttoo ubbabaykka d'ayina
Hebrews11:38 Unttunttoo ha alamii giigennaan is's'ina
Hebrews11:39 S'oossay unttunttu ammanuwaa markkattooppekka
Hebrews11:40 S'oossay nuw itti loo k'ofaa k'oppi wotseedda diraw
Hebrews12:1 Simmi nuw hawaa keena daro asay
Hebrews12:2 Nuuni nu ammanoo ogiyaa dooyyeeddawaanne polissiyaawaa gideedda Yesuusa s'eelloyte. Yesuusi yeellaa kad'iide
Hebrews12:3 Hinttenttu hinttenttu wozanaa bayizziide daaburenna mala
Hebrews12:4 Nagaraanna hinttenttu baas'etiidde
Hebrews12:5 S'oossay bare naanaadan
Hebrews12:6 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews12:7 S'oossay hinttentta muriyaa wode genc'c'ite. Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews12:8 Naanaa ubbaa seeriyaawaadan
Hebrews12:9 Hewaa bollan k'ay
Hebrews12:10 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews12:11 Nuuni murettiyaa wode
Hebrews12:12 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews12:13 Wobbiyaa gedii pas'anaappe attin
Hebrews12:14 Asaa ubbaanna saro de'anaw minnite; k'ay geeshsha de'uwaa de'ite. Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews12:15 S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsaa ooninne akkenaan attena mala naagettite; k'ay dolaade
Hebrews12:16 Woshummanaw kajjeeliyaa Asay ooninne de'enna mala
Hebrews12:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Hebrews12:18 Hinttenttu bochchanaw danddayiyaa deriyaakkonne ees's'iyaa tamaakko
Hebrews12:19 k'ay malakataa waasuwaakkonne k'aalaa kooshshaakko yibeykkita. Asay he kooshshaa siseedda wode
Hebrews12:20 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews12:21 Ayfiyaan beettiyaawe daro dagantsiyaawaa gidiyaa diraw Muse
Hebrews12:22 Shin hinttenttu S'iyoone Deriyaa
Hebrews12:23 S'oossaa bayira naanatuwaakko
Hebrews12:24 Ooratsa c'aak'k'oo gaannatiyaa Yesuusanne Aabeela suutsaappe aad'd'iyaawaa odiyaa gukkeedda suutsaakko yeeddita.
Hebrews12:25 Hinttenttoo odiyaa uraa yewuwaa sisiyaawaa hinttenttu is's'enna mala
Hebrews12:26 He wode Aa kooshshay sa'aa k'aatseedda; shin I hai
Hebrews12:27 «Itti gede gujjaade» giyaa k'aalay k'aas's'ennabay minniide de'ana mala
Hebrews12:28 Nuuni k'aas's'anaw danddayenna kawutetsaa akkiyaa diraw
Hebrews12:29 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews13:1 Hinttenttu ishatuwaa siik'iyaawaa aggoppite.
Hebrews13:2 Imatsaa mokkiyaawaakka dogoppite. Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews13:3 K'asho gollen de'iyaawanttubaa hinttenttukka unttunttunna ittippe k'asho gollen de'iyaawaadan k'oppite; k'ay hinttenttu hinttenttu huup'ew waayettiyaawaadan
Hebrews13:4 Akkiyaawaanne geliyaawaa Asay ubbay bonchchanaw bessee; k'ay asinaynne machchata ittuu ittoo ammanettanaw bessee; ayaw gooppe
Hebrews13:5 Miishshaa siik'uwaappe hinttentta naagite; hinttenttoo de'iyaawe hinttenttoo gido. Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews13:6 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews13:7 S'oossaa k'aalaa hinttenttoo odeedda hinttentta kaaletseeddaawantta hassayite; unttunttu waan de'eeddinonttonne hassayite; k'ay unttunttuwaadan ammanite.
Hebrews13:8 Yesuusi Kiristtoosi zinokka hachchekka med'inawukka laamettenna.
Hebrews13:9 Dumma dumma ooratsa timirttiyaan wora booppite. Nu wozanay S'oossaa aad'd'o keekatetsan minnooppe loo gidiyaawaappe attin
Hebrews13:10 Nuw yarshshiyaasay de'ee; Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsiyaawanttu he yarshshiyaa saappe maanaw unttunttoo maatay baawa.
Hebrews13:11 K'eesatuwaa ubbatuwaa kaappuu nagaraa diraw
Hebrews13:12 Hewaa diraw
Hebrews13:13 Simmi nuuni I boretteedda boriyaa akkiide
Hebrews13:14 Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews13:15 Simmi S'oossaw Yesuusa baggana ubbaa wode galataa yarshshuwaa immoytte; hewaa giyaawe mettershshay Aa suntsaw immiyaa galataa giyaawaa.
Hebrews13:16 Loobaa ootsiyaawaanne ittuu ittuwaa maaddiyaawaa dogoppite. Ayaw gooppe
Hebrews13:17 Hinttena kaaletsiyaawanttoo azazettite; k'ay unttunttu azaziyaawaakka ootsite. Unttunttu barenttu ootseeddawaa S'oossaw odana diraw
Hebrews13:18 Nuw S'oossaa woossite. Nuuni ubbaa wode loobaa ootsanaw koyyiyaa diraw
Hebrews13:19 S'oossay taana hinttenttukko ellekka zaarana mala
Hebrews13:20 Sarotetsaa S'oossay
Hebrews13:21 S'oossay Yesuusi Kiristtoosa baggana bare sintsan barena nashechchiyaawaa hinttentta oosissiidde
Hebrews13:22 Taanaadan ammaniyaawanttoo
Hebrews13:23 Nu ishay
Hebrews13:24 Hinttena kaaletsiyaa ubbatuwaanne S'oossaa asatuwaa ubbaa saro saro giite. S'aaliyaappe yeedda ammaniyaawanttu hinttentta saro saro giino.
Hebrews13:25 Aad'o keekatetsay hinttenanna ubbaanna ittippe gido. Ameni.

James1:5 Shin hintteppe ooninne barew aad'd'eedda eratetsay d'ayooppe
James1:6 Shin I ayaaninne sid'ennaan ammanuwaan S'oossaa woosso. Ayaw gooppe
James1:7 Ayaw gooppe
James1:8 
James1:9 Shin hiyyeesaa ishay S'oossay Aa d'ok'k'u ootseedda wode nashetto.
James1:10 K'ay dure ishaykka S'oossay Aa kawushisseedda wode nashetto. Ayaw gooppe
James1:11 Ayaw gooppe
James1:12 Waayiyaan genc'c'iyaa uray anjjetteeddawaa; ayaw gooppe
James1:13 Ooninne paac'etteedda wode
James1:14 Shin Asay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan bare huup'e iita amuwaan gooshettiyaa wodenne c'imettiyaa wode paac'ettee.
James1:15 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
James1:16 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James1:17 Loo imuwaa ubbaynne kumentsaa woytaa ubbay saluwaappe yee. Saluwaa poo'uwaa med'd'eedda Aawuwaappe yee; S'oossay bare huup'ew dummatennanne woy bare kuwaa laammenna.
James1:18 Nuuni I med'd'eedda med'etatuwaa giddon d'ok'k'asaa akkanaadan
James1:19 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James1:20 Ayaw gooppe
James1:21 Hewaa diraw
James1:22 Shin S'oossaa k'aalaa oosuwaan peeshshiteppe attin
James1:23 Ayaw gooppe
James1:24 I barena s'eelliide bee; ellekka I ay malenttonne dogi aggee.
James1:25 Shin ooninne ayiletetsaappe kessiyaa bali bayinna higgiyaa s'eelliide
James1:26 Bare ins's'arssaa naagennan barena c'immiidde
James1:27 S'oossaa Aawuwaa sintsan pokkuu bayinna geeshsha goynay hawaa; hewe hak'awe gooppe
James2:1 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James2:2 Ayaw gooppe
James2:3 loo mayuwaa mayyeedda bitaniyaa hintte aatsi bonchchiidde Aa
James2:4 yaatina hintte hintte giddon shaakotetsaa med'd'iyaawanttanne iita k'ofaanna de'iyaa daannatuwaa gidikkiteeyee?
James2:5 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James2:6 Shin hintte hiyyeesatuwaa toochcheeddita. Duretuu hinttena tuggayiyaawantta gidikkinooyee? Unttunttu hinttena daannan mootiyaawantta gidikkinooyee?
James2:7 Hinttew imetteedda loo suntsaa boriyaawanttu unttuntta gidikkinooyee?
James2:8 Shin S'oossaa Mas'aafan
James2:9 Shin hintte asaa deemuwaa s'eelliide bonchchooppe
James2:10 Ayaw gooppe
James2:11 Ayaw gooppe
James2:12 Asaa ayiletetsaappe kessiyaa higgiyan
James2:13 Ayaw gooppe
James2:14 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James2:15 Itti ishay
James2:16 hintteppe itti uray unttuntta
James2:17 Hewaa diraw
James2:18 Shin itti uray
James2:19 Neeni itti S'oossay de'iyaawaa ammanaasa; hewe loa. S'alahetuukka k'ay ammaniino; yashshaan kokkoriino.
James2:20 Neeni eeyay! Ammanuu oosuwaappe shaakettiide goennawaa eranaw koyyay?
James2:21 Nu aabbu Abraahaamo bare na'aa Yisaak'a yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla wotseedda wode
James2:22 Aa ammanuunne Aa oosuu ittippe ootseeddawaanne Aa ammanuu Aa oosuwaan poletteeddawaa be'ikkii?
James2:23 S'oossaa Mas'aafay «Abraahaamo S'oossaa ammaneedda. S'oossaykka hewaa aw s'illotetsan paydeedda» geeddawe poletteedda; k'ay S'oossaa dabbo geetettiide I s'eesetteedda.
James2:24 Asay ammano s'alalaana gidennaan
James2:25 Hewaadankka k'ay c'aaratta Ra'aaba kiitettowantta mokkaade hara ogiyaanna unttuntta moyzzeedda wode
James2:26 Ayaw gooppe
James3:1 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James3:2 Nuuni ubbaykka daroban baleetto; itti uray bare haasayan mulekka balana d'ayooppe
James3:3 Paratuu nuw azazettana mala
James3:4 Be'ite
James3:5 Hewaadan ins's'arssay bollaa giddon guutsa asatetsaa gidooppekka
James3:6 Ins's'arssaykka tamaa mala. I nu asatetsaa giddon iitabaa ubbaa ootsana danddayee; asatetsaa ubbaa tunissee. K'ay nu de'uwaa wotsaakka tamaan guuddee; Gaannamiyaa tamaan I guudettanawaa.
James3:7 Ayaw gooppe
James3:8 Shin ooninne ins's'arssaa aadissanaw danddayibeenna; ins's'arssay wod'iyaa marzzii kumeedda c'ou geena iita med'etaa.
James3:9 Nuuni ins's'arssan nu Godaanne Aawuwaa galateetto; k'ay aanikka S'oossaa malatiide med'etteedda asaa shek'k'eetto.
James3:10 Itti doonaappe galataynne shek'ay kesee. Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James3:11 Pulttuu itti ollaappe maliyaa haatsaanne c'ammiyaa haatsaa pulttanaw danddayii?
James3:12 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James3:13 Hintte giddon aad'd'eedda eranchchaynne akeekanchchay oonee? Bare loo de'uwaan oosetteedda bare oosuwaa aad'd'eedda eratetsaappe yiyaa ashikketetsaan besso.
James3:14 Shin hintte wozanaan c'ammiyaa k'anaatiinne yirggii de'oppo. K'ay tumatetsaa bollaakka worddotoppitenne otorettoppite.
James3:15 Hewaa mala aad'd'eedda eratetsay saluwaappe wod'd'iyaawaa gidenna; shin hewe sa'aabaa
James3:16 Ayaw gooppe
James3:17 Shin bollappe yiyaa aad'd'eedda eratetsay ubbaappe kase geeshsha. K'ay sarotetsaa dosiyaawaa
James3:18 S'illotetsaa ayfii sarotetsaa ootsiyaawanttu sarotetsaan zereedda zeretsaappe beetteedda.
James4:1 Olaynne walassay hintte gidduwaa hak'appe yii? Unttunttu yeeddasay hintte bollaa giddon olettiyaa hintte nashettanaw wolk'k'aama amuwaa amottiyaawaappe gidennee?
James4:2 Hintte amottiita; shin demmikkita; wod'iita. Loytsi koyyiita; shin demmanaw danddaykkita; walak'ettiitanne olettiita. Shin S'oossaa woossenna diraw
James4:3 S'oossaa woossiita
James4:4 Simmi woshummiyaawanttoo
James4:5 Woy S'oossaa Mas'aafay
James4:6 Shin S'oossay aad'd'o keekatetsaa aatsiide immee. Hewaa diraw
James4:7 Simmi
James4:8 S'oossaakko shiik'ite; ikka hinttekko shiik'ana. Hinttenoo nagaranchchatoo
James4:9 Tuggattite; kayyottitenne yeekkite. Hintte miichchaa yeekoo laammite; hintte nashechchaakka kayyoo laammite.
James4:10 Godaa sintsan hintte huup'iyaa toochchite; k'ay I hinttena d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u ootsana.
James4:11 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
James4:12 Higgiyaa immiyaawenne pirddiyaawe S'oossaa s'alalaa; I ashshanawunne d'ayissanaw danddayee; shin ne shooruwaa bolla pirddiyaawe neeni oonee?
James4:13 Hinttenoo
James4:14 Wontti hintte de'uu ayaa hananenttonne erikkita; guutsa wodew hintte beettiide
James4:15 Hewaa aggiide
James4:16 Shin hintte hai hinttenttu d'ok'k'atetsaan c'eek'ettiita; hewaa mala c'eek'uu ubbay iita.
James4:17 Hewaa diraw
James5:1 Haikka hinttenoo dure asatoo
James5:2 Hintte duretetsay bay diggeedda; k'ay hintte afilaakka bilay mi diggeedda.
James5:3 Hintte work'k'aynne hintte biray shi'i diggeedda. K'ay he shi'ay hintte bolla markkattana; hintte bollaakka tamaadan maana. Hintte hintte miishshaa sintsaw dagayi de'iita.
James5:4 Akeekite; hintte gaden katsaa k'oyc'eedda asatoo c'iggibeenna kiraa miishshay waassee; unttunttu waasuu wolk'k'aama Godaa haytsaan sisetteedda.
James5:5 Hinttew injjetina
James5:6 S'illo asaa bolla pirddeeddita; k'ay Aa wod'eeddita; I hinttenanna ek'ettenna.
James5:7 Hewaa diraw

James5:10 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo

2Peter2:12 Shin he asatuu oyk'k'ettiide d'ayanaw yeletteedda barenttu med'etaan wozanay bayinna wora do'atuwaadan haniino; unttunttu erennabaa boriino; k'ay barenttu bayizzuwan

2Peter2:14 C'aaratiyaa mac'c'a asaa s'eelliyaawaa aggena ayfii unttunttoo de'ee; k'ay nagaraa ootsiyaawaakka aggikkino. Ammanuwaan minnibeenna asaa c'immiino. Amuwaa dooyeedda wozanay unttunttoo de'ee; unttunttu shek'etteeddawantta.

1John3:1 Nuuni S'oossaa naanatuwaa geetettiide s'eesettana mala
1John3:2 Ta siik'atoo
1John3:3 K'ay Kiristtoosa be'ana giide nashechchan naagiyaa ooninne Kiristtoosi geeshsha gideeddawaadan
1John3:4 Nagaraa ootsiyaa ubbay S'oossaa higgiyaa mentsee; ayaw gooppe
1John3:5 Kiristtoosi asaa nagaraa d'ayissanaw k'onc'c'eeddawaa hintte eriita; aan nagaray baawa.
1John3:6 Kiristtoosan de'iyaa ooninne nagaraa ootsiidde de'enna; k'ay nagaraa ootsiidde de'iyaa ooninne Aa be'ibeenna woy eribeenna.
1John3:7 Ta naatoo
1John3:8 S'alahiyaa kaappuu koyiruwaappe nagaraa ootseedda diraw
1John3:9 S'oossaa naanatuwaa gidiyaa ubbay S'oossaa med'etay unttunttun de'iyaa diraw
1John3:10 S'oossaa naanatuu gidduwaaninne s'alahiyaa kaappuwaa naanatuwaa giddon de'iyaa dummatetsay hawaan erettee; s'illobaa ootsennawanttunne woy bare ishaa siik'ennawanttu ooninne S'oossaa naanatuwaa gidikkino.
1John3:11 Ayaw gooppe
1John3:12 Nuuni K'aayeela mala gidanaw bessena. K'aayeeli s'alahiyaa kaappuwaassa; hewaa gido diraw
1John3:13 Taanaadan S'oossaa kaalliyaawanttoo
1John3:14 Nuuni ammaniyaawantta siik'iyaa diraw
1John3:15 Ammaniyaawantta is's'iyaa ooninne shemppuwaa wod'eeddawaa; k'ay shemppuwaa wod'eeddawaan med'inaa de'uu bayinnawaa hintte eriita.
1John3:16 Kiristtoosi bare shemppuwaa nu diraw aatsiide immeeddawaan siik'uu ayentto nuuni ereeddo; nuunikka ammaniyaawanttu diraw
1John3:17 Shin dure Asay ooninne bare ishay metootiyaawaa be'iide
1John3:18 Ta naatoo
1John3:19 Nuuni tumuwaa baggan de'iyaawaa hewan erana; k'ay nu wozanay nu bolla pirddiyaa wode ubbaan
1John3:20 
1John3:21 Ta siik'atoo
1John3:22 Nuuni Aa azazuwaa naagiyaa dirawunne Aa nashechchiyaabaa ootsiyaa diraw
1John3:23 S'oossaa azazuu hawaa: Kiristtoosi nuuna azazeeddawaadankka
1John3:24 S'oossaa azazuwaa naagiyaa ooninne S'oossaa giddon de'ee; S'oossaykka Aa giddon de'ee; S'oossay nuw immeedda Aa Ayaanaa baggana I nu giddon de'iyaawaa nuuni ereetto.
1John4:1 Ta siik'otoo
1John4:2 S'oossaa Ayaana gidiyaawaa hintte hawaan erana; «Yesuusi Kiristtoosi asaa gidiide yeeddawaa ammanay» giyaa oonaninne de'iyaa ayyaanay ubbay S'oossaappe yee.
1John4:3 K'ay Kiristtoosi asaa gidiide yeeddawaa ammanay geenawaa ayyaanay ubbay S'oossaappe yibeenna; aan Kiristtoosa ek'ettiyaa ayyaanay de'ee. Hintte hewe yaanawaa kase siseeddita; I haray atto haikka ha alamiyaan de'ee.
1John4:4 Ta naatoo
1John4:5 Unttunttu ha alamiyaa asaa gidiyaa diraw
1John4:6 Nuuni S'oossawantta; S'oossaa eriyaa ooninne nuuni giyaawaa sisee. S'oossaa erenna ooninne nuuni giyaawaa sisenna. Nuuni tumu ayyaanaanne worddo ayaanaa hewan shaakkeetto.
1John4:7 Ta siik'atoo
1John4:8 S'oossaa eeshshay siik'o gidiyaa diraw
1John4:9 S'oossay nuuna bare siik'uwaa hawaan besseedda; nuuni Aa baggana de'uwaa demmana mala
1John4:10 Siik'uwaa giyaawe hawaa; S'oossay nuuna siik'iide
1John4:11 Ta siik'otoo
1John4:12 S'oossaa ooninne mulekka be'ibeenna; nuuni ittuu ittuwaanna siik'ettooppe
1John4:13 S'oossay bare Ayaanaa nuw immeedda diraw
1John4:14 S'oossaa Aawuu bare Na'aa ha alamiyaa ashshiyaawaa gidanaw kiitteeddawaa nuuni be'iide markkatteetto.
1John4:15 Yesuusi S'oossaa Na'aa gidiyaawaa markkattiyaa O gidduwaaninne S'oossay de'ee; ikka S'oossaa giddon de'ee.
1John4:16 S'oossay nuuna siik'iyaawaa nuuni nu huup'ew ereettonne ammaneetto. S'oossay siik'uwaa. Siik'uwaan de'iyaa ooninne S'oossaa giddon de'ee; S'oossaykka Aa giddon de'ee.
1John4:17 Nu de'uu ha alamiyaan Kiristtoosi de'eeddawaa mala gidiyaa diraw
1John4:18 Siik'uwaan yashshi baawa; gaasuukka tumu siik'uu yashshaa kessi olee. Yashshaynne muray ittippe biyaa diraw
1John4:19 S'oossay koyro nuuna siik'eedda diraw
1John4:20 Ooninne
1John4:21 K'ay Kiristtoosi nuw immeedda azazuu hawaa; S'oossaa siik'iyaa uray bare ishaakka siik'anaw bessee.

1John5:2 Nuuni S'oossaa siik'iyaawaaninne Aa azazuwaa naagiyaawaan
1John5:3 Ayaw gooppe
1John5:4 Ayaw gooppe
1John5:5 Ha alamiyaa s'oonanaw danddayiyaawe oonee? Yesuusi S'oossaa Na'aa gidiyaawaa ammaniyaawaa s'alalay s'oonana.
1John5:6 S'ink'k'ataa haatsaannanne hayk'uwaa suutsaanna yeeddawe hawaa; ikka Yesuusi Kiristtoosa; haatsaannanne suutsaanna I yeeddawaappe attin
1John5:7 Ayaw gooppe
1John5:8 Hewanttu
1John5:9 Nuuni Asay markkattiyaawaa ammanooppe
1John5:10 S'oossaa Na'aa ammaniyaa uraa wozanaan ha markkatetsay de'ee. S'oossaa ammanenna uray ooninne S'oossay bare Na'aw markkatteedda markkatetsaa ammanibeenna diraw
1John5:11 Simmi markkatetsay hawaa; S'oossay nuw med'inaa de'uwaa immeedda; hewekka Aa Na'aan de'ee.
1John5:12 S'oossaa Na'ay de'iyaa oossinne de'uu de'ee; S'oossaa Na'ay baynna oossinne de'uu baawa.
1John5:13 S'oossaa Na'aa suntsan ammaniyaa hinttenttoo med'inaa de'uu de'iyaawaa hintte erana mala
1John5:14 S'oossay koyyiyaawaadan
1John5:15 Nuuni woossiyaa ubbaan I sisiyaawaa erooppe
1John5:16 Ooninne hayk'uu bessena nagaraa bare ishay ootsishshin be'ooppe
1John5:17 Bayizzo oosuu ubbay nagaraa; shin hayk'uu bessena nagaray de'ee.
1John5:18 S'oossaa naanay ooninne nagaraa ubbaa wode ootsennawaa nuuni ereetto. Ayaw gooppe
1John5:19 Nuuni S'oossawantta gidiyaawaanne ha alamii ubbay s'alahiyaa kaappuwaan moodetteeddawe ereetto.
1John5:20 Nuuni tumu S'oossaa eranaadan

Revelation1:1 Elleelli hananaw bessiyaawaa bare oosanchchatuwaa bessana mala
Revelation1:2 Yohaannisi beiide tumatetsaan odeedda ubbabay
Revelation1:3 Ha mas'aafaa nabbabiyaa uray anjjetteeddawaa; k'ay ha timbbitiyaa mas'aafaa sisiyaawanttunne ha mas'aafan s'aafetteeddawaa naagiyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta; ayaw gooppe
Revelation1:4 Taani Yohaannisi
Revelation1:5 K'ay ammanetteeda markkaa
Revelation1:6 Nuuna bare S'oossawunne Aawoo ootsana mala
Revelation1:7 Be'ite
Revelation1:8 Kase de'iyaawe
Revelation1:9 Taani Yohaannisi
Revelation1:10 Godaa gallassan taani Ayyaanan de'ay; taani taappe guyyenna malakataa waasuwaa mala wolk'k'aama kooshshaa sisaad.
Revelation1:11 He kooshshay taana
Revelation1:12 Taani taw odiyaa kooshshaa be'anaw guyye simmaaddi; s'omppiyaa wotsiyaa laappu work'k'aa ballatuwaa be'aaddi.
Revelation1:13 He ballatuwaa giddon Asaa Na'aa malatiyaawaa be'aaddi; adussa afilaa bare gediyaa gatsi mayyiide
Revelation1:14 Aa huup'iinne Aa huup'iyaa binnaanay bootsa dorssaa isikiyaanne hewaappekka aad'd'iide shachchaa malatee; Aa ayfiikka tamaa lac'uwaa malatee.
Revelation1:15 Aa gediikka c'ooc'iyaa tamaan teeriide p'ooliyaa nahaasiyaa giyaa birataa malatee; Aa kooshshaykka wolk'k'aama shaafaa guntsaa mala.
Revelation1:16 I bare ushechcha kushiyan laappu s'oolinttatuwaa oyk'k'eedda. Aa doonaappe laau baggana k'aaretteedda mashshay keseedda. Aa deemuukka loytsi poo'iyaa awayfiyaa malatee.
Revelation1:17 Taani Aa be'eedda wode hayk'k'eeddawaadan hanaade
Revelation1:18 Taani de'uwaan de'iyaawaa. Taani hayk'k'aaddi; shin be'a
Revelation1:19 Simmi neeni be'eeddabaanne hai de'iyaawaa
Revelation1:20 Neeni ta ushechcha kushiyan be'eedda laappu s'oolinttatuwaa biletsaynne k'ay s'omppatuwaa wotsiyaa laappu work'k'aa ballatuwaa biletsay hawaa; laappu s'oolinttatuu laappu Woosa Golletuwaa kiitanchchatuwaa; woosa golliyaa laappu work'k'aa ballatuu laappu woosa golliyaa.»
Revelation2:1 Efesoonen de'iyaa woosa golle kiitanchchaw hawaadan yaagaade s'aafa: «Bare ushechcha kushiyan laappu s'oolinttiyaa oyk'k'eeddawe
Revelation2:2 Taani ne kiitaa
Revelation2:3 Neeni genc'c'aadda; k'ay ta suntsaa dirawukka metuwaa danddayaadda; daaburabeykka.
Revelation2:4 Shin taani neena kad'iyaabay de'ee; ayaw gooppe
Revelation2:5 Simmi neeni hak'appe kunddaaddintto akeeka. Ne nagaraappe simma; neeni kase ootsiyaa oosuwaa ootsa. Hewe d'ayooppe
Revelation2:6 Shin ittibaa loytsaadda; Niik'oolaawatuwaa oosuwaa
Revelation2:7 «Sisanaw haytsay de'iyaa uray Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa golletoo giyaawaa siso; Taani s'ooniyaa uraw S'oossaa gennetiyaan mokkiyaa de'uwaa mitsaa ayfiyaa maanaw immana yaagee» yaagaade s'aafa.
Revelation2:8 Samirineesan de'iyaa woosa golle kiitanchchaw hawaadan yaagaade s'aafa: «Hayk'k'eeddawe
Revelation2:9 Taani ne waayiyaanne ne hiyyeesatetsaa eray; shin neeni dure. Ayihuda gidennaan de'iidde barentta
Revelation2:10 Neeni waayettana waayyew yayyoppa. Be'a
Revelation2:11 «Haytsay de'iyaa uray Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa golletoo giyaawaa siso! «S'ooniyaa uray laa'entsuwaa hayk'uwaan k'ohettenna yaagee» yaagaade s'aafa.
Revelation2:12 P'erggaamoonan de'iyaa woosa golle kiitanchchaw hawaadan yaagaade s'aafa: «Laau baggana leefetteedda mashshay de'iyaawe hawaadan yaagee.
Revelation2:13 ‹Taani neeni de'iyaa sa'aa eray. Neeni Sees'aanaa kawutetsaa oydii de'iyaa sa'aan de'aassa; ta suntsaa minisa naagaasa. Haray atto
Revelation2:14 Shin taani neena boriyaa guutsabay de'ee; Israa'eeliyaa Asay eek'aw yarshsheedda k'umaa maanaadaaninne woshummanaadan unttuntta nagaraa oosisseedda Baalaak'a tamaarisseedda Balaama timirttiyaa tamaariyaa amareeda asatuu neenanna de'iino.
Revelation2:15 Hewaadankka
Revelation2:16 Hewaa diraw

Revelation2:19 Taani ne oosuwaa
Revelation2:20 Shin taani neena kad'iyaabay de'ee; barena
Revelation2:21 Iza bare nagaraappe simmana mala

Revelation3:2 Beegotta! Atteeddawaanne hayk'k'anaw mateeddawaa mentsetsa. Ayaw gooppe
Revelation3:3 Simmi neeni akkeeddawaanne siseeddawaa akeeka; naaga; ne nagaraappekka simma. Neeni beegottenawaa gidooppe
Revelation3:4 Shin barenttu mayuwaa k'itissibeenna amareeda asatuu Sarddeesan neenanna de'iino. Unttunttu bootsa mayuwaa mayyiide taananna hamettana; ayaw gooppe
Revelation3:5 S'ooniyaawe hewaaddankka bootsa mayuwaa mayyana. Taani Aa suntsaa de'uwaa mas'aafaappe k'uc'c'ikke; taani ta Aabbu sintsaaninne Aa kiitanchchatuwaa sintsan I tawaa gidiyaawaa markkattana.
Revelation3:6 «Sisanaw haytsay de'iyaa uray Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa golletoo giyaawaa siso yaagee» yaagaade s'aafa.

Revelation3:8 Taani ne kiitaa eray. Be'a
Revelation3:9 Be'a

Revelation3:11 Taani ellekka yaana; ooninne ne kalachchaa akkena mala

Revelation3:13 Sisanaw haytsay de'iyaa uray Geeshsha Ayyaanay woosa golletoo giyaawaa siso yaagee» yaagaade s'aafa.
Revelation3:14 Lodook'iyaan de'iyaa woosa golliyaa kiitanchchaw hawaadan yaagaade s'aafa: «Ammanetteeda tumanchcha markkay
Revelation3:15 Taani ne kiitaa eray. Neeni irs's'a gidakka; woy seelliyaawaa gidakka; irs's'a woy seelliyaawaa gidaarikkii.

Revelation4:8 Oyddu de'uwaan de'iyaa med'etatoo huup'iyaan huup'iyaan usuppun k'efii de'ee; unttunttoo bollan garssankka ubba saan ayfii kumeedda. Unttunttu k'ammanne gallassi

Revelation4:10 laatamanne oyddu c'imatuu kawutetsaa oydiyaan utteedda med'i med'inaw de'iyaawaa sintsan guufanniide

Revelation8:1 Dorssay laappuntsa maatafaa dooyyeedda wode
Revelation8:2 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation8:3 Is'aanaa c'uwayiyaa work'k'aa miishshaa oyk'k'eedda hara kiitanchchay yiide
Revelation8:4 Is'aanaa c'uway geeshshatuwaa woosaanna ittippe he kiitanchchaa kushiyaappe pude S'oossaakko beedda.
Revelation8:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation8:6 K'ay laappu malakataa oyk'k'iide laappu kiitanchchatuu malakataa punnanaw giigeeddino.
Revelation8:7 Koyro kiitanchchay bare malakataa punnina suutsaanna walaketteedda shachchaynne tamay sa'aan bukkeedda. Sa'aappe heezzentso kushii guudetteedda; mitsaappekka heezzentso kushii guudetteedda; maataa ubbaykka guudetteedda.
Revelation8:8 Laaentso kiitanchchaykka bare malakataa punneedda. Wolk'k'aama deriyaa malatiyaabay taman ees's'iidde
Revelation8:9 Abbaan de'uwaan de'iyaa med'etatuwaa heezzentso kushii hayk'k'eedda; markkabetuwaappekka heezzentso kushii d'ayeedda.
Revelation8:10 Heezzentso kiitanchchay bare malakataa punnina shaafaappenne pulttuwaa haatsaappe heezzentso kushiyaa bolla saluwaappe s'omppiyaadan ees's'iyaa wolk'k'aama s'oolinttii wod'd'eedda.
Revelation8:11 He s'oolinttiyaa suntsay C'amuwaa geetettee. Haatsaappe heezzentso kushii c'ammeedda; k'ay haatsay c'ammeedda diraw
Revelation8:12 Oyddentso kiitanchchay bare malakataa punneedda. Awaappe
Revelation8:13 Itti arggantsay saluwaan paalliyaawaa taani be'aaddi. He arggantsay bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide
Revelation9:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation9:2 S'oolinttii c'iimmo ollaa dooyyeedda; aako c'ooc'iyaappe kesiyaa c'uwaa mala c'uway he c'iimmo ollaappe kesseedda. K'ay awaynne sa'ay he c'iimmo ollaappe keseedda c'uwaan d'umeeddino.
Revelation9:3 C'uwaappe boolii duge sa'aa yeedda. Sa'aan de'iyaa soggatoo de'iyaa wolk'k'aa mala wolk'k'ay boolewukka imetteedda.
Revelation9:4 S'oossaa maatafay deemuwaan baynna asaa s'alalaa k'ohanaappe attin
Revelation9:5 Boolii he asaa ichcheshu agenaa gidiyaawaa pas'a kaa'ana mala
Revelation9:6 He gallassatuwaan Asay hayk'uwaa koyyana; shin demmenna. K'ay hayk'k'anawukka amottana; shin hayk'uu asaappe bak'atana.
Revelation9:7 Boolii olaw giigi utteedda paraa malatee. Booliyaa huup'iyaan work'k'aa malatiyaa kalachchay de'ee; Aa deemuukka asaa deemuwaa malatee.
Revelation9:8 Aa binnaanaykka mac'c'a asaa binnaanaydaa aduk'k'ee; Aa achchaykka gaammuwaa achchaa malatee.
Revelation9:9 Aa tiray birataan ootseedda gonddalliyaa malatiyaawaan goozetti utteedda; k'ay Aa k'efiyaa kooshshay olaa baanaw piriis'iyaa paratuu goochchiyaa gaariyaa kooshshaa mala.
Revelation9:10 Aw sogguwaa dufiyaa malatiyaa dufii de'ee; Aa dufiyaan dukkiyaabay de'ee. He dufiyaan ichcheshu agenaa gidiyaawaa asaa k'ohanaadan
Revelation9:11 Aa mooddiyaa kaatii de'ee. He kaatii c'iimmo ollaa kiitanchchaa. Aa suntsaykka Ibraayiss's'e k'aalaan Abddoona; k'ay Giriike k'aalaan Ap'oliyoona geetettee. Ap'oliyoona giyaawoo biletsay
Revelation9:12 Koyro aayyeero giyaawe aad'd'eedda; be'a
Revelation9:13 Usuppuntsa kiitanchchay bare malakataa punneedda. S'oossaa sintsan ek'k'eedda work'k'aappe med'd'eedda yarshshiyaasaan de'iyaa oyddu gas'aa kac'etuwaappe itti kooshshaa sisaad.
Revelation9:14 He kooshshay malakatay de'iyaa usuppuntsa kiitanchchaa
Revelation9:15 Asaa zariyaappe heezzentso kushiyaa wod'anaw
Revelation9:16 Olaa paraa toggiyaa asaa payduu laau s'eetu miiloone gidiyaawaa taani sisaad.
Revelation9:17 K'aykka taani sas'aan paratuwaanne he paratuwaa toggeedda asaa be'aaddi. Asaw tiraan wotsiyaa birataa gonddalliyaa malay de'ee. He tiraan wotsiyaa birataa gonddalliyaa malay tamaadan zo'o; samaayiyaa; k'ay ees's'iyaa diiniyaa mala. Paratuwaa huup'ii gaammuwaa huup'iyaa mala. Unttunttu doonaappe tamay
Revelation9:18 Paratuwaa doonaappe keseedda taman
Revelation9:19 Ayaw gooppe

Revelation11:4 He laau markkatuu ha sa'aa Godaa sintsan ek'k'iyaa s'omppiyaa wotsiyaa laau ballatuwaa.

Revelation13:13 He laa'entso do'ay wolk'k'aama malaatatuwaa ootseedda; haray atto tamaa saluwaappe asaa ubbaa sintsa sa'aa wotsana gakkanaw malaatatuwaa ootseedda.

Revelation17:3 He kiitanchchay taana Ayyaanan bazzuwaa afeedda. Hewan taani itti mishiratto boriyaa suntsay bollaa ubbaan s'aafetti utteedda zo'o do'aa toggeeddawunno be'aaddi; he do'aw laappu huup'iyaan tammu kac'ii de'ee.

Revelation17:11 Kase de'eedda do'ay
Revelation17:12 «Neeni be'eedda tammu kac'etuu mooddanaw doommibeenna tammu kaatetuwaa. Shin unttunttu do'aana ittippe itti saatew kaatetuwaadan mooddanaw unttunttoo maatay imettana.

Revelation17:16 K'ay neeni be'eedda tammu kac'iinne do'ay woshummewunno is's'anawantta. Unttunttu iziw de'iyaa ubbabaa akki diggana. K'ay izo kallo ashshananne izi ashuwaa mi diggana; yaatiide unttunttu izo taman guuddana.

Revelation19:10 Hewaappe guyye taani aw goyinnanaw Aa gediyaan kunddaad. Shin I taana
Revelation19:11 Yaatina
Revelation19:12 Aa ayfii tamaa lac'uwaa malatee; k'ay I bare huup'iyaan daro kalachchaa wotseedda. Aa bolla s'aafetti utteedda suntsay de'ee; shin he suntsay ayenttonne aappe attin
Revelation19:13 I mayyeedda mayuu suutsan naak'k'i kesseeddawaa. Aa suntsaykka S'oossaa K'aalaa.
Revelation19:14 Saluwaa wotaadaratuu bootsa geeshsha suufiyaa geetettiyaa kiriyaan dadetteedda mayuwaa mayyiide
Revelation19:15 Asaa zeretsaa I d'ayissiyaa kuussa mashshay Aa doonaappe kesee. Birataa s'amaan asaa I mooddana. Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama S'oossay bare hank'k'uwaa woyniyaa eessay gumiettiyaasan
Revelation19:16 Aa mayuwaa bollanne Aa wodiriyaa bolla
Revelation19:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation19:18 Yiide kaatatuwaa ashuwaa
Revelation19:19 Paraa toggeeddawaannanne Aa wotaadaratuwaanna olettanaw
Revelation19:20 He do'ay Aa sintsaan malaataa ootseedda worddo nabiyaanna ittippe oyk'etteedda. Do'aa mallay de'iyaawanttanne do'aa misilew goyinneeddawaantta I baletseeddawe he ootsiyaa malaatatuwaana. Do'aynne wordduwaa timbbitiyaa odiyaawe laaatuukka diiniyaan ees's'iyaa tamaa abbaan pas'a yegetteeddino.
Revelation19:21 Unttunttu wotaadaratuu paraa toggeeddaawaa doonaappe kesiyaa mashshaan hayk'k'eeddino. Kafatuu ubbatuu unttunttu ashuwaappe barenttoo danddayeeddawaa keenaa meeddino.
Revelation20:1 C'iimmo ollaa k'ulppiyaanne wolk'k'aama santsalataa bare kushiyan oyk'k'eedda itti kiitanchchay saluwaappe yiyaawaa taani be'aaddi.
Revelation20:2 Kiitanchchay dawiyaa
Revelation20:3 Kiitanchchay c'iimmo ollaan Aa yeggiide
Revelation20:4 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation20:5 Hayk'k'eeddawanttuppe c'oratuu shaa laytsay wurana gakkanaw
Revelation20:6 Koyro dendduwaan denddeeddawanttu anjjetteeddawanttanne S'oossaa asatuwaa. Unttunttu bolla laa'entso hayk'oo wolk'k'ay baawa. Unttunttu S'oossawunne Kiristtoosaw k'eesatuwaa gidana; unttunttu aanana ittippe shaa laytsaw mooddana.
Revelation20:7 Shaa laytsay wureeddawaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation20:8 I Sa'aan ubba saan de'iyaa asaa zeretsaa baletsanaw kessana; hewe Googanne Maagooga geetettiyaawaa. Sees'aanay abbaa shafiyaa keena zeretsaa olaw shiishshana.
Revelation20:9 He zaratuu biittaa ubbaa mayyiide geeshshatuwaa heeraanne S'oossay siik'iyaa katamato yuuyyi aad'd'i ek'k'eeddino. Shin tamay saluwaappe wod'd'iide
Revelation20:10 Do'aynne worddo nabii yegetteedda ees's'iyaa diiniyaa tamaa abbaan s'alahiyaa kaappuu
Revelation20:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation20:12 Hayk'k'eeddawanttu
Revelation20:13 Abbay bare giddon de'iyaa hayk'k'eeddawantta immeedda; hayk'uunne Si'oolii barenttu giddon de'iyaa hayk'k'eeddawantta immeeddino. Ubbaykka barenttu oosuwaadan pirddetteeddino.
Revelation20:14 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation20:15 De'uwaa mas'aafan bare suntsay s'aafettibeenna Asay ooninne tamaa abban yegetteedda.
Revelation21:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation21:2 Geeshsha katamata ooratsa Yerusaalame
Revelation21:3 Wolk'k'aama kooshshay araataappe hawaadan yaagiidde
Revelation21:4 S'oossay unttunttu ayfiyaa afotsa ubbaa k'uc'c'ana. Hawaappe sintsanaw hayk'uunne kayyuu woy waasuunne sakuu baawa. Ayaw gooppe
Revelation21:5 Araatan utteeddawe
Revelation21:6 K'aykka taana hawaadan yaageedda; «Poletteedda. Taani Alfaanne Omeegaa; Doometsaanne Poluwaa. Saametteedda oonanne Taani de'uwaa haatsaa pulttuwaappe c'oo ushshana.
Revelation21:7 S'ooniyaa uray ooninne hawaa ubbaa laattana. Taani aw S'oossaa gidana; ikka ta na'aa gidana.
Revelation21:8 Shin yayyiyaawanttu
Revelation21:9 Laappu wurssetsa boshatuu kumeedda laappu keretuwaa oyk'k'eedda laappu kiitanchchatuwaappe ittuu taakko yiide taana
Revelation21:10 Kiitanchchay taana daro d'ok'k'a deriyaa huup'iyaa Ayyaanan kessiide geeshsha katamata
Revelation21:11 He katamata S'oossaa bonchchuwaan poo'aw. He katamati poo'uu yasp'p'iidiyaa geetettiyaa alo shuchchaa mala; birilliiyaadan p'oolaw.
Revelation21:12 He katamatiw tammanne laau penggetuunne he penggetuwaan tammanne laau kiitanchchatuu naagiyaa wolk'k'aama adussa dirssay de'ee. Penggetuwaan tammanne laau Israa'eeliyaa zaratuwaa suntsay s'aafetti utteedda.
Revelation21:13 Away doliyaa baggana heezzu penggetuu de'iino. K'ay hirkki baggana heezzu penggetuunne huup'issa baggana heezzu penggetuu de'iino. Away wulliyaa baggaanakka heezzu penggetuu de'iino.
Revelation21:14 Katamati dirssay Dorssay kiitteedda tammanne laaatuwaa suntsay s'aafetteedda tammanne laau shuchchatuwaa bolla gimbbetteedda.
Revelation21:15 Taananna haasayeedda kiitanchchaw katamato
Revelation21:16 Katamatiw oyddu gas'ay de'ee; katamati geesaynne gomppay itti mala. Kiitanchchay katamato bare gatiman likkeedda. Katamata laau shaanne laau s'eetu kiilo miitiriyaa gidaaddu; katamati geesay
Revelation21:17 Kiitanchchay k'ay dirssaakka likkeedda. Asaa kushiyan itti s'eetanne oytamanne oyddu wad'aa gideedda. Hewe ooninne likkiyaa ogiyaan kiitanchchay likkinaada.
Revelation21:18 Katamati dirssay yasp'p'iidiyaa geetettiyaa shuchchaan diretteedda. Katamata birilliiyaadan p'ooliyaa geeshsha work'k'aan med'ettaaddu.
Revelation21:19 Katamati dirssaw hiis'etteedda shuchchay bonchchetteedda shuchchaa ubbaan alleek'k'etteedda; koyro hiis'etteedda shuchchay yasp'p'iidiyaa; laa'entsuu samppeeriyaa; heezzentsuu kelk'k'edooniyaa; oyddentsuu baluuriyaa;
Revelation21:20 ichcheshentsuu sarddonkkisa; usuppuntsuu sarddiyoona; laappuntsuu kiristtilooba; hosppuntsuu biralli; udduppuntsuu toop'aaziyooniyaa; tammuntsuu kirisp'p'iraasiisa; tammanne ittentsuu yaakinttiyaa; tammanne laa'entsuu ametess's'inoosiyaa.
Revelation21:21 Tammanne laau penggetuu tammanne laau ink'k'uwaa geetettiyaa alo shuchchaa; itti itti penggii itti ink'k'uwaan oosetteedda. Katamati ogii birilliyaa mala geeshsha work'k'aa.
Revelation21:22 Goday
Revelation21:23 Katamatiw poo'iyaa away woy agenay koshshenna. Ayaw gooppe
Revelation21:24 Asaa zeretsay katamati poo'uwaan hamettana. Sa'aa katatuukka barenttu bonchchuwaa he katamattikko ahana.
Revelation21:25 Katamati penggetuu ubbaa gallassikka dooyaa de'ana; ubbakka gorddettikkino. Ayaw gooppe
Revelation21:26 Asaa zeretsaa gitatetsaynne bonchchuu he katamattikko shiik'ana.
Revelation21:27 Shin tunabay woy kawushshabaa ootsiyaawe
Revelation22:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation22:2 He shaafay katamaa ogiyaa gidduwaanna duge goggee. Shaafaappe hefintsa baggannanne hafintsa baggana agenaan itti gedenne laytsan tammanne laau gede ayfiyaa de'uwaa mitsay de'ee. He mitsaa bonchchuu de'iyaawe
Revelation22:3 He katamaan S'oossaa shek'ay ayinne baawa. S'oossaa kawutetsaa oydiinne Dorssaa kawutetsaa oydii he katamaan de'ana. S'oossaa oosanchchatuu S'oossaw goyinnana.
Revelation22:4 Unttunttu Aa deemuwaa be'ana; Aa suntsay unttunttu deemuwaan s'aafettana.
Revelation22:5 Hewaappe sintsaw hara k'ammay baawa. Unttunttoo s'omppiyaa woy aawaa poo'uwaa koshshenna; ayaw gooppe
Revelation22:6 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation22:7 Yesuusi
Revelation22:8 Taani Yohaannisi
Revelation22:9 Shin kiitanchchay taana
Revelation22:10 Hewaappe guyyiyaan
Revelation22:11 Iitabaa ootsiyaawe gujjiidekka iitabaa ootso; tunay gujjiidekka tuno. Loobaa ootsiyaawe gujjiidekka loobaa ootso; geeshshaynne gujjiidekka geeshsha gido» yaageedda.
Revelation22:12 Yesuusi
Revelation22:13 Taani Alfaanne Omeegaa; Koyruwaanne Wurssetsaa; Doometsaanne Poluwaa» yaageedda.
Revelation22:14 Barenttu mayuwaa geeshshi meec'c'iyaawanttu anjjetteeddawantta. De'uwaa mitsaa ayfiyaa maanawunne katamaa penggiyaanna gelanaw unttunttoo maatay imetteedda.
Revelation22:15 Shin kanatuu
Revelation22:16 «Taani Yesuusi
Revelation22:17 Geeshsha Ayyaanaynne gelewunna
Revelation22:18 Taani ha mas'aafan s'aafetteedda hanana geedda k'aalaa sisiyaa oonanne zoray. Ooninne ha k'aalaa bolla ittibaa gujjooppe
Revelation22:19 Ooninne mas'aafan de'iyaa timbbitiyaa k'aalaappe ayaanne pac'issooppe
Revelation22:20 Ha ubbabaw markkattiyaawe
